verses.tr: And the disbeliever says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive
verses.tl: Wayaqoolu alinsanu aitha ma mittu lasawfa okhraju hayyan

verses.ar: أَوَلَا يَذۡكُرُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن قَبۡلُ وَلَمۡ يَكُ شَيۡـٔٗا
verses.tr: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing
verses.tl: Awala yathkuru alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min qablu walam yaku shayan

verses.ar: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحۡشُرَنَّهُمۡ وَٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحۡضِرَنَّهُمۡ حَوۡلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيّٗا
verses.tr: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees
verses.tl: Fawarabbika lanahshurannahum waalshshayateena thumma lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jithiyyan

verses.ar: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمۡ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عِتِيّٗا
verses.tr: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence
verses.tl: Thumma lananziAAanna min kulli sheeAAatin ayyuhum ashaddu AAala alrrahmani AAitiyyan

verses.ar: ثُمَّ لَنَحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ أَوۡلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيّٗا
verses.tr: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein
verses.tl: Thumma lanahnu aAAlamu biallatheena hum awla biha siliyyan

verses.ar: وَإِن مِّنكُمۡ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَاۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتۡمٗا مَّقۡضِيّٗا
verses.tr: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed
verses.tl: Wain minkum illa wariduha kana AAala rabbika hatman maqdiyyan

verses.ar: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَواْ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيّٗا
verses.tr: Then We will save those who feared Allah and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees
verses.tl: Thumma nunajjee allatheena ittaqaw wanatharu alththalimeena feeha jithiyyan

verses.ar: وَإِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتٖ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَيُّ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ خَيۡرٞ مَّقَامٗا وَأَحۡسَنُ نَدِيّٗا
verses.tr: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Which of [our] two parties is best in position and best in association
verses.tl: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo ayyu alfareeqayni khayrun maqaman waahsanu nadiyyan

verses.ar: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ أَثَٰثٗا وَرِءۡيٗا
verses.tr: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance
verses.tl: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ahsanu athathan wariyan

verses.ar: قُلۡ مَن كَانَ فِي ٱلضَّلَٰلَةِ فَلۡيَمۡدُدۡ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ مَدًّاۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوۡاْ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلۡعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ هُوَ شَرّٞ مَّكَانٗا وَأَضۡعَفُ جُندٗا
verses.tr: Say, "Whoever is in error - let the Most Merciful extend for him an extension [in wealth and time] until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment [in this world] or the Hour [of resurrection] - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers
verses.tl: Qul man kana fee alddalalati falyamdud lahu alrrahmanu maddan hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona imma alAAathaba waimma alssaAAata fasayaAAlamoona man huwa sharrun makanan waadAAafu jundan

verses.ar: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهۡتَدَوۡاْ هُدٗىۗ وَٱلۡبَٰقِيَٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتُ خَيۡرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابٗا وَخَيۡرٞ مَّرَدًّا
verses.tr: And Allah increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse
verses.tl: Wayazeedu Allahu allatheena ihtadaw hudan waalbaqiyatu alssalihatu khayrun AAinda rabbika thawaban wakhayrun maraddan

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِي كَفَرَ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالٗا وَوَلَدًا
verses.tr: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]
verses.tl: Afaraayta allathee kafara biayatina waqala laootayanna malan wawaladan

verses.ar: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلۡغَيۡبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدٗا
verses.tr: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise
verses.tl: AttalaAAa alghayba ami ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan

verses.ar: كَلَّاۚ سَنَكۡتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ مَدّٗا
verses.tr: No! We will record what he says and extend for him from the punishment extensively
verses.tl: Kalla sanaktubu ma yaqoolu wanamuddu lahu mina alAAathabi maddan

verses.ar: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأۡتِينَا فَرۡدٗا
verses.tr: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone
verses.tl: Wanarithuhu ma yaqoolu wayateena fardan

verses.ar: وَٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةٗ لِّيَكُونُواْ لَهُمۡ عِزّٗا
verses.tr: And they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor
verses.tl: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan liyakoonoo lahum AAizzan

verses.ar: كَلَّاۚ سَيَكۡفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضِدًّا
verses.tr: No! Those "gods" will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement]
verses.tl: Kalla sayakfuroona biAAibadatihim wayakoonoona AAalayhim diddan

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمۡ أَزّٗا
verses.tr: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them to [evil] with [constant] incitement
verses.tl: Alam tara anna arsalna alshshayateena AAala alkafireena taozzuhum azzan

verses.ar: فَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمۡ عَدّٗا
verses.tr: So be not impatient over them. We only count out to them a [limited] number
verses.tl: Fala taAAjal AAalayhim innama naAAuddu lahum AAaddan

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ وَفۡدٗا
verses.tr: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful as a delegation
verses.tl: Yawma nahshuru almuttaqeena ila alrrahmani wafdan

verses.ar: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرۡدٗا
verses.tr: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst
verses.tl: Wanasooqu almujrimeena ila jahannama wirdan

verses.ar: لَّا يَمۡلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدٗا
verses.tr: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant
verses.tl: La yamlikoona alshshafaAAata illa mani ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَلَدٗا
verses.tr: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son
verses.tl: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan

verses.ar: لَّقَدۡ جِئۡتُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا إِدّٗا
verses.tr: You have done an atrocious thing
verses.tl: Laqad jitum shayan iddan

verses.ar: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِنۡهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلۡجِبَالُ هَدًّا
verses.tr: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation
verses.tl: Takadu alssamawatu yatafattarna minhu watanshaqqu alardu watakhirru aljibalu haddan

verses.ar: أَن دَعَوۡاْ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ وَلَدٗا
verses.tr: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son
verses.tl: An daAAaw lilrrahmani waladan

verses.ar: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
verses.tr: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son
verses.tl: Wama yanbaghee lilrrahmani an yattakhitha waladan

verses.ar: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِي ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَبۡدٗا
verses.tr: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant
verses.tl: In kullu man fee alssamawati waalardi illa atee alrrahmani AAabdan

verses.ar: لَّقَدۡ أَحۡصَىٰهُمۡ وَعَدَّهُمۡ عَدّٗا
verses.tr: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting
verses.tl: Laqad ahsahum waAAaddahum AAaddan

verses.ar: وَكُلُّهُمۡ ءَاتِيهِ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ فَرۡدًا
verses.tr: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone
verses.tl: Wakulluhum ateehi yawma alqiyamati fardan

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ سَيَجۡعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وُدّٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection
verses.tl: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati sayajAAalu lahumu alrrahmanu wuddan

verses.ar: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرۡنَٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوۡمٗا لُّدّٗا
verses.tr: So, [O Muhammad], We have only made Qur'an easy in the Arabic language that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people
verses.tl: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika litubashshira bihi almuttaqeena watunthira bihi qawman luddan

verses.ar: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هَلۡ تُحِسُّ مِنۡهُم مِّنۡ أَحَدٍ أَوۡ تَسۡمَعُ لَهُمۡ رِكۡزَۢا
verses.tr: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound
verses.tl: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hal tuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasmaAAu lahum rikzan

verses.ar: طه
verses.tr: Ta, Ha
verses.tl: Taha

verses.ar: مَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِتَشۡقَىٰٓ
verses.tr: We have not sent down to you the Qur'an that you be distressed
verses.tl: Ma anzalna AAalayka alqurana litashqa

verses.ar: إِلَّا تَذۡكِرَةٗ لِّمَن يَخۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: But only as a reminder for those who fear [Allah]
verses.tl: Illa tathkiratan liman yakhsha

verses.ar: تَنزِيلٗا مِّمَّنۡ خَلَقَ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ ٱلۡعُلَى
verses.tr: A revelation from He who created the earth and highest heavens
verses.tl: Tanzeelan mimman khalaqa alarda waalssamawati alAAula

verses.ar: ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ عَلَى ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱسۡتَوَىٰ
verses.tr: The Most Merciful [who is] above the Throne established
verses.tl: Alrrahmanu AAala alAAarshi istawa

verses.ar: لَهُۥ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحۡتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
verses.tr: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil
verses.tl: Lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi wama baynahuma wama tahta alththara

verses.ar: وَإِن تَجۡهَرۡ بِٱلۡقَوۡلِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَعۡلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ وَأَخۡفَى
verses.tr: And if you speak aloud - then indeed, He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden
verses.tl: Wain tajhar bialqawli fainnahu yaAAlamu alssirra waakhfa

verses.ar: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ لَهُ ٱلۡأَسۡمَآءُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: Allah - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names
verses.tl: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa lahu alasmao alhusna

verses.ar: وَهَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And has the story of Moses reached you
verses.tl: Wahal ataka hadeethu moosa

verses.ar: إِذۡ رَءَا نَارٗا فَقَالَ لِأَهۡلِهِ ٱمۡكُثُوٓاْ إِنِّيٓ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا لَّعَلِّيٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوۡ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدٗى
verses.tr: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance
verses.tl: Ith raa naran faqala liahlihi omkuthoo innee anastu naran laAAallee ateekum minha biqabasin aw ajidu AAala alnnari hudan

verses.ar: فَلَمَّآ أَتَىٰهَا نُودِيَ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And when he came to it, he was called, "O Moses
verses.tl: Falamma ataha noodiya ya moosa

verses.ar: إِنِّيٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخۡلَعۡ نَعۡلَيۡكَ إِنَّكَ بِٱلۡوَادِ ٱلۡمُقَدَّسِ طُوٗى
verses.tr: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the sacred valley of Tuwa
verses.tl: Innee ana rabbuka faikhlaAA naAAlayka innaka bialwadi almuqaddasi tuwan

verses.ar: وَأَنَا ٱخۡتَرۡتُكَ فَٱسۡتَمِعۡ لِمَا يُوحَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And I have chosen you, so listen to what is revealed [to you]
verses.tl: Waana ikhtartuka faistamiAA lima yooha

verses.ar: إِنَّنِيٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعۡبُدۡنِي وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكۡرِيٓ
verses.tr: Indeed, I am Allah. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance
verses.tl: Innanee ana Allahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudnee waaqimi alssalata lithikree

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخۡفِيهَا لِتُجۡزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا تَسۡعَىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives
verses.tl: Inna alssaAAata atiyatun akadu okhfeeha litujza kullu nafsin bima tasAAa

verses.ar: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنۡهَا مَن لَّا يُؤۡمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرۡدَىٰ
verses.tr: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish
verses.tl: Fala yasuddannaka AAanha man la yuminu biha waittabaAAa hawahu fatarda

verses.ar: وَمَا تِلۡكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: And what is that in your right hand, O Moses
verses.tl: Wama tilka biyameenika ya moosa

verses.ar: قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ أَتَوَكَّؤُاْ عَلَيۡهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِي وَلِيَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses
verses.tl: Qala hiya AAasaya atawakkao AAalayha waahushshu biha AAala ghanamee waliya feeha maaribu okhra

verses.ar: قَالَ أَلۡقِهَا يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "Throw it down, O Moses
verses.tl: Qala alqiha ya moosa

verses.ar: فَأَلۡقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِيَ حَيَّةٞ تَسۡعَىٰ
verses.tr: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly
verses.tl: Faalqaha faitha hiya hayyatun tasAAa

verses.ar: قَالَ خُذۡهَا وَلَا تَخَفۡۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition
verses.tl: Qala khuthha wala takhaf sanuAAeeduha seerataha aloola

verses.ar: وَٱضۡمُمۡ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخۡرُجۡ بَيۡضَآءَ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: And draw in your hand to your side; it will come out white without disease - another sign
verses.tl: Waodmum yadaka ila janahika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin ayatan okhra

verses.ar: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنۡ ءَايَٰتِنَا ٱلۡكُبۡرَى
verses.tr: That We may show you [some] of Our greater signs
verses.tl: Linuriyaka min ayatina alkubra

verses.ar: ٱذۡهَبۡ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
verses.tr: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed
verses.tl: Ithhab ila firAAawna innahu tagha

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱشۡرَحۡ لِي صَدۡرِي
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "My Lord, expand for me my breast [with assurance]
verses.tl: Qala rabbi ishrah lee sadree

verses.ar: وَيَسِّرۡ لِيٓ أَمۡرِي
verses.tr: And ease for me my task
verses.tl: Wayassir lee amree

verses.ar: وَٱحۡلُلۡ عُقۡدَةٗ مِّن لِّسَانِي
verses.tr: And untie the knot from my tongue
verses.tl: Waohlul AAuqdatan min lisanee

verses.ar: يَفۡقَهُواْ قَوۡلِي
verses.tr: That they may understand my speech
verses.tl: Yafqahoo qawlee

verses.ar: وَٱجۡعَل لِّي وَزِيرٗا مِّنۡ أَهۡلِي
verses.tr: And appoint for me a minister from my family
verses.tl: WaijAAal lee wazeeran min ahlee

verses.ar: هَٰرُونَ أَخِي
verses.tr: Aaron, my brother
verses.tl: Haroona akhee

verses.ar: ٱشۡدُدۡ بِهِۦٓ أَزۡرِي
verses.tr: Increase through him my strength
verses.tl: Oshdud bihi azree

verses.ar: وَأَشۡرِكۡهُ فِيٓ أَمۡرِي
verses.tr: And let him share my task
verses.tl: Waashrikhu fee amree

verses.ar: كَيۡ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرٗا
verses.tr: That we may exalt You much
verses.tl: Kay nusabbihaka katheeran

verses.ar: وَنَذۡكُرَكَ كَثِيرًا
verses.tr: And remember You much
verses.tl: Wanathkuraka katheeran

verses.ar: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, You are of us ever Seeing
verses.tl: Innaka kunta bina baseeran

verses.ar: قَالَ قَدۡ أُوتِيتَ سُؤۡلَكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses
verses.tl: Qala qad ooteeta sulaka ya moosa

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ مَنَنَّا عَلَيۡكَ مَرَّةً أُخۡرَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time
verses.tl: Walaqad mananna AAalayka marratan okhra

verses.ar: إِذۡ أَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ
verses.tr: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired
verses.tl: Ith awhayna ila ommika ma yooha

verses.ar: أَنِ ٱقۡذِفِيهِ فِي ٱلتَّابُوتِ فَٱقۡذِفِيهِ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ فَلۡيُلۡقِهِ ٱلۡيَمُّ بِٱلسَّاحِلِ يَأۡخُذۡهُ عَدُوّٞ لِّي وَعَدُوّٞ لَّهُۥۚ وَأَلۡقَيۡتُ عَلَيۡكَ مَحَبَّةٗ مِّنِّي وَلِتُصۡنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيۡنِيٓ
verses.tr: [Saying], 'Cast him into the chest and cast it into the river, and the river will throw it onto the bank; there will take him an enemy to Me and an enemy to him.' And I bestowed upon you love from Me that you would be brought up under My eye
verses.tl: Ani iqthifeehi fee alttabooti faiqthifeehi fee alyammi falyulqihi alyammu bialssahili yakhuthhu AAaduwwun lee waAAaduwwun lahu waalqaytu AAalayka mahabbatan minnee walitusnaAAa AAala AAaynee

verses.ar: إِذۡ تَمۡشِيٓ أُخۡتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكۡفُلُهُۥۖ فَرَجَعۡنَٰكَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ كَيۡ تَقَرَّ عَيۡنُهَا وَلَا تَحۡزَنَۚ وَقَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسٗا فَنَجَّيۡنَٰكَ مِنَ ٱلۡغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّـٰكَ فُتُونٗاۚ فَلَبِثۡتَ سِنِينَ فِيٓ أَهۡلِ مَدۡيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئۡتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٖ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: [And We favored you] when your sister went and said, 'Shall I direct you to someone who will be responsible for him?' So We restored you to your mother that she might be content and not grieve. And you killed someone, but We saved you from retaliation and tried you with a [severe] trial. And you remained [some] years among the people of Madyan. Then you came [here] at the decreed time, O Moses
verses.tl: Ith tamshee okhtuka fataqoolu hal adullukum AAala man yakfuluhu farajaAAnaka ila ommika kay taqarra AAaynuha wala tahzana waqatalta nafsan fanajjaynaka mina alghammi wafatannaka futoonan falabithta sineena fee ahli madyana thumma jita AAala qadarin ya moosa

verses.ar: وَٱصۡطَنَعۡتُكَ لِنَفۡسِي
verses.tr: And I produced you for Myself
verses.tl: WaistanaAAtuka linafsee

verses.ar: ٱذۡهَبۡ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايَٰتِي وَلَا تَنِيَا فِي ذِكۡرِي
verses.tr: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance
verses.tl: Ithhab anta waakhooka biayatee wala taniya fee thikree

verses.ar: ٱذۡهَبَآ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
verses.tr: Go, both of you, to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed
verses.tl: Ithhaba ila firAAawna innahu tagha

verses.ar: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوۡلٗا لَّيِّنٗا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوۡ يَخۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allah]
verses.tl: Faqoola lahu qawlan layyinan laAAallahu yatathakkaru aw yakhsha

verses.ar: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفۡرُطَ عَلَيۡنَآ أَوۡ أَن يَطۡغَىٰ
verses.tr: They said, "Our Lord, indeed we are afraid that he will hasten [punishment] against us or that he will transgress
verses.tl: Qala rabbana innana nakhafu an yafruta AAalayna aw an yatgha

verses.ar: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآۖ إِنَّنِي مَعَكُمَآ أَسۡمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see
verses.tl: Qala la takhafa innanee maAAakuma asmaAAu waara

verses.ar: فَأۡتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرۡسِلۡ مَعَنَا بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبۡهُمۡۖ قَدۡ جِئۡنَٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّكَۖ وَٱلسَّلَٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ
verses.tr: So go to him and say, 'Indeed, we are messengers of your Lord, so send with us the Children of Israel and do not torment them. We have come to you with a sign from your Lord. And peace will be upon he who follows the guidance
verses.tl: Fatiyahu faqoola inna rasoola rabbika faarsil maAAana banee israeela wala tuAAaththibhum qad jinaka biayatin min rabbika waalssalamu AAala mani ittabaAAa alhuda

verses.ar: إِنَّا قَدۡ أُوحِيَ إِلَيۡنَآ أَنَّ ٱلۡعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, it has been revealed to us that the punishment will be upon whoever denies and turns away
verses.tl: Inna qad oohiya ilayna anna alAAathaba AAala man kaththaba watawalla

verses.ar: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: [Pharaoh] said, "So who is the Lord of you two, O Moses
verses.tl: Qala faman rabbukuma ya moosa

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِيٓ أَعۡطَىٰ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلۡقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
verses.tr: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]
verses.tl: Qala rabbuna allathee aAAta kulla shayin khalqahu thumma hada

verses.ar: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ ٱلۡقُرُونِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: [Pharaoh] said, "Then what is the case of the former generations
verses.tl: Qala fama balu alqurooni aloola

verses.ar: قَالَ عِلۡمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّي فِي كِتَٰبٖۖ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّي وَلَا يَنسَى
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "The knowledge thereof is with my Lord in a record. My Lord neither errs nor forgets
verses.tl: Qala AAilmuha AAinda rabbee fee kitabin la yadillu rabbee wala yansa

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَهۡدٗا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتَّىٰ
verses.tr: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants
verses.tl: Allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda mahdan wasalaka lakum feeha subulan waanzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi azwajan min nabatin shatta

verses.ar: كُلُواْ وَٱرۡعَوۡاْ أَنۡعَٰمَكُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلنُّهَىٰ
verses.tr: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed, in that are signs for those of intelligence
verses.tl: Kuloo wairAAaw anAAamakum inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha

verses.ar: ۞مِنۡهَا خَلَقۡنَٰكُمۡ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمۡ وَمِنۡهَا نُخۡرِجُكُمۡ تَارَةً أُخۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: From the earth We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time
verses.tl: Minha khalaqnakum wafeeha nuAAeedukum waminha nukhrijukum taratan okhra

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرَيۡنَٰهُ ءَايَٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
verses.tr: And We certainly showed Pharaoh Our signs - all of them - but he denied and refused
verses.tl: Walaqad araynahu ayatina kullaha fakaththaba waaba

verses.ar: قَالَ أَجِئۡتَنَا لِتُخۡرِجَنَا مِنۡ أَرۡضِنَا بِسِحۡرِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses
verses.tl: Qala ajitana litukhrijana min ardina bisihrika ya moosa

verses.ar: فَلَنَأۡتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحۡرٖ مِّثۡلِهِۦ فَٱجۡعَلۡ بَيۡنَنَا وَبَيۡنَكَ مَوۡعِدٗا لَّا نُخۡلِفُهُۥ نَحۡنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانٗا سُوٗى
verses.tr: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned
verses.tl: Falanatiyannaka bisihrin mithlihi faijAAal baynana wabaynaka mawAAidan la nukhlifuhu nahnu wala anta makanan suwan

verses.ar: قَالَ مَوۡعِدُكُمۡ يَوۡمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحۡشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحٗى
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "Your appointment is on the day of the festival when the people assemble at mid-morning
verses.tl: Qala mawAAidukum yawmu alzzeenati waan yuhshara alnnasu duhan

verses.ar: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيۡدَهُۥ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
verses.tr: So Pharaoh went away, put together his plan, and then came [to Moses]
verses.tl: Fatawalla firAAawnu fajamaAAa kaydahu thumma ata

verses.ar: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيۡلَكُمۡ لَا تَفۡتَرُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبٗا فَيُسۡحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٖۖ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفۡتَرَىٰ
verses.tr: Moses said to the magicians summoned by Pharaoh, "Woe to you! Do not invent a lie against Allah or He will exterminate you with a punishment; and he has failed who invents [such falsehood]
verses.tl: Qala lahum moosa waylakum la taftaroo AAala Allahi kathiban fayushitakum biAAathabin waqad khaba mani iftara

verses.ar: فَتَنَٰزَعُوٓاْ أَمۡرَهُم بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَأَسَرُّواْ ٱلنَّجۡوَىٰ
verses.tr: So they disputed over their affair among themselves and concealed their private conversation
verses.tl: FatanazaAAoo amrahum baynahum waasarroo alnnajwa

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنۡ هَٰذَٰنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلۡمُثۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way
verses.tl: Qaloo in hathani lasahirani yureedani an yukhrijakum min ardikum bisihrihima wayathhaba bitareeqatikumu almuthla

verses.ar: فَأَجۡمِعُواْ كَيۡدَكُمۡ ثُمَّ ٱئۡتُواْ صَفّٗاۚ وَقَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ مَنِ ٱسۡتَعۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes
verses.tl: FaajmiAAoo kaydakum thumma itoo saffan waqad aflaha alyawma mani istaAAla

verses.ar: قَالُواْ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلۡقِيَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنۡ أَلۡقَىٰ
verses.tr: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw
verses.tl: Qaloo ya moosa imma an tulqiya waimma an nakoona awwala man alqa

verses.ar: قَالَ بَلۡ أَلۡقُواْۖ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمۡ وَعِصِيُّهُمۡ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيۡهِ مِن سِحۡرِهِمۡ أَنَّهَا تَسۡعَىٰ
verses.tr: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes]
verses.tl: Qala bal alqoo faitha hibaluhum waAAisiyyuhum yukhayyalu ilayhi min sihrihim annaha tasAAa

verses.ar: فَأَوۡجَسَ فِي نَفۡسِهِۦ خِيفَةٗ مُّوسَىٰ
verses.tr: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses
verses.tl: Faawjasa fee nafsihi kheefatan moosa

verses.ar: قُلۡنَا لَا تَخَفۡ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: Allah said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior
verses.tl: Qulna la takhaf innaka anta alaAAla

verses.ar: وَأَلۡقِ مَا فِي يَمِينِكَ تَلۡقَفۡ مَا صَنَعُوٓاْۖ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُواْ كَيۡدُ سَٰحِرٖۖ وَلَا يُفۡلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيۡثُ أَتَىٰ
verses.tr: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is
verses.tl: Waalqi ma fee yameenika talqaf ma sanaAAoo innama sanaAAoo kaydu sahirin wala yuflihu alssahiru haythu ata

verses.ar: فَأُلۡقِيَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدٗا قَالُوٓاْ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses
verses.tl: Faolqiya alssaharatu sujjadan qaloo amanna birabbi haroona wamoosa

verses.ar: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ قَبۡلَ أَنۡ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمۡۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِي عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحۡرَۖ فَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيۡدِيَكُمۡ وَأَرۡجُلَكُم مِّنۡ خِلَٰفٖ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمۡ فِي جُذُوعِ ٱلنَّخۡلِ وَلَتَعۡلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَآ أَشَدُّ عَذَابٗا وَأَبۡقَىٰ
verses.tr: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed him before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic. So I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will surely know which of us is more severe in [giving] punishment and more enduring
verses.tl: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athana lakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu alssihra falaoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakum min khilafin walaosallibannakum fee juthooAAi alnnakhli walataAAlamunna ayyuna ashaddu AAathaban waabqa

verses.ar: قَالُواْ لَن نُّؤۡثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ ٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَٱلَّذِي فَطَرَنَاۖ فَٱقۡضِ مَآ أَنتَ قَاضٍۖ إِنَّمَا تَقۡضِي هَٰذِهِ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنۡيَآ
verses.tr: They said, "Never will we prefer you over what has come to us of clear proofs and [over] He who created us. So decree whatever you are to decree. You can only decree for this worldly life
verses.tl: Qaloo lan nuthiraka AAala ma jaana mina albayyinati waallathee fatarana faiqdi ma anta qadin innama taqdee hathihi alhayata alddunya

verses.ar: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغۡفِرَ لَنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَا وَمَآ أَكۡرَهۡتَنَا عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحۡرِۗ وَٱللَّهُ خَيۡرٞ وَأَبۡقَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allah is better and more enduring
verses.tl: Inna amanna birabbina liyaghfira lana khatayana wama akrahtana AAalayhi mina alssihri waAllahu khayrun waabqa

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَأۡتِ رَبَّهُۥ مُجۡرِمٗا فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحۡيَىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live
verses.tl: Innahu man yati rabbahu mujriman fainna lahu jahannama la yamootu feeha wala yahya

verses.ar: وَمَن يَأۡتِهِۦ مُؤۡمِنٗا قَدۡ عَمِلَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱلدَّرَجَٰتُ ٱلۡعُلَىٰ
verses.tr: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]
verses.tl: Waman yatihi muminan qad AAamila alssalihati faolaika lahumu alddarajatu alAAula

verses.ar: جَنَّـٰتُ عَدۡنٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.tr: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself
verses.tl: Jannatu AAadnin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wathalika jazao man tazakka

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنۡ أَسۡرِ بِعِبَادِي فَٱضۡرِبۡ لَهُمۡ طَرِيقٗا فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ يَبَسٗا لَّا تَخَٰفُ دَرَكٗا وَلَا تَخۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: And We had inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants and strike for them a dry path through the sea; you will not fear being overtaken [by Pharaoh] nor be afraid [of drowning]
verses.tl: Walaqad awhayna ila moosa an asri biAAibadee faidrib lahum tareeqan fee albahri yabasan la takhafu darakan wala takhsha

verses.ar: فَأَتۡبَعَهُمۡ فِرۡعَوۡنُ بِجُنُودِهِۦ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمۡ
verses.tr: So Pharaoh pursued them with his soldiers, and there covered them from the sea that which covered them
verses.tl: FaatbaAAahum firAAawnu bijunoodihi faghashiyahum mina alyammi ma ghashiyahum

verses.ar: وَأَضَلَّ فِرۡعَوۡنُ قَوۡمَهُۥ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
verses.tr: And Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide [them]
verses.tl: Waadalla firAAawnu qawmahu wama hada

verses.ar: يَٰبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ قَدۡ أَنجَيۡنَٰكُم مِّنۡ عَدُوِّكُمۡ وَوَٰعَدۡنَٰكُمۡ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلۡأَيۡمَنَ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلۡوَىٰ
verses.tr: O Children of Israel, We delivered you from your enemy, and We made an appointment with you at the right side of the mount, and We sent down to you manna and quails
verses.tl: Ya banee israeela qad anjaynakum min AAaduwwikum wawaAAadnakum janiba alttoori alaymana wanazzalna AAalaykumu almanna waalssalwa

verses.ar: كُلُواْ مِن طَيِّبَٰتِ مَا رَزَقۡنَٰكُمۡ وَلَا تَطۡغَوۡاْ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَضَبِيۖ وَمَن يَحۡلِلۡ عَلَيۡهِ غَضَبِي فَقَدۡ هَوَىٰ
verses.tr: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen
verses.tl: Kuloo min tayyibati ma razaqnakum wala tatghaw feehi fayahilla AAalaykum ghadabee waman yahlil AAalayhi ghadabee faqad hawa

verses.ar: وَإِنِّي لَغَفَّارٞ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا ثُمَّ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ
verses.tr: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance
verses.tl: Wainnee laghaffarun liman taba waamana waAAamila salihan thumma ihtada

verses.ar: ۞وَمَآ أَعۡجَلَكَ عَن قَوۡمِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "And what made you hasten from your people, O Moses
verses.tl: Wama aAAjalaka AAan qawmika ya moosa

verses.ar: قَالَ هُمۡ أُوْلَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِي وَعَجِلۡتُ إِلَيۡكَ رَبِّ لِتَرۡضَىٰ
verses.tr: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased
verses.tl: Qala hum olai AAala atharee waAAajiltu ilayka rabbi litarda

verses.ar: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدۡ فَتَنَّا قَوۡمَكَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِيُّ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Samiri has led them astray
verses.tl: Qala fainna qad fatanna qawmaka min baAAdika waadallahumu alssamiriyyu

verses.ar: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ غَضۡبَٰنَ أَسِفٗاۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَلَمۡ يَعِدۡكُمۡ رَبُّكُمۡ وَعۡدًا حَسَنًاۚ أَفَطَالَ عَلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡعَهۡدُ أَمۡ أَرَدتُّمۡ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ غَضَبٞ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ فَأَخۡلَفۡتُم مَّوۡعِدِي
verses.tr: So Moses returned to his people, angry and grieved. He said, "O my people, did your Lord not make you a good promise? Then, was the time [of its fulfillment] too long for you, or did you wish that wrath from your Lord descend upon you, so you broke your promise [of obedience] to me
verses.tl: FarajaAAa moosa ila qawmihi ghadbana asifan qala ya qawmi alam yaAAidkum rabbukum waAAdan hasanan afatala AAalaykumu alAAahdu am aradtum an yahilla AAalaykum ghadabun min rabbikum faakhlaftum mawAAidee

verses.ar: قَالُواْ مَآ أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمَلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حُمِّلۡنَآ أَوۡزَارٗا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّامِرِيُّ
verses.tr: They said, "We did not break our promise to you by our will, but we were made to carry burdens from the ornaments of the people [of Pharaoh], so we threw them [into the fire], and thus did the Samiri throw
verses.tl: Qaloo ma akhlafna mawAAidaka bimalkina walakinna hummilna awzaran min zeenati alqawmi faqathafnaha fakathalika alqa alssamiriyyu

verses.ar: فَأَخۡرَجَ لَهُمۡ عِجۡلٗا جَسَدٗا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٞ فَقَالُواْ هَٰذَآ إِلَٰهُكُمۡ وَإِلَٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِيَ
verses.tr: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot
verses.tl: Faakhraja lahum AAijlan jasadan lahu khuwarun faqaloo hatha ilahukum wailahu moosa fanasiya

verses.ar: أَفَلَا يَرَوۡنَ أَلَّا يَرۡجِعُ إِلَيۡهِمۡ قَوۡلٗا وَلَا يَمۡلِكُ لَهُمۡ ضَرّٗا وَلَا نَفۡعٗا
verses.tr: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit
verses.tl: Afala yarawna alla yarjiAAu ilayhim qawlan wala yamliku lahum darran wala nafAAan

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ هَٰرُونُ مِن قَبۡلُ يَٰقَوۡمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِۦۖ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ فَٱتَّبِعُونِي وَأَطِيعُوٓاْ أَمۡرِي
verses.tr: And Aaron had already told them before [the return of Moses], "O my people, you are only being tested by it, and indeed, your Lord is the Most Merciful, so follow me and obey my order
verses.tl: Walaqad qala lahum haroonu min qablu ya qawmi innama futintum bihi wainna rabbakumu alrrahmanu faittabiAAoonee waateeAAoo amree

verses.ar: قَالُواْ لَن نَّبۡرَحَ عَلَيۡهِ عَٰكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرۡجِعَ إِلَيۡنَا مُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: They said, "We will never cease being devoted to the calf until Moses returns to us
verses.tl: Qaloo lan nabraha AAalayhi AAakifeena hatta yarjiAAa ilayna moosa

verses.ar: قَالَ يَٰهَٰرُونُ مَا مَنَعَكَ إِذۡ رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ ضَلُّوٓاْ
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "O Aaron, what prevented you, when you saw them going astray
verses.tl: Qala ya haroonu ma manaAAaka ith raaytahum dalloo

verses.ar: أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِۖ أَفَعَصَيۡتَ أَمۡرِي
verses.tr: From following me? Then have you disobeyed my order
verses.tl: Alla tattabiAAani afaAAasayta amree

verses.ar: قَالَ يَبۡنَؤُمَّ لَا تَأۡخُذۡ بِلِحۡيَتِي وَلَا بِرَأۡسِيٓۖ إِنِّي خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقۡتَ بَيۡنَ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ وَلَمۡ تَرۡقُبۡ قَوۡلِي
verses.tr: [Aaron] said, "O son of my mother, do not seize [me] by my beard or by my head. Indeed, I feared that you would say, 'You caused division among the Children of Israel, and you did not observe [or await] my word
verses.tl: Qala ya bna omma la takhuth bilihyatee wala birasee innee khasheetu an taqoola farraqta bayna banee israeela walam tarqub qawlee

verses.ar: قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكَ يَٰسَٰمِرِيُّ
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "And what is your case, O Samiri
verses.tl: Qala fama khatbuka ya samiriyyu

verses.ar: قَالَ بَصُرۡتُ بِمَا لَمۡ يَبۡصُرُواْ بِهِۦ فَقَبَضۡتُ قَبۡضَةٗ مِّنۡ أَثَرِ ٱلرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذۡتُهَا وَكَذَٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتۡ لِي نَفۡسِي
verses.tr: He said, "I saw what they did not see, so I took a handful [of dust] from the track of the messenger and threw it, and thus did my soul entice me
verses.tl: Qala basurtu bima lam yabsuroo bihi faqabadtu qabdatan min athari alrrasooli fanabathtuha wakathalika sawwalat lee nafsee

verses.ar: قَالَ فَٱذۡهَبۡ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوۡعِدٗا لَّن تُخۡلَفَهُۥۖ وَٱنظُرۡ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ عَاكِفٗاۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "Then go. And indeed, it is [decreed] for you in [this] life to say, 'No contact.' And indeed, you have an appointment [in the Hereafter] you will not fail to keep. And look at your 'god' to which you remained devoted. We will surely burn it and blow it into the sea with a blast
verses.tl: Qala faithhab fainna laka fee alhayati an taqoola la misasa wainna laka mawAAidan lan tukhlafahu waonthur ila ilahika allathee thalta AAalayhi AAakifan lanuharriqannahu thumma lanansifannahu fee alyammi nasfan

verses.ar: إِنَّمَآ إِلَٰهُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِي لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۚ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عِلۡمٗا
verses.tr: Your god is only Allah, except for whom there is no deity. He has encompassed all things in knowledge
verses.tl: Innama ilahukumu Allahu allathee la ilaha illa huwa wasiAAa kulla shayin AAilman

verses.ar: كَذَٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيۡكَ مِنۡ أَنۢبَآءِ مَا قَدۡ سَبَقَۚ وَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَٰكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكۡرٗا
verses.tr: Thus, [O Muhammad], We relate to you from the news of what has preceded. And We have certainly given you from Us the Qur'an
verses.tl: Kathalika naqussu AAalayka min anbai ma qad sabaqa waqad ataynaka min ladunna thikran

verses.ar: مَّنۡ أَعۡرَضَ عَنۡهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَحۡمِلُ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ وِزۡرًا
verses.tr: Whoever turns away from it - then indeed, he will bear on the Day of Resurrection a burden
verses.tl: Man aAArada AAanhu fainnahu yahmilu yawma alqiyamati wizran

verses.ar: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهِۖ وَسَآءَ لَهُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ حِمۡلٗا
verses.tr: [Abiding] eternally therein, and evil it is for them on the Day of Resurrection as a load
verses.tl: Khalideena feehi wasaa lahum yawma alqiyamati himlan

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِۚ وَنَحۡشُرُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ يَوۡمَئِذٖ زُرۡقٗا
verses.tr: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed
verses.tl: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori wanahshuru almujrimeena yawmaithin zurqan

verses.ar: يَتَخَٰفَتُونَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ إِن لَّبِثۡتُمۡ إِلَّا عَشۡرٗا
verses.tr: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]
verses.tl: Yatakhafatoona baynahum in labithtum illa AAashran

verses.ar: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذۡ يَقُولُ أَمۡثَلُهُمۡ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثۡتُمۡ إِلَّا يَوۡمٗا
verses.tr: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner will say, "You remained not but one day
verses.tl: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona ith yaqoolu amthaluhum tareeqatan in labithtum illa yawman

verses.ar: وَيَسۡـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلۡجِبَالِ فَقُلۡ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّي نَسۡفٗا
verses.tr: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast
verses.tl: Wayasaloonaka AAani aljibali faqul yansifuha rabbee nasfan

verses.ar: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعٗا صَفۡصَفٗا
verses.tr: And He will leave the earth a level plain
verses.tl: Fayatharuha qaAAan safsafan

verses.ar: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجٗا وَلَآ أَمۡتٗا
verses.tr: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation
verses.tl: La tara feeha AAiwajan wala amtan

verses.ar: يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِيَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥۖ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلۡأَصۡوَاتُ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ فَلَا تَسۡمَعُ إِلَّا هَمۡسٗا
verses.tr: That Day, everyone will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps]
verses.tl: Yawmaithin yattabiAAoona alddaAAiya la AAiwaja lahu wakhashaAAati alaswatu lilrrahmani fala tasmaAAu illa hamsan

verses.ar: يَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَرَضِيَ لَهُۥ قَوۡلٗا
verses.tr: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word
verses.tl: Yawmaithin la tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waradiya lahu qawlan

verses.ar: يَعۡلَمُ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلۡمٗا
verses.tr: Allah knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it in knowledge
verses.tl: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yuheetoona bihi AAilman

verses.ar: ۞وَعَنَتِ ٱلۡوُجُوهُ لِلۡحَيِّ ٱلۡقَيُّومِۖ وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَنۡ حَمَلَ ظُلۡمٗا
verses.tr: And [all] faces will be humbled before the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. And he will have failed who carries injustice
verses.tl: WaAAanati alwujoohu lilhayyi alqayyoomi waqad khaba man hamala thulman

verses.ar: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلۡمٗا وَلَا هَضۡمٗا
verses.tr: But he who does of righteous deeds while he is a believer - he will neither fear injustice nor deprivation
verses.tl: Waman yaAAmal mina alssalihati wahuwa muminun fala yakhafu thulman wala hadman

verses.ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ قُرۡءَانًا عَرَبِيّٗا وَصَرَّفۡنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَّقُونَ أَوۡ يُحۡدِثُ لَهُمۡ ذِكۡرٗا
verses.tr: And thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur'an and have diversified therein the warnings that perhaps they will avoid [sin] or it would cause them remembrance
verses.tl: Wakathalika anzalnahu quranan AAarabiyyan wasarrafna feehi mina alwaAAeedi laAAallahum yattaqoona aw yuhdithu lahum thikran

verses.ar: فَتَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمَلِكُ ٱلۡحَقُّۗ وَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يُقۡضَىٰٓ إِلَيۡكَ وَحۡيُهُۥۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدۡنِي عِلۡمٗا
verses.tr: So high [above all] is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muhammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge
verses.tl: FataAAala Allahu almaliku alhaqqu wala taAAjal bialqurani min qabli an yuqda ilayka wahyuhu waqul rabbi zidnee AAilman

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَهِدۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَنَسِيَ وَلَمۡ نَجِدۡ لَهُۥ عَزۡمٗا
verses.tr: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination
verses.tl: Walaqad AAahidna ila adama min qablu fanasiya walam najid lahu AAazman

verses.ar: وَإِذۡ قُلۡنَا لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسۡجُدُواْ لِأٓدَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓاْ إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
verses.tr: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused
verses.tl: Waith qulna lilmalaikati osjudoo liadama fasajadoo illa ibleesa aba

verses.ar: فَقُلۡنَا يَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا عَدُوّٞ لَّكَ وَلِزَوۡجِكَ فَلَا يُخۡرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ فَتَشۡقَىٰٓ
verses.tr: So We said, "O Adam, indeed this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Then let him not remove you from Paradise so you would suffer
verses.tl: Faqulna ya adamu inna hatha AAaduwwun laka walizawjika fala yukhrijannakuma mina aljannati fatashqa

verses.ar: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed
verses.tl: Inna laka alla tajooAAa feeha wala taAAra

verses.ar: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظۡمَؤُاْ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضۡحَىٰ
verses.tr: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun
verses.tl: Waannaka la tathmao feeha wala tadha

verses.ar: فَوَسۡوَسَ إِلَيۡهِ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ قَالَ يَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلۡخُلۡدِ وَمُلۡكٖ لَّا يَبۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate
verses.tl: Fawaswasa ilayhi alshshaytanu qala ya adamu hal adulluka AAala shajarati alkhuldi wamulkin la yabla

verses.ar: فَأَكَلَا مِنۡهَا فَبَدَتۡ لَهُمَا سَوۡءَٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخۡصِفَانِ عَلَيۡهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلۡجَنَّةِۚ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
verses.tr: And Adam and his wife ate of it, and their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred
verses.tl: Faakala minha fabadat lahuma sawatuhuma watafiqa yakhsifani AAalayhima min waraqi aljannati waAAasa adamu rabbahu faghawa

verses.ar: ثُمَّ ٱجۡتَبَٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡهِ وَهَدَىٰ
verses.tr: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him]
verses.tl: Thumma ijtabahu rabbuhu fataba AAalayhi wahada

verses.ar: قَالَ ٱهۡبِطَا مِنۡهَا جَمِيعَۢاۖ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ عَدُوّٞۖ فَإِمَّا يَأۡتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّي هُدٗى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَايَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشۡقَىٰ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "Descend from Paradise - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter]
verses.tl: Qala ihbita minha jameeAAan baAAdukum libaAAdin AAaduwwun faimma yatiyannakum minnee hudan famani ittabaAAa hudaya fala yadillu wala yashqa

verses.ar: وَمَنۡ أَعۡرَضَ عَن ذِكۡرِي فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةٗ ضَنكٗا وَنَحۡشُرُهُۥ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ أَعۡمَىٰ
verses.tr: And whoever turns away from My remembrance - indeed, he will have a depressed life, and We will gather him on the Day of Resurrection blind
verses.tl: Waman aAArada AAan thikree fainna lahu maAAeeshatan dankan wanahshuruhu yawma alqiyamati aAAman

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرۡتَنِيٓ أَعۡمَىٰ وَقَدۡ كُنتُ بَصِيرٗا
verses.tr: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing
verses.tl: Qala rabbi lima hashartanee aAAma waqad kuntu baseeran

verses.ar: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ أَتَتۡكَ ءَايَٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَاۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ تُنسَىٰ
verses.tr: [Allah] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten
verses.tl: Qala kathalika atatka ayatuna fanaseetaha wakathalika alyawma tunsa

verses.ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي مَنۡ أَسۡرَفَ وَلَمۡ يُؤۡمِنۢ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِۦۚ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبۡقَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And thus do We recompense he who transgressed and did not believe in the signs of his Lord. And the punishment of the Hereafter is more severe and more enduring
verses.tl: Wakathalika najzee man asrafa walam yumin biayati rabbihi walaAAathabu alakhirati ashaddu waabqa

verses.ar: أَفَلَمۡ يَهۡدِ لَهُمۡ كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرُونِ يَمۡشُونَ فِي مَسَٰكِنِهِمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلنُّهَىٰ
verses.tr: Then, has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them as they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs for those of intelligence
verses.tl: Afalam yahdi lahum kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni yamshoona fee masakinihim inna fee thalika laayatin liolee alnnuha

verses.ar: وَلَوۡلَا كَلِمَةٞ سَبَقَتۡ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامٗا وَأَجَلٞ مُّسَمّٗى
verses.tr: And if not for a word that preceded from your Lord, punishment would have been an obligation [due immediately], and [if not for] a specified term [decreed]
verses.tl: Walawla kalimatun sabaqat min rabbika lakana lizaman waajalun musamman

verses.ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ غُرُوبِهَاۖ وَمِنۡ ءَانَآيِٕ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡ وَأَطۡرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرۡضَىٰ
verses.tr: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied
verses.tl: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla ghuroobiha wamin anai allayli fasabbih waatrafa alnnahari laAAallaka tarda

verses.ar: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيۡنَيۡكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّنۡهُمۡ زَهۡرَةَ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا لِنَفۡتِنَهُمۡ فِيهِۚ وَرِزۡقُ رَبِّكَ خَيۡرٞ وَأَبۡقَىٰ
verses.tr: And do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [some] categories of them, [its being but] the splendor of worldly life by which We test them. And the provision of your Lord is better and more enduring
verses.tl: Wala tamuddanna AAaynayka ila ma mattaAAna bihi azwajan minhum zahrata alhayati alddunya linaftinahum feehi warizqu rabbika khayrun waabqa

verses.ar: وَأۡمُرۡ أَهۡلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصۡطَبِرۡ عَلَيۡهَاۖ لَا نَسۡـَٔلُكَ رِزۡقٗاۖ نَّحۡنُ نَرۡزُقُكَۗ وَٱلۡعَٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقۡوَىٰ
verses.tr: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness
verses.tl: Wamur ahlaka bialssalati waistabir AAalayha la nasaluka rizqan nahnu narzuquka waalAAaqibatu lilttaqwa

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ لَوۡلَا يَأۡتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓۚ أَوَلَمۡ تَأۡتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِي ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures
verses.tl: Waqaloo lawla yateena biayatin min rabbihi awalam tatihim bayyinatu ma fee alssuhufi aloola

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ أَنَّآ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُم بِعَذَابٖ مِّن قَبۡلِهِۦ لَقَالُواْ رَبَّنَا لَوۡلَآ أَرۡسَلۡتَ إِلَيۡنَا رَسُولٗا فَنَتَّبِعَ ءَايَٰتِكَ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن نَّذِلَّ وَنَخۡزَىٰ
verses.tr: And if We had destroyed them with a punishment before him, they would have said, "Our Lord, why did You not send to us a messenger so we could have followed Your verses before we were humiliated and disgraced
verses.tl: Walaw anna ahlaknahum biAAathabin min qablihi laqaloo rabbana lawla arsalta ilayna rasoolan fanattabiAAa ayatika min qabli an nathilla wanakhza

verses.ar: قُلۡ كُلّٞ مُّتَرَبِّصٞ فَتَرَبَّصُواْۖ فَسَتَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ ٱلسَّوِيِّ وَمَنِ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ
verses.tr: Say, "Each [of us] is waiting; so wait. For you will know who are the companions of the sound path and who is guided
verses.tl: Qul kullun mutarabbisun fatarabbasoo fasataAAlamoona man ashabu alssirati alssawiyyi wamani ihtada

verses.ar: ٱقۡتَرَبَ لِلنَّاسِ حِسَابُهُمۡ وَهُمۡ فِي غَفۡلَةٖ مُّعۡرِضُونَ
verses.tr: [The time of] their account has approached for the people, while they are in heedlessness turning away
verses.tl: Iqtaraba lilnnasi hisabuhum wahum fee ghaflatin muAAridoona

verses.ar: مَا يَأۡتِيهِم مِّن ذِكۡرٖ مِّن رَّبِّهِم مُّحۡدَثٍ إِلَّا ٱسۡتَمَعُوهُ وَهُمۡ يَلۡعَبُونَ
verses.tr: No mention comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play
verses.tl: Ma yateehim min thikrin min rabbihim muhdathin illa istamaAAoohu wahum yalAAaboona

verses.ar: لَاهِيَةٗ قُلُوبُهُمۡۗ وَأَسَرُّواْ ٱلنَّجۡوَى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ هَلۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُكُمۡۖ أَفَتَأۡتُونَ ٱلسِّحۡرَ وَأَنتُمۡ تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: With their hearts distracted. And those who do wrong conceal their private conversation, [saying], "Is this [Prophet] except a human being like you? So would you approach magic while you are aware [of it]
verses.tl: Lahiyatan quloobuhum waasarroo alnnajwa allatheena thalamoo hal hatha illa basharun mithlukum afatatoona alssihra waantum tubsiroona

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّي يَعۡلَمُ ٱلۡقَوۡلَ فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ وَهُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.tr: The Prophet said, "My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing
verses.tl: Qala rabbee yaAAlamu alqawla fee alssamai waalardi wahuwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu

verses.ar: بَلۡ قَالُوٓاْ أَضۡغَٰثُ أَحۡلَٰمِۭ بَلِ ٱفۡتَرَىٰهُ بَلۡ هُوَ شَاعِرٞ فَلۡيَأۡتِنَا بِـَٔايَةٖ كَمَآ أُرۡسِلَ ٱلۡأَوَّلُونَ
verses.tr: But they say, "[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles]
verses.tl: Bal qaloo adghathu ahlamin bali iftarahu bal huwa shaAAirun falyatina biayatin kama orsila alawwaloona

verses.ar: مَآ ءَامَنَتۡ قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡيَةٍ أَهۡلَكۡنَٰهَآۖ أَفَهُمۡ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Not a [single] city which We destroyed believed before them, so will they believe
verses.tl: Ma amanat qablahum min qaryatin ahlaknaha afahum yuminoona

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا قَبۡلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا نُّوحِيٓ إِلَيۡهِمۡۖ فَسۡـَٔلُوٓاْ أَهۡلَ ٱلذِّكۡرِ إِن كُنتُمۡ لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: And We sent not before you, [O Muhammad], except men to whom We revealed [the message], so ask the people of the message if you do not know
verses.tl: Wama arsalna qablaka illa rijalan noohee ilayhim faisaloo ahla alththikri in kuntum la taAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَٰهُمۡ جَسَدٗا لَّا يَأۡكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَمَا كَانُواْ خَٰلِدِينَ
verses.tr: And We did not make the prophets forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth]
verses.tl: Wama jaAAalnahum jasadan la yakuloona alttaAAama wama kanoo khalideena

verses.ar: ثُمَّ صَدَقۡنَٰهُمُ ٱلۡوَعۡدَ فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُمۡ وَمَن نَّشَآءُ وَأَهۡلَكۡنَا ٱلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ
verses.tr: Then We fulfilled for them the promise, and We saved them and whom We willed and destroyed the transgressors
verses.tl: Thumma sadaqnahumu alwaAAda faanjaynahum waman nashao waahlakna almusrifeena

verses.ar: لَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ كِتَٰبٗا فِيهِ ذِكۡرُكُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: We have certainly sent down to you a Book in which is your mention. Then will you not reason
verses.tl: Laqad anzalna ilaykum kitaban feehi thikrukum afala taAAqiloona

verses.ar: وَكَمۡ قَصَمۡنَا مِن قَرۡيَةٖ كَانَتۡ ظَالِمَةٗ وَأَنشَأۡنَا بَعۡدَهَا قَوۡمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
verses.tr: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people
verses.tl: Wakam qasamna min qaryatin kanat thalimatan waanshana baAAdaha qawman akhareena

verses.ar: فَلَمَّآ أَحَسُّواْ بَأۡسَنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنۡهَا يَرۡكُضُونَ
verses.tr: And when its inhabitants perceived Our punishment, at once they fled from it
verses.tl: Falamma ahassoo basana itha hum minha yarkudoona

verses.ar: لَا تَرۡكُضُواْ وَٱرۡجِعُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَآ أُتۡرِفۡتُمۡ فِيهِ وَمَسَٰكِنِكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُسۡـَٔلُونَ
verses.tr: [Some angels said], "Do not flee but return to where you were given luxury and to your homes - perhaps you will be questioned
verses.tl: La tarkudoo wairjiAAoo ila ma otriftum feehi wamasakinikum laAAallakum tusaloona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers
verses.tl: Qaloo ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena

verses.ar: فَمَا زَالَت تِّلۡكَ دَعۡوَىٰهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ جَعَلۡنَٰهُمۡ حَصِيدًا خَٰمِدِينَ
verses.tr: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire]
verses.tl: Fama zalat tilka daAAwahum hatta jaAAalnahum haseedan khamideena

verses.ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا لَٰعِبِينَ
verses.tr: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play
verses.tl: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena

verses.ar: لَوۡ أَرَدۡنَآ أَن نَّتَّخِذَ لَهۡوٗا لَّٱتَّخَذۡنَٰهُ مِن لَّدُنَّآ إِن كُنَّا فَٰعِلِينَ
verses.tr: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so
verses.tl: Law aradna an nattakhitha lahwan laittakhathnahu min ladunna in kunna faAAileena

verses.ar: بَلۡ نَقۡذِفُ بِٱلۡحَقِّ عَلَى ٱلۡبَٰطِلِ فَيَدۡمَغُهُۥ فَإِذَا هُوَ زَاهِقٞۚ وَلَكُمُ ٱلۡوَيۡلُ مِمَّا تَصِفُونَ
verses.tr: Rather, We dash the truth upon falsehood, and it destroys it, and thereupon it departs. And for you is destruction from that which you describe
verses.tl: Bal naqthifu bialhaqqi AAala albatili fayadmaghuhu faitha huwa zahiqun walakumu alwaylu mimma tasifoona

verses.ar: وَلَهُۥ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَمَنۡ عِندَهُۥ لَا يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ عَنۡ عِبَادَتِهِۦ وَلَا يَسۡتَحۡسِرُونَ
verses.tr: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire
verses.tl: Walahu man fee alssamawati waalardi waman AAindahu la yastakbiroona AAan AAibadatihi wala yastahsiroona

verses.ar: يُسَبِّحُونَ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ لَا يَفۡتُرُونَ
verses.tr: They exalt [Him] night and day [and] do not slacken
verses.tl: Yusabbihoona allayla waalnnahara la yafturoona

verses.ar: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوٓاْ ءَالِهَةٗ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ هُمۡ يُنشِرُونَ
verses.tr: Or have men taken for themselves gods from the earth who resurrect [the dead]
verses.tl: Ami ittakhathoo alihatan mina alardi hum yunshiroona

verses.ar: لَوۡ كَانَ فِيهِمَآ ءَالِهَةٌ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ لَفَسَدَتَاۚ فَسُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَرۡشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.tr: Had there been within the heavens and earth gods besides Allah, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allah, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe
verses.tl: Law kana feehima alihatun illa Allahu lafasadata fasubhana Allahi rabbi alAAarshi AAamma yasifoona

verses.ar: لَا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَمَّا يَفۡعَلُ وَهُمۡ يُسۡـَٔلُونَ
verses.tr: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned
verses.tl: La yusalu AAamma yafAAalu wahum yusaloona

verses.ar: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةٗۖ قُلۡ هَاتُواْ بُرۡهَٰنَكُمۡۖ هَٰذَا ذِكۡرُ مَن مَّعِيَ وَذِكۡرُ مَن قَبۡلِيۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ ٱلۡحَقَّۖ فَهُم مُّعۡرِضُونَ
verses.tr: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muhammad], "Produce your proof. This [Qur'an] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me." But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away
verses.tl: Ami ittakhathoo min doonihi alihatan qul hatoo burhanakum hatha thikru man maAAiya wathikru man qablee bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona alhaqqa fahum muAAridoona

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ مِن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا نُوحِيٓ إِلَيۡهِ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعۡبُدُونِ
verses.tr: And We sent not before you any messenger except that We revealed to him that, "There is no deity except Me, so worship Me
verses.tl: Wama arsalna min qablika min rasoolin illa noohee ilayhi annahu la ilaha illa ana faoAAbudooni

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَلَدٗاۗ سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥۚ بَلۡ عِبَادٞ مُّكۡرَمُونَ
verses.tr: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants
verses.tl: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan subhanahu bal AAibadun mukramoona

verses.ar: لَا يَسۡبِقُونَهُۥ بِٱلۡقَوۡلِ وَهُم بِأَمۡرِهِۦ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command
verses.tl: La yasbiqoonahu bialqawli wahum biamrihi yaAAmaloona

verses.ar: يَعۡلَمُ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُمۡ وَلَا يَشۡفَعُونَ إِلَّا لِمَنِ ٱرۡتَضَىٰ وَهُم مِّنۡ خَشۡيَتِهِۦ مُشۡفِقُونَ
verses.tr: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive
verses.tl: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wama khalfahum wala yashfaAAoona illa limani irtada wahum min khashyatihi mushfiqoona

verses.ar: ۞وَمَن يَقُلۡ مِنۡهُمۡ إِنِّيٓ إِلَٰهٞ مِّن دُونِهِۦ فَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِيهِ جَهَنَّمَۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: And whoever of them should say, "Indeed, I am a god besides Him"- that one We would recompense with Hell. Thus do We recompense the wrongdoers
verses.tl: Waman yaqul minhum innee ilahun min doonihi fathalika najzeehi jahannama kathalika najzee alththalimeena

verses.ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ أَنَّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ كَانَتَا رَتۡقٗا فَفَتَقۡنَٰهُمَاۖ وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلۡمَآءِ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ حَيٍّۚ أَفَلَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Have those who disbelieved not considered that the heavens and the earth were a joined entity, and We separated them and made from water every living thing? Then will they not believe
verses.tl: Awalam yara allatheena kafaroo anna alssamawati waalarda kanata ratqan fafataqnahuma wajaAAalna mina almai kulla shayin hayyin afala yuminoona

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ رَوَٰسِيَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِهِمۡ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا فِجَاجٗا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يَهۡتَدُونَ
verses.tr: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided
verses.tl: WajaAAalna fee alardi rawasiya an tameeda bihim wajaAAalna feeha fijajan subulan laAAallahum yahtadoona

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ سَقۡفٗا مَّحۡفُوظٗاۖ وَهُمۡ عَنۡ ءَايَٰتِهَا مُعۡرِضُونَ
verses.tr: And We made the sky a protected ceiling, but they, from its signs, are turning away
verses.tl: WajaAAalna alssamaa saqfan mahfoothan wahum AAan ayatiha muAAridoona

verses.ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ كُلّٞ فِي فَلَكٖ يَسۡبَحُونَ
verses.tr: And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all [heavenly bodies] in an orbit are swimming
verses.tl: Wahuwa allathee khalaqa allayla waalnnahara waalshshamsa waalqamara kullun fee falakin yasbahoona

verses.ar: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَا لِبَشَرٖ مِّن قَبۡلِكَ ٱلۡخُلۡدَۖ أَفَإِيْن مِّتَّ فَهُمُ ٱلۡخَٰلِدُونَ
verses.tr: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal
verses.tl: Wama jaAAalna libasharin min qablika alkhulda afain mitta fahumu alkhalidoona

verses.ar: كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلۡمَوۡتِۗ وَنَبۡلُوكُم بِٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلۡخَيۡرِ فِتۡنَةٗۖ وَإِلَيۡنَا تُرۡجَعُونَ
verses.tr: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned
verses.tl: Kullu nafsin thaiqatu almawti wanablookum bialshsharri waalkhayri fitnatan wailayna turjaAAoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا رَءَاكَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِن يَتَّخِذُونَكَ إِلَّا هُزُوًا أَهَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي يَذۡكُرُ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَهُم بِذِكۡرِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ هُمۡ كَٰفِرُونَ
verses.tr: And when those who disbelieve see you, [O Muhammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], "Is this the one who insults your gods?" And they are, at the mention of the Most Merciful, disbelievers
verses.tl: Waitha raaka allatheena kafaroo in yattakhithoonaka illa huzuwan ahatha allathee yathkuru alihatakum wahum bithikri alrrahmani hum kafiroona

verses.ar: خُلِقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مِنۡ عَجَلٖۚ سَأُوْرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِي فَلَا تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونِ
verses.tr: Man was created of haste. I will show you My signs, so do not impatiently urge Me
verses.tl: Khuliqa alinsanu min AAajalin saoreekum ayatee fala tastaAAjiloona

verses.ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: لَوۡ يَعۡلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ حِينَ لَا يَكُفُّونَ عَن وُجُوهِهِمُ ٱلنَّارَ وَلَا عَن ظُهُورِهِمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.tr: If those who disbelieved but knew the time when they will not avert the Fire from their faces or from their backs and they will not be aided
verses.tl: Law yaAAlamu allatheena kafaroo heena la yakuffoona AAan wujoohihimu alnnara wala AAan thuhoorihim wala hum yunsaroona

verses.ar: بَلۡ تَأۡتِيهِم بَغۡتَةٗ فَتَبۡهَتُهُمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ رَدَّهَا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنظَرُونَ
verses.tr: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved
verses.tl: Bal tateehim baghtatan fatabhatuhum fala yastateeAAoona raddaha wala hum yuntharoona

verses.ar: وَلَقَدِ ٱسۡتُهۡزِئَ بِرُسُلٖ مِّن قَبۡلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُواْ مِنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
verses.tr: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule
verses.tl: Walaqadi istuhzia birusulin min qablika fahaqa biallatheena sakhiroo minhum ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona

verses.ar: قُلۡ مَن يَكۡلَؤُكُم بِٱلَّيۡلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ مِنَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ عَن ذِكۡرِ رَبِّهِم مُّعۡرِضُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away
verses.tl: Qul man yaklaokum biallayli waalnnahari mina alrrahmani bal hum AAan thikri rabbihim muAAridoona

verses.ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ ءَالِهَةٞ تَمۡنَعُهُم مِّن دُونِنَاۚ لَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ نَصۡرَ أَنفُسِهِمۡ وَلَا هُم مِّنَّا يُصۡحَبُونَ
verses.tr: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us
verses.tl: Am lahum alihatun tamnaAAuhum min doonina la yastateeAAoona nasra anfusihim wala hum minna yushaboona

verses.ar: بَلۡ مَتَّعۡنَا هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ طَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡعُمُرُۗ أَفَلَا يَرَوۡنَ أَنَّا نَأۡتِي ٱلۡأَرۡضَ نَنقُصُهَا مِنۡ أَطۡرَافِهَآۚ أَفَهُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبُونَ
verses.tr: But, [on the contrary], We have provided good things for these [disbelievers] and their fathers until life was prolonged for them. Then do they not see that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? So it is they who will overcome
verses.tl: Bal mattaAAna haolai waabaahum hatta tala AAalayhimu alAAumuru afala yarawna anna natee alarda nanqusuha min atrafiha afahumu alghaliboona

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أُنذِرُكُم بِٱلۡوَحۡيِۚ وَلَا يَسۡمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا مَا يُنذَرُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned
verses.tl: Qul innama onthirukum bialwahyi wala yasmaAAu alssummu aldduAAaa itha ma yuntharoona

verses.ar: وَلَئِن مَّسَّتۡهُمۡ نَفۡحَةٞ مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّكَ لَيَقُولُنَّ يَٰوَيۡلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, "O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers
verses.tl: Walain massathum nafhatun min AAathabi rabbika layaqoolunna ya waylana inna kunna thalimeena

verses.ar: وَنَضَعُ ٱلۡمَوَٰزِينَ ٱلۡقِسۡطَ لِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ فَلَا تُظۡلَمُ نَفۡسٞ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَإِن كَانَ مِثۡقَالَ حَبَّةٖ مِّنۡ خَرۡدَلٍ أَتَيۡنَا بِهَاۗ وَكَفَىٰ بِنَا حَٰسِبِينَ
verses.tr: And We place the scales of justice for the Day of Resurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it forth. And sufficient are We as accountant
verses.tl: WanadaAAu almawazeena alqista liyawmi alqiyamati fala tuthlamu nafsun shayan wain kana mithqala habbatin min khardalin atayna biha wakafa bina hasibeena

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ ٱلۡفُرۡقَانَ وَضِيَآءٗ وَذِكۡرٗا لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
verses.tr: And We had already given Moses and Aaron the criterion and a light and a reminder for the righteous
verses.tl: Walaqad atayna moosa waharoona alfurqana wadiyaan wathikran lilmuttaqeena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَهُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّاعَةِ مُشۡفِقُونَ
verses.tr: Who fear their Lord unseen, while they are of the Hour apprehensive
verses.tl: Allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi wahum mina alssaAAati mushfiqoona

verses.ar: وَهَٰذَا ذِكۡرٞ مُّبَارَكٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُۚ أَفَأَنتُمۡ لَهُۥ مُنكِرُونَ
verses.tr: And this [Qur'an] is a blessed message which We have sent down. Then are you with it unacquainted
verses.tl: Wahatha thikrun mubarakun anzalnahu afaantum lahu munkiroona

verses.ar: ۞وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَآ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ رُشۡدَهُۥ مِن قَبۡلُ وَكُنَّا بِهِۦ عَٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: And We had certainly given Abraham his sound judgement before, and We were of him well-Knowing
verses.tl: Walaqad atayna ibraheema rushdahu min qablu wakunna bihi AAalimeena

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوۡمِهِۦ مَا هَٰذِهِ ٱلتَّمَاثِيلُ ٱلَّتِيٓ أَنتُمۡ لَهَا عَٰكِفُونَ
verses.tr: When he said to his father and his people, "What are these statues to which you are devoted
verses.tl: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma hathihi alttamatheelu allatee antum laha AAakifoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ وَجَدۡنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا لَهَا عَٰبِدِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "We found our fathers worshippers of them
verses.tl: Qaloo wajadna abaana laha AAabideena

verses.ar: قَالَ لَقَدۡ كُنتُمۡ أَنتُمۡ وَءَابَآؤُكُمۡ فِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.tr: He said, "You were certainly, you and your fathers, in manifest error
verses.tl: Qala laqad kuntum antum waabaokum fee dalalin mubeenin

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ أَجِئۡتَنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّ أَمۡ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱللَّـٰعِبِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "Have you come to us with truth, or are you of those who jest
verses.tl: Qaloo ajitana bialhaqqi am anta mina allaAAibeena

verses.ar: قَالَ بَل رَّبُّكُمۡ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلَّذِي فَطَرَهُنَّ وَأَنَا۠ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّـٰهِدِينَ
verses.tr: He said, "[No], rather, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth who created them, and I, to that, am of those who testify
verses.tl: Qala bal rabbukum rabbu alssamawati waalardi allathee fatarahunna waana AAala thalikum mina alshshahideena

verses.ar: وَتَٱللَّهِ لَأَكِيدَنَّ أَصۡنَٰمَكُم بَعۡدَ أَن تُوَلُّواْ مُدۡبِرِينَ
verses.tr: And [I swear] by Allah, I will surely plan against your idols after you have turned and gone away
verses.tl: WataAllahi laakeedanna asnamakum baAAda an tuwalloo mudbireena

verses.ar: فَجَعَلَهُمۡ جُذَٰذًا إِلَّا كَبِيرٗا لَّهُمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ إِلَيۡهِ يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.tr: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question]
verses.tl: FajaAAalahum juthathan illa kabeeran lahum laAAallahum ilayhi yarjiAAoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ مَن فَعَلَ هَٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَآ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers
verses.tl: Qaloo man faAAala hatha bialihatina innahu lamina alththalimeena

verses.ar: قَالُواْ سَمِعۡنَا فَتٗى يَذۡكُرُهُمۡ يُقَالُ لَهُۥٓ إِبۡرَٰهِيمُ
verses.tr: They said, "We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham
verses.tl: Qaloo samiAAna fatan yathkuruhum yuqalu lahu ibraheemu

verses.ar: قَالُواْ فَأۡتُواْ بِهِۦ عَلَىٰٓ أَعۡيُنِ ٱلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَشۡهَدُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify
verses.tl: Qaloo fatoo bihi AAala aAAyuni alnnasi laAAallahum yashhadoona

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ ءَأَنتَ فَعَلۡتَ هَٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَا يَـٰٓإِبۡرَٰهِيمُ
verses.tr: They said, "Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham
verses.tl: Qaloo aanta faAAalta hatha bialihatina ya ibraheemu

verses.ar: قَالَ بَلۡ فَعَلَهُۥ كَبِيرُهُمۡ هَٰذَا فَسۡـَٔلُوهُمۡ إِن كَانُواْ يَنطِقُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak
verses.tl: Qala bal faAAalahu kabeeruhum hatha faisaloohum in kanoo yantiqoona

verses.ar: فَرَجَعُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمۡ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّكُمۡ أَنتُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
verses.tr: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers
verses.tl: FarajaAAoo ila anfusihim faqaloo innakum antumu alththalimoona

verses.ar: ثُمَّ نُكِسُواْ عَلَىٰ رُءُوسِهِمۡ لَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتَ مَا هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يَنطِقُونَ
verses.tr: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak
verses.tl: Thumma nukisoo AAala ruoosihim laqad AAalimta ma haolai yantiqoona

verses.ar: قَالَ أَفَتَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُكُمۡ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا يَضُرُّكُمۡ
verses.tr: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allah that which does not benefit you at all or harm you
verses.tl: Qala afataAAbudoona min dooni Allahi ma la yanfaAAukum shayan wala yadurrukum

verses.ar: أُفّٖ لَّكُمۡ وَلِمَا تَعۡبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allah. Then will you not use reason
verses.tl: Offin lakum walima taAAbudoona min dooni Allahi afala taAAqiloona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ حَرِّقُوهُ وَٱنصُرُوٓاْ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ فَٰعِلِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act
verses.tl: Qaloo harriqoohu waonsuroo alihatakum in kuntum faAAileena

verses.ar: قُلۡنَا يَٰنَارُ كُونِي بَرۡدٗا وَسَلَٰمًا عَلَىٰٓ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
verses.tr: Allah said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham
verses.tl: Qulna ya naru koonee bardan wasalaman AAala ibraheema

verses.ar: وَأَرَادُواْ بِهِۦ كَيۡدٗا فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُمُ ٱلۡأَخۡسَرِينَ
verses.tr: And they intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers
verses.tl: Waaradoo bihi kaydan fajaAAalnahumu alakhsareena

verses.ar: وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَلُوطًا إِلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلَّتِي بَٰرَكۡنَا فِيهَا لِلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds
verses.tl: Wanajjaynahu walootan ila alardi allatee barakna feeha lilAAalameena

verses.ar: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ نَافِلَةٗۖ وَكُلّٗا جَعَلۡنَا صَٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: And We gave him Isaac and Jacob in addition, and all [of them] We made righteous
verses.tl: Wawahabna lahu ishaqa wayaAAqooba nafilatan wakullan jaAAalna saliheena

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَٰهُمۡ أَئِمَّةٗ يَهۡدُونَ بِأَمۡرِنَا وَأَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِمۡ فِعۡلَ ٱلۡخَيۡرَٰتِ وَإِقَامَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَإِيتَآءَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةِۖ وَكَانُواْ لَنَا عَٰبِدِينَ
verses.tr: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakah; and they were worshippers of Us
verses.tl: WajaAAalnahum aimmatan yahdoona biamrina waawhayna ilayhim fiAAla alkhayrati waiqama alssalati waeetaa alzzakati wakanoo lana AAabideena

verses.ar: وَلُوطًا ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ حُكۡمٗا وَعِلۡمٗا وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ مِنَ ٱلۡقَرۡيَةِ ٱلَّتِي كَانَت تَّعۡمَلُ ٱلۡخَبَـٰٓئِثَۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمَ سَوۡءٖ فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.tr: And to Lot We gave judgement and knowledge, and We saved him from the city that was committing wicked deeds. Indeed, they were a people of evil, defiantly disobedient
verses.tl: Walootan ataynahu hukman waAAilman wanajjaynahu mina alqaryati allatee kanat taAAmalu alkhabaitha innahum kanoo qawma sawin fasiqeena

verses.ar: وَأَدۡخَلۡنَٰهُ فِي رَحۡمَتِنَآۖ إِنَّهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous
verses.tl: Waadkhalnahu fee rahmatina innahu mina alssaliheena

verses.ar: وَنُوحًا إِذۡ نَادَىٰ مِن قَبۡلُ فَٱسۡتَجَبۡنَا لَهُۥ فَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡكَرۡبِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allah] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great flood
verses.tl: Wanoohan ith nada min qablu faistajabna lahu fanajjaynahu waahlahu mina alkarbi alAAatheemi

verses.ar: وَنَصَرۡنَٰهُ مِنَ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمَ سَوۡءٖ فَأَغۡرَقۡنَٰهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.tr: And We saved him from the people who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a people of evil, so We drowned them, all together
verses.tl: Wanasarnahu mina alqawmi allatheena kaththaboo biayatina innahum kanoo qawma sawin faaghraqnahum ajmaAAeena

verses.ar: وَدَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيۡمَٰنَ إِذۡ يَحۡكُمَانِ فِي ٱلۡحَرۡثِ إِذۡ نَفَشَتۡ فِيهِ غَنَمُ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ وَكُنَّا لِحُكۡمِهِمۡ شَٰهِدِينَ
verses.tr: And [mention] David and Solomon, when they judged concerning the field - when the sheep of a people overran it [at night], and We were witness to their judgement
verses.tl: Wadawooda wasulaymana ith yahkumani fee alharthi ith nafashat feehi ghanamu alqawmi wakunna lihukmihim shahideena

verses.ar: فَفَهَّمۡنَٰهَا سُلَيۡمَٰنَۚ وَكُلًّا ءَاتَيۡنَا حُكۡمٗا وَعِلۡمٗاۚ وَسَخَّرۡنَا مَعَ دَاوُۥدَ ٱلۡجِبَالَ يُسَبِّحۡنَ وَٱلطَّيۡرَۚ وَكُنَّا فَٰعِلِينَ
verses.tr: And We gave understanding of the case to Solomon, and to each [of them] We gave judgement and knowledge. And We subjected the mountains to exalt [Us], along with David and [also] the birds. And We were doing [that]
verses.tl: Fafahhamnaha sulaymana wakullan atayna hukman waAAilman wasakhkharna maAAa dawooda aljibala yusabbihna waalttayra wakunna faAAileena

verses.ar: وَعَلَّمۡنَٰهُ صَنۡعَةَ لَبُوسٖ لَّكُمۡ لِتُحۡصِنَكُم مِّنۢ بَأۡسِكُمۡۖ فَهَلۡ أَنتُمۡ شَٰكِرُونَ
verses.tr: And We taught him the fashioning of coats of armor to protect you from your [enemy in] battle. So will you then be grateful
verses.tl: WaAAallamnahu sanAAata laboosin lakum lituhsinakum min basikum fahal antum shakiroona

verses.ar: وَلِسُلَيۡمَٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةٗ تَجۡرِي بِأَمۡرِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلَّتِي بَٰرَكۡنَا فِيهَاۚ وَكُنَّا بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing
verses.tl: Walisulaymana alrreeha AAasifatan tajree biamrihi ila alardi allatee barakna feeha wakunna bikulli shayin AAalimeena

verses.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينِ مَن يَغُوصُونَ لَهُۥ وَيَعۡمَلُونَ عَمَلٗا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَۖ وَكُنَّا لَهُمۡ حَٰفِظِينَ
verses.tr: And of the devils were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian
verses.tl: Wamina alshshayateeni man yaghoosoona lahu wayaAAmaloona AAamalan doona thalika wakunna lahum hafitheena

verses.ar: ۞وَأَيُّوبَ إِذۡ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرۡحَمُ ٱلرَّـٰحِمِينَ
verses.tr: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and you are the Most Merciful of the merciful
verses.tl: Waayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alddurru waanta arhamu alrrahimeena

verses.ar: فَٱسۡتَجَبۡنَا لَهُۥ فَكَشَفۡنَا مَا بِهِۦ مِن ضُرّٖۖ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ أَهۡلَهُۥ وَمِثۡلَهُم مَّعَهُمۡ رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِنَا وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِلۡعَٰبِدِينَ
verses.tr: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allah]
verses.tl: Faistajabna lahu fakashafna ma bihi min durrin waataynahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan min AAindina wathikra lilAAabideena

verses.ar: وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِدۡرِيسَ وَذَا ٱلۡكِفۡلِۖ كُلّٞ مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
verses.tr: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient
verses.tl: WaismaAAeela waidreesa watha alkifli kullun mina alssabireena

verses.ar: وَأَدۡخَلۡنَٰهُمۡ فِي رَحۡمَتِنَآۖ إِنَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous
verses.tl: Waadkhalnahum fee rahmatina innahum mina alssaliheena

verses.ar: وَذَا ٱلنُّونِ إِذ ذَّهَبَ مُغَٰضِبٗا فَظَنَّ أَن لَّن نَّقۡدِرَ عَلَيۡهِ فَنَادَىٰ فِي ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ أَن لَّآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنتَ سُبۡحَٰنَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: And [mention] the man of the fish, when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, "There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers
verses.tl: Watha alnnooni ith thahaba mughadiban fathanna an lan naqdira AAalayhi fanada fee alththulumati an la ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu mina alththalimeena

verses.ar: فَٱسۡتَجَبۡنَا لَهُۥ وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ مِنَ ٱلۡغَمِّۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ نُـۨجِي ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: So We responded to him and saved him from the distress. And thus do We save the believers
verses.tl: Faistajabna lahu wanajjaynahu mina alghammi wakathalika nunjee almumineena

verses.ar: وَزَكَرِيَّآ إِذۡ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرۡنِي فَرۡدٗا وَأَنتَ خَيۡرُ ٱلۡوَٰرِثِينَ
verses.tr: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while you are the best of inheritors
