verses.tl: FaatbaAAoohum mushriqeena

verses.ar: فَلَمَّا تَرَـٰٓءَا ٱلۡجَمۡعَانِ قَالَ أَصۡحَٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدۡرَكُونَ
verses.tr: And when the two companies saw one another, the companions of Moses said, "Indeed, we are to be overtaken
verses.tl: Falamma taraa aljamAAani qala ashabu moosa inna lamudrakoona

verses.ar: قَالَ كَلَّآۖ إِنَّ مَعِيَ رَبِّي سَيَهۡدِينِ
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me
verses.tl: Qala kalla inna maAAiya rabbee sayahdeeni

verses.ar: فَأَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضۡرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلۡبَحۡرَۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرۡقٖ كَٱلطَّوۡدِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: Then We inspired to Moses, "Strike with your staff the sea," and it parted, and each portion was like a great towering mountain
verses.tl: Faawhayna ila moosa ani idrib biAAasaka albahra fainfalaqa fakana kullu firqin kaalttawdi alAAatheemi

verses.ar: وَأَزۡلَفۡنَا ثَمَّ ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
verses.tr: And We advanced thereto the pursuers
verses.tl: Waazlafna thamma alakhareena

verses.ar: وَأَنجَيۡنَا مُوسَىٰ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥٓ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.tr: And We saved Moses and those with him, all together
verses.tl: Waanjayna moosa waman maAAahu ajmaAAeena

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَغۡرَقۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
verses.tr: Then We drowned the others
verses.tl: Thumma aghraqna alakhareena

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
verses.tl: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

verses.ar: وَٱتۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ نَبَأَ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
verses.tr: And recite to them the news of Abraham
verses.tl: Waotlu AAalayhim nabaa ibraheema

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوۡمِهِۦ مَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: When he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship
verses.tl: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi ma taAAbudoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ نَعۡبُدُ أَصۡنَامٗا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَٰكِفِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted
verses.tl: Qaloo naAAbudu asnaman fanathallu laha AAakifeena

verses.ar: قَالَ هَلۡ يَسۡمَعُونَكُمۡ إِذۡ تَدۡعُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate
verses.tl: Qala hal yasmaAAoonakum ith tadAAoona

verses.ar: أَوۡ يَنفَعُونَكُمۡ أَوۡ يَضُرُّونَ
verses.tr: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm
verses.tl: Aw yanfaAAoonakum aw yadurroona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ بَلۡ وَجَدۡنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus
verses.tl: Qaloo bal wajadna abaana kathalika yafAAaloona

verses.ar: قَالَ أَفَرَءَيۡتُم مَّا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping
verses.tl: Qala afaraaytum ma kuntum taAAbudoona

verses.ar: أَنتُمۡ وَءَابَآؤُكُمُ ٱلۡأَقۡدَمُونَ
verses.tr: You and your ancient forefathers
verses.tl: Antum waabaokumu alaqdamoona

verses.ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ عَدُوّٞ لِّيٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Fainnahum AAaduwwun lee illa rabba alAAalameena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَنِي فَهُوَ يَهۡدِينِ
verses.tr: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me
verses.tl: Allathee khalaqanee fahuwa yahdeeni

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِي هُوَ يُطۡعِمُنِي وَيَسۡقِينِ
verses.tr: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink
verses.tl: Waallathee huwa yutAAimunee wayasqeeni

verses.ar: وَإِذَا مَرِضۡتُ فَهُوَ يَشۡفِينِ
verses.tr: And when I am ill, it is He who cures me
verses.tl: Waitha maridtu fahuwa yashfeeni

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِي يُمِيتُنِي ثُمَّ يُحۡيِينِ
verses.tr: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life
verses.tl: Waallathee yumeetunee thumma yuhyeeni

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِيٓ أَطۡمَعُ أَن يَغۡفِرَ لِي خَطِيٓـَٔتِي يَوۡمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Waallathee atmaAAu an yaghfira lee khateeatee yawma alddeeni

verses.ar: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِي حُكۡمٗا وَأَلۡحِقۡنِي بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous
verses.tl: Rabbi hab lee hukman waalhiqnee bialssaliheena

verses.ar: وَٱجۡعَل لِّي لِسَانَ صِدۡقٖ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations
verses.tl: WaijAAal lee lisana sidqin fee alakhireena

verses.ar: وَٱجۡعَلۡنِي مِن وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.tr: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure
verses.tl: WaijAAalnee min warathati jannati alnnaAAeemi

verses.ar: وَٱغۡفِرۡ لِأَبِيٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.tr: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray
verses.tl: Waighfir liabee innahu kana mina alddalleena

verses.ar: وَلَا تُخۡزِنِي يَوۡمَ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.tr: And do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected
verses.tl: Wala tukhzinee yawma yubAAathoona

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٞ وَلَا بَنُونَ
verses.tr: The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children
verses.tl: Yawma la yanfaAAu malun wala banoona

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَنۡ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلۡبٖ سَلِيمٖ
verses.tr: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart
verses.tl: Illa man ata Allaha biqalbin saleemin

verses.ar: وَأُزۡلِفَتِ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
verses.tr: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous
verses.tl: Waozlifati aljannatu lilmuttaqeena

verses.ar: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلۡجَحِيمُ لِلۡغَاوِينَ
verses.tr: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators
verses.tl: Waburrizati aljaheemu lilghaweena

verses.ar: وَقِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
verses.tl: Waqeela lahum ayna ma kuntum taAAbudoona

verses.ar: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلۡ يَنصُرُونَكُمۡ أَوۡ يَنتَصِرُونَ
verses.tr: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves
verses.tl: Min dooni Allahi hal yansuroonakum aw yantasiroona

verses.ar: فَكُبۡكِبُواْ فِيهَا هُمۡ وَٱلۡغَاوُۥنَ
verses.tr: So they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators
verses.tl: Fakubkiboo feeha hum waalghawoona

verses.ar: وَجُنُودُ إِبۡلِيسَ أَجۡمَعُونَ
verses.tr: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together
verses.tl: Wajunoodu ibleesa ajmaAAoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ وَهُمۡ فِيهَا يَخۡتَصِمُونَ
verses.tr: They will say while they dispute therein
verses.tl: Qaloo wahum feeha yakhtasimoona

verses.ar: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٍ
verses.tr: By Allah, we were indeed in manifest error
verses.tl: TaAllahi in kunna lafee dalalin mubeenin

verses.ar: إِذۡ نُسَوِّيكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Ith nusawweekum birabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَضَلَّنَآ إِلَّا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
verses.tr: And no one misguided us except the criminals
verses.tl: Wama adallana illa almujrimoona

verses.ar: فَمَا لَنَا مِن شَٰفِعِينَ
verses.tr: So now we have no intercessors
verses.tl: Fama lana min shafiAAeena

verses.ar: وَلَا صَدِيقٍ حَمِيمٖ
verses.tr: And not a devoted friend
verses.tl: Wala sadeeqin hameemin

verses.ar: فَلَوۡ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةٗ فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers
verses.tl: Falaw anna lana karratan fanakoona mina almumineena

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
verses.tl: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٍ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: The people of Noah denied the messengers
verses.tl: Kaththabat qawmu noohin almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
verses.tl: Ith qala lahum akhoohum noohun ala tattaqoona

verses.ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
verses.tl: Innee lakum rasoolun ameenun

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: ۞قَالُوٓاْ أَنُؤۡمِنُ لَكَ وَٱتَّبَعَكَ ٱلۡأَرۡذَلُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]
verses.tl: Qaloo anuminu laka waittabaAAaka alarthaloona

verses.ar: قَالَ وَمَا عِلۡمِي بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do
verses.tl: Qala wama AAilmee bima kanoo yaAAmaloona

verses.ar: إِنۡ حِسَابُهُمۡ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّيۖ لَوۡ تَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive
verses.tl: In hisabuhum illa AAala rabbee law tashAAuroona

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِطَارِدِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And I am not one to drive away the believers
verses.tl: Wama ana bitaridi almumineena

verses.ar: إِنۡ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: I am only a clear warner
verses.tl: In ana illa natheerun mubeenun

verses.ar: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ يَٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمَرۡجُومِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned
verses.tl: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya noohu latakoonanna mina almarjoomeena

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوۡمِي كَذَّبُونِ
verses.tr: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me
verses.tl: Qala rabbi inna qawmee kaththabooni

verses.ar: فَٱفۡتَحۡ بَيۡنِي وَبَيۡنَهُمۡ فَتۡحٗا وَنَجِّنِي وَمَن مَّعِيَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of the believers
verses.tl: Faiftah baynee wabaynahum fathan wanajjinee waman maAAiya mina almumineena

verses.ar: فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِي ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
verses.tr: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship
verses.tl: Faanjaynahu waman maAAahu fee alfulki almashhooni

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَغۡرَقۡنَا بَعۡدُ ٱلۡبَاقِينَ
verses.tr: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones
verses.tl: Thumma aghraqna baAAdu albaqeena

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
verses.tl: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادٌ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: Aad denied the messengers
verses.tl: Kaththabat AAadun almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: When their brother Hud said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
verses.tl: Ith qala lahum akhoohum hoodun ala tattaqoona

verses.ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
verses.tl: Innee lakum rasoolun ameenun

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: أَتَبۡنُونَ بِكُلِّ رِيعٍ ءَايَةٗ تَعۡبَثُونَ
verses.tr: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves
verses.tl: Atabnoona bikulli reeAAin ayatan taAAbathoona

verses.ar: وَتَتَّخِذُونَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَخۡلُدُونَ
verses.tr: And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally
verses.tl: Watattakhithoona masaniAAa laAAallakum takhludoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا بَطَشۡتُم بَطَشۡتُمۡ جَبَّارِينَ
verses.tr: And when you strike, you strike as tyrants
verses.tl: Waitha batashtum batashtum jabbareena

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَمَدَّكُم بِمَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: And fear He who provided you with that which you know
verses.tl: Waittaqoo allathee amaddakum bima taAAlamoona

verses.ar: أَمَدَّكُم بِأَنۡعَٰمٖ وَبَنِينَ
verses.tr: Provided you with grazing livestock and children
verses.tl: Amaddakum bianAAamin wabaneena

verses.ar: وَجَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.tr: And gardens and springs
verses.tl: Wajannatin waAAuyoonin

verses.ar: إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day
verses.tl: Innee akhafu AAalaykum AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin

verses.ar: قَالُواْ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡنَآ أَوَعَظۡتَ أَمۡ لَمۡ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلۡوَٰعِظِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors
verses.tl: Qaloo sawaon AAalayna awaAAathta am lam takun mina alwaAAitheena

verses.ar: إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا خُلُقُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: This is not but the custom of the former peoples
verses.tl: In hatha illa khuluqu alawwaleena

verses.ar: وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.tr: And we are not to be punished
verses.tl: Wama nahnu bimuAAaththabeena

verses.ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهۡلَكۡنَٰهُمۡۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
verses.tl: Fakaththaboohu faahlaknahum inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: Thamud denied the messengers
verses.tl: Kaththabat thamoodu almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ صَٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
verses.tl: Ith qala lahum akhoohum salihun ala tattaqoona

verses.ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
verses.tl: Innee lakum rasoolun ameenun

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: أَتُتۡرَكُونَ فِي مَا هَٰهُنَآ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.tr: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death]
verses.tl: Atutrakoona fee ma hahuna amineena

verses.ar: فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٖ
verses.tr: Within gardens and springs
verses.tl: Fee jannatin waAAuyoonin

verses.ar: وَزُرُوعٖ وَنَخۡلٖ طَلۡعُهَا هَضِيمٞ
verses.tr: And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit
verses.tl: WazurooAAin wanakhlin talAAuha hadeemun

verses.ar: وَتَنۡحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡجِبَالِ بُيُوتٗا فَٰرِهِينَ
verses.tr: And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill
verses.tl: Watanhitoona mina aljibali buyootan fariheena

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: وَلَا تُطِيعُوٓاْ أَمۡرَ ٱلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ
verses.tr: And do not obey the order of the transgressors
verses.tl: Wala tuteeAAoo amra almusrifeena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفۡسِدُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَا يُصۡلِحُونَ
verses.tr: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend
verses.tl: Allatheena yufsidoona fee alardi wala yuslihoona

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُسَحَّرِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic
verses.tl: Qaloo innama anta mina almusahhareena

verses.ar: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا فَأۡتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful
verses.tl: Ma anta illa basharun mithluna fati biayatin in kunta mina alssadiqeena

verses.ar: قَالَ هَٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٞ لَّهَا شِرۡبٞ وَلَكُمۡ شِرۡبُ يَوۡمٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ
verses.tr: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day
verses.tl: Qala hathihi naqatun laha shirbun walakum shirbu yawmin maAAloomin

verses.ar: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٖ فَيَأۡخُذَكُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
verses.tr: And do not touch her with harm, lest you be seized by the punishment of a terrible day
verses.tl: Wala tamassooha bisooin fayakhuthakum AAathabu yawmin AAatheemin

verses.ar: فَعَقَرُوهَا فَأَصۡبَحُواْ نَٰدِمِينَ
verses.tr: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful
verses.tl: FaAAaqarooha faasbahoo nadimeena

verses.ar: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And the punishment seized them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
verses.tl: Faakhathahumu alAAathabu inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ لُوطٍ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: The people of Lot denied the messengers
verses.tl: Kaththabat qawmu lootin almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ أَخُوهُمۡ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: When their brother Lot said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
verses.tl: Ith qala lahum akhoohum lootun ala tattaqoona

verses.ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
verses.tl: Innee lakum rasoolun ameenun

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: أَتَأۡتُونَ ٱلذُّكۡرَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: Do you approach males among the worlds
verses.tl: Atatoona alththukrana mina alAAalameena

verses.ar: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمۡ رَبُّكُم مِّنۡ أَزۡوَٰجِكُمۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٌ عَادُونَ
verses.tr: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing
verses.tl: Watatharoona ma khalaqa lakum rabbukum min azwajikum bal antum qawmun AAadoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهِ يَٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡرَجِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted
verses.tl: Qaloo lain lam tantahi ya lootu latakoonanna mina almukhrajeena

verses.ar: قَالَ إِنِّي لِعَمَلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقَالِينَ
verses.tr: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it]
verses.tl: Qala innee liAAamalikum mina alqaleena

verses.ar: رَبِّ نَجِّنِي وَأَهۡلِي مِمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do
verses.tl: Rabbi najjinee waahlee mimma yaAAmaloona

verses.ar: فَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥٓ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.tr: So We saved him and his family, all
verses.tl: Fanajjaynahu waahlahu ajmaAAeena

verses.ar: إِلَّا عَجُوزٗا فِي ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.tr: Except an old woman among those who remained behind
verses.tl: Illa AAajoozan fee alghabireena

verses.ar: ثُمَّ دَمَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
verses.tr: Then We destroyed the others
verses.tl: Thumma dammarna alakhareena

verses.ar: وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم مَّطَرٗاۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
verses.tr: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned
verses.tl: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
verses.tl: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

verses.ar: كَذَّبَ أَصۡحَٰبُ لۡـَٔيۡكَةِ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: The companions of the thicket denied the messengers
verses.tl: Kaththaba ashabu alaykati almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لَهُمۡ شُعَيۡبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: When Shu'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah
verses.tl: Ith qala lahum shuAAaybun ala tattaqoona

verses.ar: إِنِّي لَكُمۡ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger
verses.tl: Innee lakum rasoolun ameenun

verses.ar: فَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: So fear Allah and obey me
verses.tl: Faittaqoo Allaha waateeAAooni

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٍۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Wama asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: ۞أَوۡفُواْ ٱلۡكَيۡلَ وَلَا تَكُونُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡمُخۡسِرِينَ
verses.tr: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss
verses.tl: Awfoo alkayla wala takoonoo mina almukhsireena

verses.ar: وَزِنُواْ بِٱلۡقِسۡطَاسِ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمِ
verses.tr: And weigh with an even balance
verses.tl: Wazinoo bialqistasi almustaqeemi

verses.ar: وَلَا تَبۡخَسُواْ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشۡيَآءَهُمۡ وَلَا تَعۡثَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مُفۡسِدِينَ
verses.tr: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption
verses.tl: Wala tabkhasoo alnnasa ashyaahum wala taAAthaw fee alardi mufsideena

verses.ar: وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَكُمۡ وَٱلۡجِبِلَّةَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: And fear He who created you and the former creation
verses.tl: Waittaqoo allathee khalaqakum waaljibillata alawwaleena

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُسَحَّرِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic
verses.tl: Qaloo innama anta mina almusahhareena

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡكَٰذِبِينَ
verses.tr: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars
verses.tl: Wama anta illa basharun mithluna wain nathunnuka lamina alkathibeena

verses.ar: فَأَسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡنَا كِسَفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful
verses.tl: Faasqit AAalayna kisafan mina alssamai in kunta mina alssadiqeena

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّيٓ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do
verses.tl: Qala rabbee aAAlamu bima taAAmaloona

verses.ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ عَذَابُ يَوۡمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.tr: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day
verses.tl: Fakaththaboohu faakhathahum AAathabu yawmi alththullati innahu kana AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكۡثَرُهُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers
verses.tl: Inna fee thalika laayatan wama kana aktharuhum mumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lahuwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَنزِيلُ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, the Qur'an is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Wainnahu latanzeelu rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: نَزَلَ بِهِ ٱلرُّوحُ ٱلۡأَمِينُ
verses.tr: The Trustworthy Spirit has brought it down
verses.tl: Nazala bihi alrroohu alameenu

verses.ar: عَلَىٰ قَلۡبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنذِرِينَ
verses.tr: Upon your heart, [O Muhammad] - that you may be of the warners
verses.tl: AAala qalbika litakoona mina almunthireena

verses.ar: بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِيّٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.tr: In a clear Arabic language
verses.tl: Bilisanin AAarabiyyin mubeenin

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَفِي زُبُرِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples
verses.tl: Wainnahu lafee zuburi alawwaleena

verses.ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ ءَايَةً أَن يَعۡلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُاْ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ
verses.tr: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel
verses.tl: Awalam yakun lahum ayatan an yaAAlamahu AAulamao banee israeela

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ نَزَّلۡنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضِ ٱلۡأَعۡجَمِينَ
verses.tr: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners
verses.tl: Walaw nazzalnahu AAala baAAdi alaAAjameena

verses.ar: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيۡهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it
verses.tl: Faqaraahu AAalayhim ma kanoo bihi mumineena

verses.ar: كَذَٰلِكَ سَلَكۡنَٰهُ فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: Thus have We inserted disbelief into the hearts of the criminals
verses.tl: Kathalika salaknahu fee quloobi almujrimeena

verses.ar: لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ
verses.tr: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment
verses.tl: La yuminoona bihi hatta yarawoo alAAathaba alaleema

verses.ar: فَيَأۡتِيَهُم بَغۡتَةٗ وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not
verses.tl: Fayatiyahum baghtatan wahum la yashAAuroona

verses.ar: فَيَقُولُواْ هَلۡ نَحۡنُ مُنظَرُونَ
verses.tr: And they will say, "May we be reprieved
verses.tl: Fayaqooloo hal nahnu muntharoona

verses.ar: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
verses.tr: So for Our punishment are they impatient
verses.tl: AfabiAAathabina yastaAAjiloona

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ إِن مَّتَّعۡنَٰهُمۡ سِنِينَ
verses.tr: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years
verses.tl: Afaraayta in mattaAAnahum sineena

verses.ar: ثُمَّ جَآءَهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.tr: And then there came to them that which they were promised
verses.tl: Thumma jaahum ma kanoo yooAAadoona

verses.ar: مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يُمَتَّعُونَ
verses.tr: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided
verses.tl: Ma aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yumattaAAoona

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَرۡيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
verses.tr: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners
verses.tl: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illa laha munthiroona

verses.ar: ذِكۡرَىٰ وَمَا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust
verses.tl: Thikra wama kunna thalimeena

verses.ar: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتۡ بِهِ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ
verses.tr: And the devils have not brought the revelation down
verses.tl: Wama tanazzalat bihi alshshayateenu

verses.ar: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لَهُمۡ وَمَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ
verses.tr: It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able
verses.tl: Wama yanbaghee lahum wama yastateeAAoona

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلسَّمۡعِ لَمَعۡزُولُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed
verses.tl: Innahum AAani alssamAAi lamaAAzooloona

verses.ar: فَلَا تَدۡعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.tr: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and [thus] be among the punished
verses.tl: Fala tadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara fatakoona mina almuAAaththabeena

verses.ar: وَأَنذِرۡ عَشِيرَتَكَ ٱلۡأَقۡرَبِينَ
verses.tr: And warn, [O Muhammad], your closest kindred
verses.tl: Waanthir AAasheerataka alaqrabeena

verses.ar: وَٱخۡفِضۡ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And lower your wing to those who follow you of the believers
verses.tl: Waikhfid janahaka limani ittabaAAaka mina almumineena

verses.ar: فَإِنۡ عَصَوۡكَ فَقُلۡ إِنِّي بَرِيٓءٞ مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing
verses.tl: Fain AAasawka faqul innee bareeon mimma taAAmaloona

verses.ar: وَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَى ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.tr: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Watawakkal AAala alAAazeezi alrraheemi

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يَرَىٰكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.tr: Who sees you when you arise
verses.tl: Allathee yaraka heena taqoomu

verses.ar: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِي ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
verses.tr: And your movement among those who prostrate
verses.tl: Wataqallubaka fee alssajideena

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.tr: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing
verses.tl: Innahu huwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu

verses.ar: هَلۡ أُنَبِّئُكُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ
verses.tr: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend
verses.tl: Hal onabbiokum AAala man tanazzalu alshshayateenu

verses.ar: تَنَزَّلُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٖ
verses.tr: They descend upon every sinful liar
verses.tl: Tanazzalu AAala kulli affakin atheemin

verses.ar: يُلۡقُونَ ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَأَكۡثَرُهُمۡ كَٰذِبُونَ
verses.tr: They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars
verses.tl: Yulqoona alssamAAa waaktharuhum kathiboona

verses.ar: وَٱلشُّعَرَآءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ ٱلۡغَاوُۥنَ
verses.tr: And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them
verses.tl: WaalshshuAAarao yattabiAAuhumu alghawoona

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّهُمۡ فِي كُلِّ وَادٖ يَهِيمُونَ
verses.tr: Do you not see that in every valley they roam
verses.tl: Alam tara annahum fee kulli wadin yaheemoona

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُمۡ يَقُولُونَ مَا لَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
verses.tr: And that they say what they do not do
verses.tl: Waannahum yaqooloona ma la yafAAaloona

verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَذَكَرُواْ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرٗا وَٱنتَصَرُواْ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا ظُلِمُواْۗ وَسَيَعۡلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓاْ أَيَّ مُنقَلَبٖ يَنقَلِبُونَ
verses.tr: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned
verses.tl: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati wathakaroo Allaha katheeran waintasaroo min baAAdi ma thulimoo wasayaAAlamu allatheena thalamoo ayya munqalabin yanqaliboona

verses.ar: طسٓۚ تِلۡكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ وَكِتَابٖ مُّبِينٍ
verses.tr: Ta, Seen. These are the verses of the Qur'an and a clear Book
verses.tl: Taseen tilka ayatu alqurani wakitabin mubeenin

verses.ar: هُدٗى وَبُشۡرَىٰ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: As guidance and good tidings for the believers
verses.tl: Hudan wabushra lilmumineena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤۡتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ هُمۡ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.tr: Who establish prayer and give zakah, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith]
verses.tl: Allatheena yuqeemoona alssalata wayutoona alzzakata wahum bialakhirati hum yooqinoona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمۡ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ يَعۡمَهُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly
verses.tl: Inna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati zayyanna lahum aAAmalahum fahum yaAAmahoona

verses.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمۡ سُوٓءُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ وَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلۡأَخۡسَرُونَ
verses.tr: Those are the ones for whom there will be the worst of punishment, and in the Hereafter they are the greatest losers
verses.tl: Olaika allatheena lahum sooo alAAathabi wahum fee alakhirati humu alakhsaroona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ مِن لَّدُنۡ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.tr: And indeed, [O Muhammad], you receive the Qur'an from one Wise and Knowing
verses.tl: Wainnaka latulaqqa alqurana min ladun hakeemin AAaleemin

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهۡلِهِۦٓ إِنِّيٓ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابٖ قَبَسٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُونَ
verses.tr: [Mention] when Moses said to his family, "Indeed, I have perceived a fire. I will bring you from there information or will bring you a burning torch that you may warm yourselves
verses.tl: Ith qala moosa liahlihi innee anastu naran saateekum minha bikhabarin aw ateekum bishihabin qabasin laAAallakum tastaloona

verses.ar: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُودِيَ أَنۢ بُورِكَ مَن فِي ٱلنَّارِ وَمَنۡ حَوۡلَهَا وَسُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: But when he came to it, he was called, "Blessed is whoever is at the fire and whoever is around it. And exalted is Allah, Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Falamma jaaha noodiya an boorika man fee alnnari waman hawlaha wasubhana Allahi rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
verses.tr: O Moses, indeed it is I - Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise
verses.tl: Ya moosa innahu ana Allahu alAAazeezu alhakeemu

verses.ar: وَأَلۡقِ عَصَاكَۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهۡتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنّٞ وَلَّىٰ مُدۡبِرٗا وَلَمۡ يُعَقِّبۡۚ يَٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفۡ إِنِّي لَا يَخَافُ لَدَيَّ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.tr: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allah said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear
verses.tl: Waalqi AAasaka falamma raaha tahtazzu kaannaha jannun walla mudbiran walam yuAAaqqib ya moosa la takhaf innee la yakhafu ladayya almursaloona

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسۡنَۢا بَعۡدَ سُوٓءٖ فَإِنِّي غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
verses.tr: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful
verses.tl: Illa man thalama thumma baddala husnan baAAda sooin fainnee ghafoorun raheemun

verses.ar: وَأَدۡخِلۡ يَدَكَ فِي جَيۡبِكَ تَخۡرُجۡ بَيۡضَآءَ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ سُوٓءٖۖ فِي تِسۡعِ ءَايَٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَقَوۡمِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.tr: And put your hand into the opening of your garment [at the breast]; it will come out white without disease. [These are] among the nine signs [you will take] to Pharaoh and his people. Indeed, they have been a people defiantly disobedient
verses.tl: Waadkhil yadaka fee jaybika takhruj baydaa min ghayri sooin fee tisAAi ayatin ila firAAawna waqawmihi innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena

verses.ar: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ ءَايَٰتُنَا مُبۡصِرَةٗ قَالُواْ هَٰذَا سِحۡرٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic
verses.tl: Falamma jaathum ayatuna mubsiratan qaloo hatha sihrun mubeenun

verses.ar: وَجَحَدُواْ بِهَا وَٱسۡتَيۡقَنَتۡهَآ أَنفُسُهُمۡ ظُلۡمٗا وَعُلُوّٗاۚ فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ
verses.tr: And they rejected them, while their [inner] selves were convinced thereof, out of injustice and haughtiness. So see how was the end of the corrupters
verses.tl: Wajahadoo biha waistayqanatha anfusuhum thulman waAAuluwwan faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu almufsideena

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ ءَاتَيۡنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيۡمَٰنَ عِلۡمٗاۖ وَقَالَا ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٖ مِّنۡ عِبَادِهِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allah, who has favored us over many of His believing servants
verses.tl: Walaqad atayna dawooda wasulaymana AAilman waqala alhamdu lillahi allathee faddalana AAala katheerin min AAibadihi almumineena

verses.ar: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيۡمَٰنُ دَاوُۥدَۖ وَقَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ عُلِّمۡنَا مَنطِقَ ٱلطَّيۡرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلۡفَضۡلُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
verses.tr: And Solomon inherited David. He said, "O people, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given from all things. Indeed, this is evident bounty
verses.tl: Wawaritha sulaymanu dawooda waqala ya ayyuha alnnasu AAullimna mantiqa alttayri waooteena min kulli shayin inna hatha lahuwa alfadlu almubeenu

verses.ar: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيۡمَٰنَ جُنُودُهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ وَٱلۡإِنسِ وَٱلطَّيۡرِ فَهُمۡ يُوزَعُونَ
verses.tr: And gathered for Solomon were his soldiers of the jinn and men and birds, and they were [marching] in rows
verses.tl: Wahushira lisulaymana junooduhu mina aljinni waalinsi waalttayri fahum yoozaAAoona

verses.ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ وَادِ ٱلنَّمۡلِ قَالَتۡ نَمۡلَةٞ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّمۡلُ ٱدۡخُلُواْ مَسَٰكِنَكُمۡ لَا يَحۡطِمَنَّكُمۡ سُلَيۡمَٰنُ وَجُنُودُهُۥ وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: Until, when they came upon the valley of the ants, an ant said, "O ants, enter your dwellings that you not be crushed by Solomon and his soldiers while they perceive not
verses.tl: Hatta itha ataw AAala wadi alnnamli qalat namlatun ya ayyuha alnnamlu odkhuloo masakinakum la yahtimannakum sulaymanu wajunooduhu wahum la yashAAuroona

verses.ar: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكٗا مِّن قَوۡلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوۡزِعۡنِيٓ أَنۡ أَشۡكُرَ نِعۡمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِيٓ أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَيَّ وَأَنۡ أَعۡمَلَ صَٰلِحٗا تَرۡضَىٰهُ وَأَدۡخِلۡنِي بِرَحۡمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants
verses.tl: Fatabassama dahikan min qawliha waqala rabbi awziAAnee an ashkura niAAmataka allatee anAAamta AAalayya waAAala walidayya waan aAAmala salihan tardahu waadkhilnee birahmatika fee AAibadika alssaliheena

verses.ar: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيۡرَ فَقَالَ مَالِيَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلۡهُدۡهُدَ أَمۡ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡغَآئِبِينَ
verses.tr: And he took attendance of the birds and said, "Why do I not see the hoopoe - or is he among the absent
verses.tl: Watafaqqada alttayra faqala ma liya la ara alhudhuda am kana mina alghaibeena

verses.ar: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُۥ عَذَابٗا شَدِيدًا أَوۡ لَأَاْذۡبَحَنَّهُۥٓ أَوۡ لَيَأۡتِيَنِّي بِسُلۡطَٰنٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.tr: I will surely punish him with a severe punishment or slaughter him unless he brings me clear authorization
verses.tl: LaoAAaththibannahu AAathaban shadeedan aw laathbahannahu aw layatiyannee bisultanin mubeenin

verses.ar: فَمَكَثَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيدٖ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمۡ تُحِطۡ بِهِۦ وَجِئۡتُكَ مِن سَبَإِۭ بِنَبَإٖ يَقِينٍ
verses.tr: But the hoopoe stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news
verses.tl: Famakatha ghayra baAAeedin faqala ahattu bima lam tuhit bihi wajituka min sabain binabain yaqeenin

verses.ar: إِنِّي وَجَدتُّ ٱمۡرَأَةٗ تَمۡلِكُهُمۡ وَأُوتِيَتۡ مِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ وَلَهَا عَرۡشٌ عَظِيمٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne
verses.tl: Innee wajadtu imraatan tamlikuhum waootiyat min kulli shayin walaha AAarshun AAatheemun

verses.ar: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوۡمَهَا يَسۡجُدُونَ لِلشَّمۡسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ فَصَدَّهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمۡ لَا يَهۡتَدُونَ
verses.tr: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allah, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided
verses.tl: Wajadtuha waqawmaha yasjudoona lilshshamsi min dooni Allahi wazayyana lahumu alshshaytanu aAAmalahum fasaddahum AAani alssabeeli fahum la yahtadoona

verses.ar: أَلَّاۤ يَسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡخَبۡءَ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تُخۡفُونَ وَمَا تُعۡلِنُونَ
verses.tr: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allah, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare
verses.tl: Alla yasjudoo lillahi allathee yukhriju alkhabaa fee alssamawati waalardi wayaAAlamu ma tukhfoona wama tuAAlinoona

verses.ar: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ۩
verses.tr: Allah - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne
verses.tl: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa rabbu alAAarshi alAAatheemi

verses.ar: ۞قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقۡتَ أَمۡ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰذِبِينَ
verses.tr: [Solomon] said, "We will see whether you were truthful or were of the liars
verses.tl: Qala sananthuru asadaqta am kunta mina alkathibeena

verses.ar: ٱذۡهَب بِّكِتَٰبِي هَٰذَا فَأَلۡقِهۡ إِلَيۡهِمۡ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ فَٱنظُرۡ مَاذَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.tr: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return
verses.tl: Ithhab bikitabee hatha faalqih ilayhim thumma tawalla AAanhum faonthur matha yarjiAAoona

verses.ar: قَالَتۡ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡمَلَؤُاْ إِنِّيٓ أُلۡقِيَ إِلَيَّ كِتَٰبٞ كَرِيمٌ
verses.tr: She said, "O eminent ones, indeed, to me has been delivered a noble letter
verses.tl: Qalat ya ayyuha almalao innee olqiya ilayya kitabun kareemun

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيۡمَٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسۡمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is from Solomon, and indeed, it reads: 'In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful
verses.tl: Innahu min sulaymana wainnahu bismi Allahi alrrahmani alrraheemi

verses.ar: أَلَّا تَعۡلُواْ عَلَيَّ وَأۡتُونِي مُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.tr: Be not haughty with me but come to me in submission [as Muslims]
verses.tl: Alla taAAloo AAalayya watoonee muslimeena

verses.ar: قَالَتۡ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡمَلَؤُاْ أَفۡتُونِي فِيٓ أَمۡرِي مَا كُنتُ قَاطِعَةً أَمۡرًا حَتَّىٰ تَشۡهَدُونِ
verses.tr: She said, "O eminent ones, advise me in my affair. I would not decide a matter until you witness [for] me
verses.tl: Qalat ya ayyuha almalao aftoonee fee amree ma kuntu qatiAAatan amran hatta tashhadoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ نَحۡنُ أُوْلُواْ قُوَّةٖ وَأُوْلُواْ بَأۡسٖ شَدِيدٖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ إِلَيۡكِ فَٱنظُرِي مَاذَا تَأۡمُرِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "We are men of strength and of great military might, but the command is yours, so see what you will command
verses.tl: Qaloo nahnu oloo quwwatin waoloo basin shadeedin waalamru ilayki faonthuree matha tamureena

verses.ar: قَالَتۡ إِنَّ ٱلۡمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُواْ قَرۡيَةً أَفۡسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓاْ أَعِزَّةَ أَهۡلِهَآ أَذِلَّةٗۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ يَفۡعَلُونَ
verses.tr: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do
verses.tl: Qalat inna almulooka itha dakhaloo qaryatan afsadooha wajaAAaloo aAAizzata ahliha athillatan wakathalika yafAAaloona

verses.ar: وَإِنِّي مُرۡسِلَةٌ إِلَيۡهِم بِهَدِيَّةٖ فَنَاظِرَةُۢ بِمَ يَرۡجِعُ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.tr: But indeed, I will send to them a gift and see with what [reply] the messengers will return
verses.tl: Wainnee mursilatun ilayhim bihadiyyatin fanathiratun bima yarjiAAu almursaloona

verses.ar: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيۡمَٰنَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٖ فَمَآ ءَاتَىٰنِۦَ ٱللَّهُ خَيۡرٞ مِّمَّآ ءَاتَىٰكُمۚ بَلۡ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمۡ تَفۡرَحُونَ
verses.tr: So when they came to Solomon, he said, "Do you provide me with wealth? But what Allah has given me is better than what He has given you. Rather, it is you who rejoice in your gift
verses.tl: Falamma jaa sulaymana qala atumiddoonani bimalin fama ataniya Allahu khayrun mimma atakum bal antum bihadiyyatikum tafrahoona

verses.ar: ٱرۡجِعۡ إِلَيۡهِمۡ فَلَنَأۡتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٖ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخۡرِجَنَّهُم مِّنۡهَآ أَذِلَّةٗ وَهُمۡ صَٰغِرُونَ
verses.tr: Return to them, for we will surely come to them with soldiers that they will be powerless to encounter, and we will surely expel them therefrom in humiliation, and they will be debased
verses.tl: IrjiAA ilayhim falanatiyannahum bijunoodin la qibala lahum biha walanukhrijannahum minha athillatan wahum saghiroona

verses.ar: قَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡمَلَؤُاْ أَيُّكُمۡ يَأۡتِينِي بِعَرۡشِهَا قَبۡلَ أَن يَأۡتُونِي مُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.tr: [Solomon] said, "O assembly [of jinn], which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission
verses.tl: Qala ya ayyuha almalao ayyukum yateenee biAAarshiha qabla an yatoonee muslimeena

verses.ar: قَالَ عِفۡرِيتٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبۡلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَۖ وَإِنِّي عَلَيۡهِ لَقَوِيٌّ أَمِينٞ
verses.tr: A powerful one from among the jinn said, "I will bring it to you before you rise from your place, and indeed, I am for this [task] strong and trustworthy
verses.tl: Qala AAifreetun mina aljinni ana ateeka bihi qabla an taqooma min maqamika wainne AAalayhi laqawiyyun ameenun

verses.ar: قَالَ ٱلَّذِي عِندَهُۥ عِلۡمٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبۡلَ أَن يَرۡتَدَّ إِلَيۡكَ طَرۡفُكَۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهُ مُسۡتَقِرًّا عِندَهُۥ قَالَ هَٰذَا مِن فَضۡلِ رَبِّي لِيَبۡلُوَنِيٓ ءَأَشۡكُرُ أَمۡ أَكۡفُرُۖ وَمَن شَكَرَ فَإِنَّمَا يَشۡكُرُ لِنَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ رَبِّي غَنِيّٞ كَرِيمٞ
verses.tr: Said one who had knowledge from the Scripture, "I will bring it to you before your glance returns to you." And when [Solomon] saw it placed before him, he said, "This is from the favor of my Lord to test me whether I will be grateful or ungrateful. And whoever is grateful - his gratitude is only for [the benefit of] himself. And whoever is ungrateful - then indeed, my Lord is Free of need and Generous
verses.tl: Qala allathee AAindahu AAilmun mina alkitabi ana ateeka bihi qabla an yartadda ilayka tarfuka falamma raahu mustaqirran AAindahu qala hatha min fadli rabbee liyabluwanee aashkuru am akfuru waman shakara fainnama yashkuru linafsihi waman kafara fainna rabbee ghaniyyun kareemun

verses.ar: قَالَ نَكِّرُواْ لَهَا عَرۡشَهَا نَنظُرۡ أَتَهۡتَدِيٓ أَمۡ تَكُونُ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَهۡتَدُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "Disguise for her her throne; we will see whether she will be guided [to truth] or will be of those who is not guided
verses.tl: Qala nakkiroo laha AAarshaha nanthur atahtadee am takoonu mina allatheena la yahtadoona

verses.ar: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتۡ قِيلَ أَهَٰكَذَا عَرۡشُكِۖ قَالَتۡ كَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَۚ وَأُوتِينَا ٱلۡعِلۡمَ مِن قَبۡلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.tr: So when she arrived, it was said [to her], "Is your throne like this?" She said, "[It is] as though it was it." [Solomon said], "And we were given knowledge before her, and we have been Muslims [in submission to Allah]
verses.tl: Falamma jaat qeela ahakatha AAarshuki qalat kaannahu huwa waooteena alAAilma min qabliha wakunna muslimeena

verses.ar: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَت تَّعۡبُدُ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِۖ إِنَّهَا كَانَتۡ مِن قَوۡمٖ كَٰفِرِينَ
verses.tr: And that which she was worshipping other than Allah had averted her [from submission to Him]. Indeed, she was from a disbelieving people
verses.tl: Wasaddaha ma kanat taAAbudu min dooni Allahi innaha kanat min qawmin kafireena

verses.ar: قِيلَ لَهَا ٱدۡخُلِي ٱلصَّرۡحَۖ فَلَمَّا رَأَتۡهُ حَسِبَتۡهُ لُجَّةٗ وَكَشَفَتۡ عَن سَاقَيۡهَاۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ صَرۡحٞ مُّمَرَّدٞ مِّن قَوَارِيرَۗ قَالَتۡ رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمۡتُ نَفۡسِي وَأَسۡلَمۡتُ مَعَ سُلَيۡمَٰنَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: She was told, "Enter the palace." But when she saw it, she thought it was a body of water and uncovered her shins [to wade through]. He said, "Indeed, it is a palace [whose floor is] made smooth with glass." She said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, and I submit with Solomon to Allah, Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Qeela laha odkhulee alssarha falamma raathu hasibathu lujjatan wakashafat AAan saqayha qala innahu sarhun mumarradun min qawareera qalat rabbi innee thalamtu nafsee waaslamtu maAAa sulaymana lillahi rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمۡ صَٰلِحًا أَنِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ فَإِذَا هُمۡ فَرِيقَانِ يَخۡتَصِمُونَ
verses.tr: And We had certainly sent to Thamud their brother Salih, [saying], "Worship Allah," and at once they were two parties conflicting
verses.tl: Walaqad arsalna ila thamooda akhahum salihan ani oAAbudoo Allaha faitha hum fareeqani yakhtasimoona

verses.ar: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ لِمَ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ قَبۡلَ ٱلۡحَسَنَةِۖ لَوۡلَا تَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "O my people, why are you impatient for evil instead of good? Why do you not seek forgiveness of Allah that you may receive mercy
verses.tl: Qala ya qawmi lima tastaAAjiloona bialssayyiati qabla alhasanati lawla tastaghfiroona Allaha laAAallakum turhamoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ ٱطَّيَّرۡنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَۚ قَالَ طَـٰٓئِرُكُمۡ عِندَ ٱللَّهِۖ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٞ تُفۡتَنُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "We consider you a bad omen, you and those with you." He said, "Your omen is with Allah. Rather, you are a people being tested
verses.tl: Qaloo ittayyarna bika wabiman maAAaka qala tairukum AAinda Allahi bal antum qawmun tuftanoona

verses.ar: وَكَانَ فِي ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ تِسۡعَةُ رَهۡطٖ يُفۡسِدُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَا يُصۡلِحُونَ
verses.tr: And there were in the city nine family heads causing corruption in the land and not amending [its affairs]
verses.tl: Wakana fee almadeenati tisAAatu rahtin yufsidoona fee alardi wala yuslihoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ تَقَاسَمُواْ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهۡلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدۡنَا مَهۡلِكَ أَهۡلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصَٰدِقُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "Take a mutual oath by Allah that we will kill him by night, he and his family. Then we will say to his executor, 'We did not witness the destruction of his family, and indeed, we are truthful
verses.tl: Qaloo taqasamoo biAllahi lanubayyitannahu waahlahu thumma lanaqoolanna liwaliyyihi ma shahidna mahlika ahlihi wainna lasadiqoona

verses.ar: وَمَكَرُواْ مَكۡرٗا وَمَكَرۡنَا مَكۡرٗا وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: And they planned a plan, and We planned a plan, while they perceived not
verses.tl: Wamakaroo makran wamakarna makran wahum la yashAAuroona

verses.ar: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ مَكۡرِهِمۡ أَنَّا دَمَّرۡنَٰهُمۡ وَقَوۡمَهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.tr: Then look how was the outcome of their plan - that We destroyed them and their people, all
verses.tl: Faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu makrihim anna dammarnahum waqawmahum ajmaAAeena

verses.ar: فَتِلۡكَ بُيُوتُهُمۡ خَاوِيَةَۢ بِمَا ظَلَمُوٓاْۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: So those are their houses, desolate because of the wrong they had done. Indeed in that is a sign for people who know
verses.tl: Fatilka buyootuhum khawiyatan bima thalamoo inna fee thalika laayatan liqawmin yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَأَنجَيۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَكَانُواْ يَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: And We saved those who believed and used to fear Allah
verses.tl: Waanjayna allatheena amanoo wakanoo yattaqoona

verses.ar: وَلُوطًا إِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَتَأۡتُونَ ٱلۡفَٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمۡ تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And [mention] Lot, when he said to his people, "Do you commit immorality while you are seeing
verses.tl: Walootan ith qala liqawmihi atatoona alfahishata waantum tubsiroona

verses.ar: أَئِنَّكُمۡ لَتَأۡتُونَ ٱلرِّجَالَ شَهۡوَةٗ مِّن دُونِ ٱلنِّسَآءِۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٞ تَجۡهَلُونَ
verses.tr: Do you indeed approach men with desire instead of women? Rather, you are a people behaving ignorantly
verses.tl: Ainnakum latatoona alrrijala shahwatan min dooni alnnisai bal antum qawmun tajhaloona

verses.ar: ۞فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوۡمِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓاْ أَخۡرِجُوٓاْ ءَالَ لُوطٖ مِّن قَرۡيَتِكُمۡۖ إِنَّهُمۡ أُنَاسٞ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ
verses.tr: But the answer of his people was not except that they said, "Expel the family of Lot from your city. Indeed, they are people who keep themselves pure
verses.tl: Fama kana jawaba qawmihi illa an qaloo akhrijoo ala lootin min qaryatikum innahum onasun yatatahharoona

verses.ar: فَأَنجَيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱمۡرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرۡنَٰهَا مِنَ ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.tr: So We saved him and his family, except for his wife; We destined her to be of those who remained behind
verses.tl: Faanjaynahu waahlahu illa imraatahu qaddarnaha mina alghabireena

verses.ar: وَأَمۡطَرۡنَا عَلَيۡهِم مَّطَرٗاۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
verses.tr: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned
verses.tl: Waamtarna AAalayhim mataran fasaa mataru almunthareena

verses.ar: قُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَىٰٓۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيۡرٌ أَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "Praise be to Allah, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allah better or what they associate with Him
verses.tl: Quli alhamdu lillahi wasalamun AAala AAibadihi allatheena istafa allahu khayrun amma yushrikoona

verses.ar: أَمَّنۡ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَنۢبَتۡنَا بِهِۦ حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهۡجَةٖ مَّا كَانَ لَكُمۡ أَن تُنۢبِتُواْ شَجَرَهَآۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٞ يَعۡدِلُونَ
verses.tr: [More precisely], is He [not best] who created the heavens and the earth and sent down for you rain from the sky, causing to grow thereby gardens of joyful beauty which you could not [otherwise] have grown the trees thereof? Is there a deity with Allah? [No], but they are a people who ascribe equals [to Him]
verses.tl: Amman khalaqa alssamawati waalarda waanzala lakum mina alssamai maan faanbatna bihi hadaiqa thata bahjatin ma kana lakum an tunbitoo shajaraha ailahun maAAa Allahi bal hum qawmun yaAAdiloona

verses.ar: أَمَّن جَعَلَ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ قَرَارٗا وَجَعَلَ خِلَٰلَهَآ أَنۡهَٰرٗا وَجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَجَعَلَ بَيۡنَ ٱلۡبَحۡرَيۡنِ حَاجِزًاۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Is He [not best] who made the earth a stable ground and placed within it rivers and made for it firmly set mountains and placed between the two seas a barrier? Is there a deity with Allah? [No], but most of them do not know
verses.tl: Amman jaAAala alarda qararan wajaAAala khilalaha anharan wajaAAala laha rawasiya wajaAAala bayna albahrayni hajizan ailahun maAAa Allahi bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلۡمُضۡطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكۡشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجۡعَلُكُمۡ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.tr: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Little do you remember
verses.tl: Amman yujeebu almudtarra itha daAAahu wayakshifu alssooa wayajAAalukum khulafaa alardi ailahun maAAa Allahi qaleelan ma tathakkaroona

verses.ar: أَمَّن يَهۡدِيكُمۡ فِي ظُلُمَٰتِ ٱلۡبَرِّ وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ وَمَن يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ بُشۡرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦٓۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ تَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
verses.tr: Is He [not best] who guides you through the darknesses of the land and sea and who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy? Is there a deity with Allah? High is Allah above whatever they associate with Him
verses.tl: Amman yahdeekum fee thulumati albarri waalbahri waman yursilu alrriyaha bushran bayna yaday rahmatihi ailahun maAAa Allahi taAAala Allahu AAamma yushrikoona

verses.ar: أَمَّن يَبۡدَؤُاْ ٱلۡخَلۡقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَمَن يَرۡزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ أَءِلَٰهٞ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِۚ قُلۡ هَاتُواْ بُرۡهَٰنَكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: Is He [not best] who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: Amman yabdao alkhalqa thumma yuAAeeduhu waman yarzuqukum mina alssamai waalardi ailahun maAAa Allahi qul hatoo burhanakum in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: قُل لَّا يَعۡلَمُ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ ٱلۡغَيۡبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُۚ وَمَا يَشۡعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allah, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected
verses.tl: Qul la yaAAlamu man fee alssamawati waalardi alghayba illa Allahu wama yashAAuroona ayyana yubAAathoona

verses.ar: بَلِ ٱدَّـٰرَكَ عِلۡمُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكّٖ مِّنۡهَاۖ بَلۡ هُم مِّنۡهَا عَمُونَ
verses.tr: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind
verses.tl: Bali iddaraka AAilmuhum fee alakhirati bal hum fee shakkin minha bal hum minha AAamoona

verses.ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرَٰبٗا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخۡرَجُونَ
verses.tr: And those who disbelieve say, "When we have become dust as well as our forefathers, will we indeed be brought out [of the graves]
verses.tl: Waqala allatheena kafaroo aitha kunna turaban waabaona ainna lamukhrajoona

verses.ar: لَقَدۡ وُعِدۡنَا هَٰذَا نَحۡنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبۡلُ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples
verses.tl: Laqad wuAAidna hatha nahnu waabaona min qablu in hatha illa asateeru alawwaleena

verses.ar: قُلۡ سِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals
verses.tl: Qul seeroo fee alardi faonthuroo kayfa kana AAaqibatu almujrimeena

verses.ar: وَلَا تَحۡزَنۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَا تَكُن فِي ضَيۡقٖ مِّمَّا يَمۡكُرُونَ
verses.tr: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire
verses.tl: Wala tahzan AAalayhim wala takun fee dayqin mimma yamkuroona

verses.ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: قُلۡ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعۡضُ ٱلَّذِي تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you - some of that for which you are impatient
verses.tl: Qul AAasa an yakoona radifa lakum baAAdu allathee tastaAAjiloona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضۡلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord is full of bounty for the people, but most of them do not show gratitude
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka lathoo fadlin AAala alnnasi walakinna aktharahum la yashkuroona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعۡلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمۡ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, your Lord knows what their breasts conceal and what they declare
verses.tl: Wainna rabbaka layaAAlamu ma tukinnu sudooruhum wama yuAAlinoona

verses.ar: وَمَا مِنۡ غَآئِبَةٖ فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّا فِي كِتَٰبٖ مُّبِينٍ
verses.tr: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register
verses.tl: Wama min ghaibatin fee alssamai waalardi illa fee kitabin mubeenin

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَـٰٓءِيلَ أَكۡثَرَ ٱلَّذِي هُمۡ فِيهِ يَخۡتَلِفُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, this Qur'an relates to the Children of Israel most of that over which they disagree
verses.tl: Inna hatha alqurana yaqussu AAala banee israeela akthara allathee hum feehi yakhtalifoona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَهُدٗى وَرَحۡمَةٞ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, it is guidance and mercy for the believers
verses.tl: Wainnahu lahudan warahmatun lilmumineena

verses.ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقۡضِي بَيۡنَهُم بِحُكۡمِهِۦۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.tr: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them by His [wise] judgement. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Knowing
verses.tl: Inna rabbaka yaqdee baynahum bihukmihi wahuwa alAAazeezu alAAaleemu

verses.ar: فَتَوَكَّلۡ عَلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَى ٱلۡحَقِّ ٱلۡمُبِينِ
verses.tr: So rely upon Allah; indeed, you are upon the clear truth
verses.tl: Fatawakkal AAala Allahi innaka AAala alhaqqi almubeeni

verses.ar: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَلَا تُسۡمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوۡاْ مُدۡبِرِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating
verses.tl: Innaka la tusmiAAu almawta wala tusmiAAu alssumma aldduAAaa itha wallaw mudbireena

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهَٰدِي ٱلۡعُمۡيِ عَن ضَلَٰلَتِهِمۡۖ إِن تُسۡمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤۡمِنُ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسۡلِمُونَ
verses.tr: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [submitting to Allah]
verses.tl: Wama anta bihadee alAAumyi AAan dalalatihim in tusmiAAu illa man yuminu biayatina fahum muslimoona

verses.ar: ۞وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ أَخۡرَجۡنَا لَهُمۡ دَآبَّةٗ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمۡ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.tr: And when the word befalls them, We will bring forth for them a creature from the earth speaking to them, [saying] that the people were, of Our verses, not certain [in faith]
verses.tl: Waitha waqaAAa alqawlu AAalayhim akhrajna lahum dabbatan mina alardi tukallimuhum anna alnnasa kanoo biayatina la yooqinoona

verses.ar: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٖ فَوۡجٗا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا فَهُمۡ يُوزَعُونَ
verses.tr: And [warn of] the Day when We will gather from every nation a company of those who deny Our signs, and they will be [driven] in rows
verses.tl: Wayawma nahshuru min kulli ommatin fawjan mimman yukaththibu biayatina fahum yoozaAAoona

verses.ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبۡتُم بِـَٔايَٰتِي وَلَمۡ تُحِيطُواْ بِهَا عِلۡمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: Until, when they arrive [at the place of Judgement], He will say, "Did you deny My signs while you encompassed them not in knowledge, or what [was it that] you were doing
verses.tl: Hatta itha jaoo qala akaththabtum biayatee walam tuheetoo biha AAilman ammatha kuntum taAAmaloona

verses.ar: وَوَقَعَ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَيۡهِم بِمَا ظَلَمُواْ فَهُمۡ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.tr: And the decree will befall them for the wrong they did, and they will not [be able to] speak
verses.tl: WawaqaAAa alqawlu AAalayhim bima thalamoo fahum la yantiqoona

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ أَنَّا جَعَلۡنَا ٱلَّيۡلَ لِيَسۡكُنُواْ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبۡصِرًاۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe
verses.tl: Alam yaraw anna jaAAalna allayla liyaskunoo feehi waalnnahara mubsiran inna fee thalika laayatin liqawmin yuminoona

verses.ar: وَيَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوۡهُ دَٰخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allah wills. And all will come to Him humbled
verses.tl: Wayawma yunfakhu fee alssoori fafaziAAa man fee alssamawati waman fee alardi illa man shaa Allahu wakullun atawhu dakhireena

verses.ar: وَتَرَى ٱلۡجِبَالَ تَحۡسَبُهَا جَامِدَةٗ وَهِيَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِۚ صُنۡعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَتۡقَنَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا تَفۡعَلُونَ
verses.tr: And you see the mountains, thinking them rigid, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allah, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Acquainted with that which you do
verses.tl: Watara aljibala tahsabuha jamidatan wahiya tamurru marra alssahabi sunAAa Allahi allathee atqana kulla shayin innahu khabeerun bima tafAAaloona

verses.ar: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٖ يَوۡمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
verses.tr: Whoever comes [at Judgement] with a good deed will have better than it, and they, from the terror of that Day, will be safe
verses.tl: Man jaa bialhasanati falahu khayrun minha wahum min fazaAAin yawmaithin aminoona

verses.ar: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتۡ وُجُوهُهُمۡ فِي ٱلنَّارِ هَلۡ تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do
verses.tl: Waman jaa bialssayyiati fakubbat wujoohuhum fee alnnari hal tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona

verses.ar: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرۡتُ أَنۡ أَعۡبُدَ رَبَّ هَٰذِهِ ٱلۡبَلۡدَةِ ٱلَّذِي حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَيۡءٖۖ وَأُمِرۡتُ أَنۡ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.tr: [Say, O Muhammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [those who submit to Allah]
verses.tl: Innama omirtu an aAAbuda rabba hathihi albaldati allathee harramaha walahu kullu shayin waomirtu an akoona mina almuslimeena

verses.ar: وَأَنۡ أَتۡلُوَاْ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَۖ فَمَنِ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهۡتَدِي لِنَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنذِرِينَ
verses.tr: And to recite the Qur'an." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners
verses.tl: Waan atluwa alqurana famani ihtada fainnama yahtadee linafsihi waman dalla faqul innama ana mina almunthireena

verses.ar: وَقُلِ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ فَتَعۡرِفُونَهَاۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: And say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allah. He will show you His signs, and you will recognize them. And your Lord is not unaware of what you do
verses.tl: Waquli alhamdu lillahi sayureekum ayatihi fataAArifoonaha wama rabbuka bighafilin AAamma taAAmaloona

verses.ar: طسٓمٓ
verses.tr: Ta, Seen, Meem
verses.tl: Taseenmeem

verses.ar: تِلۡكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ ٱلۡمُبِينِ
verses.tr: These are the verses of the clear Book
verses.tl: Tilka ayatu alkitabi almubeeni

verses.ar: نَتۡلُواْ عَلَيۡكَ مِن نَّبَإِ مُوسَىٰ وَفِرۡعَوۡنَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ لِقَوۡمٖ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: We recite to you from the news of Moses and Pharaoh in truth for a people who believe
verses.tl: Natloo AAalayka min nabai moosa wafirAAawna bialhaqqi liqawmin yuminoona

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِرۡعَوۡنَ عَلَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَجَعَلَ أَهۡلَهَا شِيَعٗا يَسۡتَضۡعِفُ طَآئِفَةٗ مِّنۡهُمۡ يُذَبِّحُ أَبۡنَآءَهُمۡ وَيَسۡتَحۡيِۦ نِسَآءَهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, Pharaoh exalted himself in the land and made its people into factions, oppressing a sector among them, slaughtering their [newborn] sons and keeping their females alive. Indeed, he was of the corrupters
verses.tl: Inna firAAawna AAala fee alardi wajaAAala ahlaha shiyaAAan yastadAAifu taifatan minhum yuthabbihu abnaahum wayastahyee nisaahum innahu kana mina almufsideena

verses.ar: وَنُرِيدُ أَن نَّمُنَّ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتُضۡعِفُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَنَجۡعَلَهُمۡ أَئِمَّةٗ وَنَجۡعَلَهُمُ ٱلۡوَٰرِثِينَ
verses.tr: And We wanted to confer favor upon those who were oppressed in the land and make them leaders and make them inheritors
verses.tl: Wanureedu an namunna AAala allatheena istudAAifoo fee alardi wanajAAalahum aimmatan wanajAAalahumu alwaritheena

verses.ar: وَنُمَكِّنَ لَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَنُرِيَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَهَٰمَٰنَ وَجُنُودَهُمَا مِنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يَحۡذَرُونَ
verses.tr: And establish them in the land and show Pharaoh and [his minister] Haman and their soldiers through them that which they had feared
verses.tl: Wanumakkina lahum fee alardi wanuriya firAAawna wahamana wajunoodahuma minhum ma kanoo yahtharoona

verses.ar: وَأَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنۡ أَرۡضِعِيهِۖ فَإِذَا خِفۡتِ عَلَيۡهِ فَأَلۡقِيهِ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ وَلَا تَخَافِي وَلَا تَحۡزَنِيٓۖ إِنَّا رَآدُّوهُ إِلَيۡكِ وَجَاعِلُوهُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: And We inspired to the mother of Moses, "Suckle him; but when you fear for him, cast him into the river and do not fear and do not grieve. Indeed, We will return him to you and will make him [one] of the messengers
verses.tl: Waawhayna ila ommi moosa an ardiAAeehi faitha khifti AAalayhi faalqeehi fee alyammi wala takhafee wala tahzanee inna raddoohu ilayki wajaAAiloohu mina almursaleena

verses.ar: فَٱلۡتَقَطَهُۥٓ ءَالُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ لِيَكُونَ لَهُمۡ عَدُوّٗا وَحَزَنًاۗ إِنَّ فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَهَٰمَٰنَ وَجُنُودَهُمَا كَانُواْ خَٰطِـِٔينَ
verses.tr: And the family of Pharaoh picked him up [out of the river] so that he would become to them an enemy and a [cause of] grief. Indeed, Pharaoh and Haman and their soldiers were deliberate sinners
verses.tl: Failtaqatahu alu firAAawna liyakoona lahum AAaduwwan wahazanan inna firAAawna wahamana wajunoodahuma kanoo khatieena

verses.ar: وَقَالَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتُ فِرۡعَوۡنَ قُرَّتُ عَيۡنٖ لِّي وَلَكَۖ لَا تَقۡتُلُوهُ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَنفَعَنَآ أَوۡ نَتَّخِذَهُۥ وَلَدٗا وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: And the wife of Pharaoh said, "[He will be] a comfort of the eye for me and for you. Do not kill him; perhaps he may benefit us, or we may adopt him as a son." And they perceived not
verses.tl: Waqalati imraatu firAAawna qurratu AAaynin lee walaka la taqtuloohu AAasa an yanfaAAana aw nattakhithahu waladan wahum la yashAAuroona

verses.ar: وَأَصۡبَحَ فُؤَادُ أُمِّ مُوسَىٰ فَٰرِغًاۖ إِن كَادَتۡ لَتُبۡدِي بِهِۦ لَوۡلَآ أَن رَّبَطۡنَا عَلَىٰ قَلۡبِهَا لِتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And the heart of Moses' mother became empty [of all else]. She was about to disclose [the matter concerning] him had We not bound fast her heart that she would be of the believers
verses.tl: Waasbaha fuadu ommi moosa farighan in kadat latubdee bihi lawla an rabatna AAala qalbiha litakoona mina almumineena

verses.ar: وَقَالَتۡ لِأُخۡتِهِۦ قُصِّيهِۖ فَبَصُرَتۡ بِهِۦ عَن جُنُبٖ وَهُمۡ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: And she said to his sister, "Follow him"; so she watched him from a distance while they perceived not
verses.tl: Waqalat liokhtihi qusseehi fabasurat bihi AAan junubin wahum la yashAAuroona

verses.ar: ۞وَحَرَّمۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡمَرَاضِعَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَقَالَتۡ هَلۡ أَدُلُّكُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِ بَيۡتٖ يَكۡفُلُونَهُۥ لَكُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَهُۥ نَٰصِحُونَ
verses.tr: And We had prevented from him [all] wet nurses before, so she said, "Shall I direct you to a household that will be responsible for him for you while they are to him [for his upbringing] sincere
verses.tl: Waharramna AAalayhi almaradiAAa min qablu faqalat hal adullukum AAala ahli baytin yakfuloonahu lakum wahum lahu nasihoona

verses.ar: فَرَدَدۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّهِۦ كَيۡ تَقَرَّ عَيۡنُهَا وَلَا تَحۡزَنَ وَلِتَعۡلَمَ أَنَّ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقّٞ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: So We restored him to his mother that she might be content and not grieve and that she would know that the promise of Allah is true. But most of the people do not know
verses.tl: Faradadnahu ila ommihi kay taqarra AAaynuha wala tahzana walitaAAlama anna waAAda Allahi haqqun walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَلَمَّا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُۥ وَٱسۡتَوَىٰٓ ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ حُكۡمٗا وَعِلۡمٗاۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: And when he attained his full strength and was [mentally] mature, We bestowed upon him judgement and knowledge. And thus do We reward the doers of good
verses.tl: Walamma balagha ashuddahu waistawa ataynahu hukman waAAilman wakathalika najzee almuhsineena

verses.ar: وَدَخَلَ ٱلۡمَدِينَةَ عَلَىٰ حِينِ غَفۡلَةٖ مِّنۡ أَهۡلِهَا فَوَجَدَ فِيهَا رَجُلَيۡنِ يَقۡتَتِلَانِ هَٰذَا مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ وَهَٰذَا مِنۡ عَدُوِّهِۦۖ فَٱسۡتَغَٰثَهُ ٱلَّذِي مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ عَلَى ٱلَّذِي مِنۡ عَدُوِّهِۦ فَوَكَزَهُۥ مُوسَىٰ فَقَضَىٰ عَلَيۡهِۖ قَالَ هَٰذَا مِنۡ عَمَلِ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنِۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَدُوّٞ مُّضِلّٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: And he entered the city at a time of inattention by its people and found therein two men fighting: one from his faction and one from among his enemy. And the one from his faction called for help to him against the one from his enemy, so Moses struck him and [unintentionally] killed him. [Moses] said, "This is from the work of Satan. Indeed, he is a manifest, misleading enemy
verses.tl: Wadakhala almadeenata AAala heeni ghaflatin min ahliha fawajada feeha rajulayni yaqtatilani hatha min sheeAAatihi wahatha min AAaduwwihi faistaghathahu allathee min sheeAAatihi AAala allathee min AAaduwwihi fawakazahu moosa faqada AAalayhi qala hatha min AAamali alshshaytani innahu AAaduwwun mudillun mubeenun

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمۡتُ نَفۡسِي فَٱغۡفِرۡ لِي فَغَفَرَ لَهُۥٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: He said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me," and He forgave him. Indeed, He is the Forgiving, the Merciful
verses.tl: Qala rabbi innee thalamtu nafsee faighfir lee faghafara lahu innahu huwa alghafooru alrraheemu

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَيَّ فَلَنۡ أَكُونَ ظَهِيرٗا لِّلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: He said, "My Lord, for the favor You bestowed upon me, I will never be an assistant to the criminals
verses.tl: Qala rabbi bima anAAamta AAalayya falan akoona thaheeran lilmujrimeena

verses.ar: فَأَصۡبَحَ فِي ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ خَآئِفٗا يَتَرَقَّبُ فَإِذَا ٱلَّذِي ٱسۡتَنصَرَهُۥ بِٱلۡأَمۡسِ يَسۡتَصۡرِخُهُۥۚ قَالَ لَهُۥ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّكَ لَغَوِيّٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: And he became inside the city fearful and anticipating [exposure], when suddenly the one who sought his help the previous day cried out to him [once again]. Moses said to him, "Indeed, you are an evident, [persistent] deviator
verses.tl: Faasbaha fee almadeenati khaifan yataraqqabu faitha allathee istansarahu bialamsi yastasrikhuhu qala lahu moosa innaka laghawiyyun mubeenun

verses.ar: فَلَمَّآ أَنۡ أَرَادَ أَن يَبۡطِشَ بِٱلَّذِي هُوَ عَدُوّٞ لَّهُمَا قَالَ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ أَتُرِيدُ أَن تَقۡتُلَنِي كَمَا قَتَلۡتَ نَفۡسَۢا بِٱلۡأَمۡسِۖ إِن تُرِيدُ إِلَّآ أَن تَكُونَ جَبَّارٗا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا تُرِيدُ أَن تَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُصۡلِحِينَ
verses.tr: And when he wanted to strike the one who was an enemy to both of them, he said, "O Moses, do you intend to kill me as you killed someone yesterday? You only want to be a tyrant in the land and do not want to be of the amenders
verses.tl: Falamma an arada an yabtisha biallathee huwa AAaduwwun lahuma qala ya moosa atureedu an taqtulanee kama qatalta nafsan bialamsi in tureedu illa an takoona jabbaran fee alardi wama tureedu an takoona mina almusliheena

verses.ar: وَجَآءَ رَجُلٞ مِّنۡ أَقۡصَا ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ يَسۡعَىٰ قَالَ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱلۡمَلَأَ يَأۡتَمِرُونَ بِكَ لِيَقۡتُلُوكَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ إِنِّي لَكَ مِنَ ٱلنَّـٰصِحِينَ
verses.tr: And a man came from the farthest end of the city, running. He said, "O Moses, indeed the eminent ones are conferring over you [intending] to kill you, so leave [the city]; indeed, I am to you of the sincere advisors
verses.tl: Wajaa rajulun min aqsa almadeenati yasAAa qala ya moosa inna almalaa yatamiroona bika liyaqtulooka faokhruj innee laka mina alnnasiheena

verses.ar: فَخَرَجَ مِنۡهَا خَآئِفٗا يَتَرَقَّبُۖ قَالَ رَبِّ نَجِّنِي مِنَ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: So he left it, fearful and anticipating [apprehension]. He said, "My Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people
verses.tl: Fakharaja minha khaifan yataraqqabu qala rabbi najjinee mina alqawmi alththalimeena

verses.ar: وَلَمَّا تَوَجَّهَ تِلۡقَآءَ مَدۡيَنَ قَالَ عَسَىٰ رَبِّيٓ أَن يَهۡدِيَنِي سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
verses.tr: And when he directed himself toward Madyan, he said, "Perhaps my Lord will guide me to the sound way
verses.tl: Walamma tawajjaha tilqaa madyana qala AAasa rabbee an yahdiyanee sawaa alssabeeli

verses.ar: وَلَمَّا وَرَدَ مَآءَ مَدۡيَنَ وَجَدَ عَلَيۡهِ أُمَّةٗ مِّنَ ٱلنَّاسِ يَسۡقُونَ وَوَجَدَ مِن دُونِهِمُ ٱمۡرَأَتَيۡنِ تَذُودَانِۖ قَالَ مَا خَطۡبُكُمَاۖ قَالَتَا لَا نَسۡقِي حَتَّىٰ يُصۡدِرَ ٱلرِّعَآءُۖ وَأَبُونَا شَيۡخٞ كَبِيرٞ
verses.tr: And when he came to the well of Madyan, he found there a crowd of people watering [their flocks], and he found aside from them two women driving back [their flocks]. He said, "What is your circumstance?" They said, "We do not water until the shepherds dispatch [their flocks]; and our father is an old man
verses.tl: Walamma warada maa madyana wajada AAalayhi ommatan mina alnnasi yasqoona wawajada min doonihimu imraatayni tathoodani qala ma khatbukuma qalata la nasqee hatta yusdira alrriAAao waaboona shaykhun kabeerun

verses.ar: فَسَقَىٰ لَهُمَا ثُمَّ تَوَلَّىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلظِّلِّ فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَآ أَنزَلۡتَ إِلَيَّ مِنۡ خَيۡرٖ فَقِيرٞ
verses.tr: So he watered [their flocks] for them; then he went back to the shade and said, "My Lord, indeed I am, for whatever good You would send down to me, in need
verses.tl: Fasaqa lahuma thumma tawalla ila alththilli faqala rabbi innee lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqeerun

verses.ar: فَجَآءَتۡهُ إِحۡدَىٰهُمَا تَمۡشِي عَلَى ٱسۡتِحۡيَآءٖ قَالَتۡ إِنَّ أَبِي يَدۡعُوكَ لِيَجۡزِيَكَ أَجۡرَ مَا سَقَيۡتَ لَنَاۚ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُۥ وَقَصَّ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَصَصَ قَالَ لَا تَخَفۡۖ نَجَوۡتَ مِنَ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: Then one of the two women came to him walking with shyness. She said, "Indeed, my father invites you that he may reward you for having watered for us." So when he came to him and related to him the story, he said, "Fear not. You have escaped from the wrongdoing people
verses.tl: Fajaathu ihdahuma tamshee AAala istihyain qalat inna abee yadAAooka liyajziyaka ajra ma saqayta lana falamma jaahu waqassa AAalayhi alqasasa qala la takhaf najawta mina alqawmi alththalimeena

verses.ar: قَالَتۡ إِحۡدَىٰهُمَا يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱسۡتَـٔۡجِرۡهُۖ إِنَّ خَيۡرَ مَنِ ٱسۡتَـٔۡجَرۡتَ ٱلۡقَوِيُّ ٱلۡأَمِينُ
verses.tr: One of the women said, "O my father, hire him. Indeed, the best one you can hire is the strong and the trustworthy
verses.tl: Qalat ihdahuma ya abati istajirhu inna khayra mani istajarta alqawiyyu alameenu

verses.ar: قَالَ إِنِّيٓ أُرِيدُ أَنۡ أُنكِحَكَ إِحۡدَى ٱبۡنَتَيَّ هَٰتَيۡنِ عَلَىٰٓ أَن تَأۡجُرَنِي ثَمَٰنِيَ حِجَجٖۖ فَإِنۡ أَتۡمَمۡتَ عَشۡرٗا فَمِنۡ عِندِكَۖ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَنۡ أَشُقَّ عَلَيۡكَۚ سَتَجِدُنِيٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: He said, "Indeed, I wish to wed you one of these, my two daughters, on [the condition] that you serve me for eight years; but if you complete ten, it will be [as a favor] from you. And I do not wish to put you in difficulty. You will find me, if Allah wills, from among the righteous
verses.tl: Qala innee oreedu an onkihaka ihda ibnatayya hatayni AAala an tajuranee thamaniya hijajin fain atmamta AAashran famin AAindika wama oreedu an ashuqqa AAalayka satajidunee in shaa Allahu mina alssaliheena

verses.ar: قَالَ ذَٰلِكَ بَيۡنِي وَبَيۡنَكَۖ أَيَّمَا ٱلۡأَجَلَيۡنِ قَضَيۡتُ فَلَا عُدۡوَٰنَ عَلَيَّۖ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مَا نَقُولُ وَكِيلٞ
verses.tr: [Moses] said, "That is [established] between me and you. Whichever of the two terms I complete - there is no injustice to me, and Allah, over what we say, is Witness
verses.tl: Qala thalika baynee wabaynaka ayyama alajalayni qadaytu fala AAudwana AAalayya waAllahu AAala ma naqoolu wakeelun

verses.ar: ۞فَلَمَّا قَضَىٰ مُوسَى ٱلۡأَجَلَ وَسَارَ بِأَهۡلِهِۦٓ ءَانَسَ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ نَارٗاۖ قَالَ لِأَهۡلِهِ ٱمۡكُثُوٓاْ إِنِّيٓ ءَانَسۡتُ نَارٗا لَّعَلِّيٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنۡهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوۡ جَذۡوَةٖ مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَصۡطَلُونَ
verses.tr: And when Moses had completed the term and was traveling with his family, he perceived from the direction of the mount a fire. He said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire. Perhaps I will bring you from there [some] information or burning wood from the fire that you may warm yourselves
