verses.tr: But [insolently] they said, "Our Lord, lengthen the distance between our journeys," and wronged themselves, so We made them narrations and dispersed them in total dispersion. Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful
verses.tl: Faqaloo rabbana baAAid bayna asfarina wathalamoo anfusahum fajaAAalnahum ahadeetha wamazzaqnahum kulla mumazzaqin inna fee thalika laayatin likulli sabbarin shakoorin

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ صَدَّقَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ إِبۡلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَٱتَّبَعُوهُ إِلَّا فَرِيقٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And Iblees had already confirmed through them his assumption, so they followed him, except for a party of believers
verses.tl: Walaqad saddaqa AAalayhim ibleesu thannahu faittabaAAoohu illa fareeqan mina almumineena

verses.ar: وَمَا كَانَ لَهُۥ عَلَيۡهِم مِّن سُلۡطَٰنٍ إِلَّا لِنَعۡلَمَ مَن يُؤۡمِنُ بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ مِمَّنۡ هُوَ مِنۡهَا فِي شَكّٖۗ وَرَبُّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ حَفِيظٞ
verses.tr: And he had over them no authority except [it was decreed] that We might make evident who believes in the Hereafter from who is thereof in doubt. And your Lord, over all things, is Guardian
verses.tl: Wama kana lahu AAalayhim min sultanin illa linaAAlama man yuminu bialakhirati mimman huwa minha fee shakkin warabbuka AAala kulli shayin hafeethun

verses.ar: قُلِ ٱدۡعُواْ ٱلَّذِينَ زَعَمۡتُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٖ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا لَهُمۡ فِيهِمَا مِن شِرۡكٖ وَمَا لَهُۥ مِنۡهُم مِّن ظَهِيرٖ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "Invoke those you claim [as deities] besides Allah." They do not possess an atom's weight [of ability] in the heavens or on the earth, and they do not have therein any partnership [with Him], nor is there for Him from among them any assistant
verses.tl: Quli odAAoo allatheena zaAAamtum min dooni Allahi la yamlikoona mithqala tharratin fee alssamawati wala fee alardi wama lahum feehima min shirkin wama lahu minhum min thaheerin

verses.ar: وَلَا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةُ عِندَهُۥٓ إِلَّا لِمَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُۥۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فُزِّعَ عَن قُلُوبِهِمۡ قَالُواْ مَاذَا قَالَ رَبُّكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ ٱلۡحَقَّۖ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَلِيُّ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
verses.tr: And intercession does not benefit with Him except for one whom He permits. [And those wait] until, when terror is removed from their hearts, they will say [to one another], "What has your Lord said?" They will say, "The truth." And He is the Most High, the Grand
verses.tl: Wala tanfaAAu alshshafaAAatu AAindahu illa liman athina lahu hatta itha fuzziAAa AAan quloobihim qaloo matha qala rabbukum qaloo alhaqqa wahuwa alAAaliyyu alkabeeru

verses.ar: ۞قُلۡ مَن يَرۡزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ قُلِ ٱللَّهُۖ وَإِنَّآ أَوۡ إِيَّاكُمۡ لَعَلَىٰ هُدًى أَوۡ فِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.tr: Say, "Who provides for you from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "Allah. And indeed, we or you are either upon guidance or in clear error
verses.tl: Qul man yarzuqukum mina alssamawati waalardi quli Allahu wainna aw iyyakum laAAala hudan aw fee dalalin mubeenin

verses.ar: قُل لَّا تُسۡـَٔلُونَ عَمَّآ أَجۡرَمۡنَا وَلَا نُسۡـَٔلُ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "You will not be asked about what we committed, and we will not be asked about what you do
verses.tl: Qul la tusaloona AAamma ajramna wala nusalu AAamma taAAmaloona

verses.ar: قُلۡ يَجۡمَعُ بَيۡنَنَا رَبُّنَا ثُمَّ يَفۡتَحُ بَيۡنَنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَهُوَ ٱلۡفَتَّاحُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.tr: Say, "Our Lord will bring us together; then He will judge between us in truth. And He is the Knowing Judge
verses.tl: Qul yajmaAAu baynana rabbuna thumma yaftahu baynana bialhaqqi wahuwa alfattahu alAAaleemu

verses.ar: قُلۡ أَرُونِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَلۡحَقۡتُم بِهِۦ شُرَكَآءَۖ كَلَّاۚ بَلۡ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
verses.tr: Say, "Show me those whom you have attached to Him as partners. No! Rather, He [alone] is Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise
verses.tl: Qul arooniya allatheena alhaqtum bihi shurakaa kalla bal huwa Allahu alAAazeezu alhakeemu

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰكَ إِلَّا كَآفَّةٗ لِّلنَّاسِ بَشِيرٗا وَنَذِيرٗا وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: And We have not sent you except comprehensively to mankind as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. But most of the people do not know
verses.tl: Wama arsalnaka illa kaffatan lilnnasi basheeran wanatheeran walakinna akthara alnnasi la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: قُل لَّكُم مِّيعَادُ يَوۡمٖ لَّا تَسۡتَـٔۡخِرُونَ عَنۡهُ سَاعَةٗ وَلَا تَسۡتَقۡدِمُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "For you is the appointment of a Day [when] you will not remain thereafter an hour, nor will you precede [it]
verses.tl: Qul lakum meeAAadu yawmin la tastakhiroona AAanhu saAAatan wala tastaqdimoona

verses.ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَن نُّؤۡمِنَ بِهَٰذَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ وَلَا بِٱلَّذِي بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِۗ وَلَوۡ تَرَىٰٓ إِذِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ مَوۡقُوفُونَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ يَرۡجِعُ بَعۡضُهُمۡ إِلَىٰ بَعۡضٍ ٱلۡقَوۡلَ يَقُولُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتُضۡعِفُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ لَوۡلَآ أَنتُمۡ لَكُنَّا مُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And those who disbelieve say, "We will never believe in this Qur'an nor in that before it." But if you could see when the wrongdoers are made to stand before their Lord, refuting each other's words... Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, "If not for you, we would have been believers
verses.tl: Waqala allatheena kafaroo lan numina bihatha alqurani wala biallathee bayna yadayhi walaw tara ithi alththalimoona mawqoofoona AAinda rabbihim yarjiAAu baAAduhum ila baAAdin alqawla yaqoolu allatheena istudAAifoo lillatheena istakbaroo lawla antum lakunna mumineena

verses.ar: قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتُضۡعِفُوٓاْ أَنَحۡنُ صَدَدۡنَٰكُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡهُدَىٰ بَعۡدَ إِذۡ جَآءَكُمۖ بَلۡ كُنتُم مُّجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: Those who were arrogant will say to those who were oppressed, "Did we avert you from guidance after it had come to you? Rather, you were criminals
verses.tl: Qala allatheena istakbaroo lillatheena istudAAifoo anahnu sadadnakum AAani alhuda baAAda ith jaakum bal kuntum mujrimeena

verses.ar: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتُضۡعِفُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ بَلۡ مَكۡرُ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذۡ تَأۡمُرُونَنَآ أَن نَّكۡفُرَ بِٱللَّهِ وَنَجۡعَلَ لَهُۥٓ أَندَادٗاۚ وَأَسَرُّواْ ٱلنَّدَامَةَ لَمَّا رَأَوُاْ ٱلۡعَذَابَۚ وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱلۡأَغۡلَٰلَ فِيٓ أَعۡنَاقِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۖ هَلۡ يُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: Those who were oppressed will say to those who were arrogant, "Rather, [it was your] conspiracy of night and day when you were ordering us to disbelieve in Allah and attribute to Him equals." But they will [all] confide regret when they see the punishment; and We will put shackles on the necks of those who disbelieved. Will they be recompensed except for what they used to do
verses.tl: Waqala allatheena istudAAifoo lillatheena istakbaroo bal makru allayli waalnnahari ith tamuroonana an nakfura biAllahi wanajAAala lahu andadan waasarroo alnnadamata lamma raawoo alAAathaba wajaAAalna alaghlala fee aAAnaqi allatheena kafaroo hal yujzawna illa ma kanoo yaAAmaloona

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا فِي قَرۡيَةٖ مِّن نَّذِيرٍ إِلَّا قَالَ مُتۡرَفُوهَآ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرۡسِلۡتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
verses.tr: And We did not send into a city any warner except that its affluent said, "Indeed we, in that with which you were sent, are disbelievers
verses.tl: Wama arsalna fee qaryatin min natheerin illa qala mutrafooha inna bima orsiltum bihi kafiroona

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ نَحۡنُ أَكۡثَرُ أَمۡوَٰلٗا وَأَوۡلَٰدٗا وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.tr: And they said, "We are more [than the believers] in wealth and children, and we are not to be punished
verses.tl: Waqaloo nahnu aktharu amwalan waawladan wama nahnu bimuAAaththabeena

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنَّ رَبِّي يَبۡسُطُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it], but most of the people do not know
verses.tl: Qul inna rabbee yabsutu alrrizqa liman yashao wayaqdiru walakinna akthara alnnasi la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَمۡوَٰلُكُمۡ وَلَآ أَوۡلَٰدُكُم بِٱلَّتِي تُقَرِّبُكُمۡ عِندَنَا زُلۡفَىٰٓ إِلَّا مَنۡ ءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ جَزَآءُ ٱلضِّعۡفِ بِمَا عَمِلُواْ وَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡغُرُفَٰتِ ءَامِنُونَ
verses.tr: And it is not your wealth or your children that bring you nearer to Us in position, but it is [by being] one who has believed and done righteousness. For them there will be the double reward for what they did, and they will be in the upper chambers [of Paradise], safe [and secure]
verses.tl: Wama amwalukum wala awladukum biallatee tuqarribukum AAindana zulfa illa man amana waAAamila salihan faolaika lahum jazao alddiAAfi bima AAamiloo wahum fee alghurufati aminoona

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَسۡعَوۡنَ فِيٓ ءَايَٰتِنَا مُعَٰجِزِينَ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ مُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.tr: And the ones who strive against Our verses to cause [them] failure - those will be brought into the punishment [to remain]
verses.tl: Waallatheena yasAAawna fee ayatina muAAajizeena olaika fee alAAathabi muhdaroona

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنَّ رَبِّي يَبۡسُطُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَقۡدِرُ لَهُۥۚ وَمَآ أَنفَقۡتُم مِّن شَيۡءٖ فَهُوَ يُخۡلِفُهُۥۖ وَهُوَ خَيۡرُ ٱلرَّـٰزِقِينَ
verses.tr: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts [it] for him. But whatever thing you spend [in His cause] - He will compensate it; and He is the best of providers
verses.tl: Qul inna rabbee yabsutu alrrizqa liman yashao min AAibadihi wayaqdiru lahu wama anfaqtum min shayin fahuwa yukhlifuhu wahuwa khayru alrraziqeena

verses.ar: وَيَوۡمَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ يَقُولُ لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ أَهَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِيَّاكُمۡ كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: And [mention] the Day when He will gather them all and then say to the angels, "Did these [people] used to worship you
verses.tl: Wayawma yahshuruhum jameeAAan thumma yaqoolu lilmalaikati ahaolai iyyakum kanoo yaAAbudoona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ سُبۡحَٰنَكَ أَنتَ وَلِيُّنَا مِن دُونِهِمۖ بَلۡ كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ ٱلۡجِنَّۖ أَكۡثَرُهُم بِهِم مُّؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: They will say, "Exalted are You! You, [O Allah], are our benefactor not them. Rather, they used to worship the jinn; most of them were believers in them
verses.tl: Qaloo subhanaka anta waliyyuna min doonihim bal kanoo yaAAbudoona aljinna aktharuhum bihim muminoona

verses.ar: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ لَا يَمۡلِكُ بَعۡضُكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٖ نَّفۡعٗا وَلَا ضَرّٗا وَنَقُولُ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ ذُوقُواْ عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: But today you do not hold for one another [the power of] benefit or harm, and We will say to those who wronged, "Taste the punishment of the Fire, which you used to deny
verses.tl: Faalyawma la yamliku baAAdukum libaAAdin nafAAan wala darran wanaqoolu lillatheena thalamoo thooqoo AAathaba alnnari allatee kuntum biha tukaththiboona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَايَٰتُنَا بَيِّنَٰتٖ قَالُواْ مَا هَٰذَآ إِلَّا رَجُلٞ يُرِيدُ أَن يَصُدَّكُمۡ عَمَّا كَانَ يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُكُمۡ وَقَالُواْ مَا هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ إِفۡكٞ مُّفۡتَرٗىۚ وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحۡرٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: And when our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, they say, "This is not but a man who wishes to avert you from that which your fathers were worshipping." And they say, "This is not except a lie invented." And those who disbelieve say of the truth when it has come to them, "This is not but obvious magic
verses.tl: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qaloo ma hatha illa rajulun yureedu an yasuddakum AAamma kana yaAAbudu abaokum waqaloo ma hatha illa ifkun muftaran waqala allatheena kafaroo lilhaqqi lamma jaahum in hatha illa sihrun mubeenun

verses.ar: وَمَآ ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُم مِّن كُتُبٖ يَدۡرُسُونَهَاۖ وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِمۡ قَبۡلَكَ مِن نَّذِيرٖ
verses.tr: And We had not given them any scriptures which they could study, and We had not sent to them before you, [O Muhammad], any warner
verses.tl: Wama ataynahum min kutubin yadrusoonaha wama arsalna ilayhim qablaka min natheerin

verses.ar: وَكَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَمَا بَلَغُواْ مِعۡشَارَ مَآ ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمۡ فَكَذَّبُواْ رُسُلِيۖ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.tr: And those before them denied, and the people of Makkah have not attained a tenth of what We had given them. But the former peoples denied My messengers, so how [terrible] was My reproach
verses.tl: Wakaththaba allatheena min qablihim wama balaghoo miAAshara ma ataynahum fakaththaboo rusulee fakayfa kana nakeeri

verses.ar: ۞قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَعِظُكُم بِوَٰحِدَةٍۖ أَن تَقُومُواْ لِلَّهِ مَثۡنَىٰ وَفُرَٰدَىٰ ثُمَّ تَتَفَكَّرُواْۚ مَا بِصَاحِبِكُم مِّن جِنَّةٍۚ إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا نَذِيرٞ لَّكُم بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ عَذَابٖ شَدِيدٖ
verses.tr: Say, "I only advise you of one [thing] - that you stand for Allah, [seeking truth] in pairs and individually, and then give thought." There is not in your companion any madness. He is only a warner to you before a severe punishment
verses.tl: Qul innama aAAithukum biwahidatin an taqoomoo lillahi mathna wafurada thumma tatafakkaroo ma bisahibikum min jinnatin in huwa illa natheerun lakum bayna yaday AAathabin shadeedin

verses.ar: قُلۡ مَا سَأَلۡتُكُم مِّنۡ أَجۡرٖ فَهُوَ لَكُمۡۖ إِنۡ أَجۡرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱللَّهِۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ شَهِيدٞ
verses.tr: Say, "Whatever payment I might have asked of you - it is yours. My payment is only from Allah, and He is, over all things, Witness
verses.tl: Qul ma saaltukum min ajrin fahuwa lakum in ajriya illa AAala Allahi wahuwa AAala kulli shayin shaheedun

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنَّ رَبِّي يَقۡذِفُ بِٱلۡحَقِّ عَلَّـٰمُ ٱلۡغُيُوبِ
verses.tr: Say, "Indeed, my Lord projects the truth. Knower of the unseen
verses.tl: Qul inna rabbee yaqthifu bialhaqqi AAallamu alghuyoobi

verses.ar: قُلۡ جَآءَ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَمَا يُبۡدِئُ ٱلۡبَٰطِلُ وَمَا يُعِيدُ
verses.tr: Say, "The truth has come, and falsehood can neither begin [anything] nor repeat [it]
verses.tl: Qul jaa alhaqqu wama yubdio albatilu wama yuAAeedu

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِن ضَلَلۡتُ فَإِنَّمَآ أَضِلُّ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِيۖ وَإِنِ ٱهۡتَدَيۡتُ فَبِمَا يُوحِيٓ إِلَيَّ رَبِّيٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ سَمِيعٞ قَرِيبٞ
verses.tr: Say, "If I should err, I would only err against myself. But if I am guided, it is by what my Lord reveals to me. Indeed, He is Hearing and near
verses.tl: Qul in dalaltu fainnama adillu AAala nafsee waini ihtadaytu fabima yoohee ilayya rabbee innahu sameeAAun qareebun

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ تَرَىٰٓ إِذۡ فَزِعُواْ فَلَا فَوۡتَ وَأُخِذُواْ مِن مَّكَانٖ قَرِيبٖ
verses.tr: And if you could see when they are terrified but there is no escape, and they will be seized from a place nearby
verses.tl: Walaw tara ith faziAAoo fala fawta waokhithoo min makanin qareebin

verses.ar: وَقَالُوٓاْ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلتَّنَاوُشُ مِن مَّكَانِۭ بَعِيدٖ
verses.tr: And they will [then] say, "We believe in it!" But how for them will be the taking [of faith] from a place far away
verses.tl: Waqaloo amanna bihi waanna lahumu alttanawushu min makanin baAAeedin

verses.ar: وَقَدۡ كَفَرُواْ بِهِۦ مِن قَبۡلُۖ وَيَقۡذِفُونَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ مِن مَّكَانِۭ بَعِيدٖ
verses.tr: And they had already disbelieved in it before and would assault the unseen from a place far away
verses.tl: Waqad kafaroo bihi min qablu wayaqthifoona bialghaybi min makanin baAAeedin

verses.ar: وَحِيلَ بَيۡنَهُمۡ وَبَيۡنَ مَا يَشۡتَهُونَ كَمَا فُعِلَ بِأَشۡيَاعِهِم مِّن قَبۡلُۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ فِي شَكّٖ مُّرِيبِۭ
verses.tr: And prevention will be placed between them and what they desire, as was done with their kind before. Indeed, they were in disquieting denial
verses.tl: Waheela baynahum wabayna ma yashtahoona kama fuAAila biashyaAAihim min qablu innahum kanoo fee shakkin mureebin

verses.ar: ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ فَاطِرِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ جَاعِلِ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا أُوْلِيٓ أَجۡنِحَةٖ مَّثۡنَىٰ وَثُلَٰثَ وَرُبَٰعَۚ يَزِيدُ فِي ٱلۡخَلۡقِ مَا يَشَآءُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٞ
verses.tr: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, [who] made the angels messengers having wings, two or three or four. He increases in creation what He wills. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent
verses.tl: Alhamdu lillahi fatiri alssamawati waalardi jaAAili almalaikati rusulan olee ajnihatin mathna wathulatha warubaAAa yazeedu fee alkhalqi ma yashao inna Allaha AAala kulli shayin qadeerun

verses.ar: مَّا يَفۡتَحِ ٱللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِن رَّحۡمَةٖ فَلَا مُمۡسِكَ لَهَاۖ وَمَا يُمۡسِكۡ فَلَا مُرۡسِلَ لَهُۥ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
verses.tr: Whatever Allah grants to people of mercy - none can withhold it; and whatever He withholds - none can release it thereafter. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise
verses.tl: Ma yaftahi Allahu lilnnasi min rahmatin fala mumsika laha wama yumsik fala mursila lahu min baAAdihi wahuwa alAAazeezu alhakeemu

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱذۡكُرُواْ نِعۡمَتَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡكُمۡۚ هَلۡ مِنۡ خَٰلِقٍ غَيۡرُ ٱللَّهِ يَرۡزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُؤۡفَكُونَ
verses.tr: O mankind, remember the favor of Allah upon you. Is there any creator other than Allah who provides for you from the heaven and earth? There is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha alnnasu othkuroo niAAmata Allahi AAalaykum hal min khaliqin ghayru Allahi yarzuqukum mina alssamai waalardi la ilaha illa huwa faanna tufakoona

verses.ar: وَإِن يُكَذِّبُوكَ فَقَدۡ كُذِّبَتۡ رُسُلٞ مِّن قَبۡلِكَۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرۡجَعُ ٱلۡأُمُورُ
verses.tr: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad] - already were messengers denied before you. And to Allah are returned [all] matters
verses.tl: Wain yukaththibooka faqad kuththibat rusulun min qablika waila Allahi turjaAAu alomooru

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقّٞۖ فَلَا تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَا وَلَا يَغُرَّنَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡغَرُورُ
verses.tr: O mankind, indeed the promise of Allah is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allah by the Deceiver
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha alnnasu inna waAAda Allahi haqqun fala taghurrannakumu alhayatu alddunya wala yaghurrannakum biAllahi algharooru

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَ لَكُمۡ عَدُوّٞ فَٱتَّخِذُوهُ عَدُوًّاۚ إِنَّمَا يَدۡعُواْ حِزۡبَهُۥ لِيَكُونُواْ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.tr: Indeed, Satan is an enemy to you; so take him as an enemy. He only invites his party to be among the companions of the Blaze
verses.tl: Inna alshshaytana lakum AAaduwwun faittakhithoohu AAaduwwan innama yadAAoo hizbahu liyakoonoo min ashabi alssaAAeeri

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ شَدِيدٞۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةٞ وَأَجۡرٞ كَبِيرٌ
verses.tr: Those who disbelieve will have a severe punishment, and those who believe and do righteous deeds will have forgiveness and great reward
verses.tl: Allatheena kafaroo lahum AAathabun shadeedun waallatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati lahum maghfiratun waajrun kabeerun

verses.ar: أَفَمَن زُيِّنَ لَهُۥ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ فَرَءَاهُ حَسَنٗاۖ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُضِلُّ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُۖ فَلَا تَذۡهَبۡ نَفۡسُكَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَسَرَٰتٍۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمُۢ بِمَا يَصۡنَعُونَ
verses.tr: Then is one to whom the evil of his deed has been made attractive so he considers it good [like one rightly guided]? For indeed, Allah sends astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. So do not let yourself perish over them in regret. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what they do
verses.tl: Afaman zuyyina lahu sooo AAamalihi faraahu hasanan fainna Allaha yudillu man yashao wayahdee man yashao fala tathhab nafsuka AAalayhim hasaratin inna Allaha AAaleemun bima yasnaAAoona

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَرۡسَلَ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ فَتُثِيرُ سَحَابٗا فَسُقۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٖ مَّيِّتٖ فَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.tr: And it is Allah who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds, and We drive them to a dead land and give life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness. Thus is the resurrection
verses.tl: WaAllahu allathee arsala alrriyaha fatutheeru sahaban fasuqnahu ila baladin mayyitin faahyayna bihi alarda baAAda mawtiha kathalika alnnushooru

verses.ar: مَن كَانَ يُرِيدُ ٱلۡعِزَّةَ فَلِلَّهِ ٱلۡعِزَّةُ جَمِيعًاۚ إِلَيۡهِ يَصۡعَدُ ٱلۡكَلِمُ ٱلطَّيِّبُ وَٱلۡعَمَلُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحُ يَرۡفَعُهُۥۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ يَمۡكُرُونَ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ شَدِيدٞۖ وَمَكۡرُ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُوَ يَبُورُ
verses.tr: Whoever desires honor [through power] - then to Allah belongs all honor. To Him ascends good speech, and righteous work raises it. But they who plot evil deeds will have a severe punishment, and the plotting of those - it will perish
verses.tl: Man kana yureedu alAAizzata falillahi alAAizzatu jameeAAan ilayhi yasAAadu alkalimu alttayyibu waalAAamalu alssalihu yarfaAAuhu waallatheena yamkuroona alssayyiati lahum AAathabun shadeedun wamakru olaika huwa yabooru

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُم مِّن تُرَابٖ ثُمَّ مِن نُّطۡفَةٖ ثُمَّ جَعَلَكُمۡ أَزۡوَٰجٗاۚ وَمَا تَحۡمِلُ مِنۡ أُنثَىٰ وَلَا تَضَعُ إِلَّا بِعِلۡمِهِۦۚ وَمَا يُعَمَّرُ مِن مُّعَمَّرٖ وَلَا يُنقَصُ مِنۡ عُمُرِهِۦٓ إِلَّا فِي كِتَٰبٍۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٞ
verses.tr: And Allah created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop; then He made you mates. And no female conceives nor does she give birth except with His knowledge. And no aged person is granted [additional] life nor is his lifespan lessened but that it is in a register. Indeed, that for Allah is easy
verses.tl: WaAllahu khalaqakum min turabin thumma min nutfatin thumma jaAAalakum azwajan wama tahmilu min ontha wala tadaAAu illa biAAilmihi wama yuAAammaru min muAAammarin wala yunqasu min AAumurihi illa fee kitabin inna thalika AAala Allahi yaseerun

verses.ar: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡبَحۡرَانِ هَٰذَا عَذۡبٞ فُرَاتٞ سَآئِغٞ شَرَابُهُۥ وَهَٰذَا مِلۡحٌ أُجَاجٞۖ وَمِن كُلّٖ تَأۡكُلُونَ لَحۡمٗا طَرِيّٗا وَتَسۡتَخۡرِجُونَ حِلۡيَةٗ تَلۡبَسُونَهَاۖ وَتَرَى ٱلۡفُلۡكَ فِيهِ مَوَاخِرَ لِتَبۡتَغُواْ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ وَلَعَلَّكُمۡ تَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.tr: And not alike are the two bodies of water. One is fresh and sweet, palatable for drinking, and one is salty and bitter. And from each you eat tender meat and extract ornaments which you wear, and you see the ships plowing through [them] that you might seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful
verses.tl: Wama yastawee albahrani hatha AAathbun furatun saighun sharabuhu wahatha milhun ojajun wamin kullin takuloona lahman tariyyan watastakhrijoona hilyatan talbasoonaha watara alfulka feehi mawakhira litabtaghoo min fadlihi walaAAallakum tashkuroona

verses.ar: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيۡلَ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِي ٱلَّيۡلِ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ كُلّٞ يَجۡرِي لِأَجَلٖ مُّسَمّٗىۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمۡ لَهُ ٱلۡمُلۡكُۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِن قِطۡمِيرٍ
verses.tr: He causes the night to enter the day, and He causes the day to enter the night and has subjected the sun and the moon - each running [its course] for a specified term. That is Allah, your Lord; to Him belongs sovereignty. And those whom you invoke other than Him do not possess [as much as] the membrane of a date seed
verses.tl: Yooliju allayla fee alnnahari wayooliju alnnahara fee allayli wasakhkhara alshshamsa waalqamara kullun yajree liajalin musamman thalikumu Allahu rabbukum lahu almulku waallatheena tadAAoona min doonihi ma yamlikoona min qitmeerin

verses.ar: إِن تَدۡعُوهُمۡ لَا يَسۡمَعُواْ دُعَآءَكُمۡ وَلَوۡ سَمِعُواْ مَا ٱسۡتَجَابُواْ لَكُمۡۖ وَيَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ يَكۡفُرُونَ بِشِرۡكِكُمۡۚ وَلَا يُنَبِّئُكَ مِثۡلُ خَبِيرٖ
verses.tr: If you invoke them, they do not hear your supplication; and if they heard, they would not respond to you. And on the Day of Resurrection they will deny your association. And none can inform you like [one] Acquainted [with all matters]
verses.tl: In tadAAoohum la yasmaAAoo duAAaakum walaw samiAAoo ma istajaboo lakum wayawma alqiyamati yakfuroona bishirkikum wala yunabbioka mithlu khabeerin

verses.ar: ۞يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ أَنتُمُ ٱلۡفُقَرَآءُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِۖ وَٱللَّهُ هُوَ ٱلۡغَنِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ
verses.tr: O mankind, you are those in need of Allah, while Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha alnnasu antumu alfuqarao ila Allahi waAllahu huwa alghaniyyu alhameedu

verses.ar: إِن يَشَأۡ يُذۡهِبۡكُمۡ وَيَأۡتِ بِخَلۡقٖ جَدِيدٖ
verses.tr: If He wills, He can do away with you and bring forth a new creation
verses.tl: In yasha yuthhibkum wayati bikhalqin jadeedin

verses.ar: وَمَا ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ بِعَزِيزٖ
verses.tr: And that is for Allah not difficult
verses.tl: Wama thalika AAala Allahi biAAazeezin

verses.ar: وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٞ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰۚ وَإِن تَدۡعُ مُثۡقَلَةٌ إِلَىٰ حِمۡلِهَا لَا يُحۡمَلۡ مِنۡهُ شَيۡءٞ وَلَوۡ كَانَ ذَا قُرۡبَىٰٓۗ إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَۚ وَمَن تَزَكَّىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَتَزَكَّىٰ لِنَفۡسِهِۦۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.tr: And no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. And if a heavily laden soul calls [another] to [carry some of] its load, nothing of it will be carried, even if he should be a close relative. You can only warn those who fear their Lord unseen and have established prayer. And whoever purifies himself only purifies himself for [the benefit of] his soul. And to Allah is the [final] destination
verses.tl: Wala taziru waziratun wizra okhra wain tadAAu muthqalatun ila himliha la yuhmal minhu shayon walaw kana tha qurba innama tunthiru allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi waaqamoo alssalata waman tazakka fainnama yatazakka linafsihi waila Allahi almaseeru

verses.ar: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡبَصِيرُ
verses.tr: Not equal are the blind and the seeing
verses.tl: Wama yastawee alaAAma waalbaseeru

verses.ar: وَلَا ٱلظُّلُمَٰتُ وَلَا ٱلنُّورُ
verses.tr: Nor are the darknesses and the light
verses.tl: Wala alththulumatu wala alnnooru

verses.ar: وَلَا ٱلظِّلُّ وَلَا ٱلۡحَرُورُ
verses.tr: Nor are the shade and the heat
verses.tl: Wala alththillu wala alharooru

verses.ar: وَمَا يَسۡتَوِي ٱلۡأَحۡيَآءُ وَلَا ٱلۡأَمۡوَٰتُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسۡمِعُ مَن يَشَآءُۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ بِمُسۡمِعٖ مَّن فِي ٱلۡقُبُورِ
verses.tr: And not equal are the living and the dead. Indeed, Allah causes to hear whom He wills, but you cannot make hear those in the graves
verses.tl: Wama yastawee alahyao wala alamwatu inna Allaha yusmiAAu man yashao wama anta bimusmiAAin man fee alquboori

verses.ar: إِنۡ أَنتَ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ
verses.tr: You, [O Muhammad], are not but a warner
verses.tl: In anta illa natheerun

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ بَشِيرٗا وَنَذِيرٗاۚ وَإِن مِّنۡ أُمَّةٍ إِلَّا خَلَا فِيهَا نَذِيرٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, We have sent you with the truth as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. And there was no nation but that there had passed within it a warner
verses.tl: Inna arsalnaka bialhaqqi basheeran wanatheeran wain min ommatin illa khala feeha natheerun

verses.ar: وَإِن يُكَذِّبُوكَ فَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ جَآءَتۡهُمۡ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَبِٱلزُّبُرِ وَبِٱلۡكِتَٰبِ ٱلۡمُنِيرِ
verses.tr: And if they deny you - then already have those before them denied. Their messengers came to them with clear proofs and written ordinances and with the enlightening Scripture
verses.tl: Wain yukaththibooka faqad kaththaba allatheena min qablihim jaathum rusuluhum bialbayyinati wabialzzuburi wabialkitabi almuneeri

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَخَذۡتُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۖ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.tr: Then I seized the ones who disbelieved, and how [terrible] was My reproach
verses.tl: Thumma akhathtu allatheena kafaroo fakayfa kana nakeeri

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ ثَمَرَٰتٖ مُّخۡتَلِفًا أَلۡوَٰنُهَاۚ وَمِنَ ٱلۡجِبَالِ جُدَدُۢ بِيضٞ وَحُمۡرٞ مُّخۡتَلِفٌ أَلۡوَٰنُهَا وَغَرَابِيبُ سُودٞ
verses.tr: Do you not see that Allah sends down rain from the sky, and We produce thereby fruits of varying colors? And in the mountains are tracts, white and red of varying shades and [some] extremely black
verses.tl: Alam tara anna Allaha anzala mina alssamai maan faakhrajna bihi thamaratin mukhtalifan alwanuha wamina aljibali judadun beedun wahumrun mukhtalifun alwanuha wagharabeebu soodun

verses.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَٱلدَّوَآبِّ وَٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمِ مُخۡتَلِفٌ أَلۡوَٰنُهُۥ كَذَٰلِكَۗ إِنَّمَا يَخۡشَى ٱللَّهَ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِ ٱلۡعُلَمَـٰٓؤُاْۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ غَفُورٌ
verses.tr: And among people and moving creatures and grazing livestock are various colors similarly. Only those fear Allah, from among His servants, who have knowledge. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Forgiving
verses.tl: Wamina alnnasi waalddawabbi waalanAAami mukhtalifun alwanuhu kathalika innama yakhsha Allaha min AAibadihi alAAulamao inna Allaha AAazeezun ghafoorun

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتۡلُونَ كِتَٰبَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَقَامُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَنفَقُواْ مِمَّا رَزَقۡنَٰهُمۡ سِرّٗا وَعَلَانِيَةٗ يَرۡجُونَ تِجَٰرَةٗ لَّن تَبُورَ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who recite the Book of Allah and establish prayer and spend [in His cause] out of what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, [can] expect a profit that will never perish
verses.tl: Inna allatheena yatloona kitaba Allahi waaqamoo alssalata waanfaqoo mimma razaqnahum sirran waAAalaniyatan yarjoona tijaratan lan taboora

verses.ar: لِيُوَفِّيَهُمۡ أُجُورَهُمۡ وَيَزِيدَهُم مِّن فَضۡلِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ غَفُورٞ شَكُورٞ
verses.tr: That He may give them in full their rewards and increase for them of His bounty. Indeed, He is Forgiving and Appreciative
verses.tl: Liyuwaffiyahum ojoorahum wayazeedahum min fadlihi innahu ghafoorun shakoorun

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِيٓ أَوۡحَيۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ مِنَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ هُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ مُصَدِّقٗا لِّمَا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡهِۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ لَخَبِيرُۢ بَصِيرٞ
verses.tr: And that which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], of the Book is the truth, confirming what was before it. Indeed, Allah, of His servants, is Acquainted and Seeing
verses.tl: Waallathee awhayna ilayka mina alkitabi huwa alhaqqu musaddiqan lima bayna yadayhi inna Allaha biAAibadihi lakhabeerun baseerun

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَوۡرَثۡنَا ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصۡطَفَيۡنَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَاۖ فَمِنۡهُمۡ ظَالِمٞ لِّنَفۡسِهِۦ وَمِنۡهُم مُّقۡتَصِدٞ وَمِنۡهُمۡ سَابِقُۢ بِٱلۡخَيۡرَٰتِ بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَضۡلُ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
verses.tr: Then we caused to inherit the Book those We have chosen of Our servants; and among them is he who wrongs himself, and among them is he who is moderate, and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of Allah. That [inheritance] is what is the great bounty
verses.tl: Thumma awrathna alkitaba allatheena istafayna min AAibadina faminhum thalimun linafsihi waminhum muqtasidun waminhum sabiqun bialkhayrati biithni Allahi thalika huwa alfadlu alkabeeru

verses.ar: جَنَّـٰتُ عَدۡنٖ يَدۡخُلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوۡنَ فِيهَا مِنۡ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٖ وَلُؤۡلُؤٗاۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمۡ فِيهَا حَرِيرٞ
verses.tr: [For them are] gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearls, and their garments therein will be silk
verses.tl: Jannatu AAadnin yadkhuloonaha yuhallawna feeha min asawira min thahabin waluluan walibasuhum feeha hareerun

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَذۡهَبَ عَنَّا ٱلۡحَزَنَۖ إِنَّ رَبَّنَا لَغَفُورٞ شَكُورٌ
verses.tr: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has removed from us [all] sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and Appreciative
verses.tl: Waqaloo alhamdu lillahi allathee athhaba AAanna alhazana inna rabbana laghafoorun shakoorun

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِيٓ أَحَلَّنَا دَارَ ٱلۡمُقَامَةِ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ لَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا نَصَبٞ وَلَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا لُغُوبٞ
verses.tr: He who has settled us in the home of duration out of His bounty. There touches us not in it any fatigue, and there touches us not in it weariness [of mind]
verses.tl: Allathee ahallana dara almuqamati min fadlihi la yamassuna feeha nasabun wala yamassuna feeha lughoobun

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَهُمۡ نَارُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يُقۡضَىٰ عَلَيۡهِمۡ فَيَمُوتُواْ وَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنۡهُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِهَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي كُلَّ كَفُورٖ
verses.tr: And for those who disbelieve will be the fire of Hell. [Death] is not decreed for them so they may die, nor will its torment be lightened for them. Thus do we recompense every ungrateful one
verses.tl: Waallatheena kafaroo lahum naru jahannama la yuqda AAalayhim fayamootoo wala yukhaffafu AAanhum min AAathabiha kathalika najzee kulla kafoorin

verses.ar: وَهُمۡ يَصۡطَرِخُونَ فِيهَا رَبَّنَآ أَخۡرِجۡنَا نَعۡمَلۡ صَٰلِحًا غَيۡرَ ٱلَّذِي كُنَّا نَعۡمَلُۚ أَوَلَمۡ نُعَمِّرۡكُم مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُ فِيهِ مَن تَذَكَّرَ وَجَآءَكُمُ ٱلنَّذِيرُۖ فَذُوقُواْ فَمَا لِلظَّـٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ
verses.tr: And they will cry out therein, "Our Lord, remove us; we will do righteousness - other than what we were doing!" But did We not grant you life enough for whoever would remember therein to remember, and the warner had come to you? So taste [the punishment], for there is not for the wrongdoers any helper
verses.tl: Wahum yastarikhoona feeha rabbana akhrijna naAAmal salihan ghayra allathee kunna naAAmalu awalam nuAAammirkum ma yatathakkaru feehi man tathakkara wajaakumu alnnatheeru fathooqoo fama lilththalimeena min naseerin

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَٰلِمُ غَيۡبِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.tr: Indeed, Allah is Knower of the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and earth. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts
verses.tl: Inna Allaha AAalimu ghaybi alssamawati waalardi innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَكُمۡ خَلَـٰٓئِفَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ فَمَن كَفَرَ فَعَلَيۡهِ كُفۡرُهُۥۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ كُفۡرُهُمۡ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ إِلَّا مَقۡتٗاۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ كُفۡرُهُمۡ إِلَّا خَسَارٗا
verses.tr: It is He who has made you successors upon the earth. And whoever disbelieves - upon him will be [the consequence of] his disbelief. And the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them in the sight of their Lord except in hatred; and the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them except in loss
verses.tl: Huwa allathee jaAAalakum khalaifa fee alardi faman kafara faAAalayhi kufruhu wala yazeedu alkafireena kufruhum AAinda rabbihim illa maqtan wala yazeedu alkafireena kufruhum illa khasaran

verses.ar: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ شُرَكَآءَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَرُونِي مَاذَا خَلَقُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ لَهُمۡ شِرۡكٞ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ أَمۡ ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمۡ كِتَٰبٗا فَهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَتٖ مِّنۡهُۚ بَلۡ إِن يَعِدُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ بَعۡضُهُم بَعۡضًا إِلَّا غُرُورًا
verses.tr: Say, "Have you considered your 'partners' whom you invoke besides Allah? Show me what they have created from the earth, or have they partnership [with Him] in the heavens? Or have We given them a book so they are [standing] on evidence therefrom? [No], rather, the wrongdoers do not promise each other except delusion
verses.tl: Qul araaytum shurakaakumu allatheena tadAAoona min dooni Allahi aroonee matha khalaqoo mina alardi am lahum shirkun fee alssamawati am ataynahum kitaban fahum AAala bayyinatin minhu bal in yaAAidu alththalimoona baAAduhum baAAdan illa ghurooran

verses.ar: ۞إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُمۡسِكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ أَن تَزُولَاۚ وَلَئِن زَالَتَآ إِنۡ أَمۡسَكَهُمَا مِنۡ أَحَدٖ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِيمًا غَفُورٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, Allah holds the heavens and the earth, lest they cease. And if they should cease, no one could hold them [in place] after Him. Indeed, He is Forbearing and Forgiving
verses.tl: Inna Allaha yumsiku alssamawati waalarda an tazoola walain zalata in amsakahuma min ahadin min baAAdihi innahu kana haleeman ghafooran

verses.ar: وَأَقۡسَمُواْ بِٱللَّهِ جَهۡدَ أَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ لَئِن جَآءَهُمۡ نَذِيرٞ لَّيَكُونُنَّ أَهۡدَىٰ مِنۡ إِحۡدَى ٱلۡأُمَمِۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ نَذِيرٞ مَّا زَادَهُمۡ إِلَّا نُفُورًا
verses.tr: And they swore by Allah their strongest oaths that if a warner came to them, they would be more guided than [any] one of the [previous] nations. But when a warner came to them, it did not increase them except in aversion
verses.tl: Waaqsamoo biAllahi jahda aymanihim lain jaahum natheerun layakoonunna ahda min ihda alomami falamma jaahum natheerun ma zadahum illa nufooran

verses.ar: ٱسۡتِكۡبَارٗا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَكۡرَ ٱلسَّيِّيِٕۚ وَلَا يَحِيقُ ٱلۡمَكۡرُ ٱلسَّيِّئُ إِلَّا بِأَهۡلِهِۦۚ فَهَلۡ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا سُنَّتَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَۚ فَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَبۡدِيلٗاۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَحۡوِيلًا
verses.tr: [Due to] arrogance in the land and plotting of evil; but the evil plot does not encompass except its own people. Then do they await except the way of the former peoples? But you will never find in the way of Allah any change, and you will never find in the way of Allah any alteration
verses.tl: Istikbaran fee alardi wamakra alssayyii wala yaheequ almakru alssayyio illa biahlihi fahal yanthuroona illa sunnata alawwaleena falan tajida lisunnati Allahi tabdeelan walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tahweelan

verses.ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَكَانُوٓاْ أَشَدَّ مِنۡهُمۡ قُوَّةٗۚ وَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ لِيُعۡجِزَهُۥ مِن شَيۡءٖ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَلِيمٗا قَدِيرٗا
verses.tr: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? And they were greater than them in power. But Allah is not to be caused failure by anything in the heavens or on the earth. Indeed, He is ever Knowing and Competent
verses.tl: Awalam yaseeroo fee alardi fayanthuroo kayfa kana AAaqibatu allatheena min qablihim wakanoo ashadda minhum quwwatan wama kana Allahu liyuAAjizahu min shayin fee alssamawati wala fee alardi innahu kana AAaleeman qadeeran

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِمَا كَسَبُواْ مَا تَرَكَ عَلَىٰ ظَهۡرِهَا مِن دَآبَّةٖ وَلَٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمّٗىۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمۡ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ بَصِيرَۢا
verses.tr: And if Allah were to impose blame on the people for what they have earned, He would not leave upon the earth any creature. But He defers them for a specified term. And when their time comes, then indeed Allah has ever been, of His servants, Seeing
verses.tl: Walaw yuakhithu Allahu alnnasa bima kasaboo ma taraka AAala thahriha min dabbatin walakin yuakhkhiruhum ila ajalin musamman faitha jaa ajaluhum fainna Allaha kana biAAibadihi baseeran

verses.ar: يسٓ
verses.tr: Ya, Seen
verses.tl: Yaseen

verses.ar: وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ٱلۡحَكِيمِ
verses.tr: By the wise Qur'an
verses.tl: Waalqurani alhakeemi

verses.ar: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed you, [O Muhammad], are from among the messengers
verses.tl: Innaka lamina almursaleena

verses.ar: عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
verses.tr: On a straight path
verses.tl: AAala siratin mustaqeemin

verses.ar: تَنزِيلَ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.tr: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful
verses.tl: Tanzeela alAAazeezi alrraheemi

verses.ar: لِتُنذِرَ قَوۡمٗا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمۡ فَهُمۡ غَٰفِلُونَ
verses.tr: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware
verses.tl: Litunthira qawman ma onthira abaohum fahum ghafiloona

verses.ar: لَقَدۡ حَقَّ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكۡثَرِهِمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Already the word has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe
verses.tl: Laqad haqqa alqawlu AAala aktharihim fahum la yuminoona

verses.ar: إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَا فِيٓ أَعۡنَٰقِهِمۡ أَغۡلَٰلٗا فَهِيَ إِلَى ٱلۡأَذۡقَانِ فَهُم مُّقۡمَحُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft
verses.tl: Inna jaAAalna fee aAAnaqihim aghlalan fahiya ila alathqani fahum muqmahoona

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا مِنۢ بَيۡنِ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ سَدّٗا وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِمۡ سَدّٗا فَأَغۡشَيۡنَٰهُمۡ فَهُمۡ لَا يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see
verses.tl: WajaAAalna min bayni aydeehim saddan wamin khalfihim saddan faaghshaynahum fahum la yubsiroona

verses.ar: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ءَأَنذَرۡتَهُمۡ أَمۡ لَمۡ تُنذِرۡهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe
verses.tl: Wasawaon AAalayhim aanthartahum am lam tunthirhum la yuminoona

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكۡرَ وَخَشِيَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِۖ فَبَشِّرۡهُ بِمَغۡفِرَةٖ وَأَجۡرٖ كَرِيمٍ
verses.tr: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward
verses.tl: Innama tunthiru mani ittabaAAa alththikra wakhashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi fabashshirhu bimaghfiratin waajrin kareemin

verses.ar: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ وَنَكۡتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُواْ وَءَاثَٰرَهُمۡۚ وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ أَحۡصَيۡنَٰهُ فِيٓ إِمَامٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register
verses.tl: Inna nahnu nuhyee almawta wanaktubu ma qaddamoo waatharahum wakulla shayin ahsaynahu fee imamin mubeenin

verses.ar: وَٱضۡرِبۡ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡقَرۡيَةِ إِذۡ جَآءَهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.tr: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it
verses.tl: Waidrib lahum mathalan ashaba alqaryati ith jaaha almursaloona

verses.ar: إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡهِمُ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزۡنَا بِثَالِثٖ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ إِلَيۡكُم مُّرۡسَلُونَ
verses.tr: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened them with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you
verses.tl: Ith arsalna ilayhimu ithnayni fakaththaboohuma faAAazzazna bithalithin faqaloo inna ilaykum mursaloona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ مَآ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا بَشَرٞ مِّثۡلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ مِن شَيۡءٍ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا تَكۡذِبُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies
verses.tl: Qaloo ma antum illa basharun mithluna wama anzala alrrahmanu min shayin in antum illa takthiboona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ رَبُّنَا يَعۡلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ لَمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "Our Lord knows that we are messengers to you
verses.tl: Qaloo rabbuna yaAAlamu inna ilaykum lamursaloona

verses.ar: وَمَا عَلَيۡنَآ إِلَّا ٱلۡبَلَٰغُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
verses.tr: And we are not responsible except for clear notification
verses.tl: Wama AAalayna illa albalaghu almubeenu

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا تَطَيَّرۡنَا بِكُمۡۖ لَئِن لَّمۡ تَنتَهُواْ لَنَرۡجُمَنَّكُمۡ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
verses.tr: They said, "Indeed, we consider you a bad omen. If you do not desist, we will surely stone you, and there will surely touch you, from us, a painful punishment
verses.tl: Qaloo inna tatayyarna bikum lain lam tantahoo lanarjumannakum walayamassannakum minna AAathabun aleemun

verses.ar: قَالُواْ طَـٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمۡ أَئِن ذُكِّرۡتُمۚ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ قَوۡمٞ مُّسۡرِفُونَ
verses.tr: They said, "Your omen is with yourselves. Is it because you were reminded? Rather, you are a transgressing people
verses.tl: Qaloo tairukum maAAakum ain thukkirtum bal antum qawmun musrifoona

verses.ar: وَجَآءَ مِنۡ أَقۡصَا ٱلۡمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٞ يَسۡعَىٰ قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱتَّبِعُواْ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: And there came from the farthest end of the city a man, running. He said, "O my people, follow the messengers
verses.tl: Wajaa min aqsa almadeenati rajulun yasAAa qala ya qawmi ittabiAAoo almursaleena

verses.ar: ٱتَّبِعُواْ مَن لَّا يَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ أَجۡرٗا وَهُم مُّهۡتَدُونَ
verses.tr: Follow those who do not ask of you [any] payment, and they are [rightly] guided
verses.tl: IttabiAAoo man la yasalukum ajran wahum muhtadoona

verses.ar: وَمَالِيَ لَآ أَعۡبُدُ ٱلَّذِي فَطَرَنِي وَإِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُونَ
verses.tr: And why should I not worship He who created me and to whom you will be returned
verses.tl: Wama liya la aAAbudu allathee fataranee wailayhi turjaAAoona

verses.ar: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدۡنِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ بِضُرّٖ لَّا تُغۡنِ عَنِّي شَفَٰعَتُهُمۡ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
verses.tr: Should I take other than Him [false] deities [while], if the Most Merciful intends for me some adversity, their intercession will not avail me at all, nor can they save me
verses.tl: Aattakhithu min doonihi alihatan in yuridni alrrahmanu bidurrin la tughni AAannee shafaAAatuhum shayan wala yunqithooni

verses.ar: إِنِّيٓ إِذٗا لَّفِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٍ
verses.tr: Indeed, I would then be in manifest error
verses.tl: Innee ithan lafee dalalin mubeenin

verses.ar: إِنِّيٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمۡ فَٱسۡمَعُونِ
verses.tr: Indeed, I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me
verses.tl: Innee amantu birabbikum faismaAAooni

verses.ar: قِيلَ ٱدۡخُلِ ٱلۡجَنَّةَۖ قَالَ يَٰلَيۡتَ قَوۡمِي يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: It was said, "Enter Paradise." He said, "I wish my people could know
verses.tl: Qeela odkhuli aljannata qala ya layta qawmee yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِي رَبِّي وَجَعَلَنِي مِنَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِينَ
verses.tr: Of how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored
verses.tl: Bima ghafara lee rabbee wajaAAalanee mina almukrameena

verses.ar: ۞وَمَآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ مِن جُندٖ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
verses.tr: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so
verses.tl: Wama anzalna AAala qawmihi min baAAdihi min jundin mina alssamai wama kunna munzileena

verses.ar: إِن كَانَتۡ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ فَإِذَا هُمۡ خَٰمِدُونَ
verses.tr: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished
verses.tl: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum khamidoona

verses.ar: يَٰحَسۡرَةً عَلَى ٱلۡعِبَادِۚ مَا يَأۡتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
verses.tr: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him
verses.tl: Ya hasratan AAala alAAibadi ma yateehim min rasoolin illa kanoo bihi yastahzioona

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمۡ إِلَيۡهِمۡ لَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.tr: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return
verses.tl: Alam yaraw kam ahlakna qablahum mina alqurooni annahum ilayhim la yarjiAAoona

verses.ar: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us
verses.tl: Wain kullun lamma jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona

verses.ar: وَءَايَةٞ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ ٱلۡمَيۡتَةُ أَحۡيَيۡنَٰهَا وَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مِنۡهَا حَبّٗا فَمِنۡهُ يَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.tr: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat
verses.tl: Waayatun lahumu alardu almaytatu ahyaynaha waakhrajna minha habban faminhu yakuloona

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا جَنَّـٰتٖ مِّن نَّخِيلٖ وَأَعۡنَٰبٖ وَفَجَّرۡنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلۡعُيُونِ
verses.tr: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs
verses.tl: WajaAAalna feeha jannatin min nakheelin waaAAnabin wafajjarna feeha mina alAAuyooni

verses.ar: لِيَأۡكُلُواْ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتۡهُ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.tr: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful
verses.tl: Liyakuloo min thamarihi wama AAamilathu aydeehim afala yashkuroona

verses.ar: سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلۡأَزۡوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَمِنۡ أَنفُسِهِمۡ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know
verses.tl: Subhana allathee khalaqa alazwaja kullaha mimma tunbitu alardu wamin anfusihim wamimma la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَءَايَةٞ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيۡلُ نَسۡلَخُ مِنۡهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظۡلِمُونَ
verses.tr: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it [the light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness
verses.tl: Waayatun lahumu allaylu naslakhu minhu alnnahara faitha hum muthlimoona

verses.ar: وَٱلشَّمۡسُ تَجۡرِي لِمُسۡتَقَرّٖ لَّهَاۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقۡدِيرُ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡعَلِيمِ
verses.tr: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing
verses.tl: Waalshshamsu tajree limustaqarrin laha thalika taqdeeru alAAazeezi alAAaleemi

verses.ar: وَٱلۡقَمَرَ قَدَّرۡنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلۡعُرۡجُونِ ٱلۡقَدِيمِ
verses.tr: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk
verses.tl: Waalqamara qaddarnahu manazila hatta AAada kaalAAurjooni alqadeemi

verses.ar: لَا ٱلشَّمۡسُ يَنۢبَغِي لَهَآ أَن تُدۡرِكَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيۡلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِۚ وَكُلّٞ فِي فَلَكٖ يَسۡبَحُونَ
verses.tr: It is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming
verses.tl: La alshshamsu yanbaghee laha an tudrika alqamara wala allaylu sabiqu alnnahari wakullun fee falakin yasbahoona

verses.ar: وَءَايَةٞ لَّهُمۡ أَنَّا حَمَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
verses.tr: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship
verses.tl: Waayatun lahum anna hamalna thurriyyatahum fee alfulki almashhooni

verses.ar: وَخَلَقۡنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثۡلِهِۦ مَا يَرۡكَبُونَ
verses.tr: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride
verses.tl: Wakhalaqna lahum min mithlihi ma yarkaboona

verses.ar: وَإِن نَّشَأۡ نُغۡرِقۡهُمۡ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمۡ وَلَا هُمۡ يُنقَذُونَ
verses.tr: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved
verses.tl: Wain nasha nughriqhum fala sareekha lahum wala hum yunqathoona

verses.ar: إِلَّا رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنَّا وَمَتَٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٖ
verses.tr: Except as a mercy from Us and provision for a time
verses.tl: Illa rahmatan minna wamataAAan ila heenin

verses.ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُواْ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيكُمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
verses.tr: But when it is said to them, "Beware of what is before you and what is behind you; perhaps you will receive mercy
verses.tl: Waitha qeela lahumu ittaqoo ma bayna aydeekum wama khalfakum laAAallakum turhamoona

verses.ar: وَمَا تَأۡتِيهِم مِّنۡ ءَايَةٖ مِّنۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ إِلَّا كَانُواْ عَنۡهَا مُعۡرِضِينَ
verses.tr: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord except that they are from it turning away
verses.tl: Wama tateehim min ayatin min ayati rabbihim illa kanoo AAanha muAArideena

verses.ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمۡ أَنفِقُواْ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَنُطۡعِمُ مَن لَّوۡ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطۡعَمَهُۥٓ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.tr: And when it is said to them, "Spend from that which Allah has provided for you," those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Should we feed one whom, if Allah had willed, He would have fed? You are not but in clear error
verses.tl: Waitha qeela lahum anfiqoo mimma razaqakumu Allahu qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo anutAAimu man law yashao Allahu atAAamahu in antum illa fee dalalin mubeenin

verses.ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ تَأۡخُذُهُمۡ وَهُمۡ يَخِصِّمُونَ
verses.tr: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing
verses.tl: Ma yanthuroona illa sayhatan wahidatan takhuthuhum wahum yakhissimoona

verses.ar: فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ تَوۡصِيَةٗ وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.tr: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return
verses.tl: Fala yastateeAAoona tawsiyatan wala ila ahlihim yarjiAAoona

verses.ar: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمۡ يَنسِلُونَ
verses.tr: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten
verses.tl: Wanufikha fee alssoori faitha hum mina alajdathi ila rabbihim yansiloona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرۡقَدِنَاۜۗ هَٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.tr: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth
verses.tl: Qaloo ya waylana man baAAathana min marqadina hatha ma waAAada alrrahmanu wasadaqa almursaloona

verses.ar: إِن كَانَتۡ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ فَإِذَا هُمۡ جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيۡنَا مُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.tr: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us
verses.tl: In kanat illa sayhatan wahidatan faitha hum jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroona

verses.ar: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ لَا تُظۡلَمُ نَفۡسٞ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: So today no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do
verses.tl: Faalyawma la tuthlamu nafsun shayan wala tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona

verses.ar: إِنَّ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ فِي شُغُلٖ فَٰكِهُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed the companions of Paradise, that Day, will be amused in [joyful] occupation
verses.tl: Inna ashaba aljannati alyawma fee shughulin fakihoona

verses.ar: هُمۡ وَأَزۡوَٰجُهُمۡ فِي ظِلَٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
verses.tr: They and their spouses - in shade, reclining on adorned couches
verses.tl: Hum waazwajuhum fee thilalin AAala alaraiki muttakioona

verses.ar: لَهُمۡ فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةٞ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
verses.tr: For them therein is fruit, and for them is whatever they request [or wish]
verses.tl: Lahum feeha fakihatun walahum ma yaddaAAoona

verses.ar: سَلَٰمٞ قَوۡلٗا مِّن رَّبّٖ رَّحِيمٖ
verses.tr: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord
verses.tl: Salamun qawlan min rabbin raheemin

verses.ar: وَٱمۡتَٰزُواْ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
verses.tr: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals
verses.tl: Waimtazoo alyawma ayyuha almujrimoona

verses.ar: ۞أَلَمۡ أَعۡهَدۡ إِلَيۡكُمۡ يَٰبَنِيٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعۡبُدُواْ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنَۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمۡ عَدُوّٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy
verses.tl: Alam aAAhad ilaykum ya banee adama an la taAAbudoo alshshaytana innahu lakum AAaduwwun mubeenun

verses.ar: وَأَنِ ٱعۡبُدُونِيۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٞ مُّسۡتَقِيمٞ
verses.tr: And that you worship [only] Me? This is a straight path
verses.tl: Waani oAAbudoonee hatha siratun mustaqeemun

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمۡ جِبِلّٗا كَثِيرًاۖ أَفَلَمۡ تَكُونُواْ تَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: And he had already led astray from among you much of creation, so did you not use reason
verses.tl: Walaqad adalla minkum jibillan katheeran afalam takoonoo taAAqiloona

verses.ar: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُمۡ تُوعَدُونَ
verses.tr: This is the Hellfire which you were promised
verses.tl: Hathihi jahannamu allatee kuntum tooAAadoona

verses.ar: ٱصۡلَوۡهَا ٱلۡيَوۡمَ بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَكۡفُرُونَ
verses.tr: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny
verses.tl: Islawha alyawma bima kuntum takfuroona

verses.ar: ٱلۡيَوۡمَ نَخۡتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفۡوَٰهِهِمۡ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَتَشۡهَدُ أَرۡجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.tr: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn
verses.tl: Alyawma nakhtimu AAala afwahihim watukallimuna aydeehim watashhadu arjuluhum bima kanoo yaksiboona

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسۡنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعۡيُنِهِمۡ فَٱسۡتَبَقُواْ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see
verses.tl: Walaw nashao latamasna AAala aAAyunihim faistabaqoo alssirata faanna yubsiroona

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخۡنَٰهُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمۡ فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مُضِيّٗا وَلَا يَرۡجِعُونَ
verses.tr: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return
verses.tl: Walaw nashao lamasakhnahum AAala makanatihim fama istataAAoo mudiyyan wala yarjiAAoona

verses.ar: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرۡهُ نُنَكِّسۡهُ فِي ٱلۡخَلۡقِۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand
verses.tl: Waman nuAAammirhu nunakkishu fee alkhalqi afala yaAAqiloona

verses.ar: وَمَا عَلَّمۡنَٰهُ ٱلشِّعۡرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لَهُۥٓۚ إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرٞ وَقُرۡءَانٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: And We did not give Prophet Muhammad, knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur'an
verses.tl: Wama AAallamnahu alshshiAAra wama yanbaghee lahu in huwa illa thikrun waquranun mubeenun

verses.ar: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيّٗا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.tr: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word against the disbelievers
verses.tl: Liyunthira man kana hayyan wayahiqqa alqawlu AAala alkafireena

verses.ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتۡ أَيۡدِينَآ أَنۡعَٰمٗا فَهُمۡ لَهَا مَٰلِكُونَ
verses.tr: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners
verses.tl: Awalam yaraw anna khalaqna lahum mimma AAamilat aydeena anAAaman fahum laha malikoona

verses.ar: وَذَلَّلۡنَٰهَا لَهُمۡ فَمِنۡهَا رَكُوبُهُمۡ وَمِنۡهَا يَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.tr: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat
verses.tl: Wathallalnaha lahum faminha rakoobuhum waminha yakuloona

verses.ar: وَلَهُمۡ فِيهَا مَنَٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُۚ أَفَلَا يَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.tr: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful
verses.tl: Walahum feeha manafiAAu wamasharibu afala yashkuroona

verses.ar: وَٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةٗ لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.tr: But they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped
verses.tl: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan laAAallahum yunsaroona

verses.ar: لَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ نَصۡرَهُمۡ وَهُمۡ لَهُمۡ جُندٞ مُّحۡضَرُونَ
verses.tr: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance
verses.tl: La yastateeAAoona nasrahum wahum lahum jundun muhdaroona

verses.ar: فَلَا يَحۡزُنكَ قَوۡلُهُمۡۘ إِنَّا نَعۡلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعۡلِنُونَ
verses.tr: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare
verses.tl: Fala yahzunka qawluhum inna naAAlamu ma yusirroona wama yuAAlinoona

verses.ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُ مِن نُّطۡفَةٖ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary
verses.tl: Awalam yara alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min nutfatin faitha huwa khaseemun mubeenun

verses.ar: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلٗا وَنَسِيَ خَلۡقَهُۥۖ قَالَ مَن يُحۡيِ ٱلۡعِظَٰمَ وَهِيَ رَمِيمٞ
verses.tr: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated
verses.tl: Wadaraba lana mathalan wanasiya khalqahu qala man yuhyee alAAithama wahiya rameemun

verses.ar: قُلۡ يُحۡيِيهَا ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٖۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلۡقٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.tr: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing
verses.tl: Qul yuhyeeha allathee anshaaha awwala marratin wahuwa bikulli khalqin AAaleemun

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلۡأَخۡضَرِ نَارٗا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنۡهُ تُوقِدُونَ
verses.tr: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite
verses.tl: Allathee jaAAala lakum mina alshshajari alakhdari naran faitha antum minhu tooqidoona

verses.ar: أَوَلَيۡسَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخۡلُقَ مِثۡلَهُمۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلۡخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.tr: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator
verses.tl: Awalaysa allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda biqadirin AAala an yakhluqa mithlahum bala wahuwa alkhallaqu alAAaleemu

verses.ar: إِنَّمَآ أَمۡرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيۡـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.tr: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is
verses.tl: Innama amruhu itha arada shayan an yaqoola lahu kun fayakoonu

verses.ar: فَسُبۡحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِي بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ وَإِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُونَ
verses.tr: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned
verses.tl: Fasubhana allathee biyadihi malakootu kulli shayin wailayhi turjaAAoona

verses.ar: وَٱلصَّـٰٓفَّـٰتِ صَفّٗا
verses.tr: By those [angels] lined up in rows
verses.tl: Waalssaffati saffan

verses.ar: فَٱلزَّـٰجِرَٰتِ زَجۡرٗا
verses.tr: And those who drive [the clouds]
verses.tl: Faalzzajirati zajran

verses.ar: فَٱلتَّـٰلِيَٰتِ ذِكۡرًا
verses.tr: And those who recite the message
verses.tl: Faalttaliyati thikran

verses.ar: إِنَّ إِلَٰهَكُمۡ لَوَٰحِدٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, your God is One
verses.tl: Inna ilahakum lawahidun

verses.ar: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلۡمَشَٰرِقِ
verses.tr: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises
verses.tl: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma warabbu almashariqi

verses.ar: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلۡكَوَاكِبِ
verses.tr: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars
verses.tl: Inna zayyanna alssamaa alddunya bizeenatin alkawakibi

verses.ar: وَحِفۡظٗا مِّن كُلِّ شَيۡطَٰنٖ مَّارِدٖ
verses.tr: And as protection against every rebellious devil
verses.tl: Wahifthan min kulli shaytanin maridin

verses.ar: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ وَيُقۡذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖ
verses.tr: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side
verses.tl: La yassammaAAoona ila almalai alaAAla wayuqthafoona min kulli janibin

verses.ar: دُحُورٗاۖ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ وَاصِبٌ
verses.tr: Repelled; and for them is a constant punishment
verses.tl: Duhooran walahum AAathabun wasibun

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَنۡ خَطِفَ ٱلۡخَطۡفَةَ فَأَتۡبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٞ ثَاقِبٞ
verses.tr: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness]
verses.tl: Illa man khatifa alkhatfata faatbaAAahu shihabun thaqibun

verses.ar: فَٱسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ أَهُمۡ أَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا أَم مَّنۡ خَلَقۡنَآۚ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُم مِّن طِينٖ لَّازِبِۭ
verses.tr: Then inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created men from sticky clay
verses.tl: Faistaftihim ahum ashaddu khalqan am man khalaqna inna khalaqnahum min teenin lazibin

verses.ar: بَلۡ عَجِبۡتَ وَيَسۡخَرُونَ
verses.tr: But you wonder, while they mock
verses.tl: Bal AAajibta wayaskharoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ذُكِّرُواْ لَا يَذۡكُرُونَ
verses.tr: And when they are reminded, they remember not
verses.tl: Waitha thukkiroo la yathkuroona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡاْ ءَايَةٗ يَسۡتَسۡخِرُونَ
verses.tr: And when they see a sign, they ridicule
verses.tl: Waitha raaw ayatan yastaskhiroona

verses.ar: وَقَالُوٓاْ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحۡرٞ مُّبِينٌ
verses.tr: And say, "This is not but obvious magic
verses.tl: Waqaloo in hatha illa sihrun mubeenun

verses.ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ
verses.tr: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected
verses.tl: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona

verses.ar: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلۡأَوَّلُونَ
verses.tr: And our forefathers [as well]
verses.tl: Awaabaona alawwaloona

verses.ar: قُلۡ نَعَمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ دَٰخِرُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible
verses.tl: Qul naAAam waantum dakhiroona

verses.ar: فَإِنَّمَا هِيَ زَجۡرَةٞ وَٰحِدَةٞ فَإِذَا هُمۡ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.tr: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing
verses.tl: Fainnama hiya zajratun wahidatun faitha hum yanthuroona

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ يَٰوَيۡلَنَا هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: They will say, "O woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Waqaloo ya waylana hatha yawmu alddeeni

verses.ar: هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: [They will be told], "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny
verses.tl: Hatha yawmu alfasli allathee kuntum bihi tukaththiboona

verses.ar: ۞ٱحۡشُرُواْ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَأَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship
verses.tl: Ohshuroo allatheena thalamoo waazwajahum wama kanoo yaAAbudoona

verses.ar: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهۡدُوهُمۡ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: Other than Allah, and guide them to the path of Hellfire
verses.tl: Min dooni Allahi faihdoohum ila sirati aljaheemi

verses.ar: وَقِفُوهُمۡۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسۡـُٔولُونَ
verses.tr: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned
verses.tl: Waqifoohum innahum masooloona

verses.ar: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ
verses.tr: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other
verses.tl: Ma lakum la tanasaroona

verses.ar: بَلۡ هُمُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ مُسۡتَسۡلِمُونَ
verses.tr: But they, that Day, are in surrender
verses.tl: Bal humu alyawma mustaslimoona

verses.ar: وَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.tr: And they will approach one another blaming each other
verses.tl: Waaqbala baAAduhum AAala baAAdin yatasaaloona

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّكُمۡ كُنتُمۡ تَأۡتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right
verses.tl: Qaloo innakum kuntum tatoonana AAani alyameeni

verses.ar: قَالُواْ بَل لَّمۡ تَكُونُواْ مُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: The oppressors will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers
verses.tl: Qaloo bal lam takoonoo mumineena

verses.ar: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيۡكُم مِّن سُلۡطَٰنِۭۖ بَلۡ كُنتُمۡ قَوۡمٗا طَٰغِينَ
verses.tr: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people
verses.tl: Wama kana lana AAalaykum min sultanin bal kuntum qawman tagheena

verses.ar: فَحَقَّ عَلَيۡنَا قَوۡلُ رَبِّنَآۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
verses.tr: So the word of our Lord has come into effect upon us; indeed, we will taste [punishment]
verses.tl: Fahaqqa AAalayna qawlu rabbina inna lathaiqoona

verses.ar: فَأَغۡوَيۡنَٰكُمۡ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَٰوِينَ
verses.tr: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators
verses.tl: Faaghwaynakum inna kunna ghaweena

verses.ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ مُشۡتَرِكُونَ
verses.tr: So indeed they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment
verses.tl: Fainnahum yawmaithin fee alAAathabi mushtarikoona

verses.ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَفۡعَلُ بِٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals
verses.tl: Inna kathalika nafAAalu bialmujrimeena

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمۡ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسۡتَكۡبِرُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant
verses.tl: Innahum kanoo itha qeela lahum la ilaha illa Allahu yastakbiroona

verses.ar: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓاْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٖ مَّجۡنُونِۭ
verses.tr: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet
verses.tl: Wayaqooloona ainna latarikoo alihatina lishaAAirin majnoonin

verses.ar: بَلۡ جَآءَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers
verses.tl: Bal jaa bialhaqqi wasaddaqa almursaleena

verses.ar: إِنَّكُمۡ لَذَآئِقُواْ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡأَلِيمِ
verses.tr: Indeed, you [disbelievers] will be tasters of the painful punishment
verses.tl: Innakum lathaiqoo alAAathabi alaleemi

verses.ar: وَمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do
verses.tl: Wama tujzawna illa ma kuntum taAAmaloona

verses.ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.tr: But not the chosen servants of Allah
verses.tl: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena

verses.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ رِزۡقٞ مَّعۡلُومٞ
verses.tr: Those will have a provision determined
verses.tl: Olaika lahum rizqun maAAloomun

verses.ar: فَوَٰكِهُ وَهُم مُّكۡرَمُونَ
verses.tr: Fruits; and they will be honored
verses.tl: Fawakihu wahum mukramoona

verses.ar: فِي جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.tr: In gardens of pleasure
verses.tl: Fee jannati alnnaAAeemi

verses.ar: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٖ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.tr: On thrones facing one another
verses.tl: AAala sururin mutaqabileena

verses.ar: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِكَأۡسٖ مِّن مَّعِينِۭ
verses.tr: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring
verses.tl: Yutafu AAalayhim bikasin min maAAeenin

verses.ar: بَيۡضَآءَ لَذَّةٖ لِّلشَّـٰرِبِينَ
verses.tr: White and delicious to the drinkers
verses.tl: Baydaa laththatin lilshsharibeena

verses.ar: لَا فِيهَا غَوۡلٞ وَلَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا يُنزَفُونَ
verses.tr: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated
verses.tl: La feeha ghawlun wala hum AAanha yunzafoona

verses.ar: وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ عِينٞ
verses.tr: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes
verses.tl: WaAAindahum qasiratu alttarfi AAeenun

verses.ar: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيۡضٞ مَّكۡنُونٞ
verses.tr: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected
verses.tl: Kaannahunna baydun maknoonun

verses.ar: فَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.tr: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other
verses.tl: Faaqbala baAAduhum AAala baAAdin yatasaaloona

verses.ar: قَالَ قَآئِلٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ إِنِّي كَانَ لِي قَرِينٞ
verses.tr: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth]
verses.tl: Qala qailun minhum innee kana lee qareenun

verses.ar: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُصَدِّقِينَ
verses.tr: Who would say, 'Are you indeed of those who believe
verses.tl: Yaqoolu ainnaka lamina almusaddiqeena

verses.ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
verses.tr: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed
verses.tl: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamadeenoona

verses.ar: قَالَ هَلۡ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ
verses.tr: He will say, "Would you [care to] look
verses.tl: Qala hal antum muttaliAAoona

verses.ar: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِي سَوَآءِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire
verses.tl: FaittalaAAa faraahu fee sawai aljaheemi

verses.ar: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرۡدِينِ
verses.tr: He will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me
verses.tl: Qala taAllahi in kidta laturdeeni

verses.ar: وَلَوۡلَا نِعۡمَةُ رَبِّي لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُحۡضَرِينَ
verses.tr: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell]
verses.tl: Walawla niAAmatu rabbee lakuntu mina almuhdareena

verses.ar: أَفَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَيِّتِينَ
verses.tr: Then, are we not to die
verses.tl: Afama nahnu bimayyiteena

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَوۡتَتَنَا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.tr: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished
verses.tl: Illa mawtatana aloola wama nahnu bimuAAaththabeena

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
verses.tr: Indeed, this is the great attainment
verses.tl: Inna hatha lahuwa alfawzu alAAatheemu

verses.ar: لِمِثۡلِ هَٰذَا فَلۡيَعۡمَلِ ٱلۡعَٰمِلُونَ
verses.tr: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work
verses.tl: Limithli hatha falyaAAmali alAAamiloona

verses.ar: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرٞ نُّزُلًا أَمۡ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
verses.tr: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum
verses.tl: Athalika khayrun nuzulan am shajaratu alzzaqqoomi

verses.ar: إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَٰهَا فِتۡنَةٗ لِّلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers
verses.tl: Inna jaAAalnaha fitnatan lilththalimeena

verses.ar: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٞ تَخۡرُجُ فِيٓ أَصۡلِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire
verses.tl: Innaha shajaratun takhruju fee asli aljaheemi

verses.ar: طَلۡعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينِ
verses.tr: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils
verses.tl: TalAAuha kaannahu ruoosu alshshayateeni

verses.ar: فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَأٓكِلُونَ مِنۡهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنۡهَا ٱلۡبُطُونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies
verses.tl: Fainnahum laakiloona minha famalioona minha albutoona

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا لَشَوۡبٗا مِّنۡ حَمِيمٖ
verses.tr: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water
verses.tl: Thumma inna lahum AAalayha lashawban min hameemin

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرۡجِعَهُمۡ لَإِلَى ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire
verses.tl: Thumma inna marjiAAahum laila aljaheemi

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ أَلۡفَوۡاْ ءَابَآءَهُمۡ ضَآلِّينَ
verses.tr: Indeed they found their fathers astray
verses.tl: Innahum alfaw abaahum dalleena

verses.ar: فَهُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِمۡ يُهۡرَعُونَ
verses.tr: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps
verses.tl: Fahum AAala atharihim yuhraAAoona

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ ضَلَّ قَبۡلَهُمۡ أَكۡثَرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples
verses.tl: Walaqad dalla qablahum aktharu alawwaleena

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ
verses.tr: And We had already sent among them warners
verses.tl: Walaqad arsalna feehim munthireena

verses.ar: فَٱنظُرۡ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
verses.tr: Then look how was the end of those who were warned
verses.tl: Faonthur kayfa kana AAaqibatu almunthareena

verses.ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.tr: But not the chosen servants of Allah
verses.tl: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ نَادَىٰنَا نُوحٞ فَلَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡمُجِيبُونَ
verses.tr: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders
verses.tl: Walaqad nadana noohun falaniAAma almujeeboona

verses.ar: وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡكَرۡبِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction
verses.tl: Wanajjaynahu waahlahu mina alkarbi alAAatheemi

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلۡبَاقِينَ
verses.tr: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]
verses.tl: WajaAAalna thurriyyatahu humu albaqeena

verses.ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations
verses.tl: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena

verses.ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحٖ فِي ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: Peace upon Noah among the worlds
verses.tl: Salamun AAala noohin fee alAAalameena

verses.ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good
verses.tl: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants
verses.tl: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَغۡرَقۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
verses.tr: Then We drowned the disbelievers
verses.tl: Thumma aghraqna alakhareena

verses.ar: ۞وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
verses.tr: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham
verses.tl: Wainna min sheeAAatihi laibraheema

verses.ar: إِذۡ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلۡبٖ سَلِيمٍ
verses.tr: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart
verses.tl: Ith jaa rabbahu biqalbin saleemin

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوۡمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: [And] when he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship
verses.tl: Ith qala liabeehi waqawmihi matha taAAbudoona

verses.ar: أَئِفۡكًا ءَالِهَةٗ دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ
verses.tr: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allah you desire
verses.tl: Aifkan alihatan doona Allahi tureedoona

verses.ar: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Fama thannukum birabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: فَنَظَرَ نَظۡرَةٗ فِي ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.tr: And he cast a look at the stars
verses.tl: Fanathara nathratan fee alnnujoomi

verses.ar: فَقَالَ إِنِّي سَقِيمٞ
verses.tr: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill
verses.tl: Faqala innee saqeemun

verses.ar: فَتَوَلَّوۡاْ عَنۡهُ مُدۡبِرِينَ
verses.tr: So they turned away from him, departing
verses.tl: Fatawallaw AAanhu mudbireena

verses.ar: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمۡ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.tr: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat
verses.tl: Faragha ila alihatihim faqala ala takuloona

verses.ar: مَا لَكُمۡ لَا تَنطِقُونَ
verses.tr: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak
verses.tl: Ma lakum la tantiqoona

verses.ar: فَرَاغَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضَرۡبَۢا بِٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand
verses.tl: Faragha AAalayhim darban bialyameeni

verses.ar: فَأَقۡبَلُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِ يَزِفُّونَ
verses.tr: Then the people came toward him, hastening
verses.tl: Faaqbaloo ilayhi yaziffoona

verses.ar: قَالَ أَتَعۡبُدُونَ مَا تَنۡحِتُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve
verses.tl: Qala ataAAbudoona ma tanhitoona

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: While Allah created you and that which you do
verses.tl: WaAllahu khalaqakum wama taAAmaloona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ ٱبۡنُواْ لَهُۥ بُنۡيَٰنٗا فَأَلۡقُوهُ فِي ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: They said, "Construct for him a furnace and throw him into the burning fire
verses.tl: Qaloo ibnoo lahu bunyanan faalqoohu fee aljaheemi

verses.ar: فَأَرَادُواْ بِهِۦ كَيۡدٗا فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُمُ ٱلۡأَسۡفَلِينَ
verses.tr: And they intended for him a plan, but We made them the most debased
verses.tl: Faaradoo bihi kaydan fajaAAalnahumu alasfaleena

verses.ar: وَقَالَ إِنِّي ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّي سَيَهۡدِينِ
verses.tr: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me
verses.tl: Waqala innee thahibun ila rabbee sayahdeeni

verses.ar: رَبِّ هَبۡ لِي مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous
verses.tl: Rabbi hab lee mina alssaliheena

verses.ar: فَبَشَّرۡنَٰهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ حَلِيمٖ
verses.tr: So We gave him good tidings of a forbearing boy
verses.tl: Fabashsharnahu bighulamin haleemin

verses.ar: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعۡيَ قَالَ يَٰبُنَيَّ إِنِّيٓ أَرَىٰ فِي ٱلۡمَنَامِ أَنِّيٓ أَذۡبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرۡ مَاذَا تَرَىٰۚ قَالَ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفۡعَلۡ مَا تُؤۡمَرُۖ سَتَجِدُنِيٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
verses.tr: And when he reached with him [the age of] exertion, he said, "O my son, indeed I have seen in a dream that I [must] sacrifice you, so see what you think." He said, "O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allah wills, of the steadfast
