verses.tl: Falamma balagha maAAahu alssaAAya qala ya bunayya innee ara fee almanami annee athbahuka faonthur matha tara qala ya abati ifAAal ma tumaru satajidunee in shaa Allahu mina alssabireena

verses.ar: فَلَمَّآ أَسۡلَمَا وَتَلَّهُۥ لِلۡجَبِينِ
verses.tr: And when they had both submitted and he put him down upon his forehead
verses.tl: Falamma aslama watallahu liljabeeni

verses.ar: وَنَٰدَيۡنَٰهُ أَن يَـٰٓإِبۡرَٰهِيمُ
verses.tr: We called to him, "O Abraham
verses.tl: Wanadaynahu an ya ibraheemu

verses.ar: قَدۡ صَدَّقۡتَ ٱلرُّءۡيَآۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good
verses.tl: Qad saddaqta alrruya inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلۡبَلَـٰٓؤُاْ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
verses.tr: Indeed, this was the clear trial
verses.tl: Inna hatha lahuwa albalao almubeenu

verses.ar: وَفَدَيۡنَٰهُ بِذِبۡحٍ عَظِيمٖ
verses.tr: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice
verses.tl: Wafadaynahu bithibhin AAatheemin

verses.ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations
verses.tl: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena

verses.ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ
verses.tr: Peace upon Abraham
verses.tl: Salamun AAala ibraheema

verses.ar: كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good
verses.tl: Kathalika najzee almuhsineena

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants
verses.tl: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena

verses.ar: وَبَشَّرۡنَٰهُ بِإِسۡحَٰقَ نَبِيّٗا مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: And We gave him good tidings of Isaac, a prophet from among the righteous
verses.tl: Wabashsharnahu biishaqa nabiyyan mina alssaliheena

verses.ar: وَبَٰرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسۡحَٰقَۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحۡسِنٞ وَظَالِمٞ لِّنَفۡسِهِۦ مُبِينٞ
verses.tr: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself
verses.tl: Wabarakna AAalayhi waAAala ishaqa wamin thurriyyatihima muhsinun wathalimun linafsihi mubeenun

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ
verses.tr: And We did certainly confer favor upon Moses and Aaron
verses.tl: Walaqad mananna AAala moosa waharoona

verses.ar: وَنَجَّيۡنَٰهُمَا وَقَوۡمَهُمَا مِنَ ٱلۡكَرۡبِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: And We saved them and their people from the great affliction
verses.tl: Wanajjaynahuma waqawmahuma mina alkarbi alAAatheemi

verses.ar: وَنَصَرۡنَٰهُمۡ فَكَانُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبِينَ
verses.tr: And We supported them so it was they who overcame
verses.tl: Wanasarnahum fakanoo humu alghalibeena

verses.ar: وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمَا ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَبِينَ
verses.tr: And We gave them the explicit Scripture
verses.tl: Waataynahuma alkitaba almustabeena

verses.ar: وَهَدَيۡنَٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقِيمَ
verses.tr: And We guided them on the straight path
verses.tl: Wahadaynahuma alssirata almustaqeema

verses.ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمَا فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations
verses.tl: Watarakna AAalayhima fee alakhireena

verses.ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ
verses.tr: Peace upon Moses and Aaron
verses.tl: Salamun AAala moosa waharoona

verses.ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good
verses.tl: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمَا مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants
verses.tl: Innahuma min AAibadina almumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ إِلۡيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers
verses.tl: Wainna ilyasa lamina almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ لِقَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: When he said to his people, "Will you not fear Allah
verses.tl: Ith qala liqawmihi ala tattaqoona

verses.ar: أَتَدۡعُونَ بَعۡلٗا وَتَذَرُونَ أَحۡسَنَ ٱلۡخَٰلِقِينَ
verses.tr: Do you call upon Ba'l and leave the best of creators
verses.tl: AtadAAoona baAAlan watatharoona ahsana alkhaliqeena

verses.ar: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمۡ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers
verses.tl: Allaha rabbakum warabba abaikumu alawwaleena

verses.ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَإِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.tr: And they denied him, so indeed, they will be brought [for punishment]
verses.tl: Fakaththaboohu fainnahum lamuhdaroona

verses.ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.tr: Except the chosen servants of Allah
verses.tl: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena

verses.ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations
verses.tl: Watarakna AAalayhi fee alakhireena

verses.ar: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِلۡ يَاسِينَ
verses.tr: Peace upon Elias
verses.tl: Salamun AAala il yaseena

verses.ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good
verses.tl: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ مِنۡ عِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants
verses.tl: Innahu min AAibadina almumineena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ لُوطٗا لَّمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers
verses.tl: Wainna lootan lamina almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ نَجَّيۡنَٰهُ وَأَهۡلَهُۥٓ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.tr: [So mention] when We saved him and his family, all
verses.tl: Ith najjaynahu waahlahu ajmaAAeena

verses.ar: إِلَّا عَجُوزٗا فِي ٱلۡغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.tr: Except his wife among those who remained [with the evildoers]
verses.tl: Illa AAajoozan fee alghabireena

verses.ar: ثُمَّ دَمَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأٓخَرِينَ
verses.tr: Then We destroyed the others
verses.tl: Thumma dammarna alakhareena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّكُمۡ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيۡهِم مُّصۡبِحِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning
verses.tl: Wainnakum latamurroona AAalayhim musbiheena

verses.ar: وَبِٱلَّيۡلِۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: And at night. Then will you not use reason
verses.tl: Wabiallayli afala taAAqiloona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, Jonah was among the messengers
verses.tl: Wainna yoonusa lamina almursaleena

verses.ar: إِذۡ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلۡفُلۡكِ ٱلۡمَشۡحُونِ
verses.tr: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship
verses.tl: Ith abaqa ila alfulki almashhooni

verses.ar: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُدۡحَضِينَ
verses.tr: And he drew lots and was among the losers
verses.tl: Fasahama fakana mina almudhadeena

verses.ar: فَٱلۡتَقَمَهُ ٱلۡحُوتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٞ
verses.tr: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy
verses.tl: Failtaqamahu alhootu wahuwa muleemun

verses.ar: فَلَوۡلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.tr: And had he not been of those who exalt Allah
verses.tl: Falawla annahu kana mina almusabbiheena

verses.ar: لَلَبِثَ فِي بَطۡنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.tr: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected
verses.tl: Lalabitha fee batnihi ila yawmi yubAAathoona

verses.ar: ۞فَنَبَذۡنَٰهُ بِٱلۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيمٞ
verses.tr: But We threw him onto the open shore while he was ill
verses.tl: Fanabathnahu bialAAarai wahuwa saqeemun

verses.ar: وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا عَلَيۡهِ شَجَرَةٗ مِّن يَقۡطِينٖ
verses.tr: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine
verses.tl: Waanbatna AAalayhi shajaratan min yaqteenin

verses.ar: وَأَرۡسَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِاْئَةِ أَلۡفٍ أَوۡ يَزِيدُونَ
verses.tr: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more
verses.tl: Waarsalnahu ila miati alfin aw yazeedoona

verses.ar: فَـَٔامَنُواْ فَمَتَّعۡنَٰهُمۡ إِلَىٰ حِينٖ
verses.tr: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time
verses.tl: Faamanoo famattaAAnahum ila heenin

verses.ar: فَٱسۡتَفۡتِهِمۡ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلۡبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلۡبَنُونَ
verses.tr: So inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons
verses.tl: Faistaftihim alirabbika albanatu walahumu albanoona

verses.ar: أَمۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَٰثٗا وَهُمۡ شَٰهِدُونَ
verses.tr: Or did We create the angels as females while they were witnesses
verses.tl: Am khalaqna almalaikata inathan wahum shahidoona

verses.ar: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنۡ إِفۡكِهِمۡ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.tr: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say
verses.tl: Ala innahum min ifkihim layaqooloona

verses.ar: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمۡ لَكَٰذِبُونَ
verses.tr: Allah has begotten," and indeed, they are liars
verses.tl: Walada Allahu wainnahum lakathiboona

verses.ar: أَصۡطَفَى ٱلۡبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلۡبَنِينَ
verses.tr: Has He chosen daughters over sons
verses.tl: Astafa albanati AAala albaneena

verses.ar: مَا لَكُمۡ كَيۡفَ تَحۡكُمُونَ
verses.tr: What is [wrong] with you? How do you make judgement
verses.tl: Ma lakum kayfa tahkumoona

verses.ar: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.tr: Then will you not be reminded
verses.tl: Afala tathakkaroona

verses.ar: أَمۡ لَكُمۡ سُلۡطَٰنٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: Or do you have a clear authority
verses.tl: Am lakum sultanun mubeenun

verses.ar: فَأۡتُواْ بِكِتَٰبِكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: Fatoo bikitabikum in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: وَجَعَلُواْ بَيۡنَهُۥ وَبَيۡنَ ٱلۡجِنَّةِ نَسَبٗاۚ وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمَتِ ٱلۡجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمۡ لَمُحۡضَرُونَ
verses.tr: And they have claimed between Him and the jinn a lineage, but the jinn have already known that they [who made such claims] will be brought to [punishment]
verses.tl: WajaAAaloo baynahu wabayna aljinnati nasaban walaqad AAalimati aljinnatu innahum lamuhdaroona

verses.ar: سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.tr: Exalted is Allah above what they describe
verses.tl: Subhana Allahi AAamma yasifoona

verses.ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.tr: Except the chosen servants of Allah [who do not share in that sin]
verses.tl: Illa AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena

verses.ar: فَإِنَّكُمۡ وَمَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: So indeed, you [disbelievers] and whatever you worship
verses.tl: Fainnakum wama taAAbudoona

verses.ar: مَآ أَنتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ بِفَٰتِنِينَ
verses.tr: You cannot tempt [anyone] away from Him
verses.tl: Ma antum AAalayhi bifatineena

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَنۡ هُوَ صَالِ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: Except he who is to [enter and] burn in the Hellfire
verses.tl: Illa man huwa sali aljaheemi

verses.ar: وَمَامِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٞ مَّعۡلُومٞ
verses.tr: [The angels say], "There is not among us any except that he has a known position
verses.tl: Wama minna illa lahu maqamun maAAloomun

verses.ar: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ ٱلصَّآفُّونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, we are those who line up [for prayer]
verses.tl: Wainna lanahnu alssaffoona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّا لَنَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, we are those who exalt Allah
verses.tl: Wainna lanahnu almusabbihoona

verses.ar: وَإِن كَانُواْ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, the disbelievers used to say
verses.tl: Wain kanoo layaqooloona

verses.ar: لَوۡ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكۡرٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: If we had a message from [those of] the former peoples
verses.tl: Law anna AAindana thikran mina alawwaleena

verses.ar: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.tr: We would have been the chosen servants of Allah
verses.tl: Lakunna AAibada Allahi almukhlaseena

verses.ar: فَكَفَرُواْ بِهِۦۖ فَسَوۡفَ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: But they disbelieved in it, so they are going to know
verses.tl: Fakafaroo bihi fasawfa yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ سَبَقَتۡ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: And Our word has already preceded for Our servants, the messengers
verses.tl: Walaqad sabaqat kalimatuna liAAibadina almursaleena

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ لَهُمُ ٱلۡمَنصُورُونَ
verses.tr: [That] indeed, they would be those given victory
verses.tl: Innahum lahumu almansooroona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ جُندَنَا لَهُمُ ٱلۡغَٰلِبُونَ
verses.tr: And [that] indeed, Our soldiers will be those who overcome
verses.tl: Wainna jundana lahumu alghaliboona

verses.ar: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِينٖ
verses.tr: So, [O Muhammad], leave them for a time
verses.tl: Fatawalla AAanhum hatta heenin

verses.ar: وَأَبۡصِرۡهُمۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And see [what will befall] them, for they are going to see
verses.tl: Waabsirhum fasawfa yubsiroona

verses.ar: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
verses.tr: Then for Our punishment are they impatient
verses.tl: AfabiAAathabina yastaAAjiloona

verses.ar: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمۡ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلۡمُنذَرِينَ
verses.tr: But when it descends in their territory, then evil is the morning of those who were warned
verses.tl: Faitha nazala bisahatihim fasaa sabahu almunthareena

verses.ar: وَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ حِينٖ
verses.tr: And leave them for a time
verses.tl: Watawalla AAanhum hatta heenin

verses.ar: وَأَبۡصِرۡ فَسَوۡفَ يُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And see, for they are going to see
verses.tl: Waabsir fasawfa yubsiroona

verses.ar: سُبۡحَٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلۡعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.tr: Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe
verses.tl: Subhana rabbika rabbi alAAizzati AAamma yasifoona

verses.ar: وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَى ٱلۡمُرۡسَلِينَ
verses.tr: And peace upon the messengers
verses.tl: Wasalamun AAala almursaleena

verses.ar: وَٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Waalhamdu lillahi rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: صٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ذِي ٱلذِّكۡرِ
verses.tr: Sad. By the Qur'an containing reminder
verses.tl: Sad waalqurani thee alththikri

verses.ar: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي عِزَّةٖ وَشِقَاقٖ
verses.tr: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension
verses.tl: Bali allatheena kafaroo fee AAizzatin washiqaqin

verses.ar: كَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّن قَرۡنٖ فَنَادَواْ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٖ
verses.tr: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape
verses.tl: Kam ahlakna min qablihim min qarnin fanadaw walata heena manasin

verses.ar: وَعَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡۖ وَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا سَٰحِرٞ كَذَّابٌ
verses.tr: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar
verses.tl: WaAAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum waqala alkafiroona hatha sahirun kaththabun

verses.ar: أَجَعَلَ ٱلۡأٓلِهَةَ إِلَٰهٗا وَٰحِدًاۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيۡءٌ عُجَابٞ
verses.tr: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing
verses.tl: AjaAAala alalihata ilahan wahidan inna hatha lashayon AAujabun

verses.ar: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلۡمَلَأُ مِنۡهُمۡ أَنِ ٱمۡشُواْ وَٱصۡبِرُواْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمۡۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَيۡءٞ يُرَادُ
verses.tr: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended
verses.tl: Waintalaqa almalao minhum ani imshoo waisbiroo AAala alihatikum inna hatha lashayon yuradu

verses.ar: مَا سَمِعۡنَا بِهَٰذَا فِي ٱلۡمِلَّةِ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخۡتِلَٰقٌ
verses.tr: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication
verses.tl: Ma samiAAna bihatha fee almillati alakhirati in hatha illa ikhtilaqun

verses.ar: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلذِّكۡرُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِنَاۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي شَكّٖ مِّن ذِكۡرِيۚ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِ
verses.tr: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment
verses.tl: Aonzila AAalayhi alththikru min baynina bal hum fee shakkin min thikree bal lamma yathooqoo AAathabi

verses.ar: أَمۡ عِندَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَحۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡوَهَّابِ
verses.tr: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower
verses.tl: Am AAindahum khazainu rahmati rabbika alAAazeezi alwahhabi

verses.ar: أَمۡ لَهُم مُّلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ فَلۡيَرۡتَقُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَسۡبَٰبِ
verses.tr: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access
verses.tl: Am lahum mulku alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma falyartaqoo fee alasbabi

verses.ar: جُندٞ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهۡزُومٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابِ
verses.tr: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers]
verses.tl: Jundun ma hunalika mahzoomun mina alahzabi

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٖ وَعَادٞ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ ذُو ٱلۡأَوۡتَادِ
verses.tr: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] 'Aad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes
verses.tl: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waAAadun wafirAAawnu thoo alawtadi

verses.ar: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوۡمُ لُوطٖ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ لۡـَٔيۡكَةِۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابُ
verses.tr: And [the tribe of] Thamud and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket. Those are the companies
verses.tl: Wathamoodu waqawmu lootin waashabu alaykati olaika alahzabu

verses.ar: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
verses.tr: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified
verses.tl: In kullun illa kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa AAiqabi

verses.ar: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيۡحَةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٖ
verses.tr: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay
verses.tl: Wama yanthuru haolai illa sayhatan wahidatan ma laha min fawaqin

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبۡلَ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
verses.tr: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account
verses.tl: Waqaloo rabbana AAajjil lana qittana qabla yawmi alhisabi

verses.ar: ٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلۡأَيۡدِۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.tr: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allah]
verses.tl: Isbir AAala ma yaqooloona waothkur AAabdana dawooda tha alaydi innahu awwabun

verses.ar: إِنَّا سَخَّرۡنَا ٱلۡجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحۡنَ بِٱلۡعَشِيِّ وَٱلۡإِشۡرَاقِ
verses.tr: Indeed, We subjected the mountains [to praise] with him, exalting [Allah] in the [late] afternoon and [after] sunrise
verses.tl: Inna sakhkharna aljibala maAAahu yusabbihna bialAAashiyyi waalishraqi

verses.ar: وَٱلطَّيۡرَ مَحۡشُورَةٗۖ كُلّٞ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٞ
verses.tr: And the birds were assembled, all with him repeating [praises]
verses.tl: Waalttayra mahshooratan kullun lahu awwabun

verses.ar: وَشَدَدۡنَا مُلۡكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلۡحِكۡمَةَ وَفَصۡلَ ٱلۡخِطَابِ
verses.tr: And We strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech
verses.tl: Washadadna mulkahu waataynahu alhikmata wafasla alkhitabi

verses.ar: ۞وَهَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُاْ ٱلۡخَصۡمِ إِذۡ تَسَوَّرُواْ ٱلۡمِحۡرَابَ
verses.tr: And has there come to you the news of the adversaries, when they climbed over the wall of [his] prayer chamber
verses.tl: Wahal ataka nabao alkhasmi ith tasawwaroo almihraba

verses.ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنۡهُمۡۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡۖ خَصۡمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعۡضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ فَٱحۡكُم بَيۡنَنَا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا تُشۡطِطۡ وَٱهۡدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ
verses.tr: When they entered upon David and he was alarmed by them? They said, "Fear not. [We are] two adversaries, one of whom has wronged the other, so judge between us with truth and do not exceed [it] and guide us to the sound path
verses.tl: Ith dakhaloo AAala dawooda fafaziAAa minhum qaloo la takhaf khasmani bagha baAAduna AAala baAAdin faohkum baynana bialhaqqi wala tushtit waihdina ila sawai alssirati

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَآ أَخِي لَهُۥ تِسۡعٞ وَتِسۡعُونَ نَعۡجَةٗ وَلِيَ نَعۡجَةٞ وَٰحِدَةٞ فَقَالَ أَكۡفِلۡنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِي فِي ٱلۡخِطَابِ
verses.tr: Indeed this, my brother, has ninety-nine ewes, and I have one ewe; so he said, 'Entrust her to me,' and he overpowered me in speech
verses.tl: Inna hatha akhee lahu tisAAun watisAAoona naAAjatan waliya naAAjatun wahidatun faqala akfilneeha waAAazzanee fee alkhitabi

verses.ar: قَالَ لَقَدۡ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعۡجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبۡغِي بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَقَلِيلٞ مَّا هُمۡۗ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّـٰهُ فَٱسۡتَغۡفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّۤ رَاكِعٗاۤ وَأَنَابَ۩
verses.tr: [David] said, "He has certainly wronged you in demanding your ewe [in addition] to his ewes. And indeed, many associates oppress one another, except for those who believe and do righteous deeds - and few are they." And David became certain that We had tried him, and he asked forgiveness of his Lord and fell down bowing [in prostration] and turned in repentance [to Allah]
verses.tl: Qala laqad thalamaka bisuali naAAjatika ila niAAajihi wainna katheeran mina alkhulatai layabghee baAAduhum AAala baAAdin illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati waqaleelun ma hum wathanna dawoodu annama fatannahu faistaghfara rabbahu wakharra rakiAAan waanaba

verses.ar: فَغَفَرۡنَا لَهُۥ ذَٰلِكَۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلۡفَىٰ وَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابٖ
verses.tr: So We forgave him that; and indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return
verses.tl: Faghafarna lahu thalika wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin

verses.ar: يَٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلۡنَٰكَ خَلِيفَةٗ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱحۡكُم بَيۡنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلۡهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ شَدِيدُۢ بِمَا نَسُواْ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
verses.tr: [We said], "O David, indeed We have made you a successor upon the earth, so judge between the people in truth and do not follow [your own] desire, as it will lead you astray from the way of Allah." Indeed, those who go astray from the way of Allah will have a severe punishment for having forgotten the Day of Account
verses.tl: Ya dawoodu inna jaAAalnaka khaleefatan fee alardi faohkum bayna alnnasi bialhaqqi wala tattabiAAi alhawa fayudillaka AAan sabeeli Allahi inna allatheena yadilloona AAan sabeeli Allahi lahum AAathabun shadeedun bima nasoo yawma alhisabi

verses.ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا بَٰطِلٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۚ فَوَيۡلٞ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: And We did not create the heaven and the earth and that between them aimlessly. That is the assumption of those who disbelieve, so woe to those who disbelieve from the Fire
verses.tl: Wama khalaqna alssamaa waalarda wama baynahuma batilan thalika thannu allatheena kafaroo fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo mina alnnari

verses.ar: أَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ كَٱلۡمُفۡسِدِينَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ نَجۡعَلُ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلۡفُجَّارِ
verses.tr: Or should we treat those who believe and do righteous deeds like corrupters in the land? Or should We treat those who fear Allah like the wicked
verses.tl: Am najAAalu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati kaalmufsideena fee alardi am najAAalu almuttaqeena kaalfujjari

verses.ar: كِتَٰبٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَيۡكَ مُبَٰرَكٞ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓاْ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
verses.tr: [This is] a blessed Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], that they might reflect upon its verses and that those of understanding would be reminded
verses.tl: Kitabun anzalnahu ilayka mubarakun liyaddabbaroo ayatihi waliyatathakkara oloo alalbabi

verses.ar: وَوَهَبۡنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيۡمَٰنَۚ نِعۡمَ ٱلۡعَبۡدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.tr: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allah]
verses.tl: Wawahabna lidawooda sulaymana niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun

verses.ar: إِذۡ عُرِضَ عَلَيۡهِ بِٱلۡعَشِيِّ ٱلصَّـٰفِنَٰتُ ٱلۡجِيَادُ
verses.tr: [Mention] when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised [standing] racehorses
verses.tl: Ith AAurida AAalayhi bialAAashiyyi alssafinatu aljiyadu

verses.ar: فَقَالَ إِنِّيٓ أَحۡبَبۡتُ حُبَّ ٱلۡخَيۡرِ عَن ذِكۡرِ رَبِّي حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتۡ بِٱلۡحِجَابِ
verses.tr: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until the sun disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]
verses.tl: Faqala innee ahbabtu hubba alkhayri AAan thikri rabbee hatta tawarat bialhijabi

verses.ar: رُدُّوهَا عَلَيَّۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسۡحَۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلۡأَعۡنَاقِ
verses.tr: [He said], "Return them to me," and set about striking [their] legs and necks
verses.tl: Ruddooha AAalayya fatafiqa mashan bialssooqi waalaAAnaqi

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ فَتَنَّا سُلَيۡمَٰنَ وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا عَلَىٰ كُرۡسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدٗا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
verses.tr: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned
verses.tl: Walaqad fatanna sulaymana waalqayna AAala kursiyyihi jasadan thumma anaba

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَهَبۡ لِي مُلۡكٗا لَّا يَنۢبَغِي لِأَحَدٖ مِّنۢ بَعۡدِيٓۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡوَهَّابُ
verses.tr: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower
verses.tl: Qala rabbi ighfir lee wahab lee mulkan la yanbaghee liahadin min baAAdee innaka anta alwahhabu

verses.ar: فَسَخَّرۡنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجۡرِي بِأَمۡرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيۡثُ أَصَابَ
verses.tr: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed
verses.tl: Fasakhkharna lahu alrreeha tajree biamrihi rukhaan haythu asaba

verses.ar: وَٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٖ وَغَوَّاصٖ
verses.tr: And [also] the devils [of jinn] - every builder and diver
verses.tl: Waalshshayateena kulla bannain waghawwasin

verses.ar: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِي ٱلۡأَصۡفَادِ
verses.tr: And others bound together in shackles
verses.tl: Waakhareena muqarraneena fee alasfadi

verses.ar: هَٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمۡنُنۡ أَوۡ أَمۡسِكۡ بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٖ
verses.tr: [We said], "This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account
verses.tl: Hatha AAataona faomnun aw amsik bighayri hisabin

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلۡفَىٰ وَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابٖ
verses.tr: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return
verses.tl: Wainna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maabin

verses.ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذۡ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ بِنُصۡبٖ وَعَذَابٍ
verses.tr: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment
verses.tl: Waothkur AAabdana ayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya alshshaytanu binusbin waAAathabin

verses.ar: ٱرۡكُضۡ بِرِجۡلِكَۖ هَٰذَا مُغۡتَسَلُۢ بَارِدٞ وَشَرَابٞ
verses.tr: [So he was told], "Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for] a cool bath and drink
verses.tl: Orkud birijlika hatha mughtasalun baridun washarabun

verses.ar: وَوَهَبۡنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهۡلَهُۥ وَمِثۡلَهُم مَّعَهُمۡ رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنَّا وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
verses.tr: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding
verses.tl: Wawahabna lahu ahlahu wamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan minna wathikra liolee alalbabi

verses.ar: وَخُذۡ بِيَدِكَ ضِغۡثٗا فَٱضۡرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحۡنَثۡۗ إِنَّا وَجَدۡنَٰهُ صَابِرٗاۚ نِّعۡمَ ٱلۡعَبۡدُ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٞ
verses.tr: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allah]
verses.tl: Wakhuth biyadika dighthan faidrib bihi wala tahnath inna wajadnahu sabiran niAAma alAAabdu innahu awwabun

verses.ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عِبَٰدَنَآ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ أُوْلِي ٱلۡأَيۡدِي وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
verses.tr: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision
verses.tl: Waothkur AAibadana ibraheema waishaqa wayaAAqooba olee alaydee waalabsari

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَخۡلَصۡنَٰهُم بِخَالِصَةٖ ذِكۡرَى ٱلدَّارِ
verses.tr: Indeed, We chose them for an exclusive quality: remembrance of the home [of the Hereafter]
verses.tl: Inna akhlasnahum bikhalisatin thikra alddari

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُمۡ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلۡمُصۡطَفَيۡنَ ٱلۡأَخۡيَارِ
verses.tr: And indeed they are, to Us, among the chosen and outstanding
verses.tl: Wainnahum AAindana lamina almustafayna alakhyari

verses.ar: وَٱذۡكُرۡ إِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَٱلۡيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلۡكِفۡلِۖ وَكُلّٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَخۡيَارِ
verses.tr: And remember Ishmael, Elisha and Dhul-Kifl, and all are among the outstanding
verses.tl: Waothkur ismaAAeela wailyasaAAa watha alkifli wakullun mina alakhyari

verses.ar: هَٰذَا ذِكۡرٞۚ وَإِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسۡنَ مَـَٔابٖ
verses.tr: This is a reminder. And indeed, for the righteous is a good place of return
verses.tl: Hatha thikrun wainna lilmuttaqeena lahusna maabin

verses.ar: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدۡنٖ مُّفَتَّحَةٗ لَّهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡوَٰبُ
verses.tr: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them
verses.tl: Jannati AAadnin mufattahatan lahumu alabwabu

verses.ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدۡعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَٰكِهَةٖ كَثِيرَةٖ وَشَرَابٖ
verses.tr: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink
verses.tl: Muttakieena feeha yadAAoona feeha bifakihatin katheeratin washarabin

verses.ar: ۞وَعِندَهُمۡ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ أَتۡرَابٌ
verses.tr: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances and of equal age
verses.tl: WaAAindahum qasiratu alttarfi atrabun

verses.ar: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
verses.tr: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account
verses.tl: Hatha ma tooAAadoona liyawmi alhisabi

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزۡقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
verses.tr: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion
verses.tl: Inna hatha larizquna ma lahu min nafadin

verses.ar: هَٰذَاۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّـٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابٖ
verses.tr: This [is so]. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return
verses.tl: Hatha wainna lilttagheena lasharra maabin

verses.ar: جَهَنَّمَ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَا فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمِهَادُ
verses.tr: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place
verses.tl: Jahannama yaslawnaha fabisa almihadu

verses.ar: هَٰذَا فَلۡيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٞ وَغَسَّاقٞ
verses.tr: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and [foul] purulence
verses.tl: Hatha falyathooqoohu hameemun waghassaqun

verses.ar: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكۡلِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٌ
verses.tr: And other [punishments] of its type [in various] kinds
verses.tl: Waakharu min shaklihi azwajun

verses.ar: هَٰذَا فَوۡجٞ مُّقۡتَحِمٞ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُواْ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: [Its inhabitants will say], "This is a company bursting in with you. No welcome for them. Indeed, they will burn in the Fire
verses.tl: Hatha fawjun muqtahimun maAAakum la marhaban bihim innahum saloo alnnari

verses.ar: قَالُواْ بَلۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِكُمۡۖ أَنتُمۡ قَدَّمۡتُمُوهُ لَنَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡقَرَارُ
verses.tr: They will say, "Nor you! No welcome for you. You, [our leaders], brought this upon us, and wretched is the settlement
verses.tl: Qaloo bal antum la marhaban bikum antum qaddamtumoohu lana fabisa alqararu

verses.ar: قَالُواْ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدۡهُ عَذَابٗا ضِعۡفٗا فِي ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: They will say, "Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us - increase for him double punishment in the Fire
verses.tl: Qaloo rabbana man qaddama lana hatha fazidhu AAathaban diAAfan fee alnnari

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالٗا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَشۡرَارِ
verses.tr: And they will say, "Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst
verses.tl: Waqaloo ma lana la nara rijalan kunna naAAudduhum mina alashrari

verses.ar: أَتَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّا أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرُ
verses.tr: Is it [because] we took them in ridicule, or has [our] vision turned away from them
verses.tl: Attakhathnahum sikhriyyan am zaghat AAanhumu alabsaru

verses.ar: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: Indeed, that is truth - the quarreling of the people of the Fire
verses.tl: Inna thalika lahaqqun takhasumu ahli alnnari

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٞۖ وَمَا مِنۡ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allah, the One, the Prevailing
verses.tl: Qul innama ana munthirun wama min ilahin illa Allahu alwahidu alqahharu

verses.ar: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفَّـٰرُ
verses.tr: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver
verses.tl: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma alAAazeezu alghaffaru

verses.ar: قُلۡ هُوَ نَبَؤٌاْ عَظِيمٌ
verses.tr: Say, "It is great news
verses.tl: Qul huwa nabaon AAatheemun

verses.ar: أَنتُمۡ عَنۡهُ مُعۡرِضُونَ
verses.tr: From which you turn away
verses.tl: Antum AAanhu muAAridoona

verses.ar: مَا كَانَ لِيَ مِنۡ عِلۡمِۭ بِٱلۡمَلَإِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰٓ إِذۡ يَخۡتَصِمُونَ
verses.tr: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly [of angels] when they were disputing [the creation of Adam]
verses.tl: Ma kana liya min AAilmin bialmalai alaAAla ith yakhtasimoona

verses.ar: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٌ
verses.tr: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner
verses.tl: In yooha ilayya illa annama ana natheerun mubeenun

verses.ar: إِذۡ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّي خَٰلِقُۢ بَشَرٗا مِّن طِينٖ
verses.tr: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay
verses.tl: Ith qala rabbuka lilmalaikati innee khaliqun basharan min teenin

verses.ar: فَإِذَا سَوَّيۡتُهُۥ وَنَفَخۡتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُواْ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
verses.tr: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration
verses.tl: Faitha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehi min roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideena

verses.ar: فَسَجَدَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعُونَ
verses.tr: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely
verses.tl: Fasajada almalaikatu kulluhum ajmaAAoona

verses.ar: إِلَّآ إِبۡلِيسَ ٱسۡتَكۡبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.tr: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers
verses.tl: Illa ibleesa istakbara wakana mina alkafireena

verses.ar: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبۡلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسۡجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقۡتُ بِيَدَيَّۖ أَسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ أَمۡ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَالِينَ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty
verses.tl: Qala ya ibleesu ma manaAAaka an tasjuda lima khalaqtu biyadayya astakbarta am kunta mina alAAaleena

verses.ar: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡهُ خَلَقۡتَنِي مِن نَّارٖ وَخَلَقۡتَهُۥ مِن طِينٖ
verses.tr: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay
verses.tl: Qala ana khayrun minhu khalaqtanee min narin wakhalaqtahu min teenin

verses.ar: قَالَ فَٱخۡرُجۡ مِنۡهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٞ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "Then get out of Paradise, for indeed, you are expelled
verses.tl: Qala faokhruj minha fainnaka rajeemun

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكَ لَعۡنَتِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Wainna AAalayka laAAnatee ila yawmi alddeeni

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرۡنِيٓ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ يُبۡعَثُونَ
verses.tr: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected
verses.tl: Qala rabbi faanthirnee ila yawmi yubAAathoona

verses.ar: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُنظَرِينَ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved
verses.tl: Qala fainnaka mina almunthareena

verses.ar: إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡوَقۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡلُومِ
verses.tr: Until the Day of the time well-known
verses.tl: Ila yawmi alwaqti almaAAloomi

verses.ar: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغۡوِيَنَّهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.tr: [Iblees] said, "By your might, I will surely mislead them all
verses.tl: Qala fabiAAizzatika laoghwiyannahum ajmaAAeena

verses.ar: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنۡهُمُ ٱلۡمُخۡلَصِينَ
verses.tr: Except, among them, Your chosen servants
verses.tl: Illa AAibadaka minhumu almukhlaseena

verses.ar: قَالَ فَٱلۡحَقُّ وَٱلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ
verses.tr: [Allah] said, "The truth [is My oath], and the truth I say
verses.tl: Qala faalhaqqu waalhaqqa aqoolu

verses.ar: لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
verses.tr: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together
verses.tl: Laamlaanna jahannama minka wamimman tabiAAaka minhum ajmaAAeena

verses.ar: قُلۡ مَآ أَسۡـَٔلُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ أَجۡرٖ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلۡمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "I do not ask you for the Qur'an any payment, and I am not of the pretentious
verses.tl: Qul ma asalukum AAalayhi min ajrin wama ana mina almutakallifeena

verses.ar: إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرٞ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: It is but a reminder to the worlds
verses.tl: In huwa illa thikrun lilAAalameena

verses.ar: وَلَتَعۡلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعۡدَ حِينِۭ
verses.tr: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time
verses.tl: WalataAAlamunna nabaahu baAAda heenin

verses.ar: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡحَكِيمِ
verses.tr: The revelation of the Qur'an is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise
verses.tl: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alhakeemi

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ بِٱلۡحَقِّ فَٱعۡبُدِ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡلِصٗا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We have sent down to you the Book, [O Muhammad], in truth. So worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion
verses.tl: Inna anzalna ilayka alkitaba bialhaqqi faoAAbudi Allaha mukhlisan lahu alddeena

verses.ar: أَلَا لِلَّهِ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلۡخَالِصُۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوۡلِيَآءَ مَا نَعۡبُدُهُمۡ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلۡفَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَهُمۡ فِي مَا هُمۡ فِيهِ يَخۡتَلِفُونَۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهۡدِي مَنۡ هُوَ كَٰذِبٞ كَفَّارٞ
verses.tr: Unquestionably, for Allah is the pure religion. And those who take protectors besides Him [say], "We only worship them that they may bring us nearer to Allah in position." Indeed, Allah will judge between them concerning that over which they differ. Indeed, Allah does not guide he who is a liar and [confirmed] disbeliever
verses.tl: Ala lillahi alddeenu alkhalisu waallatheena ittakhathoo min doonihi awliyaa ma naAAbuduhum illa liyuqarriboona ila Allahi zulfa inna Allaha yahkumu baynahum fee ma hum feehi yakhtalifoona inna Allaha la yahdee man huwa kathibun kaffarun

verses.ar: لَّوۡ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدٗا لَّٱصۡطَفَىٰ مِمَّا يَخۡلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُۚ سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥۖ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡوَٰحِدُ ٱلۡقَهَّارُ
verses.tr: If Allah had intended to take a son, He could have chosen from what He creates whatever He willed. Exalted is He; He is Allah, the One, the Prevailing
verses.tl: Law arada Allahu an yattakhitha waladan laistafa mimma yakhluqu ma yashao subhanahu huwa Allahu alwahidu alqahharu

verses.ar: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ يُكَوِّرُ ٱلَّيۡلَ عَلَى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ ٱلنَّهَارَ عَلَى ٱلَّيۡلِۖ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ كُلّٞ يَجۡرِي لِأَجَلٖ مُّسَمًّىۗ أَلَا هُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفَّـٰرُ
verses.tr: He created the heavens and earth in truth. He wraps the night over the day and wraps the day over the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term. Unquestionably, He is the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver
verses.tl: Khalaqa alssamawati waalarda bialhaqqi yukawwiru allayla AAala alnnahari wayukawwiru alnnahara AAala allayli wasakhkhara alshshamsa waalqamara kullun yajree liajalin musamman ala huwa alAAazeezu alghaffaru

verses.ar: خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفۡسٖ وَٰحِدَةٖ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنۡهَا زَوۡجَهَا وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَنۡعَٰمِ ثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَزۡوَٰجٖۚ يَخۡلُقُكُمۡ فِي بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمۡ خَلۡقٗا مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ خَلۡقٖ فِي ظُلُمَٰتٖ ثَلَٰثٖۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمۡ لَهُ ٱلۡمُلۡكُۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُصۡرَفُونَ
verses.tr: He created you from one soul. Then He made from it its mate, and He produced for you from the grazing livestock eight mates. He creates you in the wombs of your mothers, creation after creation, within three darknesses. That is Allah, your Lord; to Him belongs dominion. There is no deity except Him, so how are you averted
verses.tl: Khalaqakum min nafsin wahidatin thumma jaAAala minha zawjaha waanzala lakum mina alanAAami thamaniyata azwajin yakhluqukum fee butooni ommahatikum khalqan min baAAdi khalqin fee thulumatin thalathin thalikumu Allahu rabbukum lahu almulku la ilaha illa huwa faanna tusrafoona

verses.ar: إِن تَكۡفُرُواْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَنِيٌّ عَنكُمۡۖ وَلَا يَرۡضَىٰ لِعِبَادِهِ ٱلۡكُفۡرَۖ وَإِن تَشۡكُرُواْ يَرۡضَهُ لَكُمۡۗ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٞ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰۚ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُم مَّرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.tr: If you disbelieve - indeed, Allah is Free from need of you. And He does not approve for His servants disbelief. And if you are grateful, He approves it for you; and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, and He will inform you about what you used to do. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts
verses.tl: In takfuroo fainna Allaha ghaniyyun AAankum wala yarda liAAibadihi alkufra wain tashkuroo yardahu lakum wala taziru waziratun wizra okhra thumma ila rabbikum marjiAAukum fayunabbiokum bima kuntum taAAmaloona innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori

verses.ar: ۞وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡهُ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيُضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon his Lord, turning to Him [alone]; then when He bestows on him a favor from Himself, he forgets Him whom he called upon before, and he attributes to Allah equals to mislead [people] from His way. Say, "Enjoy your disbelief for a little; indeed, you are of the companions of the Fire
verses.tl: Waitha massa alinsana durrun daAAa rabbahu muneeban ilayhi thumma itha khawwalahu niAAmatan minhu nasiya ma kana yadAAoo ilayhi min qablu wajaAAala lillahi andadan liyudilla AAan sabeelihi qul tamattaAA bikufrika qaleelan innaka min ashabi alnnari

verses.ar: أَمَّنۡ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيۡلِ سَاجِدٗا وَقَآئِمٗا يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرۡجُواْ رَحۡمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۗ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي ٱلَّذِينَ يَعۡلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
verses.tr: Is one who is devoutly obedient during periods of the night, prostrating and standing [in prayer], fearing the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord, [like one who does not]? Say, "Are those who know equal to those who do not know?" Only they will remember [who are] people of understanding
verses.tl: Amman huwa qanitun anaa allayli sajidan waqaiman yahtharu alakhirata wayarjoo rahmata rabbihi qul hal yastawee allatheena yaAAlamoona waallatheena la yaAAlamoona innama yatathakkaru oloo alalbabi

verses.ar: قُلۡ يَٰعِبَادِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱتَّقُواْ رَبَّكُمۡۚ لِلَّذِينَ أَحۡسَنُواْ فِي هَٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنۡيَا حَسَنَةٞۗ وَأَرۡضُ ٱللَّهِ وَٰسِعَةٌۗ إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى ٱلصَّـٰبِرُونَ أَجۡرَهُم بِغَيۡرِ حِسَابٖ
verses.tr: Say, "O My servants who have believed, fear your Lord. For those who do good in this world is good, and the earth of Allah is spacious. Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account
verses.tl: Qul ya AAibadi allatheena amanoo ittaqoo rabbakum lillatheena ahsanoo fee hathihi alddunya hasanatun waardu Allahi wasiAAatun innama yuwaffa alssabiroona ajrahum bighayri hisabin

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنِّيٓ أُمِرۡتُ أَنۡ أَعۡبُدَ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡلِصٗا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, I have been commanded to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion
verses.tl: Qul innee omirtu an aAAbuda Allaha mukhlisan lahu alddeena

verses.ar: وَأُمِرۡتُ لِأَنۡ أَكُونَ أَوَّلَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.tr: And I have been commanded to be the first [among you] of the Muslims
verses.tl: Waomirtu lian akoona awwala almuslimeena

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنِّيٓ أَخَافُ إِنۡ عَصَيۡتُ رَبِّي عَذَابَ يَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
verses.tr: Say, "Indeed I fear, if I should disobey my Lord, the punishment of a tremendous Day
verses.tl: Qul innee akhafu in AAasaytu rabbee AAathaba yawmin AAatheemin

verses.ar: قُلِ ٱللَّهَ أَعۡبُدُ مُخۡلِصٗا لَّهُۥ دِينِي
verses.tr: Say, "Allah [alone] do I worship, sincere to Him in my religion
verses.tl: Quli Allaha aAAbudu mukhlisan lahu deenee

verses.ar: فَٱعۡبُدُواْ مَا شِئۡتُم مِّن دُونِهِۦۗ قُلۡ إِنَّ ٱلۡخَٰسِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓاْ أَنفُسَهُمۡ وَأَهۡلِيهِمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِۗ أَلَا ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡخُسۡرَانُ ٱلۡمُبِينُ
verses.tr: So worship what you will besides Him." Say, "Indeed, the losers are the ones who will lose themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, that is the manifest loss
verses.tl: FaoAAbudoo ma shitum min doonihi qul inna alkhasireena allatheena khasiroo anfusahum waahleehim yawma alqiyamati ala thalika huwa alkhusranu almubeenu

verses.ar: لَهُم مِّن فَوۡقِهِمۡ ظُلَلٞ مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَمِن تَحۡتِهِمۡ ظُلَلٞۚ ذَٰلِكَ يُخَوِّفُ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦ عِبَادَهُۥۚ يَٰعِبَادِ فَٱتَّقُونِ
verses.tr: They will have canopies of fire above them and below them, canopies. By that Allah threatens His servants. O My servants, then fear Me
verses.tl: Lahum min fawqihim thulalun mina alnnari wamin tahtihim thulalun thalika yukhawwifu Allahu bihi AAibadahu ya AAibadi faittaqooni

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱجۡتَنَبُواْ ٱلطَّـٰغُوتَ أَن يَعۡبُدُوهَا وَأَنَابُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ لَهُمُ ٱلۡبُشۡرَىٰۚ فَبَشِّرۡ عِبَادِ
verses.tr: But those who have avoided Taghut, lest they worship it, and turned back to Allah - for them are good tidings. So give good tidings to My servants
verses.tl: Waallatheena ijtanaboo alttaghoota an yaAAbudooha waanaboo ila Allahi lahumu albushra fabashshir AAibadi

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَسۡتَمِعُونَ ٱلۡقَوۡلَ فَيَتَّبِعُونَ أَحۡسَنَهُۥٓۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ هَدَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُۖ وَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمۡ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
verses.tr: Who listen to speech and follow the best of it. Those are the ones Allah has guided, and those are people of understanding
verses.tl: Allatheena yastamiAAoona alqawla fayattabiAAoona ahsanahu olaika allatheena hadahumu Allahu waolaika hum oloo alalbabi

verses.ar: أَفَمَنۡ حَقَّ عَلَيۡهِ كَلِمَةُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ أَفَأَنتَ تُنقِذُ مَن فِي ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: Then, is one who has deserved the decree of punishment [to be guided]? Then, can you save one who is in the Fire
verses.tl: Afaman haqqa AAalayhi kalimatu alAAathabi afaanta tunqithu man fee alnnari

verses.ar: لَٰكِنِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمۡ لَهُمۡ غُرَفٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهَا غُرَفٞ مَّبۡنِيَّةٞ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۖ وَعۡدَ ٱللَّهِ لَا يُخۡلِفُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡمِيعَادَ
verses.tr: But those who have feared their Lord - for them are chambers, above them chambers built high, beneath which rivers flow. [This is] the promise of Allah. Allah does not fail in [His] promise
verses.tl: Lakini allatheena ittaqaw rabbahum lahum ghurafun min fawqiha ghurafun mabniyyatun tajree min tahtiha alanharu waAAda Allahi la yukhlifu Allahu almeeAAada

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَسَلَكَهُۥ يَنَٰبِيعَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ثُمَّ يُخۡرِجُ بِهِۦ زَرۡعٗا مُّخۡتَلِفًا أَلۡوَٰنُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصۡفَرّٗا ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ حُطَٰمًاۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرَىٰ لِأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
verses.tr: Do you not see that Allah sends down rain from the sky and makes it flow as springs [and rivers] in the earth; then He produces thereby crops of varying colors; then they dry and you see them turned yellow; then He makes them [scattered] debris. Indeed in that is a reminder for those of understanding
verses.tl: Alam tara anna Allaha anzala mina alssamai maan fasalakahu yanabeeAAa fee alardi thumma yukhriju bihi zarAAan mukhtalifan alwanuhu thumma yaheeju fatarahu musfarran thumma yajAAaluhu hutaman inna fee thalika lathikra liolee alalbabi

verses.ar: أَفَمَن شَرَحَ ٱللَّهُ صَدۡرَهُۥ لِلۡإِسۡلَٰمِ فَهُوَ عَلَىٰ نُورٖ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦۚ فَوَيۡلٞ لِّلۡقَٰسِيَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مِّن ذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ فِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٍ
verses.tr: So is one whose breast Allah has expanded to [accept] Islam and he is upon a light from his Lord [like one whose heart rejects it]? Then woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of Allah. Those are in manifest error
verses.tl: Afaman sharaha Allahu sadrahu lilislami fahuwa AAala noorin min rabbihi fawaylun lilqasiyati quloobuhum min thikri Allahi olaika fee dalalin mubeenin

verses.ar: ٱللَّهُ نَزَّلَ أَحۡسَنَ ٱلۡحَدِيثِ كِتَٰبٗا مُّتَشَٰبِهٗا مَّثَانِيَ تَقۡشَعِرُّ مِنۡهُ جُلُودُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُمۡ ثُمَّ تَلِينُ جُلُودُهُمۡ وَقُلُوبُهُمۡ إِلَىٰ ذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُدَى ٱللَّهِ يَهۡدِي بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَمَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنۡ هَادٍ
verses.tr: Allah has sent down the best statement: a consistent Book wherein is reiteration. The skins shiver therefrom of those who fear their Lord; then their skins and their hearts relax at the remembrance of Allah. That is the guidance of Allah by which He guides whom He wills. And one whom Allah leaves astray - for him there is no guide
verses.tl: Allahu nazzala ahsana alhadeethi kitaban mutashabihan mathaniya taqshaAAirru minhu juloodu allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum thumma taleenu julooduhum waquloobuhum ila thikri Allahi thalika huda Allahi yahdee bihi man yashao waman yudlili Allahu fama lahu min hadin

verses.ar: أَفَمَن يَتَّقِي بِوَجۡهِهِۦ سُوٓءَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِۚ وَقِيلَ لِلظَّـٰلِمِينَ ذُوقُواْ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.tr: Then is he who will shield with his face the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection [like one secure from it]? And it will be said to the wrongdoers, "Taste what you used to earn
verses.tl: Afaman yattaqee biwajhihi sooa alAAathabi yawma alqiyamati waqeela lilththalimeena thooqoo ma kuntum taksiboona

verses.ar: كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: Those before them denied, and punishment came upon them from where they did not perceive
verses.tl: Kaththaba allatheena min qablihim faatahumu alAAathabu min haythu la yashAAuroona

verses.ar: فَأَذَاقَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡخِزۡيَ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ أَكۡبَرُۚ لَوۡ كَانُواْ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: So Allah made them taste disgrace in worldly life. But the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew
verses.tl: Faathaqahumu Allahu alkhizya fee alhayati alddunya walaAAathabu alakhirati akbaru law kanoo yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ ضَرَبۡنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِي هَٰذَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مِن كُلِّ مَثَلٖ لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.tr: And We have certainly presented for the people in this Qur'an from every [kind of] example - that they might remember
verses.tl: Walaqad darabna lilnnasi fee hatha alqurani min kulli mathalin laAAallahum yatathakkaroona

verses.ar: قُرۡءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا غَيۡرَ ذِي عِوَجٖ لَّعَلَّهُمۡ يَتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: [It is] an Arabic Qur'an, without any deviance that they might become righteous
verses.tl: Quranan AAarabiyyan ghayra thee AAiwajin laAAallahum yattaqoona

verses.ar: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلٗا رَّجُلٗا فِيهِ شُرَكَآءُ مُتَشَٰكِسُونَ وَرَجُلٗا سَلَمٗا لِّرَجُلٍ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِۚ بَلۡ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Allah presents an example: a slave owned by quarreling partners and another belonging exclusively to one man - are they equal in comparison? Praise be to Allah! But most of them do not know
verses.tl: Daraba Allahu mathalan rajulan feehi shurakao mutashakisoona warajulan salaman lirajulin hal yastawiyani mathalan alhamdu lillahi bal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: إِنَّكَ مَيِّتٞ وَإِنَّهُم مَّيِّتُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, you are to die, and indeed, they are to die
verses.tl: Innaka mayyitun wainnahum mayyitoona

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ عِندَ رَبِّكُمۡ تَخۡتَصِمُونَ
verses.tr: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, before your Lord, will dispute
verses.tl: Thumma innakum yawma alqiyamati AAinda rabbikum takhtasimoona

verses.ar: ۞فَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن كَذَبَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ وَكَذَّبَ بِٱلصِّدۡقِ إِذۡ جَآءَهُۥٓۚ أَلَيۡسَ فِي جَهَنَّمَ مَثۡوٗى لِّلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.tr: So who is more unjust than one who lies about Allah and denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a residence for the disbelievers
verses.tl: Faman athlamu mimman kathaba AAala Allahi wakaththaba bialssidqi ith jaahu alaysa fee jahannama mathwan lilkafireena

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِي جَآءَ بِٱلصِّدۡقِ وَصَدَّقَ بِهِۦٓ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡمُتَّقُونَ
verses.tr: And the one who has brought the truth and [they who] believed in it - those are the righteous
verses.tl: Waallathee jaa bialssidqi wasaddaqa bihi olaika humu almuttaqoona

verses.ar: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡۚ ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: They will have whatever they desire with their Lord. That is the reward of the doers of good
verses.tl: Lahum ma yashaoona AAinda rabbihim thalika jazao almuhsineena

verses.ar: لِيُكَفِّرَ ٱللَّهُ عَنۡهُمۡ أَسۡوَأَ ٱلَّذِي عَمِلُواْ وَيَجۡزِيَهُمۡ أَجۡرَهُم بِأَحۡسَنِ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: That Allah may remove from them the worst of what they did and reward them their due for the best of what they used to do
verses.tl: Liyukaffira Allahu AAanhum aswaa allathee AAamiloo wayajziyahum ajrahum biahsani allathee kanoo yaAAmaloona

verses.ar: أَلَيۡسَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَافٍ عَبۡدَهُۥۖ وَيُخَوِّفُونَكَ بِٱلَّذِينَ مِن دُونِهِۦۚ وَمَن يُضۡلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنۡ هَادٖ
verses.tr: Is not Allah sufficient for His Servant [Prophet Muhammad]? And [yet], they threaten you with those [they worship] other than Him. And whoever Allah leaves astray - for him there is no guide
verses.tl: Alaysa Allahu bikafin AAabdahu wayukhawwifoonaka biallatheena min doonihi waman yudlili Allahu fama lahu min hadin

verses.ar: وَمَن يَهۡدِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن مُّضِلٍّۗ أَلَيۡسَ ٱللَّهُ بِعَزِيزٖ ذِي ٱنتِقَامٖ
verses.tr: And whoever Allah guides - for him there is no misleader. Is not Allah Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution
verses.tl: Waman yahdi Allahu fama lahu min mudillin alaysa Allahu biAAazeezin thee intiqamin

verses.ar: وَلَئِن سَأَلۡتَهُم مَّنۡ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُۚ قُلۡ أَفَرَءَيۡتُم مَّا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِنۡ أَرَادَنِيَ ٱللَّهُ بِضُرٍّ هَلۡ هُنَّ كَٰشِفَٰتُ ضُرِّهِۦٓ أَوۡ أَرَادَنِي بِرَحۡمَةٍ هَلۡ هُنَّ مُمۡسِكَٰتُ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ قُلۡ حَسۡبِيَ ٱللَّهُۖ عَلَيۡهِ يَتَوَكَّلُ ٱلۡمُتَوَكِّلُونَ
verses.tr: And if you asked them, "Who created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "Allah." Say, "Then have you considered what you invoke besides Allah? If Allah intended me harm, are they removers of His harm; or if He intended me mercy, are they withholders of His mercy?" Say, "Sufficient for me is Allah; upon Him [alone] rely the [wise] reliers
verses.tl: Walain saaltahum man khalaqa alssamawati waalarda layaqoolunna Allahu qul afaraaytum ma tadAAoona min dooni Allahi in aradaniya Allahu bidurrin hal hunna kashifatu durrihi aw aradanee birahmatin hal hunna mumsikatu rahmatihi qul hasbiya Allahu AAalayhi yatawakkalu almutawakkiloona

verses.ar: قُلۡ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمۡ إِنِّي عَٰمِلٞۖ فَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "O my people, work according to your position, [for] indeed, I am working; and you are going to know
verses.tl: Qul ya qawmi iAAmaloo AAala makanatikum innee AAamilun fasawfa taAAlamoona

verses.ar: مَن يَأۡتِيهِ عَذَابٞ يُخۡزِيهِ وَيَحِلُّ عَلَيۡهِ عَذَابٞ مُّقِيمٌ
verses.tr: To whom will come a torment disgracing him and on whom will descend an enduring punishment
verses.tl: Man yateehi AAathabun yukhzeehi wayahillu AAalayhi AAathabun muqeemun

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ لِلنَّاسِ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ فَمَنِ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ فَلِنَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَإِنَّمَا يَضِلُّ عَلَيۡهَاۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِوَكِيلٍ
verses.tr: Indeed, We sent down to you the Book for the people in truth. So whoever is guided - it is for [the benefit of] his soul; and whoever goes astray only goes astray to its detriment. And you are not a manager over them
verses.tl: Inna anzalna AAalayka alkitaba lilnnasi bialhaqqi famani ihtada falinafsihi waman dalla fainnama yadillu AAalayha wama anta AAalayhim biwakeelin

verses.ar: ٱللَّهُ يَتَوَفَّى ٱلۡأَنفُسَ حِينَ مَوۡتِهَا وَٱلَّتِي لَمۡ تَمُتۡ فِي مَنَامِهَاۖ فَيُمۡسِكُ ٱلَّتِي قَضَىٰ عَلَيۡهَا ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَيُرۡسِلُ ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰٓ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمًّىۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.tr: Allah takes the souls at the time of their death, and those that do not die [He takes] during their sleep. Then He keeps those for which He has decreed death and releases the others for a specified term. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought
verses.tl: Allahu yatawaffa alanfusa heena mawtiha waallatee lam tamut fee manamiha fayumsiku allatee qada AAalayha almawta wayursilu alokhra ila ajalin musamman inna fee thalika laayatin liqawmin yatafakkaroona

verses.ar: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ شُفَعَآءَۚ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ كَانُواْ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: Or have they taken other than Allah as intercessors? Say, "Even though they do not possess [power over] anything, nor do they reason
verses.tl: Ami ittakhathoo min dooni Allahi shufaAAaa qul awalaw kanoo la yamlikoona shayan wala yaAAqiloona

verses.ar: قُل لِّلَّهِ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةُ جَمِيعٗاۖ لَّهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡهِ تُرۡجَعُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "To Allah belongs [the right to allow] intercession entirely. To Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Then to Him you will be returned
verses.tl: Qul lillahi alshshafaAAatu jameeAAan lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi thumma ilayhi turjaAAoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَحۡدَهُ ٱشۡمَأَزَّتۡ قُلُوبُ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِۖ وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ إِذَا هُمۡ يَسۡتَبۡشِرُونَ
verses.tr: And when Allah is mentioned alone, the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter shrink with aversion, but when those [worshipped] other than Him are mentioned, immediately they rejoice
verses.tl: Waitha thukira Allahu wahdahu ishmaazzat quloobu allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati waitha thukira allatheena min doonihi itha hum yastabshiroona

verses.ar: قُلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ عَٰلِمَ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَٱلشَّهَٰدَةِ أَنتَ تَحۡكُمُ بَيۡنَ عِبَادِكَ فِي مَا كَانُواْ فِيهِ يَخۡتَلِفُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "O Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, You will judge between your servants concerning that over which they used to differ
verses.tl: Quli allahumma fatira alssamawati waalardi AAalima alghaybi waalshshahadati anta tahkumu bayna AAibadika fee ma kanoo feehi yakhtalifoona

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ أَنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ مَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ جَمِيعٗا وَمِثۡلَهُۥ مَعَهُۥ لَٱفۡتَدَوۡاْ بِهِۦ مِن سُوٓءِ ٱلۡعَذَابِ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِۚ وَبَدَا لَهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمۡ يَكُونُواْ يَحۡتَسِبُونَ
verses.tr: And if those who did wrong had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it, they would [attempt to] ransom themselves thereby from the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection. And there will appear to them from Allah that which they had not taken into account
verses.tl: Walaw anna lillatheena thalamoo ma fee alardi jameeAAan wamithlahu maAAahu laiftadaw bihi min sooi alAAathabi yawma alqiyamati wabada lahum mina Allahi ma lam yakoonoo yahtasiboona

verses.ar: وَبَدَا لَهُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُواْ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُواْ بِهِۦ يَسۡتَهۡزِءُونَ
verses.tr: And there will appear to them the evils they had earned, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule
verses.tl: Wabada lahum sayyiatu ma kasaboo wahaqa bihim ma kanoo bihi yastahzioona

verses.ar: فَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَانَا ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلۡنَٰهُ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنَّا قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أُوتِيتُهُۥ عَلَىٰ عِلۡمِۭۚ بَلۡ هِيَ فِتۡنَةٞ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon Us; then when We bestow on him a favor from Us, he says, "I have only been given it because of [my] knowledge." Rather, it is a trial, but most of them do not know
verses.tl: Faitha massa alinsana durrun daAAana thumma itha khawwalnahu niAAmatan minna qala innama ooteetuhu AAala AAilmin bal hiya fitnatun walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: قَدۡ قَالَهَا ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَمَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.tr: Those before them had already said it, but they were not availed by what they used to earn
verses.tl: Qad qalaha allatheena min qablihim fama aghna AAanhum ma kanoo yaksiboona

verses.ar: فَأَصَابَهُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُواْۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ مِنۡ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ سَيُصِيبُهُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُواْ وَمَا هُم بِمُعۡجِزِينَ
verses.tr: And the evil consequences of what they earned struck them. And those who have wronged of these [people] will be afflicted by the evil consequences of what they earned; and they will not cause failure
verses.tl: Faasabahum sayyiatu ma kasaboo waallatheena thalamoo min haolai sayuseebuhum sayyiatu ma kasaboo wama hum bimuAAjizeena

verses.ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبۡسُطُ ٱلرِّزۡقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَقۡدِرُۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Do they not know that Allah extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe
verses.tl: Awalam yaAAlamoo anna Allaha yabsutu alrrizqa liman yashao wayaqdiru inna fee thalika laayatin liqawmin yuminoona

verses.ar: ۞قُلۡ يَٰعِبَادِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسۡرَفُواْ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمۡ لَا تَقۡنَطُواْ مِن رَّحۡمَةِ ٱللَّهِۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَغۡفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًاۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: Say, "O My servants who have transgressed against themselves [by sinning], do not despair of the mercy of Allah. Indeed, Allah forgives all sins. Indeed, it is He who is the Forgiving, the Merciful
verses.tl: Qul ya AAibadiya allatheena asrafoo AAala anfusihim la taqnatoo min rahmati Allahi inna Allaha yaghfiru alththunooba jameeAAan innahu huwa alghafooru alrraheemu

verses.ar: وَأَنِيبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمۡ وَأَسۡلِمُواْ لَهُۥ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يَأۡتِيَكُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ ثُمَّ لَا تُنصَرُونَ
verses.tr: And return [in repentance] to your Lord and submit to Him before the punishment comes upon you; then you will not be helped
verses.tl: Waaneeboo ila rabbikum waaslimoo lahu min qabli an yatiyakumu alAAathabu thumma la tunsaroona

verses.ar: وَٱتَّبِعُوٓاْ أَحۡسَنَ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيۡكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُم مِّن قَبۡلِ أَن يَأۡتِيَكُمُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ بَغۡتَةٗ وَأَنتُمۡ لَا تَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: And follow the best of what was revealed to you from your Lord before the punishment comes upon you suddenly while you do not perceive
verses.tl: WaittabiAAoo ahsana ma onzila ilaykum min rabbikum min qabli an yatiyakumu alAAathabu baghtatan waantum la tashAAuroona

verses.ar: أَن تَقُولَ نَفۡسٞ يَٰحَسۡرَتَىٰ عَلَىٰ مَا فَرَّطتُ فِي جَنۢبِ ٱللَّهِ وَإِن كُنتُ لَمِنَ ٱلسَّـٰخِرِينَ
verses.tr: Lest a soul should say, "Oh [how great is] my regret over what I neglected in regard to Allah and that I was among the mockers
verses.tl: An taqoola nafsun ya hasrata AAala ma farrattu fee janbi Allahi wain kuntu lamina alssakhireena

verses.ar: أَوۡ تَقُولَ لَوۡ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هَدَىٰنِي لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ
verses.tr: Or [lest] it say, "If only Allah had guided me, I would have been among the righteous
verses.tl: Aw taqoola law anna Allaha hadanee lakuntu mina almuttaqeena

verses.ar: أَوۡ تَقُولَ حِينَ تَرَى ٱلۡعَذَابَ لَوۡ أَنَّ لِي كَرَّةٗ فَأَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: Or [lest] it say when it sees the punishment, "If only I had another turn so I could be among the doers of good
verses.tl: Aw taqoola heena tara alAAathaba law anna lee karratan faakoona mina almuhsineena

verses.ar: بَلَىٰ قَدۡ جَآءَتۡكَ ءَايَٰتِي فَكَذَّبۡتَ بِهَا وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرۡتَ وَكُنتَ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.tr: But yes, there had come to you My verses, but you denied them and were arrogant, and you were among the disbelievers
verses.tl: Bala qad jaatka ayatee fakaththabta biha waistakbarta wakunta mina alkafireena

verses.ar: وَيَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ تَرَى ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَبُواْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ وُجُوهُهُم مُّسۡوَدَّةٌۚ أَلَيۡسَ فِي جَهَنَّمَ مَثۡوٗى لِّلۡمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
verses.tr: And on the Day of Resurrection you will see those who lied about Allah [with] their faces blackened. Is there not in Hell a residence for the arrogant
verses.tl: Wayawma alqiyamati tara allatheena kathaboo AAala Allahi wujoohuhum muswaddatun alaysa fee jahannama mathwan lilmutakabbireena

verses.ar: وَيُنَجِّي ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ بِمَفَازَتِهِمۡ لَا يَمَسُّهُمُ ٱلسُّوٓءُ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحۡزَنُونَ
verses.tr: And Allah will save those who feared Him by their attainment; no evil will touch them, nor will they grieve
verses.tl: Wayunajjee Allahu allatheena ittaqaw bimafazatihim la yamassuhumu alssooo wala hum yahzanoona

verses.ar: ٱللَّهُ خَٰلِقُ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ وَكِيلٞ
verses.tr: Allah is the Creator of all things, and He is, over all things, Disposer of affairs
verses.tl: Allahu khaliqu kulli shayin wahuwa AAala kulli shayin wakeelun

verses.ar: لَّهُۥ مَقَالِيدُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.tr: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth. And they who disbelieve in the verses of Allah - it is those who are the losers
verses.tl: Lahu maqaleedu alssamawati waalardi waallatheena kafaroo biayati Allahi olaika humu alkhasiroona

verses.ar: قُلۡ أَفَغَيۡرَ ٱللَّهِ تَأۡمُرُوٓنِّيٓ أَعۡبُدُ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡجَٰهِلُونَ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "Is it other than Allah that you order me to worship, O ignorant ones
verses.tl: Qul afaghayra Allahi tamuroonnee aAAbudu ayyuha aljahiloona

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أُوحِيَ إِلَيۡكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِكَ لَئِنۡ أَشۡرَكۡتَ لَيَحۡبَطَنَّ عَمَلُكَ وَلَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡخَٰسِرِينَ
verses.tr: And it was already revealed to you and to those before you that if you should associate [anything] with Allah, your work would surely become worthless, and you would surely be among the losers
verses.tl: Walaqad oohiya ilayka waila allatheena min qablika lain ashrakta layahbatanna AAamaluka walatakoonanna mina alkhasireena

verses.ar: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعۡبُدۡ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّـٰكِرِينَ
verses.tr: Rather, worship [only] Allah and be among the grateful
verses.tl: Bali Allaha faoAAbud wakun mina alshshakireena

verses.ar: وَمَا قَدَرُواْ ٱللَّهَ حَقَّ قَدۡرِهِۦ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ جَمِيعٗا قَبۡضَتُهُۥ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ وَٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ مَطۡوِيَّـٰتُۢ بِيَمِينِهِۦۚ سُبۡحَٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
verses.tr: They have not appraised Allah with true appraisal, while the earth entirely will be [within] His grip on the Day of Resurrection, and the heavens will be folded in His right hand. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him
verses.tl: Wama qadaroo Allaha haqqa qadrihi waalardu jameeAAan qabdatuhu yawma alqiyamati waalssamawatu matwiyyatun biyameenihi subhanahu wataAAala AAamma yushrikoona

verses.ar: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَصَعِقَ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُۖ ثُمَّ نُفِخَ فِيهِ أُخۡرَىٰ فَإِذَا هُمۡ قِيَامٞ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.tr: And the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will fall dead except whom Allah wills. Then it will be blown again, and at once they will be standing, looking on
verses.tl: Wanufikha fee alssoori fasaAAiqa man fee alssamawati waman fee alardi illa man shaa Allahu thumma nufikha feehi okhra faitha hum qiyamun yanthuroona

verses.ar: وَأَشۡرَقَتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ بِنُورِ رَبِّهَا وَوُضِعَ ٱلۡكِتَٰبُ وَجِاْيٓءَ بِٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءِ وَقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُم بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَهُمۡ لَا يُظۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord, and the record [of deeds] will be placed, and the prophets and the witnesses will be brought, and it will be judged between them in truth, and they will not be wronged
verses.tl: Waashraqati alardu binoori rabbiha wawudiAAa alkitabu wajeea bialnnabiyyeena waalshshuhadai waqudiya baynahum bialhaqqi wahum la yuthlamoona

verses.ar: وَوُفِّيَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ مَّا عَمِلَتۡ وَهُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَفۡعَلُونَ
verses.tr: And every soul will be fully compensated [for] what it did; and He is most knowing of what they do
verses.tl: Wawuffiyat kullu nafsin ma AAamilat wahuwa aAAlamu bima yafAAaloona

verses.ar: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمۡ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمۡ يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.tr: And those who disbelieved will be driven to Hell in groups until, when they reach it, its gates are opened and its keepers will say, "Did there not come to you messengers from yourselves, reciting to you the verses of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this Day of yours?" They will say, "Yes, but the word of punishment has come into effect upon the disbelievers
verses.tl: Waseeqa allatheena kafaroo ila jahannama zumaran hatta itha jaooha futihat abwabuha waqala lahum khazanatuha alam yatikum rusulun minkum yatloona AAalaykum ayati rabbikum wayunthiroonakum liqaa yawmikum hatha qaloo bala walakin haqqat kalimatu alAAathabi AAala alkafireena

verses.ar: قِيلَ ٱدۡخُلُوٓاْ أَبۡوَٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ مَثۡوَى ٱلۡمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
verses.tr: [To them] it will be said, "Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant
verses.tl: Qeela odkhuloo abwaba jahannama khalideena feeha fabisa mathwa almutakabbireena

verses.ar: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمۡ إِلَى ٱلۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ طِبۡتُمۡ فَٱدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
verses.tr: But those who feared their Lord will be driven to Paradise in groups until, when they reach it while its gates have been opened and its keepers say, "Peace be upon you; you have become pure; so enter it to abide eternally therein," [they will enter]
verses.tl: Waseeqa allatheena ittaqaw rabbahum ila aljannati zumaran hatta itha jaooha wafutihat abwabuha waqala lahum khazanatuha salamun AAalaykum tibtum faodkhulooha khalideena

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي صَدَقَنَا وَعۡدَهُۥ وَأَوۡرَثَنَا ٱلۡأَرۡضَ نَتَبَوَّأُ مِنَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ حَيۡثُ نَشَآءُۖ فَنِعۡمَ أَجۡرُ ٱلۡعَٰمِلِينَ
verses.tr: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has fulfilled for us His promise and made us inherit the earth [so] we may settle in Paradise wherever we will. And excellent is the reward of [righteous] workers
verses.tl: Waqaloo alhamdu lillahi allathee sadaqana waAAdahu waawrathana alarda natabawwao mina aljannati haythu nashao faniAAma ajru alAAamileena

verses.ar: وَتَرَى ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ حَآفِّينَ مِنۡ حَوۡلِ ٱلۡعَرۡشِ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡۚ وَقُضِيَ بَيۡنَهُم بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ وَقِيلَ ٱلۡحَمۡدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And you will see the angels surrounding the Throne, exalting [Allah] with praise of their Lord. And it will be judged between them in truth, and it will be said, "[All] praise to Allah, Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Watara almalaikata haffeena min hawli alAAarshi yusabbihoona bihamdi rabbihim waqudiya baynahum bialhaqqi waqeela alhamdu lillahi rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: حمٓ
verses.tr: Ha, Meem
verses.tl: Hameem

verses.ar: تَنزِيلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡعَلِيمِ
verses.tr: The revelation of the Book is from Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Knowing
verses.tl: Tanzeelu alkitabi mina Allahi alAAazeezi alAAaleemi

verses.ar: غَافِرِ ٱلذَّنۢبِ وَقَابِلِ ٱلتَّوۡبِ شَدِيدِ ٱلۡعِقَابِ ذِي ٱلطَّوۡلِۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَۖ إِلَيۡهِ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.tr: The forgiver of sin, acceptor of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance. There is no deity except Him; to Him is the destination
verses.tl: Ghafiri alththanbi waqabili alttawbi shadeedi alAAiqabi thee alttawli la ilaha illa huwa ilayhi almaseeru

verses.ar: مَا يُجَٰدِلُ فِيٓ ءَايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فَلَا يَغۡرُرۡكَ تَقَلُّبُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ
verses.tr: No one disputes concerning the signs of Allah except those who disbelieve, so be not deceived by their [uninhibited] movement throughout the land
verses.tl: Ma yujadilu fee ayati Allahi illa allatheena kafaroo fala yaghrurka taqallubuhum fee albiladi

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٖ وَٱلۡأَحۡزَابُ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِمۡۖ وَهَمَّتۡ كُلُّ أُمَّةِۭ بِرَسُولِهِمۡ لِيَأۡخُذُوهُۖ وَجَٰدَلُواْ بِٱلۡبَٰطِلِ لِيُدۡحِضُواْ بِهِ ٱلۡحَقَّ فَأَخَذۡتُهُمۡۖ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عِقَابِ
verses.tr: The people of Noah denied before them and the [disbelieving] factions after them, and every nation intended [a plot] for their messenger to seize him, and they disputed by [using] falsehood to [attempt to] invalidate thereby the truth. So I seized them, and how [terrible] was My penalty
verses.tl: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waalahzabu min baAAdihim wahammat kullu ommatin birasoolihim liyakhuthoohu wajadaloo bialbatili liyudhidoo bihi alhaqqa faakhathtuhum fakayfa kana AAiqabi

verses.ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَتُ رَبِّكَ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ أَنَّهُمۡ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: And thus has the word of your Lord come into effect upon those who disbelieved that they are companions of the Fire
verses.tl: Wakathalika haqqat kalimatu rabbika AAala allatheena kafaroo annahum ashabu alnnari

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَحۡمِلُونَ ٱلۡعَرۡشَ وَمَنۡ حَوۡلَهُۥ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَيُؤۡمِنُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۖ رَبَّنَا وَسِعۡتَ كُلَّ شَيۡءٖ رَّحۡمَةٗ وَعِلۡمٗا فَٱغۡفِرۡ لِلَّذِينَ تَابُواْ وَٱتَّبَعُواْ سَبِيلَكَ وَقِهِمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: Those [angels] who carry the Throne and those around it exalt [Allah] with praise of their Lord and believe in Him and ask forgiveness for those who have believed, [saying], "Our Lord, You have encompassed all things in mercy and knowledge, so forgive those who have repented and followed Your way and protect them from the punishment of Hellfire
verses.tl: Allatheena yahmiloona alAAarsha waman hawlahu yusabbihoona bihamdi rabbihim wayuminoona bihi wayastaghfiroona lillatheena amanoo rabbana wasiAAta kulla shayin rahmatan waAAilman faighfir lillatheena taboo waittabaAAoo sabeelaka waqihim AAathaba aljaheemi

verses.ar: رَبَّنَا وَأَدۡخِلۡهُمۡ جَنَّـٰتِ عَدۡنٍ ٱلَّتِي وَعَدتَّهُمۡ وَمَن صَلَحَ مِنۡ ءَابَآئِهِمۡ وَأَزۡوَٰجِهِمۡ وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِهِمۡۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
verses.tr: Our Lord, and admit them to gardens of perpetual residence which You have promised them and whoever was righteous among their fathers, their spouses and their offspring. Indeed, it is You who is the Exalted in Might, the Wise
verses.tl: Rabbana waadkhilhum jannati AAadnin allatee waAAadtahum waman salaha min abaihim waazwajihim wathurriyyatihim innaka anta alAAazeezu alhakeemu

verses.ar: وَقِهِمُ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِۚ وَمَن تَقِ ٱلسَّيِّـَٔاتِ يَوۡمَئِذٖ فَقَدۡ رَحِمۡتَهُۥۚ وَذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
verses.tr: And protect them from the evil consequences [of their deeds]. And he whom You protect from evil consequences that Day - You will have given him mercy. And that is the great attainment
verses.tl: Waqihimu alssayyiati waman taqi alssayyiati yawmaithin faqad rahimtahu wathalika huwa alfawzu alAAatheemu

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ يُنَادَوۡنَ لَمَقۡتُ ٱللَّهِ أَكۡبَرُ مِن مَّقۡتِكُمۡ أَنفُسَكُمۡ إِذۡ تُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَى ٱلۡإِيمَٰنِ فَتَكۡفُرُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who disbelieve will be addressed, "The hatred of Allah for you was [even] greater than your hatred of yourselves [this Day in Hell] when you were invited to faith, but you refused
verses.tl: Inna allatheena kafaroo yunadawna lamaqtu Allahi akbaru min maqtikum anfusakum ith tudAAawna ila aleemani fatakfuroona

verses.ar: قَالُواْ رَبَّنَآ أَمَتَّنَا ٱثۡنَتَيۡنِ وَأَحۡيَيۡتَنَا ٱثۡنَتَيۡنِ فَٱعۡتَرَفۡنَا بِذُنُوبِنَا فَهَلۡ إِلَىٰ خُرُوجٖ مِّن سَبِيلٖ
verses.tr: They will say, "Our Lord, You made us lifeless twice and gave us life twice, and we have confessed our sins. So is there to an exit any way
verses.tl: Qaloo rabbana amattana ithnatayni waahyaytana ithnatayni faiAAtarafna bithunoobina fahal ila khuroojin min sabeelin

verses.ar: ذَٰلِكُم بِأَنَّهُۥٓ إِذَا دُعِيَ ٱللَّهُ وَحۡدَهُۥ كَفَرۡتُمۡ وَإِن يُشۡرَكۡ بِهِۦ تُؤۡمِنُواْۚ فَٱلۡحُكۡمُ لِلَّهِ ٱلۡعَلِيِّ ٱلۡكَبِيرِ
verses.tr: [They will be told], "That is because, when Allah was called upon alone, you disbelieved; but if others were associated with Him, you believed. So the judgement is with Allah, the Most High, the Grand
verses.tl: Thalikum biannahu itha duAAiya Allahu wahdahu kafartum wain yushrak bihi tuminoo faalhukmu lillahi alAAaliyyi alkabeeri

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُرِيكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَيُنَزِّلُ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقٗاۚ وَمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ إِلَّا مَن يُنِيبُ
verses.tr: It is He who shows you His signs and sends down to you from the sky, provision. But none will remember except he who turns back [in repentance]
verses.tl: Huwa allathee yureekum ayatihi wayunazzilu lakum mina alssamai rizqan wama yatathakkaru illa man yuneebu

verses.ar: فَٱدۡعُواْ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ وَلَوۡ كَرِهَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ
verses.tr: So invoke Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, although the disbelievers dislike it
verses.tl: FaodAAoo Allaha mukhliseena lahu alddeena walaw kariha alkafiroona

verses.ar: رَفِيعُ ٱلدَّرَجَٰتِ ذُو ٱلۡعَرۡشِ يُلۡقِي ٱلرُّوحَ مِنۡ أَمۡرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦ لِيُنذِرَ يَوۡمَ ٱلتَّلَاقِ
verses.tr: [He is] the Exalted above [all] degrees, Owner of the Throne; He places the inspiration of His command upon whom He wills of His servants to warn of the Day of Meeting
verses.tl: RafeeAAu alddarajati thoo alAAarshi yulqee alrrooha min amrihi AAala man yashao min AAibadihi liyunthira yawma alttalaqi

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ هُم بَٰرِزُونَۖ لَا يَخۡفَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مِنۡهُمۡ شَيۡءٞۚ لِّمَنِ ٱلۡمُلۡكُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَۖ لِلَّهِ ٱلۡوَٰحِدِ ٱلۡقَهَّارِ
verses.tr: The Day they come forth nothing concerning them will be concealed from Allah. To whom belongs [all] sovereignty this Day? To Allah, the One, the Prevailing
verses.tl: Yawma hum barizoona la yakhfa AAala Allahi minhum shayon limani almulku alyawma lillahi alwahidi alqahhari

verses.ar: ٱلۡيَوۡمَ تُجۡزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡۚ لَا ظُلۡمَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَرِيعُ ٱلۡحِسَابِ
verses.tr: This Day every soul will be recompensed for what it earned. No injustice today! Indeed, Allah is swift in account
verses.tl: Alyawma tujza kullu nafsin bima kasabat la thulma alyawma inna Allaha sareeAAu alhisabi

verses.ar: وَأَنذِرۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡأٓزِفَةِ إِذِ ٱلۡقُلُوبُ لَدَى ٱلۡحَنَاجِرِ كَٰظِمِينَۚ مَا لِلظَّـٰلِمِينَ مِنۡ حَمِيمٖ وَلَا شَفِيعٖ يُطَاعُ
verses.tr: And warn them, [O Muhammad], of the Approaching Day, when hearts are at the throats, filled [with distress]. For the wrongdoers there will be no devoted friend and no intercessor [who is] obeyed
