verses.tl: Fahal yanthuroona illa alssaAAata an tatiyahum baghtatan faqad jaa ashratuha faanna lahum itha jaathum thikrahum

verses.ar: فَٱعۡلَمۡ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لِذَنۢبِكَ وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ مُتَقَلَّبَكُمۡ وَمَثۡوَىٰكُمۡ
verses.tr: So know, [O Muhammad], that there is no deity except Allah and ask forgiveness for your sin and for the believing men and believing women. And Allah knows of your movement and your resting place
verses.tl: FaiAAlam annahu la ilaha illa Allahu waistaghfir lithanbika walilmumineena waalmuminati waAllahu yaAAlamu mutaqallabakum wamathwakum

verses.ar: وَيَقُولُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَوۡلَا نُزِّلَتۡ سُورَةٞۖ فَإِذَآ أُنزِلَتۡ سُورَةٞ مُّحۡكَمَةٞ وَذُكِرَ فِيهَا ٱلۡقِتَالُ رَأَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٞ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَيۡكَ نَظَرَ ٱلۡمَغۡشِيِّ عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلۡمَوۡتِۖ فَأَوۡلَىٰ لَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Those who believe say, "Why has a surah not been sent down? But when a precise surah is revealed and fighting is mentioned therein, you see those in whose hearts is hypocrisy looking at you with a look of one overcome by death. And more appropriate for them [would have been]
verses.tl: Wayaqoolu allatheena amanoo lawla nuzzilat sooratun faitha onzilat sooratun muhkamatun wathukira feeha alqitalu raayta allatheena fee quloobihim maradun yanthuroona ilayka nathara almaghshiyyi AAalayhi mina almawti faawla lahum

verses.ar: طَاعَةٞ وَقَوۡلٞ مَّعۡرُوفٞۚ فَإِذَا عَزَمَ ٱلۡأَمۡرُ فَلَوۡ صَدَقُواْ ٱللَّهَ لَكَانَ خَيۡرٗا لَّهُمۡ
verses.tr: Obedience and good words. And when the matter [of fighting] was determined, if they had been true to Allah, it would have been better for them
verses.tl: TaAAatun waqawlun maAAroofun faitha AAazama alamru falaw sadaqoo Allaha lakana khayran lahum

verses.ar: فَهَلۡ عَسَيۡتُمۡ إِن تَوَلَّيۡتُمۡ أَن تُفۡسِدُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَتُقَطِّعُوٓاْ أَرۡحَامَكُمۡ
verses.tr: So would you perhaps, if you turned away, cause corruption on earth and sever your [ties of] relationship
verses.tl: Fahal AAasaytum in tawallaytum an tufsidoo fee alardi watuqattiAAoo arhamakum

verses.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَعَنَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ فَأَصَمَّهُمۡ وَأَعۡمَىٰٓ أَبۡصَٰرَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Those [who do so] are the ones that Allah has cursed, so He deafened them and blinded their vision
verses.tl: Olaika allatheena laAAanahumu Allahu faasammahum waaAAma absarahum

verses.ar: أَفَلَا يَتَدَبَّرُونَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ أَمۡ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبٍ أَقۡفَالُهَآ
verses.tr: Then do they not reflect upon the Qur'an, or are there locks upon [their] hearts
verses.tl: Afala yatadabbaroona alqurana am AAala quloobin aqfaluha

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱرۡتَدُّواْ عَلَىٰٓ أَدۡبَٰرِهِم مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلۡهُدَى ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ سَوَّلَ لَهُمۡ وَأَمۡلَىٰ لَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who reverted back [to disbelief] after guidance had become clear to them - Satan enticed them and prolonged hope for them
verses.tl: Inna allatheena irtaddoo AAala adbarihim min baAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhuda alshshaytanu sawwala lahum waamla lahum

verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ قَالُواْ لِلَّذِينَ كَرِهُواْ مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ سَنُطِيعُكُمۡ فِي بَعۡضِ ٱلۡأَمۡرِۖ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ إِسۡرَارَهُمۡ
verses.tr: That is because they said to those who disliked what Allah sent down, "We will obey you in part of the matter." And Allah knows what they conceal
verses.tl: Thalika biannahum qaloo lillatheena karihoo ma nazzala Allahu sanuteeAAukum fee baAAdi alamri waAllahu yaAAlamu israrahum

verses.ar: فَكَيۡفَ إِذَا تَوَفَّتۡهُمُ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ يَضۡرِبُونَ وُجُوهَهُمۡ وَأَدۡبَٰرَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Then how [will it be] when the angels take them in death, striking their faces and their backs
verses.tl: Fakayfa itha tawaffathumu almalaikatu yadriboona wujoohahum waadbarahum

verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمُ ٱتَّبَعُواْ مَآ أَسۡخَطَ ٱللَّهَ وَكَرِهُواْ رِضۡوَٰنَهُۥ فَأَحۡبَطَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
verses.tr: That is because they followed what angered Allah and disliked [what earns] His pleasure, so He rendered worthless their deeds
verses.tl: Thalika biannahumu ittabaAAoo ma askhata Allaha wakarihoo ridwanahu faahbata aAAmalahum

verses.ar: أَمۡ حَسِبَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ أَن لَّن يُخۡرِجَ ٱللَّهُ أَضۡغَٰنَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Or do those in whose hearts is disease think that Allah would never expose their [feelings of] hatred
verses.tl: Am hasiba allatheena fee quloobihim maradun an lan yukhrija Allahu adghanahum

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيۡنَٰكَهُمۡ فَلَعَرَفۡتَهُم بِسِيمَٰهُمۡۚ وَلَتَعۡرِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي لَحۡنِ ٱلۡقَوۡلِۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ
verses.tr: And if We willed, We could show them to you, and you would know them by their mark; but you will surely know them by the tone of [their] speech. And Allah knows your deeds
verses.tl: Walaw nashao laaraynakahum falaAAaraftahum biseemahum walataAArifannahum fee lahni alqawli waAllahu yaAAlamu aAAmalakum

verses.ar: وَلَنَبۡلُوَنَّكُمۡ حَتَّىٰ نَعۡلَمَ ٱلۡمُجَٰهِدِينَ مِنكُمۡ وَٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ وَنَبۡلُوَاْ أَخۡبَارَكُمۡ
verses.tr: And We will surely test you until We make evident those who strive among you [for the cause of Allah] and the patient, and We will test your affairs
verses.tl: Walanabluwannakum hatta naAAlama almujahideena minkum waalssabireena wanabluwa akhbarakum

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَشَآقُّواْ ٱلرَّسُولَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلۡهُدَىٰ لَن يَضُرُّواْ ٱللَّهَ شَيۡـٔٗا وَسَيُحۡبِطُ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who disbelieved and averted [people] from the path of Allah and opposed the Messenger after guidance had become clear to them - never will they harm Allah at all, and He will render worthless their deeds
verses.tl: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi washaqqoo alrrasoola min baAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhuda lan yaduroo Allaha shayan wasayuhbitu aAAmalahum

verses.ar: ۞يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَطِيعُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُواْ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَلَا تُبۡطِلُوٓاْ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, obey Allah and obey the Messenger and do not invalidate your deeds
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ateeAAoo Allaha waateeAAoo alrrasoola wala tubtiloo aAAmalakum

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ مَاتُواْ وَهُمۡ كُفَّارٞ فَلَن يَغۡفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who disbelieved and averted [people] from the path of Allah and then died while they were disbelievers - never will Allah forgive them
verses.tl: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi thumma matoo wahum kuffarun falan yaghfira Allahu lahum

verses.ar: فَلَا تَهِنُواْ وَتَدۡعُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّلۡمِ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلۡأَعۡلَوۡنَ وَٱللَّهُ مَعَكُمۡ وَلَن يَتِرَكُمۡ أَعۡمَٰلَكُمۡ
verses.tr: So do not weaken and call for peace while you are superior; and Allah is with you and will never deprive you of [the reward of] your deeds
verses.tl: Fala tahinoo watadAAoo ila alssalmi waantumu alaAAlawna waAllahu maAAakum walan yatirakum aAAmalakum

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَا لَعِبٞ وَلَهۡوٞۚ وَإِن تُؤۡمِنُواْ وَتَتَّقُواْ يُؤۡتِكُمۡ أُجُورَكُمۡ وَلَا يَسۡـَٔلۡكُمۡ أَمۡوَٰلَكُمۡ
verses.tr: [This] worldly life is only amusement and diversion. And if you believe and fear Allah, He will give you your rewards and not ask you for your properties
verses.tl: Innama alhayatu alddunya laAAibun walahwun wain tuminoo watattaqoo yutikum ojoorakum wala yasalkum amwalakum

verses.ar: إِن يَسۡـَٔلۡكُمُوهَا فَيُحۡفِكُمۡ تَبۡخَلُواْ وَيُخۡرِجۡ أَضۡغَٰنَكُمۡ
verses.tr: If He should ask you for them and press you, you would withhold, and He would expose your unwillingness
verses.tl: In yasalkumooha fayuhfikum tabkhaloo wayukhrij adghanakum

verses.ar: هَـٰٓأَنتُمۡ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ تُدۡعَوۡنَ لِتُنفِقُواْ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَمِنكُم مَّن يَبۡخَلُۖ وَمَن يَبۡخَلۡ فَإِنَّمَا يَبۡخَلُ عَن نَّفۡسِهِۦۚ وَٱللَّهُ ٱلۡغَنِيُّ وَأَنتُمُ ٱلۡفُقَرَآءُۚ وَإِن تَتَوَلَّوۡاْ يَسۡتَبۡدِلۡ قَوۡمًا غَيۡرَكُمۡ ثُمَّ لَا يَكُونُوٓاْ أَمۡثَٰلَكُم
verses.tr: Here you are - those invited to spend in the cause of Allah - but among you are those who withhold [out of greed]. And whoever withholds only withholds [benefit] from himself; and Allah is the Free of need, while you are the needy. And if you turn away, He will replace you with another people; then they will not be the likes of you
verses.tl: Haantum haolai tudAAawna litunfiqoo fee sabeeli Allahi faminkum man yabkhalu waman yabkhal fainnama yabkhalu AAan nafsihi waAllahu alghaniyyu waantumu alfuqarao wain tatawallaw yastabdil qawman ghayrakum thumma la yakoonoo amthalakum

verses.ar: إِنَّا فَتَحۡنَا لَكَ فَتۡحٗا مُّبِينٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, We have given you, [O Muhammad], a clear conquest
verses.tl: Inna fatahna laka fathan mubeenan

verses.ar: لِّيَغۡفِرَ لَكَ ٱللَّهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِن ذَنۢبِكَ وَمَا تَأَخَّرَ وَيُتِمَّ نِعۡمَتَهُۥ عَلَيۡكَ وَيَهۡدِيَكَ صِرَٰطٗا مُّسۡتَقِيمٗا
verses.tr: That Allah may forgive for you what preceded of your sin and what will follow and complete His favor upon you and guide you to a straight path
verses.tl: Liyaghfira laka Allahu ma taqaddama min thanbika wama taakhkhara wayutimma niAAmatahu AAalayka wayahdiyaka siratan mustaqeeman

verses.ar: وَيَنصُرَكَ ٱللَّهُ نَصۡرًا عَزِيزًا
verses.tr: And [that] Allah may aid you with a mighty victory
verses.tl: Wayansuraka Allahu nasran AAazeezan

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ لِيَزۡدَادُوٓاْ إِيمَٰنٗا مَّعَ إِيمَٰنِهِمۡۗ وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا
verses.tr: It is He who sent down tranquillity into the hearts of the believers that they would increase in faith along with their [present] faith. And to Allah belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth, and ever is Allah Knowing and Wise
verses.tl: Huwa allathee anzala alssakeenata fee quloobi almumineena liyazdadoo eemanan maAAa eemanihim walillahi junoodu alssamawati waalardi wakana Allahu AAaleeman hakeeman

verses.ar: لِّيُدۡخِلَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِ جَنَّـٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا وَيُكَفِّرَ عَنۡهُمۡ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡۚ وَكَانَ ذَٰلِكَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡزًا عَظِيمٗا
verses.tr: [And] that He may admit the believing men and the believing women to gardens beneath which rivers flow to abide therein eternally and remove from them their misdeeds - and ever is that, in the sight of Allah, a great attainment
verses.tl: Liyudkhila almumineena waalmuminati jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha wayukaffira AAanhum sayyiatihim wakana thalika AAinda Allahi fawzan AAatheeman

verses.ar: وَيُعَذِّبَ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقِينَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقَٰتِ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكَٰتِ ٱلظَّآنِّينَ بِٱللَّهِ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوۡءِۚ عَلَيۡهِمۡ دَآئِرَةُ ٱلسَّوۡءِۖ وَغَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَلَعَنَهُمۡ وَأَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ جَهَنَّمَۖ وَسَآءَتۡ مَصِيرٗا
verses.tr: And [that] He may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women, and the polytheist men and polytheist women - those who assume about Allah an assumption of evil nature. Upon them is a misfortune of evil nature; and Allah has become angry with them and has cursed them and prepared for them Hell, and evil it is as a destination
verses.tl: WayuAAaththiba almunafiqeena waalmunafiqati waalmushrikeena waalmushrikati alththanneena biAllahi thanna alssawi AAalayhim dairatu alssawi waghadiba Allahu AAalayhim walaAAanahum waaAAadda lahum jahannama wasaat maseeran

verses.ar: وَلِلَّهِ جُنُودُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا
verses.tr: And to Allah belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth. And ever is Allah Exalted in Might and Wise
verses.tl: Walillahi junoodu alssamawati waalardi wakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeeman

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰكَ شَٰهِدٗا وَمُبَشِّرٗا وَنَذِيرٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, We have sent you as a witness and a bringer of good tidings and a warner
verses.tl: Inna arsalnaka shahidan wamubashshiran wanatheeran

verses.ar: لِّتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُعَزِّرُوهُ وَتُوَقِّرُوهُۚ وَتُسَبِّحُوهُ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلًا
verses.tr: That you [people] may believe in Allah and His Messenger and honor him and respect the Prophet and exalt Allah morning and afternoon
verses.tl: Lituminoo biAllahi warasoolihi watuAAazziroohu watuwaqqiroohu watusabbihoohu bukratan waaseelan

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ يَدُ ٱللَّهِ فَوۡقَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡۚ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦۖ وَمَنۡ أَوۡفَىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيۡهُ ٱللَّهَ فَسَيُؤۡتِيهِ أَجۡرًا عَظِيمٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to you, [O Muhammad] - they are actually pledging allegiance to Allah. The hand of Allah is over their hands. So he who breaks his word only breaks it to the detriment of himself. And he who fulfills that which he has promised Allah - He will give him a great reward
verses.tl: Inna allatheena yubayiAAoonaka innama yubayiAAoona Allaha yadu Allahi fawqa aydeehim faman nakatha fainnama yankuthu AAala nafsihi waman awfa bima AAahada AAalayhu Allaha fasayuteehi ajran AAatheeman

verses.ar: سَيَقُولُ لَكَ ٱلۡمُخَلَّفُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابِ شَغَلَتۡنَآ أَمۡوَٰلُنَا وَأَهۡلُونَا فَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡ لَنَاۚ يَقُولُونَ بِأَلۡسِنَتِهِم مَّا لَيۡسَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡۚ قُلۡ فَمَن يَمۡلِكُ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيۡـًٔا إِنۡ أَرَادَ بِكُمۡ ضَرًّا أَوۡ أَرَادَ بِكُمۡ نَفۡعَۢاۚ بَلۡ كَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرَۢا
verses.tr: Those who remained behind of the bedouins will say to you, "Our properties and our families occupied us, so ask forgiveness for us." They say with their tongues what is not within their hearts. Say, "Then who could prevent Allah at all if He intended for you harm or intended for you benefit? Rather, ever is Allah, with what you do, Acquainted
verses.tl: Sayaqoolu laka almukhallafoona mina alaAArabi shaghalatna amwaluna waahloona faistaghfir lana yaqooloona bialsinatihim ma laysa fee quloobihim qul faman yamliku lakum mina Allahi shayan in arada bikum darran aw arada bikum nafAAan bal kana Allahu bima taAAmaloona khabeeran

verses.ar: بَلۡ ظَنَنتُمۡ أَن لَّن يَنقَلِبَ ٱلرَّسُولُ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِيهِمۡ أَبَدٗا وَزُيِّنَ ذَٰلِكَ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡ وَظَنَنتُمۡ ظَنَّ ٱلسَّوۡءِ وَكُنتُمۡ قَوۡمَۢا بُورٗا
verses.tr: But you thought that the Messenger and the believers would never return to their families, ever, and that was made pleasing in your hearts. And you assumed an assumption of evil and became a people ruined
verses.tl: Bal thanantum an lan yanqaliba alrrasoolu waalmuminoona ila ahleehim abadan wazuyyina thalika fee quloobikum wathanantum thanna alssawi wakuntum qawman booran

verses.ar: وَمَن لَّمۡ يُؤۡمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ فَإِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَعِيرٗا
verses.tr: And whoever has not believed in Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers a Blaze
verses.tl: Waman lam yumin biAllahi warasoolihi fainna aAAtadna lilkafireena saAAeeran

verses.ar: وَلِلَّهِ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ يَغۡفِرُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورٗا رَّحِيمٗا
verses.tr: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. He forgives whom He wills and punishes whom He wills. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful
verses.tl: Walillahi mulku alssamawati waalardi yaghfiru liman yashao wayuAAaththibu man yashao wakana Allahu ghafooran raheeman

verses.ar: سَيَقُولُ ٱلۡمُخَلَّفُونَ إِذَا ٱنطَلَقۡتُمۡ إِلَىٰ مَغَانِمَ لِتَأۡخُذُوهَا ذَرُونَا نَتَّبِعۡكُمۡۖ يُرِيدُونَ أَن يُبَدِّلُواْ كَلَٰمَ ٱللَّهِۚ قُل لَّن تَتَّبِعُونَا كَذَٰلِكُمۡ قَالَ ٱللَّهُ مِن قَبۡلُۖ فَسَيَقُولُونَ بَلۡ تَحۡسُدُونَنَاۚ بَلۡ كَانُواْ لَا يَفۡقَهُونَ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗا
verses.tr: Those who remained behind will say when you set out toward the war booty to take it, "Let us follow you." They wish to change the words of Allah. Say, "Never will you follow us. Thus did Allah say before." So they will say, "Rather, you envy us." But [in fact] they were not understanding except a little
verses.tl: Sayaqoolu almukhallafoona itha intalaqtum ila maghanima litakhuthooha tharoona nattabiAAkum yureedoona an yubaddiloo kalama Allahi qul lan tattabiAAoona kathalikum qala Allahu min qablu fasayaqooloona bal tahsudoonana bal kanoo la yafqahoona illa qaleelan

verses.ar: قُل لِّلۡمُخَلَّفِينَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابِ سَتُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمٍ أُوْلِي بَأۡسٖ شَدِيدٖ تُقَٰتِلُونَهُمۡ أَوۡ يُسۡلِمُونَۖ فَإِن تُطِيعُواْ يُؤۡتِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ أَجۡرًا حَسَنٗاۖ وَإِن تَتَوَلَّوۡاْ كَمَا تَوَلَّيۡتُم مِّن قَبۡلُ يُعَذِّبۡكُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمٗا
verses.tr: Say to those who remained behind of the bedouins, "You will be called to [face] a people of great military might; you may fight them, or they will submit. So if you obey, Allah will give you a good reward; but if you turn away as you turned away before, He will punish you with a painful punishment
verses.tl: Qul lilmukhallafeena mina alaAArabi satudAAawna ila qawmin olee basin shadeedin tuqatiloonahum aw yuslimoona fain tuteeAAoo yutikumu Allahu ajran hasanan wain tatawallaw kama tawallaytum min qablu yuAAaththibkum AAathaban aleeman

verses.ar: لَّيۡسَ عَلَى ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ حَرَجٞ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَعۡرَجِ حَرَجٞ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلۡمَرِيضِ حَرَجٞۗ وَمَن يُطِعِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ يُدۡخِلۡهُ جَنَّـٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۖ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ يُعَذِّبۡهُ عَذَابًا أَلِيمٗا
verses.tr: There is not upon the blind any guilt or upon the lame any guilt or upon the ill any guilt [for remaining behind]. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger - He will admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow; but whoever turns away - He will punish him with a painful punishment
verses.tl: Laysa AAala alaAAma harajun wala AAala alaAAraji harajun wala AAala almareedi harajun waman yutiAAi Allaha warasoolahu yudkhilhu jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu waman yatawalla yuAAaththibhu AAathaban aleeman

verses.ar: ۞لَّقَدۡ رَضِيَ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ إِذۡ يُبَايِعُونَكَ تَحۡتَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ فَعَلِمَ مَا فِي قُلُوبِهِمۡ فَأَنزَلَ ٱلسَّكِينَةَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وَأَثَٰبَهُمۡ فَتۡحٗا قَرِيبٗا
verses.tr: Certainly was Allah pleased with the believers when they pledged allegiance to you, [O Muhammad], under the tree, and He knew what was in their hearts, so He sent down tranquillity upon them and rewarded them with an imminent conquest
verses.tl: Laqad radiya Allahu AAani almumineena ith yubayiAAoonaka tahta alshshajarati faAAalima ma fee quloobihim faanzala alsakeenata AAalayhim waathabahum fathan qareeban

verses.ar: وَمَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةٗ يَأۡخُذُونَهَاۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَزِيزًا حَكِيمٗا
verses.tr: And much war booty which they will take. And ever is Allah Exalted in Might and Wise
verses.tl: Wamaghanima katheeratan yakhuthoonaha wakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeeman

verses.ar: وَعَدَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَغَانِمَ كَثِيرَةٗ تَأۡخُذُونَهَا فَعَجَّلَ لَكُمۡ هَٰذِهِۦ وَكَفَّ أَيۡدِيَ ٱلنَّاسِ عَنكُمۡ وَلِتَكُونَ ءَايَةٗ لِّلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَيَهۡدِيَكُمۡ صِرَٰطٗا مُّسۡتَقِيمٗا
verses.tr: Allah has promised you much booty that you will take [in the future] and has hastened for you this [victory] and withheld the hands of people from you - that it may be a sign for the believers and [that] He may guide you to a straight path
verses.tl: WaAAadakumu Allahu maghanima katheeratan takhuthoonaha faAAajjala lakum hathihi wakaffa aydiya alnnasi AAankum walitakoona ayatan lilmumineena wayahdiyakum siratan mustaqeeman

verses.ar: وَأُخۡرَىٰ لَمۡ تَقۡدِرُواْ عَلَيۡهَا قَدۡ أَحَاطَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَاۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٗا
verses.tr: And [He promises] other [victories] that you were [so far] unable to [realize] which Allah has already encompassed. And ever is Allah, over all things, competent
verses.tl: Waokhra lam taqdiroo AAalayha qad ahata Allahu biha wakana Allahu AAala kulli shayin qadeeran

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ قَٰتَلَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَوَلَّوُاْ ٱلۡأَدۡبَٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيّٗا وَلَا نَصِيرٗا
verses.tr: And if those [Makkans] who disbelieve had fought you, they would have turned their backs [in flight]. Then they would not find a protector or a helper
verses.tl: Walaw qatalakumu allatheena kafaroo lawallawoo aladbara thumma la yajidoona waliyyan wala naseeran

verses.ar: سُنَّةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِي قَدۡ خَلَتۡ مِن قَبۡلُۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ ٱللَّهِ تَبۡدِيلٗا
verses.tr: [This is] the established way of Allah which has occurred before. And never will you find in the way of Allah any change
verses.tl: Sunnata Allahi allatee qad khalat min qablu walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tabdeelan

verses.ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي كَفَّ أَيۡدِيَهُمۡ عَنكُمۡ وَأَيۡدِيَكُمۡ عَنۡهُم بِبَطۡنِ مَكَّةَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَنۡ أَظۡفَرَكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
verses.tr: And it is He who withheld their hands from you and your hands from them within [the area of] Makkah after He caused you to overcome them. And ever is Allah of what you do, Seeing
verses.tl: Wahuwa allathee kaffa aydiyahum AAankum waaydiyakum AAanhum bibatni makkata min baAAdi an athfarakum AAalayhim wakana Allahu bima taAAmaloona baseeran

verses.ar: هُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَصَدُّوكُمۡ عَنِ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدِ ٱلۡحَرَامِ وَٱلۡهَدۡيَ مَعۡكُوفًا أَن يَبۡلُغَ مَحِلَّهُۥۚ وَلَوۡلَا رِجَالٞ مُّؤۡمِنُونَ وَنِسَآءٞ مُّؤۡمِنَٰتٞ لَّمۡ تَعۡلَمُوهُمۡ أَن تَطَـُٔوهُمۡ فَتُصِيبَكُم مِّنۡهُم مَّعَرَّةُۢ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖۖ لِّيُدۡخِلَ ٱللَّهُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ لَوۡ تَزَيَّلُواْ لَعَذَّبۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.tr: They are the ones who disbelieved and obstructed you from al-Masjid al-Haram while the offering was prevented from reaching its place of sacrifice. And if not for believing men and believing women whom you did not know - that you might trample them and there would befall you because of them dishonor without [your] knowledge - [you would have been permitted to enter Makkah]. [This was so] that Allah might admit to His mercy whom He willed. If they had been apart [from them], We would have punished those who disbelieved among them with painful punishment
verses.tl: Humu allatheena kafaroo wasaddookum AAani almasjidi alharami waalhadya maAAkoofan an yablugha mahillahu walawla rijalun muminoona wanisaon muminatun lam taAAlamoohum an tataoohum fatuseebakum minhum maAAarratun bighayri AAilmin liyudkhila Allahu fee rahmatihi man yashao law tazayyaloo laAAaththabna allatheena kafaroo minhum AAathaban aleeman

verses.ar: إِذۡ جَعَلَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلۡحَمِيَّةَ حَمِيَّةَ ٱلۡجَٰهِلِيَّةِ فَأَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ سَكِينَتَهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ وَعَلَى ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَأَلۡزَمَهُمۡ كَلِمَةَ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ وَكَانُوٓاْ أَحَقَّ بِهَا وَأَهۡلَهَاۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٗا
verses.tr: When those who disbelieved had put into their hearts chauvinism - the chauvinism of the time of ignorance. But Allah sent down His tranquillity upon His Messenger and upon the believers and imposed upon them the word of righteousness, and they were more deserving of it and worthy of it. And ever is Allah, of all things, Knowing
verses.tl: Ith jaAAala allatheena kafaroo fee quloobihimu alhamiyyata hamiyyata aljahiliyyati faanzala Allahu sakeenatahu AAala rasoolihi waAAala almumineena waalzamahum kalimata alttaqwa wakanoo ahaqqa biha waahlaha wakana Allahu bikulli shayin AAaleeman

verses.ar: لَّقَدۡ صَدَقَ ٱللَّهُ رَسُولَهُ ٱلرُّءۡيَا بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ لَتَدۡخُلُنَّ ٱلۡمَسۡجِدَ ٱلۡحَرَامَ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ءَامِنِينَ مُحَلِّقِينَ رُءُوسَكُمۡ وَمُقَصِّرِينَ لَا تَخَافُونَۖ فَعَلِمَ مَا لَمۡ تَعۡلَمُواْ فَجَعَلَ مِن دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ فَتۡحٗا قَرِيبًا
verses.tr: Certainly has Allah showed to His Messenger the vision in truth. You will surely enter al-Masjid al-Haram, if Allah wills, in safety, with your heads shaved and [hair] shortened, not fearing [anyone]. He knew what you did not know and has arranged before that a conquest near [at hand]
verses.tl: Laqad sadaqa Allahu rasoolahu alrruya bialhaqqi latadkhulunna almasjida alharama in shaa Allahu amineena muhalliqeena ruoosakum wamuqassireena la takhafoona faAAalima ma lam taAAlamoo fajaAAala min dooni thalika fathan qareeban

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَرۡسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلۡهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلۡحَقِّ لِيُظۡهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِٱللَّهِ شَهِيدٗا
verses.tr: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion. And sufficient is Allah as Witness
verses.tl: Huwa allathee arsala rasoolahu bialhuda wadeeni alhaqqi liyuthhirahu AAala alddeeni kullihi wakafa biAllahi shaheedan

verses.ar: مُّحَمَّدٞ رَّسُولُ ٱللَّهِۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ أَشِدَّآءُ عَلَى ٱلۡكُفَّارِ رُحَمَآءُ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ تَرَىٰهُمۡ رُكَّعٗا سُجَّدٗا يَبۡتَغُونَ فَضۡلٗا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضۡوَٰنٗاۖ سِيمَاهُمۡ فِي وُجُوهِهِم مِّنۡ أَثَرِ ٱلسُّجُودِۚ ذَٰلِكَ مَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلتَّوۡرَىٰةِۚ وَمَثَلُهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡإِنجِيلِ كَزَرۡعٍ أَخۡرَجَ شَطۡـَٔهُۥ فَـَٔازَرَهُۥ فَٱسۡتَغۡلَظَ فَٱسۡتَوَىٰ عَلَىٰ سُوقِهِۦ يُعۡجِبُ ٱلزُّرَّاعَ لِيَغِيظَ بِهِمُ ٱلۡكُفَّارَۗ وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ مِنۡهُم مَّغۡفِرَةٗ وَأَجۡرًا عَظِيمَۢا
verses.tr: Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; and those with him are forceful against the disbelievers, merciful among themselves. You see them bowing and prostrating [in prayer], seeking bounty from Allah and [His] pleasure. Their mark is on their faces from the trace of prostration. That is their description in the Torah. And their description in the Gospel is as a plant which produces its offshoots and strengthens them so they grow firm and stand upon their stalks, delighting the sowers - so that Allah may enrage by them the disbelievers. Allah has promised those who believe and do righteous deeds among them forgiveness and a great reward
verses.tl: Muhammadun rasoolu Allahi waallatheena maAAahu ashiddao AAala alkuffari ruhamao baynahum tarahum rukkaAAan sujjadan yabtaghoona fadlan mina Allahi waridwanan seemahum fee wujoohihim min athari alssujoodi thalika mathaluhum fee alttawrati wamathaluhum fee alinjeeli kazarAAin akhraja shatahu faazarahu faistaghlatha faistawa AAala sooqihi yuAAjibu alzzurraAAa liyagheetha bihimu alkuffara waAAada Allahu allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati minhum maghfiratan waajran AAatheeman

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تُقَدِّمُواْ بَيۡنَ يَدَيِ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦۖ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٞ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, do not put [yourselves] before Allah and His Messenger but fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Hearing and Knowing
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la tuqaddimoo bayna yadayi Allahi warasoolihi waittaqoo Allaha inna Allaha sameeAAun AAaleemun

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا تَرۡفَعُوٓاْ أَصۡوَٰتَكُمۡ فَوۡقَ صَوۡتِ ٱلنَّبِيِّ وَلَا تَجۡهَرُواْ لَهُۥ بِٱلۡقَوۡلِ كَجَهۡرِ بَعۡضِكُمۡ لِبَعۡضٍ أَن تَحۡبَطَ أَعۡمَٰلُكُمۡ وَأَنتُمۡ لَا تَشۡعُرُونَ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, do not raise your voices above the voice of the Prophet or be loud to him in speech like the loudness of some of you to others, lest your deeds become worthless while you perceive not
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la tarfaAAoo aswatakum fawqa sawti alnnabiyyi wala tajharoo lahu bialqawli kajahri baAAdikum libaAAdin an tahbata aAAmalukum waantum la tashAAuroona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَغُضُّونَ أَصۡوَٰتَهُمۡ عِندَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱمۡتَحَنَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمۡ لِلتَّقۡوَىٰۚ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةٞ وَأَجۡرٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who lower their voices before the Messenger of Allah - they are the ones whose hearts Allah has tested for righteousness. For them is forgiveness and great reward
verses.tl: Inna allatheena yaghuddoona aswatahum AAinda rasooli Allahi olaika allatheena imtahana Allahu quloobahum lilttaqwa lahum maghfiratun waajrun AAatheemun

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُنَادُونَكَ مِن وَرَآءِ ٱلۡحُجُرَٰتِ أَكۡثَرُهُمۡ لَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who call you, [O Muhammad], from behind the chambers - most of them do not use reason
verses.tl: Inna allatheena yunadoonaka min warai alhujurati aktharuhum la yaAAqiloona

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ أَنَّهُمۡ صَبَرُواْ حَتَّىٰ تَخۡرُجَ إِلَيۡهِمۡ لَكَانَ خَيۡرٗا لَّهُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
verses.tr: And if they had been patient until you [could] come out to them, it would have been better for them. But Allah is Forgiving and Merciful
verses.tl: Walaw annahum sabaroo hatta takhruja ilayhim lakana khayran lahum waAllahu ghafoorun raheemun

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِن جَآءَكُمۡ فَاسِقُۢ بِنَبَإٖ فَتَبَيَّنُوٓاْ أَن تُصِيبُواْ قَوۡمَۢا بِجَهَٰلَةٖ فَتُصۡبِحُواْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَعَلۡتُمۡ نَٰدِمِينَ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, if there comes to you a disobedient one with information, investigate, lest you harm a people out of ignorance and become, over what you have done, regretful
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo in jaakum fasiqun binabain fatabayyanoo an tuseeboo qawman bijahalatin fatusbihoo AAala ma faAAaltum nadimeena

verses.ar: وَٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ فِيكُمۡ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِۚ لَوۡ يُطِيعُكُمۡ فِي كَثِيرٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَمۡرِ لَعَنِتُّمۡ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ حَبَّبَ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنَ وَزَيَّنَهُۥ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡ وَكَرَّهَ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡكُفۡرَ وَٱلۡفُسُوقَ وَٱلۡعِصۡيَانَۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلرَّـٰشِدُونَ
verses.tr: And know that among you is the Messenger of Allah. If he were to obey you in much of the matter, you would be in difficulty, but Allah has endeared to you the faith and has made it pleasing in your hearts and has made hateful to you disbelief, defiance and disobedience. Those are the [rightly] guided
verses.tl: WaiAAlamoo anna feekum rasoola Allahi law yuteeAAukum fee katheerin mina alamri laAAanittum walakinna Allaha habbaba ilaykumu aleemana wazayyanahu fee quloobikum wakarraha ilaykumu alkufra waalfusooqa waalAAisyana olaika humu alrrashidoona

verses.ar: فَضۡلٗا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَنِعۡمَةٗۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٞ
verses.tr: [It is] as bounty from Allah and favor. And Allah is Knowing and Wise
verses.tl: Fadlan mina Allahi waniAAmatan waAllahu AAaleemun hakeemun

verses.ar: وَإِن طَآئِفَتَانِ مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ ٱقۡتَتَلُواْ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَهُمَاۖ فَإِنۢ بَغَتۡ إِحۡدَىٰهُمَا عَلَى ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰ فَقَٰتِلُواْ ٱلَّتِي تَبۡغِي حَتَّىٰ تَفِيٓءَ إِلَىٰٓ أَمۡرِ ٱللَّهِۚ فَإِن فَآءَتۡ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَهُمَا بِٱلۡعَدۡلِ وَأَقۡسِطُوٓاْۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُقۡسِطِينَ
verses.tr: And if two factions among the believers should fight, then make settlement between the two. But if one of them oppresses the other, then fight against the one that oppresses until it returns to the ordinance of Allah. And if it returns, then make settlement between them in justice and act justly. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly
verses.tl: Wain taifatani mina almumineena iqtataloo faaslihoo baynahuma fain baghat ihdahuma AAala alokhra faqatiloo allatee tabghee hatta tafeea ila amri Allahi fain faat faaslihoo baynahuma bialAAadli waaqsitoo inna Allaha yuhibbu almuqsiteena

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ إِخۡوَةٞ فَأَصۡلِحُواْ بَيۡنَ أَخَوَيۡكُمۡۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تُرۡحَمُونَ
verses.tr: The believers are but brothers, so make settlement between your brothers. And fear Allah that you may receive mercy
verses.tl: Innama almuminoona ikhwatun faaslihoo bayna akhawaykum waittaqoo Allaha laAAallakum turhamoona

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لَا يَسۡخَرۡ قَوۡمٞ مِّن قَوۡمٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونُواْ خَيۡرٗا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَلَا نِسَآءٞ مِّن نِّسَآءٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُنَّ خَيۡرٗا مِّنۡهُنَّۖ وَلَا تَلۡمِزُوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَلَا تَنَابَزُواْ بِٱلۡأَلۡقَٰبِۖ بِئۡسَ ٱلِٱسۡمُ ٱلۡفُسُوقُ بَعۡدَ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنِۚ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَتُبۡ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, let not a people ridicule [another] people; perhaps they may be better than them; nor let women ridicule [other] women; perhaps they may be better than them. And do not insult one another and do not call each other by [offensive] nicknames. Wretched is the name of disobedience after [one's] faith. And whoever does not repent - then it is those who are the wrongdoers
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo la yaskhar qawmun min qawmin AAasa an yakoonoo khayran minhum wala nisaon min nisain AAasa an yakunna khayran minhunna wala talmizoo anfusakum wala tanabazoo bialalqabi bisa alismu alfusooqu baAAda aleemani waman lam yatub faolaika humu alththalimoona

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱجۡتَنِبُواْ كَثِيرٗا مِّنَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعۡضَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِثۡمٞۖ وَلَا تَجَسَّسُواْ وَلَا يَغۡتَب بَّعۡضُكُم بَعۡضًاۚ أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمۡ أَن يَأۡكُلَ لَحۡمَ أَخِيهِ مَيۡتٗا فَكَرِهۡتُمُوهُۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَوَّابٞ رَّحِيمٞ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, avoid much [negative] assumption. Indeed, some assumption is sin. And do not spy or backbite each other. Would one of you like to eat the flesh of his brother when dead? You would detest it. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is Accepting of repentance and Merciful
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ijtaniboo katheeran mina alththanni inna baAAda alththanni ithmun wala tajassasoo wala yaghtab baAAdukum baAAdan ayuhibbu ahadukum an yakula lahma akheehi maytan fakarihtumoohu waittaqoo Allaha inna Allaha tawwabun raheemun

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰكُم مِّن ذَكَرٖ وَأُنثَىٰ وَجَعَلۡنَٰكُمۡ شُعُوبٗا وَقَبَآئِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوٓاْۚ إِنَّ أَكۡرَمَكُمۡ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَتۡقَىٰكُمۡۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٞ
verses.tr: O mankind, indeed We have created you from male and female and made you peoples and tribes that you may know one another. Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allah is the most righteous of you. Indeed, Allah is Knowing and Acquainted
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha alnnasu inna khalaqnakum min thakarin waontha wajaAAalnakum shuAAooban waqabaila litaAAarafoo inna akramakum AAinda Allahi atqakum inna Allaha AAaleemun khabeerun

verses.ar: ۞قَالَتِ ٱلۡأَعۡرَابُ ءَامَنَّاۖ قُل لَّمۡ تُؤۡمِنُواْ وَلَٰكِن قُولُوٓاْ أَسۡلَمۡنَا وَلَمَّا يَدۡخُلِ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنُ فِي قُلُوبِكُمۡۖ وَإِن تُطِيعُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ لَا يَلِتۡكُم مِّنۡ أَعۡمَٰلِكُمۡ شَيۡـًٔاۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.tr: The bedouins say, "We have believed." Say, "You have not [yet] believed; but say [instead], 'We have submitted,' for faith has not yet entered your hearts. And if you obey Allah and His Messenger, He will not deprive you from your deeds of anything. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful
verses.tl: Qalati alaAArabu amanna qul lam tuminoo walakin qooloo aslamna walamma yadkhuli aleemanu fee quloobikum wain tuteeAAoo Allaha warasoolahu la yalitkum min aAAmalikum shayan inna Allaha ghafoorun raheemun

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَرۡتَابُواْ وَجَٰهَدُواْ بِأَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ وَأَنفُسِهِمۡ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ
verses.tr: The believers are only the ones who have believed in Allah and His Messenger and then doubt not but strive with their properties and their lives in the cause of Allah. It is those who are the truthful
verses.tl: Innama almuminoona allatheena amanoo biAllahi warasoolihi thumma lam yartaboo wajahadoo biamwalihim waanfusihim fee sabeeli Allahi olaika humu alssadiqoona

verses.ar: قُلۡ أَتُعَلِّمُونَ ٱللَّهَ بِدِينِكُمۡ وَٱللَّهُ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٞ
verses.tr: Say, "Would you acquaint Allah with your religion while Allah knows whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth, and Allah is Knowing of all things
verses.tl: Qul atuAAallimoona Allaha bideenikum waAllahu yaAAlamu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi waAllahu bikulli shayin AAaleemun

verses.ar: يَمُنُّونَ عَلَيۡكَ أَنۡ أَسۡلَمُواْۖ قُل لَّا تَمُنُّواْ عَلَيَّ إِسۡلَٰمَكُمۖ بَلِ ٱللَّهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنۡ هَدَىٰكُمۡ لِلۡإِيمَٰنِ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: They consider it a favor to you that they have accepted Islam. Say, "Do not consider your Islam a favor to me. Rather, Allah has conferred favor upon you that He has guided you to the faith, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: Yamunnoona AAalayka an aslamoo qul la tamunnoo AAalayya islamakum bali Allahu yamunnu AAalaykum an hadakum lileemani in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ غَيۡبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ بَصِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, Allah knows the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth. And Allah is Seeing of what you do
verses.tl: Inna Allaha yaAAlamu ghayba alssamawati waalardi waAllahu baseerun bima taAAmaloona

verses.ar: قٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ٱلۡمَجِيدِ
verses.tr: Qaf. By the honored Qur'an
verses.tl: Qaf waalqurani almajeedi

verses.ar: بَلۡ عَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَيۡءٌ عَجِيبٌ
verses.tr: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, "This is an amazing thing
verses.tl: Bal AAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum faqala alkafiroona hatha shayon AAajeebun

verses.ar: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗاۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجۡعُۢ بَعِيدٞ
verses.tr: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant return
verses.tl: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban thalika rajAAun baAAeedun

verses.ar: قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ مِنۡهُمۡۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَٰبٌ حَفِيظُۢ
verses.tr: We know what the earth diminishes of them, and with Us is a retaining record
verses.tl: Qad AAalimna ma tanqusu alardu minhum waAAindana kitabun hafeethun

verses.ar: بَلۡ كَذَّبُواْ بِٱلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيٓ أَمۡرٖ مَّرِيجٍ
verses.tr: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition
verses.tl: Bal kaththaboo bialhaqqi lamma jaahum fahum fee amrin mareejin

verses.ar: أَفَلَمۡ يَنظُرُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ كَيۡفَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٖ
verses.tr: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts
verses.tl: Afalam yanthuroo ila alssamai fawqahum kayfa banaynaha wazayyannaha wama laha min furoojin

verses.ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنَٰهَا وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجِۭ بَهِيجٖ
verses.tr: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind
verses.tl: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli zawjin baheejin

verses.ar: تَبۡصِرَةٗ وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ
verses.tr: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allah]
verses.tl: Tabsiratan wathikra likulli AAabdin muneebin

verses.ar: وَنَزَّلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ مُّبَٰرَكٗا فَأَنۢبَتۡنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٖ وَحَبَّ ٱلۡحَصِيدِ
verses.tr: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest
verses.tl: Wanazzalna mina alssamai maan mubarakan faanbatna bihi jannatin wahabba alhaseedi

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّخۡلَ بَاسِقَٰتٖ لَّهَا طَلۡعٞ نَّضِيدٞ
verses.tr: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers
verses.tl: Waalnnakhla basiqatin laha talAAun nadeedun

verses.ar: رِّزۡقٗا لِّلۡعِبَادِۖ وَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِۦ بَلۡدَةٗ مَّيۡتٗاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡخُرُوجُ
verses.tr: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the resurrection
verses.tl: Rizqan lilAAibadi waahyayna bihi baldatan maytan kathalika alkhurooju

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٖ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
verses.tr: The people of Noah denied before them, and the companions of the well and Thamud
verses.tl: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waashabu alrrassi wathamoodu

verses.ar: وَعَادٞ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ وَإِخۡوَٰنُ لُوطٖ
verses.tr: And 'Aad and Pharaoh and the brothers of Lot
verses.tl: WaAAadun wafirAAawnu waikhwanu lootin

verses.ar: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ وَقَوۡمُ تُبَّعٖۚ كُلّٞ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
verses.tr: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubba'. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled
verses.tl: Waashabu alaykati waqawmu tubbaAAin kullun kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa waAAeedi

verses.ar: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلۡخَلۡقِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي لَبۡسٖ مِّنۡ خَلۡقٖ جَدِيدٖ
verses.tr: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation
verses.tl: AfaAAayeena bialkhalqi alawwali bal hum fee labsin min khalqin jadeedin

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعۡلَمُ مَا تُوَسۡوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفۡسُهُۥۖ وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ حَبۡلِ ٱلۡوَرِيدِ
verses.tr: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein
verses.tl: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana wanaAAlamu ma tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi min habli alwareedi

verses.ar: إِذۡ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلۡمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٞ
verses.tr: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left
verses.tl: Ith yatalaqqa almutalaqqiyani AAani alyameeni waAAani alshshimali qaAAeedun

verses.ar: مَّا يَلۡفِظُ مِن قَوۡلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيۡهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٞ
verses.tr: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record]
verses.tl: Ma yalfithu min qawlin illa ladayhi raqeebun AAateedun

verses.ar: وَجَآءَتۡ سَكۡرَةُ ٱلۡمَوۡتِ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنۡهُ تَحِيدُ
verses.tr: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid
verses.tl: Wajaat sakratu almawti bialhaqqi thalika ma kunta minhu taheedu

verses.ar: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ
verses.tr: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat
verses.tl: Wanufikha fee alssoori thalika yawmu alwaAAeedi

verses.ar: وَجَآءَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٞ وَشَهِيدٞ
verses.tr: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness
verses.tl: Wajaat kullu nafsin maAAaha saiqun washaheedun

verses.ar: لَّقَدۡ كُنتَ فِي غَفۡلَةٖ مِّنۡ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفۡنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ حَدِيدٞ
verses.tr: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp
verses.tl: Laqad kunta fee ghaflatin min hatha fakashafna AAanka ghitaaka fabasaruka alyawma hadeedun

verses.ar: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
verses.tr: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared
verses.tl: Waqala qareenuhu hatha ma ladayya AAateedun

verses.ar: أَلۡقِيَا فِي جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٖ
verses.tr: [Allah will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever
verses.tl: Alqiya fee jahannama kulla kaffarin AAaneedin

verses.ar: مَّنَّاعٖ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدٖ مُّرِيبٍ
verses.tr: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter
verses.tl: MannaAAin lilkhayri muAAtadin mureebin

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلۡقِيَاهُ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
verses.tr: Who made [as equal] with Allah another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment
verses.tl: Allathee jaAAala maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara faalqiyahu fee alAAathabi alshshadeedi

verses.ar: ۞قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطۡغَيۡتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِي ضَلَٰلِۭ بَعِيدٖ
verses.tr: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error
verses.tl: Qala qareenuhu rabbana ma atghaytuhu walakin kana fee dalalin baAAeedin

verses.ar: قَالَ لَا تَخۡتَصِمُواْ لَدَيَّ وَقَدۡ قَدَّمۡتُ إِلَيۡكُم بِٱلۡوَعِيدِ
verses.tr: [Allah] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the warning
verses.tl: Qala la takhtasimoo ladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bialwaAAeedi

verses.ar: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٖ لِّلۡعَبِيدِ
verses.tr: The word will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants
verses.tl: Ma yubaddalu alqawlu ladayya wama ana bithallamin lilAAabeedi

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمۡتَلَأۡتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلۡ مِن مَّزِيدٖ
verses.tr: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more
verses.tl: Yawma naqoolu lijahannama hali imtalati wataqoolu hal min mazeedin

verses.ar: وَأُزۡلِفَتِ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيدٍ
verses.tr: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far
verses.tl: Waozlifati aljannatu lilmuttaqeena ghayra baAAeedin

verses.ar: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٖ
verses.tr: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allah] and keeper [of His covenant]
verses.tl: Hatha ma tooAAadoona likulli awwabin hafeethin

verses.ar: مَّنۡ خَشِيَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلۡبٖ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.tr: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance]
verses.tl: Man khashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi wajaa biqalbin muneebin

verses.ar: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٖۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُلُودِ
verses.tr: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity
verses.tl: Odkhulooha bisalamin thalika yawmu alkhuloodi

verses.ar: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا مَزِيدٞ
verses.tr: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more
verses.tl: Lahum ma yashaoona feeha waladayna mazeedun

verses.ar: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ أَشَدُّ مِنۡهُم بَطۡشٗا فَنَقَّبُواْ فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ هَلۡ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
verses.tr: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape
verses.tl: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fee albiladi hal min maheesin

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلۡبٌ أَوۡ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٞ
verses.tr: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind]
verses.tl: Inna fee thalika lathikra liman kana lahu qalbun aw alqa alssamAAa wahuwa shaheedun

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٖ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٖ
verses.tr: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness
verses.tl: Walaqad khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma fee sittati ayyamin wama massana min lughoobin

verses.ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ ٱلۡغُرُوبِ
verses.tr: So be patient, [O Muhammad], over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting
verses.tl: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla alghuroobi

verses.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَأَدۡبَٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
verses.tr: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration
verses.tl: Wamina allayli fasabbihhu waadbara alssujoodi

verses.ar: وَٱسۡتَمِعۡ يَوۡمَ يُنَادِ ٱلۡمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٖ قَرِيبٖ
verses.tr: And listen on the Day when the Caller will call out from a place that is near
verses.tl: WaistamiAA yawma yunadi almunadi min makanin qareebin

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَسۡمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيۡحَةَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُرُوجِ
verses.tr: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves]
verses.tl: Yawma yasmaAAoona alssayhata bialhaqqi thalika yawmu alkhurooji

verses.ar: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيۡنَا ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination
verses.tl: Inna nahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wailayna almaseeru

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمۡ سِرَاعٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرٞ
verses.tr: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us
verses.tl: Yawma tashaqqaqu alardu AAanhum siraAAan thalika hashrun AAalayna yaseerun

verses.ar: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِجَبَّارٖۖ فَذَكِّرۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
verses.tr: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur'an whoever fears My threat
verses.tl: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona wama anta AAalayhim bijabbarin fathakkir bialqurani man yakhafu waAAeedi

verses.ar: وَٱلذَّـٰرِيَٰتِ ذَرۡوٗا
verses.tr: By those [winds] scattering [dust] dispersing
verses.tl: Waalththariyati tharwan

verses.ar: فَٱلۡحَٰمِلَٰتِ وِقۡرٗا
verses.tr: And those [clouds] carrying a load [of water]
verses.tl: Faalhamilati wiqran

verses.ar: فَٱلۡجَٰرِيَٰتِ يُسۡرٗا
verses.tr: And those [ships] sailing with ease
verses.tl: Faaljariyati yusran

verses.ar: فَٱلۡمُقَسِّمَٰتِ أَمۡرًا
verses.tr: And those [angels] apportioning [each] matter
verses.tl: Faalmuqassimati amran

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, what you are promised is true
verses.tl: Innama tooAAadoona lasadiqun

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٞ
verses.tr: And indeed, the recompense is to occur
verses.tl: Wainna alddeena lawaqiAAun

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلۡحُبُكِ
verses.tr: By the heaven containing pathways
verses.tl: Waalssamai thati alhubuki

verses.ar: إِنَّكُمۡ لَفِي قَوۡلٖ مُّخۡتَلِفٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, you are in differing speech
verses.tl: Innakum lafee qawlin mukhtalifin

verses.ar: يُؤۡفَكُ عَنۡهُ مَنۡ أُفِكَ
verses.tr: Deluded away from the Qur'an is he who is deluded
verses.tl: Yufaku AAanhu man ofika

verses.ar: قُتِلَ ٱلۡخَرَّـٰصُونَ
verses.tr: Destroyed are the falsifiers
verses.tl: Qutila alkharrasoona

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ فِي غَمۡرَةٖ سَاهُونَ
verses.tr: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless
verses.tl: Allatheena hum fee ghamratin sahoona

verses.ar: يَسۡـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: They ask, "When is the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Yasaloona ayyana yawmu alddeeni

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ هُمۡ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفۡتَنُونَ
verses.tr: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire
verses.tl: Yawma hum AAala alnnari yuftanoona

verses.ar: ذُوقُواْ فِتۡنَتَكُمۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسۡتَعۡجِلُونَ
verses.tr: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient
verses.tl: Thooqoo fitnatakum hatha allathee kuntum bihi tastaAAjiloona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.tr: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs
verses.tl: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin waAAuyoonin

verses.ar: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَبۡلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good
verses.tl: Akhitheena ma atahum rabbuhum innahum kanoo qabla thalika muhsineena

verses.ar: كَانُواْ قَلِيلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ مَا يَهۡجَعُونَ
verses.tr: They used to sleep but little of the night
verses.tl: Kanoo qaleelan mina allayli ma yahjaAAoona

verses.ar: وَبِٱلۡأَسۡحَارِ هُمۡ يَسۡتَغۡفِرُونَ
verses.tr: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness
verses.tl: Wabialashari hum yastaghfiroona

verses.ar: وَفِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ حَقّٞ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلۡمَحۡرُومِ
verses.tr: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived
verses.tl: Wafee amwalihim haqqun lilssaili waalmahroomi

verses.ar: وَفِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ ءَايَٰتٞ لِّلۡمُوقِنِينَ
verses.tr: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
verses.tl: Wafee alardi ayatun lilmooqineena

verses.ar: وَفِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And in yourselves. Then will you not see
verses.tl: Wafee anfusikum afala tubsiroona

verses.ar: وَفِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزۡقُكُمۡ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
verses.tr: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised
verses.tl: Wafee alssamai rizqukum wama tooAAadoona

verses.ar: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقّٞ مِّثۡلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمۡ تَنطِقُونَ
verses.tr: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking
verses.tl: Fawarabbi alssamai waalardi innahu lahaqqun mithla ma annakum tantiqoona

verses.ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيۡفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ ٱلۡمُكۡرَمِينَ
verses.tr: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham
verses.tl: Hal ataka hadeethu dayfi ibraheema almukrameena

verses.ar: إِذۡ دَخَلُواْ عَلَيۡهِ فَقَالُواْ سَلَٰمٗاۖ قَالَ سَلَٰمٞ قَوۡمٞ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.tr: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace, [you are] a people unknown
verses.tl: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala salamun qawmun munkaroona

verses.ar: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجۡلٖ سَمِينٖ
verses.tr: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf
verses.tl: Faragha ila ahlihi fajaa biAAijlin sameenin

verses.ar: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيۡهِمۡ قَالَ أَلَا تَأۡكُلُونَ
verses.tr: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat
verses.tl: Faqarrabahu ilayhim qala ala takuloona

verses.ar: فَأَوۡجَسَ مِنۡهُمۡ خِيفَةٗۖ قَالُواْ لَا تَخَفۡۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٖ
verses.tr: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy
verses.tl: Faawjasa minhum kheefatan qaloo la takhaf wabashsharoohu bighulamin AAaleemin

verses.ar: فَأَقۡبَلَتِ ٱمۡرَأَتُهُۥ فِي صَرَّةٖ فَصَكَّتۡ وَجۡهَهَا وَقَالَتۡ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٞ
verses.tr: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman
verses.tl: Faaqbalati imraatuhu fee sarratin fasakkat wajhaha waqalat AAajoozun AAaqeemun

verses.ar: قَالُواْ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ ٱلۡعَلِيمُ
verses.tr: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing
verses.tl: Qaloo kathaliki qala rabbuki innahu huwa alhakeemu alAAaleemu

verses.ar: ۞قَالَ فَمَا خَطۡبُكُمۡ أَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُرۡسَلُونَ
verses.tr: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers
verses.tl: Qala fama khatbukum ayyuha almursaloona

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّآ أُرۡسِلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوۡمٖ مُّجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals
verses.tl: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena

verses.ar: لِنُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حِجَارَةٗ مِّن طِينٖ
verses.tr: To send down upon them stones of clay
verses.tl: Linursila AAalayhim hijaratan min teenin

verses.ar: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُسۡرِفِينَ
verses.tr: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors
verses.tl: Musawwamatan AAinda rabbika lilmusrifeena

verses.ar: فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers
verses.tl: Faakhrajna man kana feeha mina almumineena

verses.ar: فَمَا وَجَدۡنَا فِيهَا غَيۡرَ بَيۡتٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡمُسۡلِمِينَ
verses.tr: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims
verses.tl: Fama wajadna feeha ghayra baytin mina almuslimeena

verses.ar: وَتَرَكۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةٗ لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَلِيمَ
verses.tr: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment
verses.tl: Watarakna feeha ayatan lillatheena yakhafoona alAAathaba alaleema

verses.ar: وَفِي مُوسَىٰٓ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ بِسُلۡطَٰنٖ مُّبِينٖ
verses.tr: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority
verses.tl: Wafee moosa ith arsalnahu ila firAAawna bisultanin mubeenin

verses.ar: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكۡنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَٰحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونٞ
verses.tr: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman
verses.tl: Fatawalla biruknihi waqala sahirun aw majnoonun

verses.ar: فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذۡنَٰهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٞ
verses.tr: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy
verses.tl: Faakhathnahu wajunoodahu fanabathnahum fee alyammi wahuwa muleemun

verses.ar: وَفِي عَادٍ إِذۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلۡعَقِيمَ
verses.tr: And in 'Aad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind
verses.tl: Wafee AAadin ith arsalna AAalayhimu alrreeha alAAaqeema

verses.ar: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَيۡءٍ أَتَتۡ عَلَيۡهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتۡهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
verses.tr: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins
verses.tl: Ma tatharu min shayin atat AAalayhi illa jaAAalathu kaalrrameemi

verses.ar: وَفِي ثَمُودَ إِذۡ قِيلَ لَهُمۡ تَمَتَّعُواْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٖ
verses.tr: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time
verses.tl: Wafee thamooda ith qeela lahum tamattaAAoo hatta heenin

verses.ar: فَعَتَوۡاْ عَنۡ أَمۡرِ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمۡ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.tr: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on
verses.tl: FaAAataw AAan amri rabbihim faakhathathumu alssaAAiqatu wahum yanthuroona

verses.ar: فَمَا ٱسۡتَطَٰعُواْ مِن قِيَامٖ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُنتَصِرِينَ
verses.tr: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves
verses.tl: Fama istataAAoo min qiyamin wama kanoo muntasireena

verses.ar: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحٖ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَوۡمٗا فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.tr: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient
verses.tl: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا بِأَيۡيْدٖ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
verses.tr: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander
verses.tl: Waalssamaa banaynaha biaydin wainna lamoosiAAoona

verses.ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ فَرَشۡنَٰهَا فَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡمَٰهِدُونَ
verses.tr: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer
verses.tl: Waalarda farashnaha faniAAma almahidoona

verses.ar: وَمِن كُلِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.tr: And of all things We created two mates; perhaps you will remember
verses.tl: Wamin kulli shayin khalaqna zawjayni laAAallakum tathakkaroona

verses.ar: فَفِرُّوٓاْ إِلَى ٱللَّهِۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنۡهُ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner
verses.tl: Fafirroo ila Allahi innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun

verses.ar: وَلَا تَجۡعَلُواْ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَۖ إِنِّي لَكُم مِّنۡهُ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٞ
verses.tr: And do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner
verses.tl: Wala tajAAaloo maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun

verses.ar: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُواْ سَاحِرٌ أَوۡ مَجۡنُونٌ
verses.tr: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman
verses.tl: Kathalika ma ata allatheena min qablihim min rasoolin illa qaloo sahirun aw majnoonun

verses.ar: أَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِهِۦۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٞ طَاغُونَ
verses.tr: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people
verses.tl: Atawasaw bihi bal hum qawmun taghoona

verses.ar: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٖ
verses.tr: So leave them, [O Muhammad], for you are not to be blamed
verses.tl: Fatawalla AAanhum fama anta bimaloomin

verses.ar: وَذَكِّرۡ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers
verses.tl: Wathakkir fainna alththikra tanfaAAu almumineena

verses.ar: وَمَا خَلَقۡتُ ٱلۡجِنَّ وَٱلۡإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُونِ
verses.tr: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me
verses.tl: Wama khalaqtu aljinna waalinsa illa liyaAAbudooni

verses.ar: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنۡهُم مِّن رِّزۡقٖ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطۡعِمُونِ
verses.tr: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me
verses.tl: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wama oreedu an yutAAimooni

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلۡقُوَّةِ ٱلۡمَتِينُ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength
verses.tl: Inna Allaha huwa alrrazzaqu thoo alquwwati almateenu

verses.ar: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ ذَنُوبٗا مِّثۡلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصۡحَٰبِهِمۡ فَلَا يَسۡتَعۡجِلُونِ
verses.tr: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their predecessors, so let them not impatiently urge Me
verses.tl: Fainna lillatheena thalamoo thanooban mithla thanoobi ashabihim fala yastaAAjiloona

verses.ar: فَوَيۡلٞ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِن يَوۡمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
verses.tr: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised
verses.tl: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min yawmihimu allathee yooAAadoona

verses.ar: وَٱلطُّورِ
verses.tr: By the mount
verses.tl: Waalttoori

verses.ar: وَكِتَٰبٖ مَّسۡطُورٖ
verses.tr: And [by] a Book inscribed
verses.tl: Wakitabin mastoorin

verses.ar: فِي رَقّٖ مَّنشُورٖ
verses.tr: In parchment spread open
verses.tl: Fee raqqin manshoorin

verses.ar: وَٱلۡبَيۡتِ ٱلۡمَعۡمُورِ
verses.tr: And [by] the frequented House
verses.tl: Waalbayti almaAAmoori

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّقۡفِ ٱلۡمَرۡفُوعِ
verses.tr: And [by] the heaven raised high
verses.tl: Waalssaqfi almarfooAAi

verses.ar: وَٱلۡبَحۡرِ ٱلۡمَسۡجُورِ
verses.tr: And [by] the sea filled [with fire]
verses.tl: Waalbahri almasjoori

verses.ar: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur
verses.tl: Inna AAathaba rabbika lawaqiAAun

verses.ar: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٖ
verses.tr: Of it there is no preventer
verses.tl: Ma lahu min dafiAAin

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوۡرٗا
verses.tr: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion
verses.tl: Yawma tamooru alssamao mawran

verses.ar: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلۡجِبَالُ سَيۡرٗا
verses.tr: And the mountains will pass on, departing
verses.tl: Wataseeru aljibalu sayran

verses.ar: فَوَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Fawaylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ فِي خَوۡضٖ يَلۡعَبُونَ
verses.tr: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves
verses.tl: Allatheena hum fee khawdin yalAAaboona

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
verses.tr: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say]
verses.tl: Yawma yudaAAAAoona ila nari jahannama daAAAAan

verses.ar: هَٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِي كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: This is the Fire which you used to deny
verses.tl: Hathihi alnnaru allatee kuntum biha tukaththiboona

verses.ar: أَفَسِحۡرٌ هَٰذَآ أَمۡ أَنتُمۡ لَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: Then is this magic, or do you not see
verses.tl: Afasihrun hatha am antum la tubsiroona

verses.ar: ٱصۡلَوۡهَا فَٱصۡبِرُوٓاْ أَوۡ لَا تَصۡبِرُواْ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ إِنَّمَا تُجۡزَوۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do
verses.tl: Islawha faisbiroo aw la tasbiroo sawaon AAalaykum innama tujzawna ma kuntum taAAmaloona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَنَعِيمٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure
verses.tl: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin wanaAAeemin

verses.ar: فَٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ وَوَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire
verses.tl: Fakiheena bima atahum rabbuhum wawaqahum rabbuhum AAathaba aljaheemi

verses.ar: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do
verses.tl: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima kuntum taAAmaloona

verses.ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٖ مَّصۡفُوفَةٖۖ وَزَوَّجۡنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٖ
verses.tr: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes
verses.tl: Muttakieena AAala sururin masfoofatin wazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeenin

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَٱتَّبَعَتۡهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلۡحَقۡنَا بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمۡ وَمَآ أَلَتۡنَٰهُم مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيۡءٖۚ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيِٕۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٞ
verses.tr: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained
verses.tl: Waallatheena amanoo waittabaAAathum thurriyyatuhum bieemanin alhaqna bihim thurriyyatahum wama alatnahum min AAamalihim min shayin kullu imriin bima kasaba raheenun

verses.ar: وَأَمۡدَدۡنَٰهُم بِفَٰكِهَةٖ وَلَحۡمٖ مِّمَّا يَشۡتَهُونَ
verses.tr: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire
verses.tl: Waamdadnahum bifakihatin walahmin mimma yashtahoona

verses.ar: يَتَنَٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأۡسٗا لَّا لَغۡوٞ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأۡثِيمٞ
verses.tr: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin
verses.tl: YatanazaAAoona feeha kasan la laghwun feeha wala tatheemun

verses.ar: ۞وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ غِلۡمَانٞ لَّهُمۡ كَأَنَّهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤٞ مَّكۡنُونٞ
verses.tr: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected
verses.tl: Wayatoofu AAalayhim ghilmanun lahum kaannahum luluon maknoonun

verses.ar: وَأَقۡبَلَ بَعۡضُهُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.tr: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other
verses.tl: Waaqbala baAAduhum AAala baAAdin yatasaaloona

verses.ar: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبۡلُ فِيٓ أَهۡلِنَا مُشۡفِقِينَ
verses.tr: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allah]
verses.tl: Qaloo inna kunna qablu fee ahlina mushfiqeena

verses.ar: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.tr: So Allah conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire
verses.tl: Famanna Allahu AAalayna wawaqana AAathaba alssamoomi

verses.ar: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبۡلُ نَدۡعُوهُۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلۡبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.tr: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful
verses.tl: Inna kunna min qablu nadAAoohu innahu huwa albarru alrraheemu

verses.ar: فَذَكِّرۡ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعۡمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٖ وَلَا مَجۡنُونٍ
verses.tr: So remind [O Muhammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman
verses.tl: Fathakkir fama anta biniAAmati rabbika bikahin wala majnoonin

verses.ar: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٞ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيۡبَ ٱلۡمَنُونِ
verses.tr: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time
verses.tl: Am yaqooloona shaAAirun natarabbasu bihi rayba almanooni

verses.ar: قُلۡ تَرَبَّصُواْ فَإِنِّي مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
verses.tr: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters
verses.tl: Qul tarabbasoo fainnee maAAakum mina almutarabbiseena

verses.ar: أَمۡ تَأۡمُرُهُمۡ أَحۡلَٰمُهُم بِهَٰذَآۚ أَمۡ هُمۡ قَوۡمٞ طَاغُونَ
verses.tr: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people
verses.tl: Am tamuruhum ahlamuhum bihatha am hum qawmun taghoona

verses.ar: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥۚ بَل لَّا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe
verses.tl: Am yaqooloona taqawwalahu bal la yuminoona

verses.ar: فَلۡيَأۡتُواْ بِحَدِيثٖ مِّثۡلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُواْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful
verses.tl: Falyatoo bihadeethin mithlihi in kanoo sadiqeena

verses.ar: أَمۡ خُلِقُواْ مِنۡ غَيۡرِ شَيۡءٍ أَمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡخَٰلِقُونَ
verses.tr: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]
verses.tl: Am khuliqoo min ghayri shayin am humu alkhaliqoona

verses.ar: أَمۡ خَلَقُواْ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.tr: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain
verses.tl: Am khalaqoo alssamawati waalarda bal la yooqinoona

verses.ar: أَمۡ عِندَهُمۡ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡمُصَۜيۡطِرُونَ
verses.tr: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]
verses.tl: Am AAindahum khazainu rabbika am humu almusaytiroona

verses.ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ سُلَّمٞ يَسۡتَمِعُونَ فِيهِۖ فَلۡيَأۡتِ مُسۡتَمِعُهُم بِسُلۡطَٰنٖ مُّبِينٍ
verses.tr: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority
verses.tl: Am lahum sullamun yastamiAAoona feehi falyati mustamiAAuhum bisultanin mubeenin

verses.ar: أَمۡ لَهُ ٱلۡبَنَٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلۡبَنُونَ
verses.tr: Or has He daughters while you have sons
verses.tl: Am lahu albanatu walakumu albanoona

verses.ar: أَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ أَجۡرٗا فَهُم مِّن مَّغۡرَمٖ مُّثۡقَلُونَ
verses.tr: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down
verses.tl: Am tasaluhum ajran fahum min maghramin muthqaloona

verses.ar: أَمۡ عِندَهُمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبُ فَهُمۡ يَكۡتُبُونَ
verses.tr: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down
verses.tl: Am AAindahumu alghaybu fahum yaktuboona

verses.ar: أَمۡ يُرِيدُونَ كَيۡدٗاۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡمَكِيدُونَ
verses.tr: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan
verses.tl: Am yureedoona kaydan faallatheena kafaroo humu almakeedoona

verses.ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ إِلَٰهٌ غَيۡرُ ٱللَّهِۚ سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
verses.tr: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him
verses.tl: Am lahum ilahun ghayru Allahi subhana Allahi AAamma yushrikoona

verses.ar: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطٗا يَقُولُواْ سَحَابٞ مَّرۡكُومٞ
verses.tr: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up
verses.tl: Wain yaraw kisfan mina alssamai saqitan yaqooloo sahabun markoomun

verses.ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي فِيهِ يُصۡعَقُونَ
verses.tr: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible
verses.tl: Fatharhum hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee feehi yusAAaqoona

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُمۡ كَيۡدُهُمۡ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.tr: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped
verses.tl: Yawma la yughnee AAanhum kayduhum shayan wala hum yunsaroona

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ عَذَابٗا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know
verses.tl: Wainna lillatheena thalamoo AAathaban doona thalika walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَاۖ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.tr: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise
verses.tl: Waisbir lihukmi rabbika fainnaka biaAAyunina wasabbih bihamdi rabbika heena taqoomu

verses.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَإِدۡبَٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.tr: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars
verses.tl: Wamina allayli fasabbihhu waidbara alnnujoomi

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّجۡمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ
verses.tr: By the star when it descends
verses.tl: Waalnnajmi itha hawa

verses.ar: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمۡ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
verses.tr: Your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred
verses.tl: Ma dalla sahibukum wama ghawa

verses.ar: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلۡهَوَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination
verses.tl: Wama yantiqu AAani alhawa

verses.ar: إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحۡيٞ يُوحَىٰ
verses.tr: It is not but a revelation revealed
verses.tl: In huwa illa wahyun yooha

verses.ar: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلۡقُوَىٰ
verses.tr: Taught to him by one intense in strength
verses.tl: AAallamahu shadeedu alquwa

verses.ar: ذُو مِرَّةٖ فَٱسۡتَوَىٰ
verses.tr: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form
verses.tl: Thoo mirratin faistawa

verses.ar: وَهُوَ بِٱلۡأُفُقِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: While he was in the higher [part of the] horizon
verses.tl: Wahuwa bialofuqi alaAAla

verses.ar: ثُمَّ دَنَا فَتَدَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: Then he approached and descended
verses.tl: Thumma dana fatadalla

verses.ar: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوۡسَيۡنِ أَوۡ أَدۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer
verses.tl: Fakana qaba qawsayni aw adna

verses.ar: فَأَوۡحَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦ مَآ أَوۡحَىٰ
verses.tr: And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed
verses.tl: Faawha ila AAabdihi ma awha

verses.ar: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلۡفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ
verses.tr: The heart did not lie [about] what it saw
verses.tl: Ma kathaba alfuadu ma raa

verses.ar: أَفَتُمَٰرُونَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَا يَرَىٰ
verses.tr: So will you dispute with him over what he saw
verses.tl: Afatumaroonahu AAala ma yara

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ رَءَاهُ نَزۡلَةً أُخۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: And he certainly saw him in another descent
verses.tl: Walaqad raahu nazlatan okhra

verses.ar: عِندَ سِدۡرَةِ ٱلۡمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.tr: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary
verses.tl: AAinda sidrati almuntaha

verses.ar: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلۡمَأۡوَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Near it is the Garden of Refuge
verses.tl: AAindaha jannatu almawa

verses.ar: إِذۡ يَغۡشَى ٱلسِّدۡرَةَ مَا يَغۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it]
verses.tl: Ith yaghsha alssidrata ma yaghsha

verses.ar: مَا زَاغَ ٱلۡبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ
verses.tr: The sight [of the Prophet] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit]
verses.tl: Ma zagha albasaru wama tagha

verses.ar: لَقَدۡ رَأَىٰ مِنۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰٓ
verses.tr: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord
verses.tl: Laqad raa min ayati rabbihi alkubra

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتُمُ ٱللَّـٰتَ وَٱلۡعُزَّىٰ
verses.tr: So have you considered al-Lat and al-'Uzza
verses.tl: Afaraaytumu allata waalAAuzza

verses.ar: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And Manat, the third - the other one
verses.tl: Wamanata alththalithata alokhra

verses.ar: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلۡأُنثَىٰ
verses.tr: Is the male for you and for Him the female
verses.tl: Alakumu alththakaru walahu alontha

verses.ar: تِلۡكَ إِذٗا قِسۡمَةٞ ضِيزَىٰٓ
verses.tr: That, then, is an unjust division
verses.tl: Tilka ithan qismatun deeza

verses.ar: إِنۡ هِيَ إِلَّآ أَسۡمَآءٞ سَمَّيۡتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمۡ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلۡطَٰنٍۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهۡوَى ٱلۡأَنفُسُۖ وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ
verses.tr: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allah has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance
verses.tl: In hiya illa asmaon sammaytumooha antum waabaokum ma anzala Allahu biha min sultanin in yattabiAAoona illa alththanna wama tahwa alanfusu walaqad jaahum min rabbihimu alhuda

verses.ar: أَمۡ لِلۡإِنسَٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ
verses.tr: Or is there for man whatever he wishes
verses.tl: Am lilinsani ma tamanna

verses.ar: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ وَٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: Rather, to Allah belongs the Hereafter and the first [life]
verses.tl: Falillahi alakhiratu waaloola

verses.ar: ۞وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٖ فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغۡنِي شَفَٰعَتُهُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعۡدِ أَن يَأۡذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرۡضَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allah has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves
verses.tl: Wakam min malakin fee alssamawati la tughnee shafaAAatuhum shayan illa min baAAdi an yathana Allahu liman yashao wayarda

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسۡمِيَةَ ٱلۡأُنثَىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names
verses.tl: Inna allatheena la yuminoona bialakhirati layusammoona almalaikata tasmiyata alontha

verses.ar: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنۡ عِلۡمٍۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغۡنِي مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ شَيۡـٔٗا
verses.tr: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all
verses.tl: Wama lahum bihi min AAilmin in yattabiAAoona illa alththanna wainna alththanna la yughnee mina alhaqqi shayan

verses.ar: فَأَعۡرِضۡ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكۡرِنَا وَلَمۡ يُرِدۡ إِلَّا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا
verses.tr: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life
verses.tl: FaaAArid AAan man tawalla AAan thikrina walam yurid illa alhayata alddunya

verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ مَبۡلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡعِلۡمِۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهۡتَدَىٰ
verses.tr: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided
verses.tl: Thalika mablaghuhum mina alAAilmi inna rabbaka huwa aAAlamu biman dalla AAan sabeelihi wahuwa aAAlamu bimani ihtada

verses.ar: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ لِيَجۡزِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَـٰٓـُٔواْ بِمَا عَمِلُواْ وَيَجۡزِيَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحۡسَنُواْ بِٱلۡحُسۡنَى
verses.tr: And to Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward]
verses.tl: Walillahi ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi liyajziya allatheena asaoo bima AAamiloo wayajziya allatheena ahsanoo bialhusna

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجۡتَنِبُونَ كَبَـٰٓئِرَ ٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلۡمَغۡفِرَةِۚ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِكُمۡ إِذۡ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِذۡ أَنتُمۡ أَجِنَّةٞ فِي بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمۡۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓاْ أَنفُسَكُمۡۖ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him
verses.tl: Allatheena yajtaniboona kabaira alithmi waalfawahisha illa allamama inna rabbaka wasiAAu almaghfirati huwa aAAlamu bikum ith anshaakum mina alardi waith antum ajinnatun fee butooni ommahatikum fala tuzakkoo anfusakum huwa aAAlamu bimani ittaqa

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِي تَوَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: Have you seen the one who turned away
verses.tl: Afaraayta allathee tawalla

verses.ar: وَأَعۡطَىٰ قَلِيلٗا وَأَكۡدَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And gave a little and [then] refrained
verses.tl: WaaAAta qaleelan waakda

verses.ar: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees
verses.tl: aAAindahu AAilmu alghaybi fahuwa yara

verses.ar: أَمۡ لَمۡ يُنَبَّأۡ بِمَا فِي صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses
verses.tl: Am lam yunabba bima fee suhufi moosa

verses.ar: وَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِي وَفَّىٰٓ
verses.tr: And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations]
verses.tl: Waibraheema allathee waffa

verses.ar: أَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٞ وِزۡرَ أُخۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another
verses.tl: Alla taziru waziratun wizra okhra

verses.ar: وَأَن لَّيۡسَ لِلۡإِنسَٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.tr: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives
verses.tl: Waan laysa lilinsani illa ma saAAa

verses.ar: وَأَنَّ سَعۡيَهُۥ سَوۡفَ يُرَىٰ
verses.tr: And that his effort is going to be seen
verses.tl: Waanna saAAyahu sawfa yura

verses.ar: ثُمَّ يُجۡزَىٰهُ ٱلۡجَزَآءَ ٱلۡأَوۡفَىٰ
verses.tr: Then he will be recompensed for it with the fullest recompense
verses.tl: Thumma yujzahu aljazaa alawfa

verses.ar: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡمُنتَهَىٰ
