verses.tr: And that to your Lord is the finality
verses.tl: Waanna ila rabbika almuntaha

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضۡحَكَ وَأَبۡكَىٰ
verses.tr: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep
verses.tl: Waannahu huwa adhaka waabka

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحۡيَا
verses.tr: And that it is He who causes death and gives life
verses.tl: Waannahu huwa amata waahya

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوۡجَيۡنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلۡأُنثَىٰ
verses.tr: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female
verses.tl: Waannahu khalaqa alzzawjayni alththakara waalontha

verses.ar: مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ إِذَا تُمۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted
verses.tl: Min nutfatin itha tumna

verses.ar: وَأَنَّ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُخۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation
verses.tl: Waanna AAalayhi alnnashata alokhra

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغۡنَىٰ وَأَقۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: And that it is He who enriches and suffices
verses.tl: Waannahu huwa aghna waaqna

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius
verses.tl: Waannahu huwa rabbu alshshiAAra

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥٓ أَهۡلَكَ عَادًا ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: And that He destroyed the first [people of] 'Aad
verses.tl: Waannahu ahlaka AAadan aloola

verses.ar: وَثَمُودَاْ فَمَآ أَبۡقَىٰ
verses.tr: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them]
verses.tl: Wathamooda fama abqa

verses.ar: وَقَوۡمَ نُوحٖ مِّن قَبۡلُۖ إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ هُمۡ أَظۡلَمَ وَأَطۡغَىٰ
verses.tr: And the people of Noah before. Indeed, it was they who were [even] more unjust and oppressing
verses.tl: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanoo hum athlama waatgha

verses.ar: وَٱلۡمُؤۡتَفِكَةَ أَهۡوَىٰ
verses.tr: And the overturned towns He hurled down
verses.tl: Waalmutafikata ahwa

verses.ar: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ
verses.tr: And covered them by that which He covered
verses.tl: Faghashshaha ma ghashsha

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ
verses.tr: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbika tatamara

verses.ar: هَٰذَا نَذِيرٞ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰٓ
verses.tr: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners
verses.tl: Hatha natheerun mina alnnuthuri aloola

verses.ar: أَزِفَتِ ٱلۡأٓزِفَةُ
verses.tr: The Approaching Day has approached
verses.tl: Azifati alazifatu

verses.ar: لَيۡسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.tr: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover
verses.tl: Laysa laha min dooni Allahi kashifatun

verses.ar: أَفَمِنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلۡحَدِيثِ تَعۡجَبُونَ
verses.tr: Then at this statement do you wonder
verses.tl: Afamin hatha alhadeethi taAAjaboona

verses.ar: وَتَضۡحَكُونَ وَلَا تَبۡكُونَ
verses.tr: And you laugh and do not weep
verses.tl: Watadhakoona wala tabkoona

verses.ar: وَأَنتُمۡ سَٰمِدُونَ
verses.tr: While you are proudly sporting
verses.tl: Waantum samidoona

verses.ar: فَٱسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلَّهِۤ وَٱعۡبُدُواْ۩
verses.tr: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him]
verses.tl: Faosjudoo lillahi waoAAbudoo

verses.ar: ٱقۡتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلۡقَمَرُ
verses.tr: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two]
verses.tl: Iqtarabati alssaAAatu wainshaqqa alqamaru

verses.ar: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ ءَايَةٗ يُعۡرِضُواْ وَيَقُولُواْ سِحۡرٞ مُّسۡتَمِرّٞ
verses.tr: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic
verses.tl: Wain yaraw ayatan yuAAridoo wayaqooloo sihrun mustamirrun

verses.ar: وَكَذَّبُواْ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓاْ أَهۡوَآءَهُمۡۚ وَكُلُّ أَمۡرٖ مُّسۡتَقِرّٞ
verses.tr: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement
verses.tl: Wakaththaboo waittabaAAoo ahwaahum wakullu amrin mustaqirrun

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزۡدَجَرٌ
verses.tr: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence
verses.tl: Walaqad jaahum mina alanbai ma feehi muzdajarun

verses.ar: حِكۡمَةُۢ بَٰلِغَةٞۖ فَمَا تُغۡنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.tr: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them]
verses.tl: Hikmatun balighatun fama tughnee alnnuthuru

verses.ar: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡۘ يَوۡمَ يَدۡعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَيۡءٖ نُّكُرٍ
verses.tr: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding
verses.tl: Fatawalla AAanhum yawma yadAAu alddaAAi ila shayin nukurin

verses.ar: خُشَّعًا أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمۡ جَرَادٞ مُّنتَشِرٞ
verses.tr: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading
verses.tl: KhushshaAAan absaruhum yakhrujoona mina alajdathi kaannahum jaradun muntashirun

verses.ar: مُّهۡطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِۖ يَقُولُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوۡمٌ عَسِرٞ
verses.tr: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day
verses.tl: MuhtiAAeena ila alddaAAi yaqoolu alkafiroona hatha yawmun AAasirun

verses.ar: ۞كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٖ فَكَذَّبُواْ عَبۡدَنَا وَقَالُواْ مَجۡنُونٞ وَٱزۡدُجِرَ
verses.tr: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled
verses.tl: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin fakaththaboo AAabdana waqaloo majnoonun waizdujira

verses.ar: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّي مَغۡلُوبٞ فَٱنتَصِرۡ
verses.tr: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help
verses.tl: FadaAAa rabbahu annee maghloobun faintasir

verses.ar: فَفَتَحۡنَآ أَبۡوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٖ مُّنۡهَمِرٖ
verses.tr: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
verses.tl: Fafatahna abwaba alssamai bimain munhamirin

verses.ar: وَفَجَّرۡنَا ٱلۡأَرۡضَ عُيُونٗا فَٱلۡتَقَى ٱلۡمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمۡرٖ قَدۡ قُدِرَ
verses.tr: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined
verses.tl: Wafajjarna alarda AAuyoonan failtaqa almao AAala amrin qad qudira

verses.ar: وَحَمَلۡنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلۡوَٰحٖ وَدُسُرٖ
verses.tr: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails
verses.tl: Wahamalnahu AAala thati alwahin wadusurin

verses.ar: تَجۡرِي بِأَعۡيُنِنَا جَزَآءٗ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.tr: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied
verses.tl: Tajree biaAAyunina jazaan liman kana kufira

verses.ar: وَلَقَد تَّرَكۡنَٰهَآ ءَايَةٗ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
verses.tr: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember
verses.tl: Walaqad taraknaha ayatan fahal min muddakirin

verses.ar: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.tr: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning
verses.tl: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
verses.tr: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember
verses.tl: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادٞ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.tr: Aad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning
verses.tl: Kaththabat AAadun fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيحٗا صَرۡصَرٗا فِي يَوۡمِ نَحۡسٖ مُّسۡتَمِرّٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune
verses.tl: Inna arsalna AAalayhim reehan sarsaran fee yawmi nahsin mustamirrin

verses.ar: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمۡ أَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٖ مُّنقَعِرٖ
verses.tr: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted
verses.tl: TanziAAu alnnasa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin munqaAAirin

verses.ar: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.tr: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning
verses.tl: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
verses.tr: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember
verses.tl: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.tr: Thamud denied the warning
verses.tl: Kaththabat thamoodu bialnnuthuri

verses.ar: فَقَالُوٓاْ أَبَشَرٗا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدٗا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذٗا لَّفِي ضَلَٰلٖ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.tr: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness
verses.tl: Faqaloo abasharan minna wahidan nattabiAAuhu inna ithan lafee dalalin wasuAAurin

verses.ar: أَءُلۡقِيَ ٱلذِّكۡرُ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۢ بَيۡنِنَا بَلۡ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٞ
verses.tr: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar
verses.tl: Aolqiya alththikru AAalayhi min baynina bal huwa kaththabun ashirun

verses.ar: سَيَعۡلَمُونَ غَدٗا مَّنِ ٱلۡكَذَّابُ ٱلۡأَشِرُ
verses.tr: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar
verses.tl: SayaAAlamoona ghadan mani alkaththabu alashiru

verses.ar: إِنَّا مُرۡسِلُواْ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتۡنَةٗ لَّهُمۡ فَٱرۡتَقِبۡهُمۡ وَٱصۡطَبِرۡ
verses.tr: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient
verses.tl: Inna mursiloo alnnaqati fitnatan lahum fairtaqibhum waistabir

verses.ar: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ أَنَّ ٱلۡمَآءَ قِسۡمَةُۢ بَيۡنَهُمۡۖ كُلُّ شِرۡبٖ مُّحۡتَضَرٞ
verses.tr: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn]
verses.tl: Wanabbihum anna almaa qismatun baynahum kullu shirbin muhtadarun

verses.ar: فَنَادَوۡاْ صَاحِبَهُمۡ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.tr: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her]
verses.tl: Fanadaw sahibahum fataAAata faAAaqara

verses.ar: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.tr: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning
verses.tl: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ صَيۡحَةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ فَكَانُواْ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلۡمُحۡتَظِرِ
verses.tr: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen
verses.tl: Inna arsalna AAalayhim sayhatan wahidatan fakanoo kahasheemi almuhtathiri

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
verses.tr: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember
verses.tl: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ لُوطِۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.tr: The people of Lot denied the warning
verses.tl: Kaththabat qawmu lootin bialnnuthuri

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٖۖ نَّجَّيۡنَٰهُم بِسَحَرٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn
verses.tl: Inna arsalna AAalayhim hasiban illa ala lootin najjaynahum bisaharin

verses.ar: نِّعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِنَاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي مَن شَكَرَ
verses.tr: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful
verses.tl: NiAAmatan min AAindina kathalika najzee man shakara

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَنذَرَهُم بَطۡشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوۡاْ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.tr: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning
verses.tl: Walaqad antharahum batshatana fatamaraw bialnnuthuri

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيۡفِهِۦ فَطَمَسۡنَآ أَعۡيُنَهُمۡ فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.tr: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning
verses.tl: Walaqad rawadoohu AAan dayfihi fatamasna aAAyunahum fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ صَبَّحَهُم بُكۡرَةً عَذَابٞ مُّسۡتَقِرّٞ
verses.tr: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment
verses.tl: Walaqad sabbahahum bukratan AAathabun mustaqirrun

verses.ar: فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِي وَنُذُرِ
verses.tr: So taste My punishment and warning
verses.tl: Fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
verses.tr: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember
verses.tl: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.tr: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning
verses.tl: Walaqad jaa ala firAAawna alnnuthuru

verses.ar: كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ أَخۡذَ عَزِيزٖ مُّقۡتَدِرٍ
verses.tr: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability
verses.tl: Kaththaboo biayatina kulliha faakhathnahum akhtha AAazeezin muqtadirin

verses.ar: أَكُفَّارُكُمۡ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكُمۡ أَمۡ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٞ فِي ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.tr: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture
verses.tl: Akuffarukum khayrun min olaikum am lakum baraatun fee alzzuburi

verses.ar: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ نَحۡنُ جَمِيعٞ مُّنتَصِرٞ
verses.tr: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]
verses.tl: Am yaqooloona nahnu jameeAAun muntasirun

verses.ar: سَيُهۡزَمُ ٱلۡجَمۡعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.tr: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat]
verses.tl: Sayuhzamu aljamAAu wayuwalloona alddubura

verses.ar: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوۡعِدُهُمۡ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدۡهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
verses.tr: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter
verses.tl: Bali alssaAAatu mawAAiduhum waalssaAAatu adha waamarru

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ فِي ضَلَٰلٖ وَسُعُرٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness
verses.tl: Inna almujrimeena fee dalalin wasuAAurin

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يُسۡحَبُونَ فِي ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمۡ ذُوقُواْ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.tr: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar
verses.tl: Yawma yushaboona fee alnnari AAala wujoohihim thooqoo massa saqara

verses.ar: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقۡنَٰهُ بِقَدَرٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, all things We created with predestination
verses.tl: Inna kulla shayin khalaqnahu biqadarin

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَمۡرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٞ كَلَمۡحِۭ بِٱلۡبَصَرِ
verses.tr: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye
verses.tl: Wama amruna illa wahidatun kalamhin bialbasari

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَآ أَشۡيَاعَكُمۡ فَهَلۡ مِن مُّدَّكِرٖ
verses.tr: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember
verses.tl: Walaqad ahlakna ashyaAAakum fahal min muddakirin

verses.ar: وَكُلُّ شَيۡءٖ فَعَلُوهُ فِي ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.tr: And everything they did is in written records
verses.tl: Wakullu shayin faAAaloohu fee alzzuburi

verses.ar: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٖ وَكَبِيرٖ مُّسۡتَطَرٌ
verses.tr: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed
verses.tl: Wakullu sagheerin wakabeerin mustatarun

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ وَنَهَرٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers
verses.tl: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin wanaharin

verses.ar: فِي مَقۡعَدِ صِدۡقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٖ مُّقۡتَدِرِۭ
verses.tr: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability
verses.tl: Fee maqAAadi sidqin AAinda maleekin muqtadirin

verses.ar: ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ
verses.tr: The Most Merciful
verses.tl: Alrrahmanu

verses.ar: عَلَّمَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ
verses.tr: Taught the Qur'an
verses.tl: AAallama alqurana

verses.ar: خَلَقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ
verses.tr: Created man
verses.tl: Khalaqa alinsana

verses.ar: عَلَّمَهُ ٱلۡبَيَانَ
verses.tr: [And] taught him eloquence
verses.tl: AAallamahu albayana

verses.ar: ٱلشَّمۡسُ وَٱلۡقَمَرُ بِحُسۡبَانٖ
verses.tr: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation
verses.tl: Alshshamsu waalqamaru bihusbanin

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّجۡمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسۡجُدَانِ
verses.tr: And the stars and trees prostrate
verses.tl: Waalnnajmu waalshshajaru yasjudani

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلۡمِيزَانَ
verses.tr: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance
verses.tl: Waalssamaa rafaAAaha wawadaAAa almeezana

verses.ar: أَلَّا تَطۡغَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡمِيزَانِ
verses.tr: That you not transgress within the balance
verses.tl: Alla tatghaw fee almeezani

verses.ar: وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلۡوَزۡنَ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِ وَلَا تُخۡسِرُواْ ٱلۡمِيزَانَ
verses.tr: And establish weight in justice and do not make deficient the balance
verses.tl: Waaqeemoo alwazna bialqisti wala tukhsiroo almeezana

verses.ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلۡأَنَامِ
verses.tr: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures
verses.tl: Waalarda wadaAAaha lilanami

verses.ar: فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةٞ وَٱلنَّخۡلُ ذَاتُ ٱلۡأَكۡمَامِ
verses.tr: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
verses.tl: Feeha fakihatun waalnnakhlu thatu alakmami

verses.ar: وَٱلۡحَبُّ ذُو ٱلۡعَصۡفِ وَٱلرَّيۡحَانُ
verses.tr: And grain having husks and scented plants
verses.tl: Waalhabbu thoo alAAasfi waalrrayhani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: خَلَقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلۡصَٰلٖ كَٱلۡفَخَّارِ
verses.tr: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery
verses.tl: Khalaqa alinsana min salsalin kaalfakhkhari

verses.ar: وَخَلَقَ ٱلۡجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٖ مِّن نَّارٖ
verses.tr: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire
verses.tl: Wakhalaqa aljanna min marijin min narin

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: رَبُّ ٱلۡمَشۡرِقَيۡنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلۡمَغۡرِبَيۡنِ
verses.tr: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets
verses.tl: Rabbu almashriqayni warabbu almaghribayni

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: مَرَجَ ٱلۡبَحۡرَيۡنِ يَلۡتَقِيَانِ
verses.tr: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side]
verses.tl: Maraja albahrayni yaltaqiyani

verses.ar: بَيۡنَهُمَا بَرۡزَخٞ لَّا يَبۡغِيَانِ
verses.tr: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses
verses.tl: Baynahuma barzakhun la yabghiyani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهُمَا ٱللُّؤۡلُؤُ وَٱلۡمَرۡجَانُ
verses.tr: From both of them emerge pearl and coral
verses.tl: Yakhruju minhuma alluluo waalmarjanu

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: وَلَهُ ٱلۡجَوَارِ ٱلۡمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِي ٱلۡبَحۡرِ كَٱلۡأَعۡلَٰمِ
verses.tr: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains
verses.tl: Walahu aljawari almunshaatu fee albahri kaalaAAlami

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: كُلُّ مَنۡ عَلَيۡهَا فَانٖ
verses.tr: Everyone upon the earth will perish
verses.tl: Kullu man AAalayha fanin

verses.ar: وَيَبۡقَىٰ وَجۡهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ
verses.tr: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor
verses.tl: Wayabqa wajhu rabbika thoo aljalali waalikrami

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: يَسۡـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ كُلَّ يَوۡمٍ هُوَ فِي شَأۡنٖ
verses.tr: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter
verses.tl: Yasaluhu man fee alssamawati waalardi kulla yawmin huwa fee shanin

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: سَنَفۡرُغُ لَكُمۡ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ
verses.tr: We will attend to you, O prominent beings
verses.tl: Sanafrughu lakum ayyuha alththaqalani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: يَٰمَعۡشَرَ ٱلۡجِنِّ وَٱلۡإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسۡتَطَعۡتُمۡ أَن تَنفُذُواْ مِنۡ أَقۡطَارِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَٱنفُذُواْۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلۡطَٰنٖ
verses.tr: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah]
verses.tl: Ya maAAshara aljinni waalinsi ini istataAAtum an tanfuthoo min aqtari alssamawati waalardi faonfuthoo la tanfuthoona illa bisultanin

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: يُرۡسَلُ عَلَيۡكُمَا شُوَاظٞ مِّن نَّارٖ وَنُحَاسٞ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
verses.tr: There will be sent upon you a flame of fire and smoke, and you will not defend yourselves
verses.tl: Yursalu AAalaykuma shuwathun min narin wanuhasun fala tantasirani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ وَرۡدَةٗ كَٱلدِّهَانِ
verses.tr: And when the heaven is split open and becomes rose-colored like oil
verses.tl: Faitha inshaqqati alssamao fakanat wardatan kaalddihani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فَيَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّا يُسۡـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٞ وَلَا جَآنّٞ
verses.tr: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn
verses.tl: Fayawmaithin la yusalu AAan thanbihi insun wala jannun

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: يُعۡرَفُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ بِسِيمَٰهُمۡ فَيُؤۡخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِي وَٱلۡأَقۡدَامِ
verses.tr: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet
verses.tl: YuAArafu almujrimoona biseemahum fayukhathu bialnnawasee waalaqdami

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِي يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُونَ
verses.tr: This is Hell, which the criminals deny
verses.tl: Hathihi jahannamu allatee yukaththibu biha almujrimoona

verses.ar: يَطُوفُونَ بَيۡنَهَا وَبَيۡنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٖ
verses.tr: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree]
verses.tl: Yatoofoona baynaha wabayna hameemin anin

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: وَلِمَنۡ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ
verses.tr: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens
verses.tl: Waliman khafa maqama rabbihi jannatani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: ذَوَاتَآ أَفۡنَانٖ
verses.tr: Having [spreading] branches
verses.tl: Thawata afnanin

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فِيهِمَا عَيۡنَانِ تَجۡرِيَانِ
verses.tr: In both of them are two springs, flowing
verses.tl: Feehima AAaynani tajriyani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَٰكِهَةٖ زَوۡجَانِ
verses.tr: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds
verses.tl: Feehima min kulli fakihatin zawjani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشِۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنۡ إِسۡتَبۡرَقٖۚ وَجَنَى ٱلۡجَنَّتَيۡنِ دَانٖ
verses.tr: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low
verses.tl: Muttakieena AAala furushin batainuha min istabraqin wajana aljannatayni danin

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فِيهِنَّ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرۡفِ لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ إِنسٞ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنّٞ
verses.tr: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni
verses.tl: Feehinna qasiratu alttarfi lam yatmithhunna insun qablahum wala jannun

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلۡيَاقُوتُ وَٱلۡمَرۡجَانُ
verses.tr: As if they were rubies and coral
verses.tl: Kaannahunna alyaqootu waalmarjanu

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: هَلۡ جَزَآءُ ٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنُ
verses.tr: Is the reward for good [anything] but good
verses.tl: Hal jazao alihsani illa alihsanu

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ
verses.tr: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens
verses.tl: Wamin doonihima jannatani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: مُدۡهَآمَّتَانِ
verses.tr: Dark green [in color]
verses.tl: Mudhammatani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فِيهِمَا عَيۡنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ
verses.tr: In both of them are two springs, spouting
verses.tl: Feehima AAaynani naddakhatani

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فِيهِمَا فَٰكِهَةٞ وَنَخۡلٞ وَرُمَّانٞ
verses.tr: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates
verses.tl: Feehima fakihatun wanakhlun warummanun

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: فِيهِنَّ خَيۡرَٰتٌ حِسَانٞ
verses.tr: In them are good and beautiful women
verses.tl: Feehinna khayratun hisanun

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: حُورٞ مَّقۡصُورَٰتٞ فِي ٱلۡخِيَامِ
verses.tr: Fair ones reserved in pavilions
verses.tl: Hoorun maqsooratun fee alkhiyami

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: لَمۡ يَطۡمِثۡهُنَّ إِنسٞ قَبۡلَهُمۡ وَلَا جَآنّٞ
verses.tr: Untouched before them by man or jinni
verses.tl: Lam yatmithhunna insun qablahum wala jannun

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفۡرَفٍ خُضۡرٖ وَعَبۡقَرِيٍّ حِسَانٖ
verses.tr: Reclining on green cushions and beautiful fine carpets
verses.tl: Muttakieena AAala rafrafin khudrin waAAabqariyyin hisanin

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.tr: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny
verses.tl: Fabiayyi alai rabbikuma tukaththibani

verses.ar: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱسۡمُ رَبِّكَ ذِي ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ
verses.tr: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor
verses.tl: Tabaraka ismu rabbika thee aljalali waalikrami

verses.ar: إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلۡوَاقِعَةُ
verses.tr: When the Occurrence occurs
verses.tl: Itha waqaAAati alwaqiAAatu

verses.ar: لَيۡسَ لِوَقۡعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ
verses.tr: There is, at its occurrence, no denial
verses.tl: Laysa liwaqAAatiha kathibatun

verses.ar: خَافِضَةٞ رَّافِعَةٌ
verses.tr: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others]
verses.tl: Khafidatun rafiAAatun

verses.ar: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ رَجّٗا
verses.tr: When the earth is shaken with convulsion
verses.tl: Itha rujjati alardu rajjan

verses.ar: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلۡجِبَالُ بَسّٗا
verses.tr: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling
verses.tl: Wabussati aljibalu bassan

verses.ar: فَكَانَتۡ هَبَآءٗ مُّنۢبَثّٗا
verses.tr: And become dust dispersing
verses.tl: Fakanat habaan munbaththan

verses.ar: وَكُنتُمۡ أَزۡوَٰجٗا ثَلَٰثَةٗ
verses.tr: And you become [of] three kinds
verses.tl: Wakuntum azwajan thalathatan

verses.ar: فَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَيۡمَنَةِ مَآ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَيۡمَنَةِ
verses.tr: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right
verses.tl: Faashabu almaymanati ma ashabu almaymanati

verses.ar: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِ مَآ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِ
verses.tr: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left
verses.tl: Waashabu almashamati ma ashabu almashamati

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ
verses.tr: And the forerunners, the forerunners
verses.tl: Waalssabiqoona alssabiqoona

verses.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلۡمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.tr: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]
verses.tl: Olaika almuqarraboona

verses.ar: فِي جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.tr: In the Gardens of Pleasure
verses.tl: Fee jannati alnnaAAeemi

verses.ar: ثُلَّةٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: A [large] company of the former peoples
verses.tl: Thullatun mina alawwaleena

verses.ar: وَقَلِيلٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And a few of the later peoples
verses.tl: Waqaleelun mina alakhireena

verses.ar: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٖ مَّوۡضُونَةٖ
verses.tr: On thrones woven [with ornament]
verses.tl: AAala sururin mawdoonatin

verses.ar: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيۡهَا مُتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.tr: Reclining on them, facing each other
verses.tl: Muttakieena AAalayha mutaqabileena

verses.ar: يَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَٰنٞ مُّخَلَّدُونَ
verses.tr: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal
verses.tl: Yatoofu AAalayhim wildanun mukhalladoona

verses.ar: بِأَكۡوَابٖ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأۡسٖ مِّن مَّعِينٖ
verses.tr: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring
verses.tl: Biakwabin waabareeqa wakasin min maAAeenin

verses.ar: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنۡهَا وَلَا يُنزِفُونَ
verses.tr: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated
verses.tl: La yusaddaAAoona AAanha wala yunzifoona

verses.ar: وَفَٰكِهَةٖ مِّمَّا يَتَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.tr: And fruit of what they select
verses.tl: Wafakihatin mimma yatakhayyaroona

verses.ar: وَلَحۡمِ طَيۡرٖ مِّمَّا يَشۡتَهُونَ
verses.tr: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire
verses.tl: Walahmi tayrin mimma yashtahoona

verses.ar: وَحُورٌ عِينٞ
verses.tr: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes
verses.tl: Wahoorun AAeenun

verses.ar: كَأَمۡثَٰلِ ٱللُّؤۡلُوِٕ ٱلۡمَكۡنُونِ
verses.tr: The likenesses of pearls well-protected
verses.tl: Kaamthali allului almaknooni

verses.ar: جَزَآءَۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: As reward for what they used to do
verses.tl: Jazaan bima kanoo yaAAmaloona

verses.ar: لَا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوٗا وَلَا تَأۡثِيمًا
verses.tr: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin
verses.tl: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan wala tatheeman

verses.ar: إِلَّا قِيلٗا سَلَٰمٗا سَلَٰمٗا
verses.tr: Only a saying: "Peace, peace
verses.tl: Illa qeelan salaman salaman

verses.ar: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡيَمِينِ مَآ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right
verses.tl: Waashabu alyameeni ma ashabu alyameeni

verses.ar: فِي سِدۡرٖ مَّخۡضُودٖ
verses.tr: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed
verses.tl: Fee sidrin makhdoodin

verses.ar: وَطَلۡحٖ مَّنضُودٖ
verses.tr: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]
verses.tl: Watalhin mandoodin

verses.ar: وَظِلّٖ مَّمۡدُودٖ
verses.tr: And shade extended
verses.tl: Wathillin mamdoodin

verses.ar: وَمَآءٖ مَّسۡكُوبٖ
verses.tr: And water poured out
verses.tl: Wamain maskoobin

verses.ar: وَفَٰكِهَةٖ كَثِيرَةٖ
verses.tr: And fruit, abundant [and varied]
verses.tl: Wafakihatin katheeratin

verses.ar: لَّا مَقۡطُوعَةٖ وَلَا مَمۡنُوعَةٖ
verses.tr: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden
verses.tl: La maqtooAAatin wala mamnooAAatin

verses.ar: وَفُرُشٖ مَّرۡفُوعَةٍ
verses.tr: And [upon] beds raised high
verses.tl: Wafurushin marfooAAatin

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَنشَأۡنَٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءٗ
verses.tr: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation
verses.tl: Inna anshanahunna inshaan

verses.ar: فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُنَّ أَبۡكَارًا
verses.tr: And made them virgins
verses.tl: FajaAAalnahunna abkaran

verses.ar: عُرُبًا أَتۡرَابٗا
verses.tr: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age
verses.tl: AAuruban atraban

verses.ar: لِّأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: For the companions of the right [who are]
verses.tl: Liashabi alyameeni

verses.ar: ثُلَّةٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: A company of the former peoples
verses.tl: Thullatun mina alawwaleena

verses.ar: وَثُلَّةٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: And a company of the later peoples
verses.tl: Wathullatun mina alakhireena

verses.ar: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ مَآ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ
verses.tr: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left
verses.tl: Waashabu alshshimali ma ashabu alshshimali

verses.ar: فِي سَمُومٖ وَحَمِيمٖ
verses.tr: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
verses.tl: Fee samoomin wahameemin

verses.ar: وَظِلّٖ مِّن يَحۡمُومٖ
verses.tr: And a shade of black smoke
verses.tl: Wathillin min yahmoomin

verses.ar: لَّا بَارِدٖ وَلَا كَرِيمٍ
verses.tr: Neither cool nor beneficial
verses.tl: La baridin wala kareemin

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ قَبۡلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُتۡرَفِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence
verses.tl: Innahum kanoo qabla thalika mutrafeena

verses.ar: وَكَانُواْ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلۡحِنثِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: And they used to persist in the great violation
verses.tl: Wakanoo yusirroona AAala alhinthi alAAatheemi

verses.ar: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبۡعُوثُونَ
verses.tr: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected
verses.tl: Wakanoo yaqooloona aitha mitna wakunna turaban waAAithaman ainna lamabAAoothoona

verses.ar: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلۡأَوَّلُونَ
verses.tr: And our forefathers [as well]
verses.tl: Awa abaona alawwaloona

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنَّ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples
verses.tl: Qul inna alawwaleena waalakhireena

verses.ar: لَمَجۡمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَٰتِ يَوۡمٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ
verses.tr: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day
verses.tl: LamajmooAAoona ila meeqati yawmin maAAloomin

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمۡ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلۡمُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers
verses.tl: Thumma innakum ayyuha alddalloona almukaththiboona

verses.ar: لَأٓكِلُونَ مِن شَجَرٖ مِّن زَقُّومٖ
verses.tr: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum
verses.tl: Laakiloona min shajarin min zaqqoomin

verses.ar: فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنۡهَا ٱلۡبُطُونَ
verses.tr: And filling with it your bellies
verses.tl: Famalioona minha albutoona

verses.ar: فَشَٰرِبُونَ عَلَيۡهِ مِنَ ٱلۡحَمِيمِ
verses.tr: And drinking on top of it from scalding water
verses.tl: Fashariboona AAalayhi mina alhameemi

verses.ar: فَشَٰرِبُونَ شُرۡبَ ٱلۡهِيمِ
verses.tr: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels
verses.tl: Fashariboona shurba alheemi

verses.ar: هَٰذَا نُزُلُهُمۡ يَوۡمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Hatha nuzuluhum yawma alddeeni

verses.ar: نَحۡنُ خَلَقۡنَٰكُمۡ فَلَوۡلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ
verses.tr: We have created you, so why do you not believe
verses.tl: Nahnu khalaqnakum falawla tusaddiqoona

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتُم مَّا تُمۡنُونَ
verses.tr: Have you seen that which you emit
verses.tl: Afaraaytum ma tumnoona

verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمۡ تَخۡلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡخَٰلِقُونَ
verses.tr: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator
verses.tl: Aantum takhluqoonahu am nahnu alkhaliqoona

verses.ar: نَحۡنُ قَدَّرۡنَا بَيۡنَكُمُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ
verses.tr: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone
verses.tl: Nahnu qaddarna baynakumu almawta wama nahnu bimasbooqeena

verses.ar: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمۡثَٰلَكُمۡ وَنُنشِئَكُمۡ فِي مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know
verses.tl: AAala an nubaddila amthalakum wanunshiakum fee ma la taAAlamoona

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ عَلِمۡتُمُ ٱلنَّشۡأَةَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ فَلَوۡلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.tr: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember
verses.tl: Walaqad AAalimtumu alnnashata aloola falawla tathakkaroona

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتُم مَّا تَحۡرُثُونَ
verses.tr: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow
verses.tl: Afaraaytum ma tahruthoona

verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمۡ تَزۡرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلزَّـٰرِعُونَ
verses.tr: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower
verses.tl: Aantum tazraAAoonahu am nahnu alzzariAAoona

verses.ar: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ حُطَٰمٗا فَظَلۡتُمۡ تَفَكَّهُونَ
verses.tr: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder
verses.tl: Law nashao lajaAAalnahu hutaman fathaltum tafakkahoona

verses.ar: إِنَّا لَمُغۡرَمُونَ
verses.tr: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt
verses.tl: Inna lamughramoona

verses.ar: بَلۡ نَحۡنُ مَحۡرُومُونَ
verses.tr: Rather, we have been deprived
verses.tl: Bal nahnu mahroomoona

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتُمُ ٱلۡمَآءَ ٱلَّذِي تَشۡرَبُونَ
verses.tr: And have you seen the water that you drink
verses.tl: Afaraaytumu almaa allathee tashraboona

verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنزَلۡتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُزۡنِ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنزِلُونَ
verses.tr: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down
verses.tl: Aantum anzaltumoohu mina almuzni am nahnu almunziloona

verses.ar: لَوۡ نَشَآءُ جَعَلۡنَٰهُ أُجَاجٗا فَلَوۡلَا تَشۡكُرُونَ
verses.tr: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful
verses.tl: Law nashao jaAAalnahu ojajan falawla tashkuroona

verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِي تُورُونَ
verses.tr: And have you seen the fire that you ignite
verses.tl: Afaraaytumu alnnara allatee tooroona

verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَنشَأۡتُمۡ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمۡ نَحۡنُ ٱلۡمُنشِـُٔونَ
verses.tr: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer
verses.tl: Aantum anshatum shajarataha am nahnu almunshioona

verses.ar: نَحۡنُ جَعَلۡنَٰهَا تَذۡكِرَةٗ وَمَتَٰعٗا لِّلۡمُقۡوِينَ
verses.tr: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers
verses.tl: Nahnu jaAAalnaha tathkiratan wamataAAan lilmuqweena

verses.ar: فَسَبِّحۡ بِٱسۡمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great
verses.tl: Fasabbih biismi rabbika alAAatheemi

verses.ar: ۞فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِمَوَٰقِعِ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.tr: Then I swear by the setting of the stars
verses.tl: Fala oqsimu bimawaqiAAi alnnujoomi

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَقَسَمٞ لَّوۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ
verses.tr: And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great
verses.tl: Wainnahu laqasamun law taAAlamoona AAatheemun

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ لَقُرۡءَانٞ كَرِيمٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is a noble Qur'an
verses.tl: Innahu laquranun kareemun

verses.ar: فِي كِتَٰبٖ مَّكۡنُونٖ
verses.tr: In a Register well-protected
verses.tl: Fee kitabin maknoonin

verses.ar: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلۡمُطَهَّرُونَ
verses.tr: None touch it except the purified
verses.tl: La yamassuhu illa almutahharoona

verses.ar: تَنزِيلٞ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Tanzeelun min rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: أَفَبِهَٰذَا ٱلۡحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدۡهِنُونَ
verses.tr: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
verses.tl: Afabihatha alhadeethi antum mudhinoona

verses.ar: وَتَجۡعَلُونَ رِزۡقَكُمۡ أَنَّكُمۡ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]
verses.tl: WatajAAaloona rizqakum annakum tukaththiboona

verses.ar: فَلَوۡلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلۡحُلۡقُومَ
verses.tr: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat
verses.tl: Falawla itha balaghati alhulqooma

verses.ar: وَأَنتُمۡ حِينَئِذٖ تَنظُرُونَ
verses.tr: And you are at that time looking on
verses.tl: Waantum heenaithin tanthuroona

verses.ar: وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنكُمۡ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see
verses.tl: Wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi minkum walakin la tubsiroona

verses.ar: فَلَوۡلَآ إِن كُنتُمۡ غَيۡرَ مَدِينِينَ
verses.tr: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed
verses.tl: Falawla in kuntum ghayra madeeneena

verses.ar: تَرۡجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.tr: Bring it back, if you should be truthful
verses.tl: TarjiAAoonaha in kuntum sadiqeena

verses.ar: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.tr: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah
verses.tl: Faamma in kana mina almuqarrabeena

verses.ar: فَرَوۡحٞ وَرَيۡحَانٞ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٖ
verses.tr: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure
verses.tl: Farawhun warayhanun wajannatu naAAeemin

verses.ar: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: And if he was of the companions of the right
verses.tl: Waamma in kana min ashabi alyameeni

verses.ar: فَسَلَٰمٞ لَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right
verses.tl: Fasalamun laka min ashabi alyameeni

verses.ar: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.tr: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray
verses.tl: Waamma in kana mina almukaththibeena alddalleena

verses.ar: فَنُزُلٞ مِّنۡ حَمِيمٖ
verses.tr: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
verses.tl: Fanuzulun min hameemin

verses.ar: وَتَصۡلِيَةُ جَحِيمٍ
verses.tr: And burning in Hellfire
verses.tl: Watasliyatu jaheemin

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلۡيَقِينِ
verses.tr: Indeed, this is the true certainty
verses.tl: Inna hatha lahuwa haqqu alyaqeeni

verses.ar: فَسَبِّحۡ بِٱسۡمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great
verses.tl: Fasabbih biismi rabbika alAAatheemi

verses.ar: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
verses.tr: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise
verses.tl: Sabbaha lillahi ma fee alssamawati waalardi wahuwa alAAazeezu alhakeemu

verses.ar: لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ يُحۡيِۦ وَيُمِيتُۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٌ
verses.tr: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent
verses.tl: Lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi yuhyee wayumeetu wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeerun

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلۡأَوَّلُ وَٱلۡأٓخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلۡبَاطِنُۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.tr: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing
verses.tl: Huwa alawwalu waalakhiru waalththahiru waalbatinu wahuwa bikulli shayin AAaleemun

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٖ ثُمَّ ٱسۡتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡعَرۡشِۖ يَعۡلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهَا وَمَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعۡرُجُ فِيهَاۖ وَهُوَ مَعَكُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كُنتُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ بَصِيرٞ
verses.tr: It is He who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. He knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein; and He is with you wherever you are. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing
verses.tl: Huwa allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda fee sittati ayyamin thumma istawa AAala alAAarshi yaAAlamu ma yaliju fee alardi wama yakhruju minha wama yanzilu mina alssamai wama yaAAruju feeha wahuwa maAAakum ayna ma kuntum waAllahu bima taAAmaloona baseerun

verses.ar: لَّهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرۡجَعُ ٱلۡأُمُورُ
verses.tr: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. And to Allah are returned [all] matters
verses.tl: Lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi waila Allahi turjaAAu alomooru

verses.ar: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيۡلَ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِي ٱلَّيۡلِۚ وَهُوَ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.tr: He causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night, and he is Knowing of that within the breasts
verses.tl: Yooliju allayla fee alnnahari wayooliju alnnahara fee allayi wahuwa AAaleemun bithati alssudoori

verses.ar: ءَامِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُواْ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسۡتَخۡلَفِينَ فِيهِۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَأَنفَقُواْ لَهُمۡ أَجۡرٞ كَبِيرٞ
verses.tr: Believe in Allah and His Messenger and spend out of that in which He has made you successors. For those who have believed among you and spent, there will be a great reward
verses.tl: Aminoo biAllahi warasoolihi waanfiqoo mimma jaAAalakum mustakhlafeena feehi faallatheena amanoo minkum waanfaqoo lahum ajrun kabeerun

verses.ar: وَمَا لَكُمۡ لَا تُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدۡعُوكُمۡ لِتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِرَبِّكُمۡ وَقَدۡ أَخَذَ مِيثَٰقَكُمۡ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤۡمِنِينَ
verses.tr: And why do you not believe in Allah while the Messenger invites you to believe in your Lord and He has taken your covenant, if you should [truly] be believers
verses.tl: Wama lakum la tuminoona biAllahi waalrrasoolu yadAAookum lituminoo birabbikum waqad akhatha meethaqakum in kuntum mumineena

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبۡدِهِۦٓ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخۡرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمۡ لَرَءُوفٞ رَّحِيمٞ
verses.tr: It is He who sends down upon His Servant [Muhammad] verses of clear evidence that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And indeed, Allah is to you Kind and Merciful
verses.tl: Huwa allathee yunazzilu AAala AAabdihi ayatin bayyinatin liyukhrijakum mina alththulumati ila alnnoori wainna Allaha bikum laraoofun raheemun

verses.ar: وَمَا لَكُمۡ أَلَّا تُنفِقُواْ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِلَّهِ مِيرَٰثُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ لَا يَسۡتَوِي مِنكُم مَّنۡ أَنفَقَ مِن قَبۡلِ ٱلۡفَتۡحِ وَقَٰتَلَۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَعۡظَمُ دَرَجَةٗ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنفَقُواْ مِنۢ بَعۡدُ وَقَٰتَلُواْۚ وَكُلّٗا وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
verses.tr: And why do you not spend in the cause of Allah while to Allah belongs the heritage of the heavens and the earth? Not equal among you are those who spent before the conquest [of Makkah] and fought [and those who did so after it]. Those are greater in degree than they who spent afterwards and fought. But to all Allah has promised the best [reward]. And Allah, with what you do, is Acquainted
verses.tl: Wama lakum alla tunfiqoo fee sabeeli Allahi walillahi meerathu alssamawati waalardi la yastawee minkum man anfaqa min qabli alfathi waqatala olaika aAAthamu darajatan mina allatheena anfaqoo min baAAdu waqataloo wakullan waAAada Allahu alhusna waAllahu bima taAAmaloona khabeerun

verses.ar: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِي يُقۡرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا فَيُضَٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ
verses.tr: Who is it that would loan Allah a goodly loan so He will multiply it for him and he will have a noble reward
verses.tl: Man tha allathee yuqridu Allaha qardan hasanan fayudaAAifahu lahu walahu ajrun kareemun

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ تَرَى ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِ يَسۡعَىٰ نُورُهُم بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَبِأَيۡمَٰنِهِمۖ بُشۡرَىٰكُمُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ جَنَّـٰتٞ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡعَظِيمُ
verses.tr: On the Day you see the believing men and believing women, their light proceeding before them and on their right, [it will be said], "Your good tidings today are [of] gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein you will abide eternally." That is what is the great attainment
verses.tl: Yawma tara almumineena waalmuminati yasAAa nooruhum bayna aydeehim wabiaymanihim bushrakumu alyawma jannatun tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha thalika huwa alfawzu alAAatheemu

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَقُولُ ٱلۡمُنَٰفِقُونَ وَٱلۡمُنَٰفِقَٰتُ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱنظُرُونَا نَقۡتَبِسۡ مِن نُّورِكُمۡ قِيلَ ٱرۡجِعُواْ وَرَآءَكُمۡ فَٱلۡتَمِسُواْ نُورٗاۖ فَضُرِبَ بَيۡنَهُم بِسُورٖ لَّهُۥ بَابُۢ بَاطِنُهُۥ فِيهِ ٱلرَّحۡمَةُ وَظَٰهِرُهُۥ مِن قِبَلِهِ ٱلۡعَذَابُ
verses.tr: On the [same] Day the hypocrite men and hypocrite women will say to those who believed, "Wait for us that we may acquire some of your light." It will be said, "Go back behind you and seek light." And a wall will be placed between them with a door, its interior containing mercy, but on the outside of it is torment
verses.tl: Yawma yaqoolu almunafiqoona waalmunafiqatu lillatheena amanoo onthuroona naqtabis min noorikum qeela irjiAAoo waraakum failtamisoo nooran faduriba baynahum bisoorin lahu babun batinuhu feehi alrrahmatu wathahiruhu min qibalihi alAAathabu

verses.ar: يُنَادُونَهُمۡ أَلَمۡ نَكُن مَّعَكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنَّكُمۡ فَتَنتُمۡ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَتَرَبَّصۡتُمۡ وَٱرۡتَبۡتُمۡ وَغَرَّتۡكُمُ ٱلۡأَمَانِيُّ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَ أَمۡرُ ٱللَّهِ وَغَرَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡغَرُورُ
verses.tr: The hypocrites will call to the believers, "Were we not with you?" They will say, "Yes, but you afflicted yourselves and awaited [misfortune for us] and doubted, and wishful thinking deluded you until there came the command of Allah. And the Deceiver deceived you concerning Allah
verses.tl: Yunadoonahum alam nakun maAAakum qaloo bala walakinnakum fatantum anfusakum watarabbastum wairtabtum wagharratkumu alamaniyyu hatta jaa amru Allahi wagharrakum biAllahi algharooru

verses.ar: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ لَا يُؤۡخَذُ مِنكُمۡ فِدۡيَةٞ وَلَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۚ مَأۡوَىٰكُمُ ٱلنَّارُۖ هِيَ مَوۡلَىٰكُمۡۖ وَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.tr: So today no ransom will be taken from you or from those who disbelieved. Your refuge is the Fire. It is most worthy of you, and wretched is the destination
verses.tl: Faalyawma la yukhathu minkum fidyatun wala mina allatheena kafaroo mawakumu alnnaru hiya mawlakum wabisa almaseeru

verses.ar: ۞أَلَمۡ يَأۡنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ أَن تَخۡشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمۡ لِذِكۡرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُواْ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبۡلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡأَمَدُ فَقَسَتۡ قُلُوبُهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
verses.tr: Has the time not come for those who have believed that their hearts should become humbly submissive at the remembrance of Allah and what has come down of the truth? And let them not be like those who were given the Scripture before, and a long period passed over them, so their hearts hardened; and many of them are defiantly disobedient
verses.tl: Alam yani lillatheena amanoo an takhshaAAa quloobuhum lithikri Allahi wama nazala mina alhaqqi wala yakoonoo kaallatheena ootoo alkitaba min qablu fatala AAalayhimu alamadu faqasat quloobuhum wakatheerun minhum fasiqoona

verses.ar: ٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحۡيِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَاۚ قَدۡ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَعۡقِلُونَ
verses.tr: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. We have made clear to you the signs; perhaps you will understand
verses.tl: IAAlamoo anna Allaha yuhyee alarda baAAda mawtiha qad bayyanna lakumu alayati laAAallakum taAAqiloona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلۡمُصَّدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقۡرَضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗا يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمۡ وَلَهُمۡ أَجۡرٞ كَرِيمٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and [they who] have loaned Allah a goodly loan - it will be multiplied for them, and they will have a noble reward
verses.tl: Inna almussaddiqeena waalmussaddiqati waaqradoo Allaha qardan hasanan yudaAAafu lahum walahum ajrun kareemun

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦٓ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَۖ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءُ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ لَهُمۡ أَجۡرُهُمۡ وَنُورُهُمۡۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَكَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: And those who have believed in Allah and His messengers - those are [in the ranks of] the supporters of truth and the martyrs, with their Lord. For them is their reward and their light. But those who have disbelieved and denied Our verses - those are the companions of Hellfire
verses.tl: Waallatheena amanoo biAllahi warusulihi olaika humu alssiddeeqoona waalshshuhadao AAinda rabbihim lahum ajruhum wanooruhum waallatheena kafaroo wakaththaboo biayatina olaika ashabu aljaheemi

verses.ar: ٱعۡلَمُوٓاْ أَنَّمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَا لَعِبٞ وَلَهۡوٞ وَزِينَةٞ وَتَفَاخُرُۢ بَيۡنَكُمۡ وَتَكَاثُرٞ فِي ٱلۡأَمۡوَٰلِ وَٱلۡأَوۡلَٰدِۖ كَمَثَلِ غَيۡثٍ أَعۡجَبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارَ نَبَاتُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصۡفَرّٗا ثُمَّ يَكُونُ حُطَٰمٗاۖ وَفِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ عَذَابٞ شَدِيدٞ وَمَغۡفِرَةٞ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضۡوَٰنٞۚ وَمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَآ إِلَّا مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡغُرُورِ
verses.tr: Know that the life of this world is but amusement and diversion and adornment and boasting to one another and competition in increase of wealth and children - like the example of a rain whose [resulting] plant growth pleases the tillers; then it dries and you see it turned yellow; then it becomes [scattered] debris. And in the Hereafter is severe punishment and forgiveness from Allah and approval. And what is the worldly life except the enjoyment of delusion
verses.tl: IAAlamoo annama alhayatu alddunya laAAibun walahwun wazeenatun watafakhurun baynakum watakathurun fee alamwali waalawladi kamathali ghaythin aAAjaba alkuffara nabatuhu thumma yaheeju fatarahu musfarran thumma yakoonu hutaman wafee alakhirati AAathabun shadeedun wamaghfiratun mina Allahi waridwanun wama alhayatu alddunya illa mataAAu alghuroori

verses.ar: سَابِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَغۡفِرَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرۡضُهَا كَعَرۡضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ أُعِدَّتۡ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضۡلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤۡتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلۡفَضۡلِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: Race toward forgiveness from your Lord and a Garden whose width is like the width of the heavens and earth, prepared for those who believed in Allah and His messengers. That is the bounty of Allah which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty
verses.tl: Sabiqoo ila maghfiratin min rabbikum wajannatin AAarduha kaAAardi alssamai waalardi oAAiddat lillatheena amanoo biAllahi warusulihi thalika fadlu Allahi yuteehi man yashao waAllahu thoo alfadli alAAatheemi

verses.ar: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٖ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَا فِيٓ أَنفُسِكُمۡ إِلَّا فِي كِتَٰبٖ مِّن قَبۡلِ أَن نَّبۡرَأَهَآۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٞ
verses.tr: No disaster strikes upon the earth or among yourselves except that it is in a register before We bring it into being - indeed that, for Allah, is easy
verses.tl: Ma asaba min museebatin fee alardi wala fee anfusikum illa fee kitabin min qabli an nabraaha inna thalika AAala Allahi yaseerun

verses.ar: لِّكَيۡلَا تَأۡسَوۡاْ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَفۡرَحُواْ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمۡۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخۡتَالٖ فَخُورٍ
verses.tr: In order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult [in pride] over what He has given you. And Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful
verses.tl: Likayla tasaw AAala ma fatakum wala tafrahoo bima atakum waAllahu la yuhibbu kulla mukhtalin fakhoorin

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبۡخَلُونَ وَيَأۡمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلۡبُخۡلِۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡغَنِيُّ ٱلۡحَمِيدُ
verses.tr: [Those] who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy
verses.tl: Allatheena yabkhaloona wayamuroona alnnasa bialbukhli waman yatawalla fainna Allaha huwa alghaniyyu alhameedu

verses.ar: لَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا رُسُلَنَا بِٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتِ وَأَنزَلۡنَا مَعَهُمُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَٱلۡمِيزَانَ لِيَقُومَ ٱلنَّاسُ بِٱلۡقِسۡطِۖ وَأَنزَلۡنَا ٱلۡحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأۡسٞ شَدِيدٞ وَمَنَٰفِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعۡلَمَ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥ وَرُسُلَهُۥ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِيٌّ عَزِيزٞ
verses.tr: We have already sent Our messengers with clear evidences and sent down with them the Scripture and the balance that the people may maintain [their affairs] in justice. And We sent down iron, wherein is great military might and benefits for the people, and so that Allah may make evident those who support Him and His messengers unseen. Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might
verses.tl: Laqad arsalna rusulana bialbayyinati waanzalna maAAahumu alkitaba waalmeezana liyaqooma alnnasu bialqisti waanzalna alhadeeda feehi basun shadeedun wamanafiAAu lilnnasi waliyaAAlama Allahu man yansuruhu warusulahu bialghaybi inna Allaha qawiyyun AAazeezun

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحٗا وَإِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِي ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلۡكِتَٰبَۖ فَمِنۡهُم مُّهۡتَدٖۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
verses.tr: And We have already sent Noah and Abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture; and among them is he who is guided, but many of them are defiantly disobedient
verses.tl: Walaqad arsalna noohan waibraheema wajaAAalna fee thurriyyatihima alnnubuwwata waalkitaba faminhum muhtadin wakatheerun minhum fasiqoona

verses.ar: ثُمَّ قَفَّيۡنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيۡنَا بِعِيسَى ٱبۡنِ مَرۡيَمَ وَءَاتَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلۡإِنجِيلَۖ وَجَعَلۡنَا فِي قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ رَأۡفَةٗ وَرَحۡمَةٗۚ وَرَهۡبَانِيَّةً ٱبۡتَدَعُوهَا مَا كَتَبۡنَٰهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ إِلَّا ٱبۡتِغَآءَ رِضۡوَٰنِ ٱللَّهِ فَمَا رَعَوۡهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَاۖ فَـَٔاتَيۡنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنۡهُمۡ أَجۡرَهُمۡۖ وَكَثِيرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَٰسِقُونَ
verses.tr: Then We sent following their footsteps Our messengers and followed [them] with Jesus, the son of Mary, and gave him the Gospel. And We placed in the hearts of those who followed him compassion and mercy and monasticism, which they innovated; We did not prescribe it for them except [that they did so] seeking the approval of Allah. But they did not observe it with due observance. So We gave the ones who believed among them their reward, but many of them are defiantly disobedient
verses.tl: Thumma qaffayna AAala atharihim birusulina waqaffayna biAAeesa ibni maryama waataynahu alinjeela wajaAAalna fee quloobi allatheena ittabaAAoohu rafatan warahmatan warahbaniyyatan ibtadaAAooha ma katabnaha AAalayhim illa ibtighaa ridwani Allahi fama raAAawha haqqa riAAayatiha faatayna allatheena amanoo minhum ajrahum wakatheerun minhum fasiqoona

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ ٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُواْ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤۡتِكُمۡ كِفۡلَيۡنِ مِن رَّحۡمَتِهِۦ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ نُورٗا تَمۡشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغۡفِرۡ لَكُمۡۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, fear Allah and believe in His Messenger; He will [then] give you a double portion of His mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you; and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo ittaqoo Allaha waaminoo birasoolihi yutikum kiflayni min rahmatihi wayajAAal lakum nooran tamshoona bihi wayaghfir lakum waAllahu ghafoorun raheemun

verses.ar: لِّئَلَّا يَعۡلَمَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَلَّا يَقۡدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَيۡءٖ مِّن فَضۡلِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَنَّ ٱلۡفَضۡلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤۡتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلۡفَضۡلِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: [This is] so that the People of the Scripture may know that they are not able [to obtain] anything from the bounty of Allah and that [all] bounty is in the hand of Allah; He gives it to whom He wills. And Allah is the possessor of great bounty
verses.tl: Lialla yaAAlama ahlu alkitabi alla yaqdiroona AAala shayin min fadli Allahi waanna alfadla biyadi Allahi yuteehi man yashao waAllahu thoo alfadli alAAatheemi

verses.ar: قَدۡ سَمِعَ ٱللَّهُ قَوۡلَ ٱلَّتِي تُجَٰدِلُكَ فِي زَوۡجِهَا وَتَشۡتَكِيٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَٱللَّهُ يَسۡمَعُ تَحَاوُرَكُمَآۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعُۢ بَصِيرٌ
verses.tr: Certainly has Allah heard the speech of the one who argues with you, [O Muhammad], concerning her husband and directs her complaint to Allah. And Allah hears your dialogue; indeed, Allah is Hearing and Seeing
verses.tl: Qad samiAAa Allahu qawla allatee tujadiluka fee zawjiha watashtakee ila Allahi waAllahu yasmaAAu tahawurakuma inna Allaha sameeAAun baseerun

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يُظَٰهِرُونَ مِنكُم مِّن نِّسَآئِهِم مَّا هُنَّ أُمَّهَٰتِهِمۡۖ إِنۡ أُمَّهَٰتُهُمۡ إِلَّا ٱلَّـٰٓـِٔي وَلَدۡنَهُمۡۚ وَإِنَّهُمۡ لَيَقُولُونَ مُنكَرٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡقَوۡلِ وَزُورٗاۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَعَفُوٌّ غَفُورٞ
verses.tr: Those who pronounce thihar among you [to separate] from their wives - they are not [consequently] their mothers. Their mothers are none but those who gave birth to them. And indeed, they are saying an objectionable statement and a falsehood. But indeed, Allah is Pardoning and Forgiving
verses.tl: Allatheena yuthahiroona minkum min nisaihim ma hunna ommahatihim in ommahatuhum illa allaee waladnahum wainnahum layaqooloona munkaran mina alqawli wazooran wainna Allaha laAAafuwwun ghafoorun

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُظَٰهِرُونَ مِن نِّسَآئِهِمۡ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا قَالُواْ فَتَحۡرِيرُ رَقَبَةٖ مِّن قَبۡلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّاۚ ذَٰلِكُمۡ تُوعَظُونَ بِهِۦۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
verses.tr: And those who pronounce thihar from their wives and then [wish to] go back on what they said - then [there must be] the freeing of a slave before they touch one another. That is what you are admonished thereby; and Allah is Acquainted with what you do
verses.tl: Waallatheena yuthahiroona min nisaihim thumma yaAAoodoona lima qaloo fatahreeru raqabatin min qabli an yatamassa thalikum tooAAathoona bihi waAllahu bima taAAmaloona khabeerun

verses.ar: فَمَن لَّمۡ يَجِدۡ فَصِيَامُ شَهۡرَيۡنِ مُتَتَابِعَيۡنِ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّاۖ فَمَن لَّمۡ يَسۡتَطِعۡ فَإِطۡعَامُ سِتِّينَ مِسۡكِينٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِتُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦۚ وَتِلۡكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِۗ وَلِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.tr: And he who does not find [a slave] - then a fast for two months consecutively before they touch one another; and he who is unable - then the feeding of sixty poor persons. That is for you to believe [completely] in Allah and His Messenger; and those are the limits [set by] Allah. And for the disbelievers is a painful punishment
verses.tl: Faman lam yajid fasiyamu shahrayni mutatabiAAayni min qabli an yatamassa faman lam yastatiAA faitAAamu sitteena miskeenan thalika lituminoo biAllahi warasoolihi watilka hudoodu Allahi walilkafireena AAathabun aleemun

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ كُبِتُواْ كَمَا كُبِتَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡۚ وَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖۚ وَلِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger are abased as those before them were abased. And We have certainly sent down verses of clear evidence. And for the disbelievers is a humiliating punishment
verses.tl: Inna allatheena yuhaddoona Allaha warasoolahu kubitoo kama kubita allatheena min qablihim waqad anzalna ayatin bayyinatin walilkafireena AAathabun muheenun

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَبۡعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعٗا فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوٓاْۚ أَحۡصَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ وَنَسُوهُۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ شَهِيدٌ
verses.tr: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all and inform them of what they did. Allah had enumerated it, while they forgot it; and Allah is, over all things, Witness
verses.tl: Yawma yabAAathuhumu Allahu jameeAAan fayunabbiohum bima AAamiloo ahsahu Allahu wanasoohu waAllahu AAala kulli shayin shaheedun

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ مَا يَكُونُ مِن نَّجۡوَىٰ ثَلَٰثَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ رَابِعُهُمۡ وَلَا خَمۡسَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ سَادِسُهُمۡ وَلَآ أَدۡنَىٰ مِن ذَٰلِكَ وَلَآ أَكۡثَرَ إِلَّا هُوَ مَعَهُمۡ أَيۡنَ مَا كَانُواْۖ ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُواْ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.tr: Have you not considered that Allah knows what is in the heavens and what is on the earth? There is in no private conversation three but that He is the fourth of them, nor are there five but that He is the sixth of them - and no less than that and no more except that He is with them [in knowledge] wherever they are. Then He will inform them of what they did, on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed Allah is, of all things, Knowing
verses.tl: Alam tara anna Allaha yaAAlamu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi ma yakoonu min najwa thalathatin illa huwa rabiAAuhum wala khamsatin illa huwa sadisuhum wala adna min thalika wala akthara illa huwa maAAahum ayna ma kanoo thumma yunabbiohum bima AAamiloo yawma alqiyamati inna Allaha bikulli shayin AAaleemun

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نُهُواْ عَنِ ٱلنَّجۡوَىٰ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا نُهُواْ عَنۡهُ وَيَتَنَٰجَوۡنَ بِٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡعُدۡوَٰنِ وَمَعۡصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِۖ وَإِذَا جَآءُوكَ حَيَّوۡكَ بِمَا لَمۡ يُحَيِّكَ بِهِ ٱللَّهُ وَيَقُولُونَ فِيٓ أَنفُسِهِمۡ لَوۡلَا يُعَذِّبُنَا ٱللَّهُ بِمَا نَقُولُۚ حَسۡبُهُمۡ جَهَنَّمُ يَصۡلَوۡنَهَاۖ فَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
verses.tr: Have you not considered those who were forbidden from private conversation, then they return to that which they were forbidden and converse among themselves about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger? And when they come to you, they greet you with that [word] by which Allah does not greet you and say among themselves, "Why does Allah not punish us for what we say?" Sufficient for them is Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the destination
verses.tl: Alam tara ila allatheena nuhoo AAani alnnajwa thumma yaAAoodoona lima nuhoo AAanhu wayatanajawna bialithmi waalAAudwani wamaAAsiyati alrrasooli waitha jaooka hayyawka bima lam yuhayyika bihi Allahu wayaqooloona fee anfusihim lawla yuAAaththibuna Allahu bima naqoolu hasbuhum jahannamu yaslawnaha fabisa almaseeru

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِذَا تَنَٰجَيۡتُمۡ فَلَا تَتَنَٰجَوۡاْ بِٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡعُدۡوَٰنِ وَمَعۡصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَتَنَٰجَوۡاْ بِٱلۡبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقۡوَىٰۖ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِيٓ إِلَيۡهِ تُحۡشَرُونَ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, when you converse privately, do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger but converse about righteousness and piety. And fear Allah, to whom you will be gathered
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo itha tanajaytum fala tatanajaw bialithmi waalAAudwani wamaAAsiyati alrrasooli watanajaw bialbirri waalttaqwa waittaqoo Allaha allathee ilayhi tuhsharoona

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّجۡوَىٰ مِنَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنِ لِيَحۡزُنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَلَيۡسَ بِضَآرِّهِمۡ شَيۡـًٔا إِلَّا بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلۡيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Private conversation is only from Satan that he may grieve those who have believed, but he will not harm them at all except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely
verses.tl: Innama alnnajwa mina alshshaytani liyahzuna allatheena amanoo walaysa bidarrihim shayan illa biithni Allahi waAAala Allahi falyatawakkali almuminoona

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمۡ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِي ٱلۡمَجَٰلِسِ فَٱفۡسَحُواْ يَفۡسَحِ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمۡۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ ٱنشُزُواْ فَٱنشُزُواْ يَرۡفَعِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡعِلۡمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, when you are told, "Space yourselves" in assemblies, then make space; Allah will make space for you. And when you are told, "Arise," then arise; Allah will raise those who have believed among you and those who were given knowledge, by degrees. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo itha qeela lakum tafassahoo fee almajalisi faifsahoo yafsahi Allahu lakum waitha qeela onshuzoo faonshuzoo yarfaAAi Allahu allatheena amanoo minkum waallatheena ootoo alAAilma darajatin waAllahu bima taAAmaloona khabeerun

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِذَا نَٰجَيۡتُمُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَقَدِّمُواْ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ نَجۡوَىٰكُمۡ صَدَقَةٗۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيۡرٞ لَّكُمۡ وَأَطۡهَرُۚ فَإِن لَّمۡ تَجِدُواْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.tr: O you who have believed, when you [wish to] privately consult the Messenger, present before your consultation a charity. That is better for you and purer. But if you find not [the means] - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoo itha najaytumu alrrasoola faqaddimoo bayna yaday najwakum sadaqatan thalika khayrun lakum waatharu fain lam tajidoo fainna Allaha ghafoorun raheemun

verses.ar: ءَأَشۡفَقۡتُمۡ أَن تُقَدِّمُواْ بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ نَجۡوَىٰكُمۡ صَدَقَٰتٖۚ فَإِذۡ لَمۡ تَفۡعَلُواْ وَتَابَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِيعُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: Have you feared to present before your consultation charities? Then when you do not and Allah has forgiven you, then [at least] establish prayer and give zakah and obey Allah and His Messenger. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do
verses.tl: Aashfaqtum an tuqaddimoo bayna yaday najwakum sadaqatin faith lam tafAAaloo wataba Allahu AAalaykum faaqeemoo alssalata waatoo alzzakata waateeAAoo Allaha warasoolahu waAllahu khabeerun bima taAAmaloona

verses.ar: ۞أَلَمۡ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ تَوَلَّوۡاْ قَوۡمًا غَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهِم مَّا هُم مِّنكُمۡ وَلَا مِنۡهُمۡ وَيَحۡلِفُونَ عَلَى ٱلۡكَذِبِ وَهُمۡ يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Have you not considered those who make allies of a people with whom Allah has become angry? They are neither of you nor of them, and they swear to untruth while they know [they are lying]
verses.tl: Alam tara ila allatheena tawallaw qawman ghadiba Allahu AAalayhim ma hum minkum wala minhum wayahlifoona AAala alkathibi wahum yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٗا شَدِيدًاۖ إِنَّهُمۡ سَآءَ مَا كَانُواْ يَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment. Indeed, it was evil that they were doing
verses.tl: aAAadda Allahu lahum AAathaban shadeedan innahum saa ma kanoo yaAAmaloona

verses.ar: ٱتَّخَذُوٓاْ أَيۡمَٰنَهُمۡ جُنَّةٗ فَصَدُّواْ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
verses.tr: They took their [false] oaths as a cover, so they averted [people] from the way of Allah, and for them is a humiliating punishment
verses.tl: Ittakhathoo aymanahum junnatan fasaddoo AAan sabeeli Allahi falahum AAathabun muheenun

verses.ar: لَّن تُغۡنِيَ عَنۡهُمۡ أَمۡوَٰلُهُمۡ وَلَآ أَوۡلَٰدُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيۡـًٔاۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِۖ هُمۡ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.tr: Never will their wealth or their children avail them against Allah at all. Those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally
verses.tl: Lan tughniya AAanhum amwaluhum wala awladuhum mina Allahi shayan olaika ashabu alnnari hum feeha khalidoona

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَبۡعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعٗا فَيَحۡلِفُونَ لَهُۥ كَمَا يَحۡلِفُونَ لَكُمۡ وَيَحۡسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمۡ عَلَىٰ شَيۡءٍۚ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمۡ هُمُ ٱلۡكَٰذِبُونَ
verses.tr: On the Day Allah will resurrect them all, and they will swear to Him as they swear to you and think that they are [standing] on something. Unquestionably, it is they who are the liars
verses.tl: Yawma yabAAathuhumu Allahu jameeAAan fayahlifoona lahu kama yahlifoona lakum wayahsaboona annahum AAala shayin ala innahum humu alkathiboona

verses.ar: ٱسۡتَحۡوَذَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمۡ ذِكۡرَ ٱللَّهِۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ حِزۡبُ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنِۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزۡبَ ٱلشَّيۡطَٰنِ هُمُ ٱلۡخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.tr: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers
verses.tl: Istahwatha AAalayhimu alshshaytanu faansahum thikra Allahi olaika hizbu alshshaytani ala inna hizba alshshaytani humu alkhasiroona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ فِي ٱلۡأَذَلِّينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, the ones who oppose Allah and His Messenger - those will be among the most humbled
verses.tl: Inna allatheena yuhaddoona Allaha warasoolahu olaika fee alathalleena

verses.ar: كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَغۡلِبَنَّ أَنَا۠ وَرُسُلِيٓۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِيٌّ عَزِيزٞ
verses.tr: Allah has written, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers." Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might
verses.tl: Kataba Allahu laaghlibanna ana warusulee inna Allaha qawiyyun AAazeezun

verses.ar: لَّا تَجِدُ قَوۡمٗا يُؤۡمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلۡيَوۡمِ ٱلۡأٓخِرِ يُوَآدُّونَ مَنۡ حَآدَّ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَوۡ كَانُوٓاْ ءَابَآءَهُمۡ أَوۡ أَبۡنَآءَهُمۡ أَوۡ إِخۡوَٰنَهُمۡ أَوۡ عَشِيرَتَهُمۡۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ كَتَبَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلۡإِيمَٰنَ وَأَيَّدَهُم بِرُوحٖ مِّنۡهُۖ وَيُدۡخِلُهُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ رَضِيَ ٱللَّهُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَرَضُواْ عَنۡهُۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ حِزۡبُ ٱللَّهِۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزۡبَ ٱللَّهِ هُمُ ٱلۡمُفۡلِحُونَ
verses.tr: You will not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day having affection for those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, even if they were their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. Those - He has decreed within their hearts faith and supported them with spirit from Him. And We will admit them to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. Allah is pleased with them, and they are pleased with Him - those are the party of Allah. Unquestionably, the party of Allah - they are the successful
verses.tl: La tajidu qawman yuminoona biAllahi waalyawmi alakhiri yuwaddoona man hadda Allaha warasoolahu walaw kanoo abaahum aw abnaahum aw ikhwanahum aw AAasheeratahum olaika kataba fee quloobihimu aleemana waayyadahum biroohin minhu wayudkhiluhum jannatin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha radiya Allahu AAanhum waradoo AAanhu olaika hizbu Allahi ala inna hizba Allahi humu almuflihoona

verses.ar: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۖ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡحَكِيمُ
verses.tr: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise
verses.tl: Sabbaha lillahi ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi wahuwa alAAazeezu alhakeemu

verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَخۡرَجَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ مِن دِيَٰرِهِمۡ لِأَوَّلِ ٱلۡحَشۡرِۚ مَا ظَنَنتُمۡ أَن يَخۡرُجُواْۖ وَظَنُّوٓاْ أَنَّهُم مَّانِعَتُهُمۡ حُصُونُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ فَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ لَمۡ يَحۡتَسِبُواْۖ وَقَذَفَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلرُّعۡبَۚ يُخۡرِبُونَ بُيُوتَهُم بِأَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَأَيۡدِي ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ فَٱعۡتَبِرُواْ يَـٰٓأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
verses.tr: It is He who expelled the ones who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture from their homes at the first gathering. You did not think they would leave, and they thought that their fortresses would protect them from Allah; but [the decree of] Allah came upon them from where they had not expected, and He cast terror into their hearts [so] they destroyed their houses by their [own] hands and the hands of the believers. So take warning, O people of vision
verses.tl: Huwa allathee akhraja allatheena kafaroo min ahli alkitabi min diyarihim liawwali alhashri ma thanantum an yakhrujoo wathannoo annahum maniAAatuhum husoonuhum mina Allahi faatahumu Allahu min haythu lam yahtasiboo waqathafa fee quloobihimu alrruAAba yukhriboona buyootahum biaydeehim waaydee almumineena faiAAtabiroo ya olee alabsari

verses.ar: وَلَوۡلَآ أَن كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡجَلَآءَ لَعَذَّبَهُمۡ فِي ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ وَلَهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ عَذَابُ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.tr: And if not that Allah had decreed for them evacuation, He would have punished them in [this] world, and for them in the Hereafter is the punishment of the Fire
verses.tl: Walawla an kataba Allahu AAalayhimu aljalaa laAAaththabahum fee alddunya walahum fee alakhirati AAathabu alnnari

verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمۡ شَآقُّواْ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥۖ وَمَن يُشَآقِّ ٱللَّهَ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلۡعِقَابِ
verses.tr: That is because they opposed Allah and His Messenger. And whoever opposes Allah - then indeed, Allah is severe in penalty
verses.tl: Thalika biannahum shaqqoo Allaha warasoolahu waman yushaqqi Allaha fainna Allaha shadeedu alAAiqabi

verses.ar: مَا قَطَعۡتُم مِّن لِّينَةٍ أَوۡ تَرَكۡتُمُوهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلَىٰٓ أُصُولِهَا فَبِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِيُخۡزِيَ ٱلۡفَٰسِقِينَ
verses.tr: Whatever you have cut down of [their] palm trees or left standing on their trunks - it was by permission of Allah and so He would disgrace the defiantly disobedient
verses.tl: Ma qataAAtum min leenatin aw taraktumooha qaimatan AAala osooliha fabiithni Allahi waliyukhziya alfasiqeena

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنۡهُمۡ فَمَآ أَوۡجَفۡتُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡ خَيۡلٖ وَلَا رِكَابٖ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسَلِّطُ رُسُلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٞ
verses.tr: And what Allah restored [of property] to His Messenger from them - you did not spur for it [in an expedition] any horses or camels, but Allah gives His messengers power over whom He wills, and Allah is over all things competent
verses.tl: Wama afaa Allahu AAala rasoolihi minhum fama awjaftum AAalayhi min khaylin wala rikabin walakinna Allaha yusallitu rusulahu AAala man yashao waAllahu AAala kulli shayin qadeerun

verses.ar: مَّآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡقُرَىٰ فَلِلَّهِ وَلِلرَّسُولِ وَلِذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينِ وَٱبۡنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ كَيۡ لَا يَكُونَ دُولَةَۢ بَيۡنَ ٱلۡأَغۡنِيَآءِ مِنكُمۡۚ وَمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمُ ٱلرَّسُولُ فَخُذُوهُ وَمَا نَهَىٰكُمۡ عَنۡهُ فَٱنتَهُواْۚ وَٱتَّقُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلۡعِقَابِ
verses.tr: And what Allah restored to His Messenger from the people of the towns - it is for Allah and for the Messenger and for [his] near relatives and orphans and the [stranded] traveler - so that it will not be a perpetual distribution among the rich from among you. And whatever the Messenger has given you - take; and what he has forbidden you - refrain from. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is severe in penalty
verses.tl: Ma afaa Allahu AAala rasoolihi min ahli alqura falillahi walilrrasooli walithee alqurba waalyatama waalmasakeeni waibni alssabeeli kay la yakoona doolatan bayna alaghniyai minkum wama atakumu alrrasoolu fakhuthoohu wama nahakum AAanhu faintahoo waittaqoo Allaha inna Allaha shadeedu alAAiqabi

verses.ar: لِلۡفُقَرَآءِ ٱلۡمُهَٰجِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُخۡرِجُواْ مِن دِيَٰرِهِمۡ وَأَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ يَبۡتَغُونَ فَضۡلٗا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضۡوَٰنٗا وَيَنصُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ
verses.tr: For the poor emigrants who were expelled from their homes and their properties, seeking bounty from Allah and [His] approval and supporting Allah and His Messenger, [there is also a share]. Those are the truthful
verses.tl: Lilfuqarai almuhajireena allatheena okhrijoo min diyarihim waamwalihim yabtaghoona fadlan mina Allahi waridwanan wayansuroona Allaha warasoolahu olaika humu alssadiqoona
