verses.ar: فَٱجۡتَبَٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.tr: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous
verses.tl: Faijtabahu rabbuhu fajaAAalahu mina alssaliheena

verses.ar: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَيُزۡلِقُونَكَ بِأَبۡصَٰرِهِمۡ لَمَّا سَمِعُواْ ٱلذِّكۡرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجۡنُونٞ
verses.tr: And indeed, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes when they hear the message, and they say, "Indeed, he is mad
verses.tl: Wain yakadu allatheena kafaroo layuzliqoonaka biabsarihim lamma samiAAoo alththikra wayaqooloona innahu lamajnoonun

verses.ar: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرٞ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds
verses.tl: Wama huwa illa thikrun lilAAalameena

verses.ar: ٱلۡحَآقَّةُ
verses.tr: The Inevitable Reality
verses.tl: Alhaqqatu

verses.ar: مَا ٱلۡحَآقَّةُ
verses.tr: What is the Inevitable Reality
verses.tl: Ma alhaqqatu

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلۡحَآقَّةُ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma alhaqqatu

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ وَعَادُۢ بِٱلۡقَارِعَةِ
verses.tr: Thamud and 'Aad denied the Striking Calamity
verses.tl: Kaththabat thamoodu waAAadun bialqariAAati

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا ثَمُودُ فَأُهۡلِكُواْ بِٱلطَّاغِيَةِ
verses.tr: So as for Thamud, they were destroyed by the overpowering [blast]
verses.tl: Faamma thamoodu faohlikoo bialttaghiyati

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا عَادٞ فَأُهۡلِكُواْ بِرِيحٖ صَرۡصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٖ
verses.tr: And as for 'Aad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind
verses.tl: Waamma AAadun faohlikoo bireehin sarsarin AAatiyatin

verses.ar: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَبۡعَ لَيَالٖ وَثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومٗاۖ فَتَرَى ٱلۡقَوۡمَ فِيهَا صَرۡعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمۡ أَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٍ خَاوِيَةٖ
verses.tr: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees
verses.tl: Sakhkharaha AAalayhim sabAAa layalin wathamaniyata ayyamin husooman fatara alqawma feeha sarAAa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin khawiyatun

verses.ar: فَهَلۡ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٖ
verses.tr: Then do you see of them any remains
verses.tl: Fahal tara lahum min baqiyatin

verses.ar: وَجَآءَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ وَمَن قَبۡلَهُۥ وَٱلۡمُؤۡتَفِكَٰتُ بِٱلۡخَاطِئَةِ
verses.tr: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin
verses.tl: Wajaa firAAawnu waman qablahu waalmutafikatu bialkhatiati

verses.ar: فَعَصَوۡاْ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ أَخۡذَةٗ رَّابِيَةً
verses.tr: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity]
verses.tl: FaAAasaw rasoola rabbihim faakhathahum akhthatan rabiyatan

verses.ar: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلۡمَآءُ حَمَلۡنَٰكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡجَارِيَةِ
verses.tr: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship
verses.tl: Inna lamma tagha almao hamalnakum fee aljariyati

verses.ar: لِنَجۡعَلَهَا لَكُمۡ تَذۡكِرَةٗ وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٞ وَٰعِيَةٞ
verses.tr: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it
verses.tl: LinajAAalaha lakum tathkiratan wataAAiyaha othunun waAAiyatun

verses.ar: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ نَفۡخَةٞ وَٰحِدَةٞ
verses.tr: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast
verses.tl: Faitha nufikha fee alssoori nafkhatun wahidatun

verses.ar: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَٱلۡجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ
verses.tr: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow
verses.tl: Wahumilati alardu waaljibalu fadukkata dakkatan wahidatan

verses.ar: فَيَوۡمَئِذٖ وَقَعَتِ ٱلۡوَاقِعَةُ
verses.tr: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur
verses.tl: Fayawmaithin waqaAAati alwaqiAAatu

verses.ar: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِيَ يَوۡمَئِذٖ وَاهِيَةٞ
verses.tr: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm
verses.tl: Wainshaqqati alssamao fahiya yawmaithin wahiyatun

verses.ar: وَٱلۡمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرۡجَآئِهَاۚ وَيَحۡمِلُ عَرۡشَ رَبِّكَ فَوۡقَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ ثَمَٰنِيَةٞ
verses.tr: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them]
verses.tl: Waalmalaku AAala arjaiha wayahmilu AAarsha rabbika fawqahum yawmaithin thamaniyatun

verses.ar: يَوۡمَئِذٖ تُعۡرَضُونَ لَا تَخۡفَىٰ مِنكُمۡ خَافِيَةٞ
verses.tr: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed
verses.tl: Yawmaithin tuAAradoona la takhfa minkum khafiyatun

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقۡرَءُواْ كِتَٰبِيَهۡ
verses.tr: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record
verses.tl: Faamma man ootiya kitabahu biyameenihi fayaqoolu haomu iqraoo kitabiyah

verses.ar: إِنِّي ظَنَنتُ أَنِّي مُلَٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهۡ
verses.tr: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account
verses.tl: Innee thanantu annee mulaqin hisabiyah

verses.ar: فَهُوَ فِي عِيشَةٖ رَّاضِيَةٖ
verses.tr: So he will be in a pleasant life
verses.tl: Fahuwa fee AAeeshatin radiyatin

verses.ar: فِي جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٖ
verses.tr: In an elevated garden
verses.tl: Fee jannatin AAaliyatin

verses.ar: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٞ
verses.tr: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near
verses.tl: Qutoofuha daniyatun

verses.ar: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَآ أَسۡلَفۡتُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَيَّامِ ٱلۡخَالِيَةِ
verses.tr: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past
verses.tl: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima aslaftum fee alayyami alkhaliyati

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي لَمۡ أُوتَ كِتَٰبِيَهۡ
verses.tr: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record
verses.tl: Waamma man ootiya kitabahu bishimalihi fayaqoolu ya laytanee lam oota kitabiyah

verses.ar: وَلَمۡ أَدۡرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهۡ
verses.tr: And had not known what is my account
verses.tl: Walam adri ma hisabiyah

verses.ar: يَٰلَيۡتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلۡقَاضِيَةَ
verses.tr: I wish my death had been the decisive one
verses.tl: Ya laytaha kanati alqadiyatu

verses.ar: مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنِّي مَالِيَهۡۜ
verses.tr: My wealth has not availed me
verses.tl: Ma aghna AAannee maliyah

verses.ar: هَلَكَ عَنِّي سُلۡطَٰنِيَهۡ
verses.tr: Gone from me is my authority
verses.tl: Halaka AAannee sultaniyah

verses.ar: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
verses.tr: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him
verses.tl: Khuthoohu faghulloohu

verses.ar: ثُمَّ ٱلۡجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
verses.tr: Then into Hellfire drive him
verses.tl: Thumma aljaheema salloohu

verses.ar: ثُمَّ فِي سِلۡسِلَةٖ ذَرۡعُهَا سَبۡعُونَ ذِرَاعٗا فَٱسۡلُكُوهُ
verses.tr: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him
verses.tl: Thumma fee silsilatin tharAAuha sabAAoona thiraAAan faoslukoohu

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great
verses.tl: Innahu kana la yuminu biAllahi alAAatheemi

verses.ar: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلۡمِسۡكِينِ
verses.tr: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor
verses.tl: Wala yahuddu AAala taAAami almiskeeni

verses.ar: فَلَيۡسَ لَهُ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ هَٰهُنَا حَمِيمٞ
verses.tr: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend
verses.tl: Falaysa lahu alyawma hahuna hameemun

verses.ar: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنۡ غِسۡلِينٖ
verses.tr: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds
verses.tl: Wala taAAamun illa min ghisleenin

verses.ar: لَّا يَأۡكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلۡخَٰطِـُٔونَ
verses.tr: None will eat it except the sinners
verses.tl: La yakuluhu illa alkhatioona

verses.ar: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِمَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: So I swear by what you see
verses.tl: Fala oqsimu bima tubsiroona

verses.ar: وَمَا لَا تُبۡصِرُونَ
verses.tr: And what you do not see
verses.tl: Wama la tubsiroona

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوۡلُ رَسُولٖ كَرِيمٖ
verses.tr: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is the word of a noble Messenger
verses.tl: Innahu laqawlu rasoolin kareemin

verses.ar: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوۡلِ شَاعِرٖۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe
verses.tl: Wama huwa biqawli shaAAirin qaleelan ma tuminoona

verses.ar: وَلَا بِقَوۡلِ كَاهِنٖۚ قَلِيلٗا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.tr: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember
verses.tl: Wala biqawli kahinin qaleelan ma tathakkaroona

verses.ar: تَنزِيلٞ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Tanzeelun min rabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيۡنَا بَعۡضَ ٱلۡأَقَاوِيلِ
verses.tr: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings
verses.tl: Walaw taqawwala AAalayna baAAda alaqaweeli

verses.ar: لَأَخَذۡنَا مِنۡهُ بِٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: We would have seized him by the right hand
verses.tl: Laakhathna minhu bialyameeni

verses.ar: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعۡنَا مِنۡهُ ٱلۡوَتِينَ
verses.tr: Then We would have cut from him the aorta
verses.tl: Thumma laqataAAna minhu alwateena

verses.ar: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنۡ أَحَدٍ عَنۡهُ حَٰجِزِينَ
verses.tr: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him
verses.tl: Fama minkum min ahadin AAanhu hajizeena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذۡكِرَةٞ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, the Qur'an is a reminder for the righteous
verses.tl: Wainnahu latathkiratun lilmuttaqeena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّا لَنَعۡلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers
verses.tl: Wainna lanaAAlamu anna minkum mukaththibeena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَسۡرَةٌ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, it will be [a cause of] regret upon the disbelievers
verses.tl: Wainnahu lahasratun AAala alkafireena

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلۡيَقِينِ
verses.tr: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty
verses.tl: Wainnahu lahaqqu alyaqeeni

verses.ar: فَسَبِّحۡ بِٱسۡمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great
verses.tl: Fasabbih biismi rabbika alAAatheemi

verses.ar: سَأَلَ سَآئِلُۢ بِعَذَابٖ وَاقِعٖ
verses.tr: A supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen
verses.tl: Saala sailun biAAathabin waqiAAin

verses.ar: لِّلۡكَٰفِرِينَ لَيۡسَ لَهُۥ دَافِعٞ
verses.tr: To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer
verses.tl: Lilkafireena laysa lahu dafiAAun

verses.ar: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِي ٱلۡمَعَارِجِ
verses.tr: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent
verses.tl: Mina Allahi thee almaAAariji

verses.ar: تَعۡرُجُ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيۡهِ فِي يَوۡمٖ كَانَ مِقۡدَارُهُۥ خَمۡسِينَ أَلۡفَ سَنَةٖ
verses.tr: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years
verses.tl: TaAAruju almalaikatu waalrroohu ilayhi fee yawmin kana miqdaruhu khamseena alfa sanatin

verses.ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ صَبۡرٗا جَمِيلًا
verses.tr: So be patient with gracious patience
verses.tl: Faisbir sabran jameelan

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ يَرَوۡنَهُۥ بَعِيدٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, they see it [as] distant
verses.tl: Innahum yarawnahu baAAeedan

verses.ar: وَنَرَىٰهُ قَرِيبٗا
verses.tr: But We see it [as] near
verses.tl: Wanarahu qareeban

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ تَكُونُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ كَٱلۡمُهۡلِ
verses.tr: On the Day the sky will be like murky oil
verses.tl: Yawma takoonu alssamao kaalmuhli

verses.ar: وَتَكُونُ ٱلۡجِبَالُ كَٱلۡعِهۡنِ
verses.tr: And the mountains will be like wool
verses.tl: Watakoonu aljibalu kaalAAihni

verses.ar: وَلَا يَسۡـَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمٗا
verses.tr: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend
verses.tl: Wala yasalu hameemun hameeman

verses.ar: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمۡۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُ لَوۡ يَفۡتَدِي مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمِئِذِۭ بِبَنِيهِ
verses.tr: They will be shown each other. The criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that Day by his children
verses.tl: Yubassaroonahum yawaddu almujrimu law yaftadee min AAathabi yawmiithin bibaneehi

verses.ar: وَصَٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَأَخِيهِ
verses.tr: And his wife and his brother
verses.tl: Wasahibatihi waakheehi

verses.ar: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِي تُـٔۡوِيهِ
verses.tr: And his nearest kindred who shelter him
verses.tl: Wafaseelatihi allatee tuweehi

verses.ar: وَمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ جَمِيعٗا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
verses.tr: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him
verses.tl: Waman fee alardi jameeAAan thumma yunjeehi

verses.ar: كَلَّآۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ
verses.tr: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell]
verses.tl: Kalla innaha latha

verses.ar: نَزَّاعَةٗ لِّلشَّوَىٰ
verses.tr: A remover of exteriors
verses.tl: NazzaAAatan lilshshawa

verses.ar: تَدۡعُواْ مَنۡ أَدۡبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]
verses.tl: TadAAoo man adbara watawalla

verses.ar: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوۡعَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And collected [wealth] and hoarded
verses.tl: WajamaAAa faawAAa

verses.ar: ۞إِنَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا
verses.tr: Indeed, mankind was created anxious
verses.tl: Inna alinsana khuliqa halooAAan

verses.ar: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعٗا
verses.tr: When evil touches him, impatient
verses.tl: Itha massahu alshsharru jazooAAan

verses.ar: وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلۡخَيۡرُ مَنُوعًا
verses.tr: And when good touches him, withholding [of it]
verses.tl: Waitha massahu alkhayru manooAAan

verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱلۡمُصَلِّينَ
verses.tr: Except the observers of prayer
verses.tl: Illa almusalleena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمۡ دَآئِمُونَ
verses.tr: Those who are constant in their prayer
verses.tl: Allatheena hum AAala salatihim daimoona

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِهِمۡ حَقّٞ مَّعۡلُومٞ
verses.tr: And those within whose wealth is a known right
verses.tl: Waallatheena fee amwalihim haqqun maAAloomun

verses.ar: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلۡمَحۡرُومِ
verses.tr: For the petitioner and the deprived
verses.tl: Lilssaili waalmahroomi

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُصَدِّقُونَ بِيَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: And those who believe in the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Waallatheena yusaddiqoona biyawmi alddeeni

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ
verses.tr: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord
verses.tl: Waallatheena hum min AAathabi rabbihim mushfiqoona

verses.ar: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمۡ غَيۡرُ مَأۡمُونٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe
verses.tl: Inna AAathaba rabbihim ghayru mamoonin

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ لِفُرُوجِهِمۡ حَٰفِظُونَ
verses.tr: And those who guard their private parts
verses.tl: Waallatheena hum lifuroojihim hafithoona

verses.ar: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزۡوَٰجِهِمۡ أَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُهُمۡ فَإِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُومِينَ
verses.tr: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed
verses.tl: Illa AAala azwajihim aw ma malakat aymanuhum fainnahum ghayru maloomeena

verses.ar: فَمَنِ ٱبۡتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡعَادُونَ
verses.tr: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors
verses.tl: Famani ibtagha waraa thalika faolaika humu alAAadoona

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ لِأَمَٰنَٰتِهِمۡ وَعَهۡدِهِمۡ رَٰعُونَ
verses.tr: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive
verses.tl: Waallatheena hum liamanatihim waAAahdihim raAAoona

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِشَهَٰدَٰتِهِمۡ قَآئِمُونَ
verses.tr: And those who are in their testimonies upright
verses.tl: Waallatheena hum bishahadatihim qaimoona

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمۡ يُحَافِظُونَ
verses.tr: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer
verses.tl: Waallatheena hum AAala salatihim yuhafithoona

verses.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ مُّكۡرَمُونَ
verses.tr: They will be in gardens, honored
verses.tl: Olaika fee jannatin mukramoona

verses.ar: فَمَالِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ قِبَلَكَ مُهۡطِعِينَ
verses.tr: So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muhammad]
verses.tl: Famali allatheena kafaroo qibalaka muhtiAAeena

verses.ar: عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ
verses.tr: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups
verses.tl: AAani alyameeni waAAani alshshimali AAizeena

verses.ar: أَيَطۡمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيٕٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُدۡخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٖ
verses.tr: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure
verses.tl: AyatmaAAu kullu imriin minhum an yudkhala jannata naAAeemin

verses.ar: كَلَّآۖ إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَٰهُم مِّمَّا يَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know
verses.tl: Kalla inna khalaqnahum mimma yaAAlamoona

verses.ar: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلۡمَشَٰرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغَٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَٰدِرُونَ
verses.tr: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able
verses.tl: Fala oqsimu birabbi almashariqi waalmagharibi inna laqadiroona

verses.ar: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيۡرٗا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ
verses.tr: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone
verses.tl: AAala an nubaddila khayran minhum wama nahnu bimasbooqeena

verses.ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ يَخُوضُواْ وَيَلۡعَبُواْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
verses.tr: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised
verses.tl: Fatharhum yakhoodoo wayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee yooAAadoona

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ سِرَاعٗا كَأَنَّهُمۡ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٖ يُوفِضُونَ
verses.tr: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening
verses.tl: Yawma yakhrujoona mina alajdathi siraAAan kaannahum ila nusubin yoofidoona

verses.ar: خَٰشِعَةً أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةٞۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.tr: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised
verses.tl: KhashiAAatan absaruhum tarhaquhum thillatun thalika alyawmu allathee kanoo yooAAadoona

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَنۡ أَنذِرۡ قَوۡمَكَ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يَأۡتِيَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment
verses.tl: Inna arsalna noohan ila qawmihi an anthir qawmaka min qabli an yatiyahum AAathabun aleemun

verses.ar: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ إِنِّي لَكُمۡ نَذِيرٞ مُّبِينٌ
verses.tr: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner
verses.tl: Qala ya qawmi innee lakum natheerun mubeenun

verses.ar: أَنِ ٱعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.tr: [Saying], 'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me
verses.tl: Ani oAAbudoo Allaha waittaqoohu waateeAAooni

verses.ar: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمۡ وَيُؤَخِّرۡكُمۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٖ مُّسَمًّىۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُۚ لَوۡ كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew
verses.tl: Yaghfir lakum min thunoobikum wayuakhkhirkum ila ajalin musamman inna ajala Allahi itha jaa la yuakhkharu law kuntum taAAlamoona

verses.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُ قَوۡمِي لَيۡلٗا وَنَهَارٗا
verses.tr: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day
verses.tl: Qala rabbi innee daAAawtu qawmee laylan wanaharan

verses.ar: فَلَمۡ يَزِدۡهُمۡ دُعَآءِيٓ إِلَّا فِرَارٗا
verses.tr: But my invitation increased them not except in flight
verses.tl: Falam yazidhum duAAaee illa firaran

verses.ar: وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ لِتَغۡفِرَ لَهُمۡ جَعَلُوٓاْ أَصَٰبِعَهُمۡ فِيٓ ءَاذَانِهِمۡ وَٱسۡتَغۡشَوۡاْ ثِيَابَهُمۡ وَأَصَرُّواْ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ ٱسۡتِكۡبَارٗا
verses.tr: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance
verses.tl: Wainnee kullama daAAawtuhum litaghfira lahum jaAAaloo asabiAAahum fee athanihim waistaghshaw thiyabahum waasarroo waistakbaroo istikbaran

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ جِهَارٗا
verses.tr: Then I invited them publicly
verses.tl: Thumma innee daAAawtuhum jiharan

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنِّيٓ أَعۡلَنتُ لَهُمۡ وَأَسۡرَرۡتُ لَهُمۡ إِسۡرَارٗا
verses.tr: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
verses.tl: Thumma innee aAAlantu lahum waasrartu lahum israran

verses.ar: فَقُلۡتُ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمۡ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارٗا
verses.tr: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver
verses.tl: Faqultu istaghfiroo rabbakum innahu kana ghaffaran

verses.ar: يُرۡسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّدۡرَارٗا
verses.tr: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
verses.tl: Yursili alssamaa AAalaykum midraran

verses.ar: وَيُمۡدِدۡكُم بِأَمۡوَٰلٖ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٖ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ أَنۡهَٰرٗا
verses.tr: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers
verses.tl: Wayumdidkum biamwalin wabaneena wayajAAal lakum jannatin wayajAAal lakum anharan

verses.ar: مَّا لَكُمۡ لَا تَرۡجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارٗا
verses.tr: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
verses.tl: Ma lakum la tarjoona lillahi waqaran

verses.ar: وَقَدۡ خَلَقَكُمۡ أَطۡوَارًا
verses.tr: While He has created you in stages
verses.tl: Waqad khalaqakum atwaran

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَوۡاْ كَيۡفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٖ طِبَاقٗا
verses.tr: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
verses.tl: Alam taraw kayfa khalaqa Allahu sabAAa samawatin tibaqan

verses.ar: وَجَعَلَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورٗا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ سِرَاجٗا
verses.tr: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp
verses.tl: WajaAAala alqamara feehinna nooran wajaAAala alshshamsa sirajan

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ نَبَاتٗا
verses.tr: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth
verses.tl: WaAllahu anbatakum mina alardi nabatan

verses.ar: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمۡ فِيهَا وَيُخۡرِجُكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجٗا
verses.tr: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction
verses.tl: Thumma yuAAeedukum feeha wayukhrijukum ikhrajan

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِسَاطٗا
verses.tr: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
verses.tl: WaAllahu jaAAala lakumu alarda bisatan

verses.ar: لِّتَسۡلُكُواْ مِنۡهَا سُبُلٗا فِجَاجٗا
verses.tr: That you may follow therein roads of passage
verses.tl: Litaslukoo minha subulan fijajan

verses.ar: قَالَ نُوحٞ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمۡ عَصَوۡنِي وَٱتَّبَعُواْ مَن لَّمۡ يَزِدۡهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارٗا
verses.tr: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss
verses.tl: Qala noohun rabbi innahum AAasawnee waittabaAAoo man lam yazidhu maluhu wawaladuhu illa khasaran

verses.ar: وَمَكَرُواْ مَكۡرٗا كُبَّارٗا
verses.tr: And they conspired an immense conspiracy
verses.tl: Wamakaroo makran kubbaran

verses.ar: وَقَالُواْ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدّٗا وَلَا سُوَاعٗا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسۡرٗا
verses.tr: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa' or Yaghuth and Ya'uq and Nasr
verses.tl: Waqaloo la tatharunna alihatakum wala tatharunna waddan wala suwaAAan wala yaghootha wayaAAooqa wanasran

verses.ar: وَقَدۡ أَضَلُّواْ كَثِيرٗاۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَٰلٗا
verses.tr: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error
verses.tl: Waqad adalloo katheeran wala tazidi alththalimeena illa dalalan

verses.ar: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمۡ أُغۡرِقُواْ فَأُدۡخِلُواْ نَارٗا فَلَمۡ يَجِدُواْ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارٗا
verses.tr: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers
verses.tl: Mimma khateeatihim oghriqoo faodkhiloo naran falam yajidoo lahum min dooni Allahi ansaran

verses.ar: وَقَالَ نُوحٞ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
verses.tr: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant
verses.tl: Waqala noohun rabbi la tathar AAala alardi mina alkafireena dayyaran

verses.ar: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرۡهُمۡ يُضِلُّواْ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓاْ إِلَّا فَاجِرٗا كَفَّارٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever
verses.tl: Innaka in tatharhum yudilloo AAibadaka wala yalidoo illa fajiran kaffaran

verses.ar: رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَلِوَٰلِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيۡتِيَ مُؤۡمِنٗا وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارَۢا
verses.tr: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction
verses.tl: Rabbi ighfir lee waliwalidayya waliman dakhala baytiya muminan walilmumineena waalmuminati wala tazidi alththalimeena illa tabaran

verses.ar: قُلۡ أُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسۡتَمَعَ نَفَرٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا سَمِعۡنَا قُرۡءَانًا عَجَبٗا
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur'an
verses.tl: Qul oohiya ilayya annahu istamaAAa nafarun mina aljinni faqaloo inna samiAAna quranan AAajaban

verses.ar: يَهۡدِيٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشۡدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦۖ وَلَن نُّشۡرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدٗا
verses.tr: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone
verses.tl: Yahdee ila alrrushdi faamanna bihi walan nushrika birabbina ahadan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَٰحِبَةٗ وَلَا وَلَدٗا
verses.tr: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son
verses.tl: Waannahu taAAala jaddu rabbina ma ittakhatha sahibatan wala waladan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطٗا
verses.tr: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression
verses.tl: Waannahu kana yaqoolu safeehuna AAala Allahi shatatan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلۡإِنسُ وَٱلۡجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبٗا
verses.tr: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie
verses.tl: Waanna thananna an lan taqoola alinsu waaljinnu AAala Allahi kathiban

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٖ مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمۡ رَهَقٗا
verses.tr: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden
verses.tl: Waannahu kana rijalun mina alinsi yaAAoothoona birijalin mina aljinni fazadoohum rahaqan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُمۡ ظَنُّواْ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمۡ أَن لَّن يَبۡعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٗا
verses.tr: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger]
verses.tl: Waannahum thannoo kama thanantum an lan yabAAatha Allahu ahadan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا لَمَسۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدۡنَٰهَا مُلِئَتۡ حَرَسٗا شَدِيدٗا وَشُهُبٗا
verses.tr: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames
verses.tl: Waanna lamasna alssamaa fawajadnaha muliat harasan shadeedan washuhuban

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقۡعُدُ مِنۡهَا مَقَٰعِدَ لِلسَّمۡعِۖ فَمَن يَسۡتَمِعِ ٱلۡأٓنَ يَجِدۡ لَهُۥ شِهَابٗا رَّصَدٗا
verses.tr: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him
verses.tl: Waanna kunna naqAAudu minha maqaAAida lilssamAAi faman yastamiAAi alana yajid lahu shihaban rasadan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدۡرِيٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ أَرَادَ بِهِمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ رَشَدٗا
verses.tr: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course
verses.tl: Waanna la nadree asharrun oreeda biman fee alardi am arada bihim rabbuhum rashadan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدٗا
verses.tr: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways
verses.tl: Waanna minna alssalihoona waminna doona thalika kunna taraiqa qidadan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعۡجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَن نُّعۡجِزَهُۥ هَرَبٗا
verses.tr: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight
verses.tl: Wanna thananna an lan nuAAjiza Allaha fee alardi walan nuAAjizahu haraban

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعۡنَا ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦۖ فَمَن يُؤۡمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخۡسٗا وَلَا رَهَقٗا
verses.tr: And when we heard the guidance, we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden
verses.tl: Waanna lamma samiAAna alhuda amanna bihi faman yumin birabbihi fala yakhafu bakhsan wala rahaqan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلۡمُسۡلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلۡقَٰسِطُونَۖ فَمَنۡ أَسۡلَمَ فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوۡاْ رَشَدٗا
verses.tr: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allah], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course
verses.tl: Waanna minna almuslimoona waminna alqasitoona faman aslama faolaika taharraw rashadan

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا ٱلۡقَٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُواْ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبٗا
verses.tr: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood
verses.tl: Waama alqasitoona fakanoo lijahannama hataban

verses.ar: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسۡتَقَٰمُواْ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقٗا
verses.tr: And [Allah revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant provision
verses.tl: Waallawi istaqamoo AAala alttareeqati laasqaynahum maan ghadaqan

verses.ar: لِّنَفۡتِنَهُمۡ فِيهِۚ وَمَن يُعۡرِضۡ عَن ذِكۡرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسۡلُكۡهُ عَذَابٗا صَعَدٗا
verses.tr: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment
verses.tl: Linaftinahum feehi waman yuAArid AAan thikri rabbihi yaslukhu AAathaban saAAadan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّ ٱلۡمَسَٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدۡعُواْ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٗا
verses.tr: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone
verses.tl: Waanna almasajida lillahi fala tadAAoo maAAa Allahi ahadan

verses.ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبۡدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدۡعُوهُ كَادُواْ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيۡهِ لِبَدٗا
verses.tr: And that when the Servant of Allah stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass
verses.tl: Waannahu lamma qama AAabdu Allahi yadAAoohu kadoo yakoonoona AAalayhi libadan

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَدۡعُواْ رَبِّي وَلَآ أُشۡرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدٗا
verses.tr: Say, [O Muhammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone
verses.tl: Qul innama adAAoo rabbee wala oshriku bihi ahadan

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنِّي لَآ أَمۡلِكُ لَكُمۡ ضَرّٗا وَلَا رَشَدٗا
verses.tr: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction
verses.tl: Qul innee la amliku lakum darran wala rashadan

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنِّي لَن يُجِيرَنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٞ وَلَنۡ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلۡتَحَدًا
verses.tr: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allah anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge
verses.tl: Qul innee lan yujeeranee mina Allahi ahadun walan ajida min doonihi multahadan

verses.ar: إِلَّا بَلَٰغٗا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَٰلَٰتِهِۦۚ وَمَن يَعۡصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
verses.tr: But [I have for you] only notification from Allah, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever
verses.tl: Illa balaghan mina Allahi warisalatihi waman yaAAsi Allaha warasoolahu fainna lahu nara jahannama khalideena feeha abadan

verses.ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوۡاْ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ أَضۡعَفُ نَاصِرٗا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدٗا
verses.tr: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number
verses.tl: Hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona fasayaAAlamoona man adAAafu nasiran waaqallu AAadadan

verses.ar: قُلۡ إِنۡ أَدۡرِيٓ أَقَرِيبٞ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمۡ يَجۡعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّيٓ أَمَدًا
verses.tr: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period
verses.tl: Qul in adree aqareebun ma tooAAadoona am yajAAalu lahu rabbee amadan

verses.ar: عَٰلِمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ فَلَا يُظۡهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيۡبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.tr: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone
verses.tl: AAalimu alghaybi fala yuthhiru AAala ghaybihi ahadan

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرۡتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٖ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسۡلُكُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِۦ رَصَدٗا
verses.tr: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before each messenger and behind him observers
verses.tl: Illa mani irtada min rasoolin fainnahu yasluku min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi rasadan

verses.ar: لِّيَعۡلَمَ أَن قَدۡ أَبۡلَغُواْ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ وَأَحۡصَىٰ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عَدَدَۢا
verses.tr: That he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number
verses.tl: LiyaAAlama an qad ablaghoo risalati rabbihim waahata bima ladayhim waahsa kulla shayin AAadadan

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُزَّمِّلُ
verses.tr: O you who wraps himself [in clothing]
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha almuzzammilu

verses.ar: قُمِ ٱلَّيۡلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗا
verses.tr: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little
verses.tl: Qumi allayla illa qaleelan

verses.ar: نِّصۡفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصۡ مِنۡهُ قَلِيلًا
verses.tr: Half of it - or subtract from it a little
verses.tl: Nisfahu awi onqus minhu qaleelan

verses.ar: أَوۡ زِدۡ عَلَيۡهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَرۡتِيلًا
verses.tr: Or add to it, and recite the Qur'an with measured recitation
verses.tl: Aw zid AAalayhi warattili alqurana tarteelan

verses.ar: إِنَّا سَنُلۡقِي عَلَيۡكَ قَوۡلٗا ثَقِيلًا
verses.tr: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word
verses.tl: Inna sanulqee AAalayka qawlan thaqeelan

verses.ar: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيۡلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطۡـٔٗا وَأَقۡوَمُ قِيلًا
verses.tr: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words
verses.tl: Inna nashiata allayli hiya ashaddu watan waaqwamu qeelan

verses.ar: إِنَّ لَكَ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبۡحٗا طَوِيلٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation
verses.tl: Inna laka fee alnnahari sabhan taweelan

verses.ar: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلۡ إِلَيۡهِ تَبۡتِيلٗا
verses.tr: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion
verses.tl: Waothkuri isma rabbika watabattal ilayhi tabteelan

verses.ar: رَّبُّ ٱلۡمَشۡرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغۡرِبِ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذۡهُ وَكِيلٗا
verses.tr: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs
verses.tl: Rabbu almashriqi waalmaghribi la ilaha illa huwa faittakhithhu wakeelan

verses.ar: وَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهۡجُرۡهُمۡ هَجۡرٗا جَمِيلٗا
verses.tr: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance
verses.tl: Waisbir AAala ma yaqooloona waohjurhum hajran jameelan

verses.ar: وَذَرۡنِي وَٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ أُوْلِي ٱلنَّعۡمَةِ وَمَهِّلۡهُمۡ قَلِيلًا
verses.tr: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little
verses.tl: Watharnee waalmukaththibeena olee alnnaAAmati wamahhilhum qaleelan

verses.ar: إِنَّ لَدَيۡنَآ أَنكَالٗا وَجَحِيمٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire
verses.tl: Inna ladayna ankalan wajaheeman

verses.ar: وَطَعَامٗا ذَا غُصَّةٖ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمٗا
verses.tr: And food that chokes and a painful punishment
verses.tl: WataAAaman tha ghussatin waAAathaban aleeman

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ تَرۡجُفُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَٱلۡجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلۡجِبَالُ كَثِيبٗا مَّهِيلًا
verses.tr: On the Day the earth and the mountains will convulse and the mountains will become a heap of sand pouring down
verses.tl: Yawma tarjufu alardu waaljibalu wakanati aljibalu katheeban maheelan

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ رَسُولٗا شَٰهِدًا عَلَيۡكُمۡ كَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ رَسُولٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness upon you just as We sent to Pharaoh a messenger
verses.tl: Inna arsalna ilaykum rasoolan shahidan AAalaykum kama arsalna ila firAAawna rasoolan

verses.ar: فَعَصَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُ أَخۡذٗا وَبِيلٗا
verses.tr: But Pharaoh disobeyed the messenger, so We seized him with a ruinous seizure
verses.tl: FaAAasa firAAawnu alrrasoola faakhathnahu akhthan wabeelan

verses.ar: فَكَيۡفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرۡتُمۡ يَوۡمٗا يَجۡعَلُ ٱلۡوِلۡدَٰنَ شِيبًا
verses.tr: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired
verses.tl: Fakayfa tattaqoona in kafartum yawman yajAAalu alwildana sheeban

verses.ar: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرُۢ بِهِۦۚ كَانَ وَعۡدُهُۥ مَفۡعُولًا
verses.tr: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled
verses.tl: Alssamao munfatirun bihi kana waAAduhu mafAAoolan

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةٞۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.tr: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way
verses.tl: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan

verses.ar: ۞إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدۡنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَنِصۡفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةٞ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحۡصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرۡضَىٰ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضۡرِبُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ يَبۡتَغُونَ مِن فَضۡلِ ٱللَّهِ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنۡهُۚ وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقۡرِضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنٗاۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُواْ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنۡ خَيۡرٖ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيۡرٗا وَأَعۡظَمَ أَجۡرٗاۚ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمُۢ
verses.tr: Indeed, your Lord knows, [O Muhammad], that you stand [in prayer] almost two thirds of the night or half of it or a third of it, and [so do] a group of those with you. And Allah determines [the extent of] the night and the day. He has known that you [Muslims] will not be able to do it and has turned to you in forgiveness, so recite what is easy [for you] of the Qur'an. He has known that there will be among you those who are ill and others traveling throughout the land seeking [something] of the bounty of Allah and others fighting for the cause of Allah. So recite what is easy from it and establish prayer and give zakah and loan Allah a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves - you will find it with Allah. It is better and greater in reward. And seek forgiveness of Allah. Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful
verses.tl: Inna rabbaka yaAAlamu annaka taqoomu adna min thuluthayi allayli wanisfahu wathuluthahu wataifatun mina allatheena maAAaka waAllahu yuqaddiru allayla waalnnahara AAalima an lan tuhsoohu fataba AAalaykum faiqraoo ma tayassara mina alqurani AAalima an sayakoonu minkum marda waakharoona yadriboona fee alardi yabtaghoona min fadli Allahi waakharoona yuqatiloona fee sabeeli Allahi faiqraoo ma tayassara minhu waaqeemoo alssalata waatoo alzzakata waaqridoo Allaha qardan hasanan wama tuqaddimoo lianfusikum min khayrin tajidoohu AAinda Allahi huwa khayran waaAAthama ajran waistaghfiroo Allaha inna Allaha ghafoorun raheemun

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡمُدَّثِّرُ
verses.tr: O you who covers himself [with a garment]
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha almuddaththiru

verses.ar: قُمۡ فَأَنذِرۡ
verses.tr: Arise and warn
verses.tl: Qum faanthir

verses.ar: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرۡ
verses.tr: And your Lord glorify
verses.tl: Warabbaka fakabbir

verses.ar: وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرۡ
verses.tr: And your clothing purify
verses.tl: Wathiyabaka fatahhir

verses.ar: وَٱلرُّجۡزَ فَٱهۡجُرۡ
verses.tr: And uncleanliness avoid
verses.tl: Waalrrujza faohjur

verses.ar: وَلَا تَمۡنُن تَسۡتَكۡثِرُ
verses.tr: And do not confer favor to acquire more
verses.tl: Wala tamnun tastakthiru

verses.ar: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَٱصۡبِرۡ
verses.tr: But for your Lord be patient
verses.tl: Walirabbika faisbir

verses.ar: فَإِذَا نُقِرَ فِي ٱلنَّاقُورِ
verses.tr: And when the trumpet is blown
verses.tl: Faitha nuqira fee alnnaqoori

verses.ar: فَذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَوۡمٌ عَسِيرٌ
verses.tr: That Day will be a difficult day
verses.tl: Fathalika yawmaithin yawmun AAaseerun

verses.ar: عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ غَيۡرُ يَسِيرٖ
verses.tr: For the disbelievers - not easy
verses.tl: AAala alkafireena ghayru yaseerin

verses.ar: ذَرۡنِي وَمَنۡ خَلَقۡتُ وَحِيدٗا
verses.tr: Leave Me with the one I created alone
verses.tl: Tharnee waman khalaqtu waheedan

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡتُ لَهُۥ مَالٗا مَّمۡدُودٗا
verses.tr: And to whom I granted extensive wealth
verses.tl: WajaAAaltu lahu malan mamdoodan

verses.ar: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودٗا
verses.tr: And children present [with him]
verses.tl: Wabaneena shuhoodan

verses.ar: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمۡهِيدٗا
verses.tr: And spread [everything] before him, easing [his life]
verses.tl: Wamahhadtu lahu tamheedan

verses.ar: ثُمَّ يَطۡمَعُ أَنۡ أَزِيدَ
verses.tr: Then he desires that I should add more
verses.tl: Thumma yatmaAAu an azeeda

verses.ar: كَلَّآۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِأٓيَٰتِنَا عَنِيدٗا
verses.tr: No! Indeed, he has been toward Our verses obstinate
verses.tl: Kalla innahu kana liayatina AAaneedan

verses.ar: سَأُرۡهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا
verses.tr: I will cover him with arduous torment
verses.tl: Saorhiquhu saAAoodan

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ
verses.tr: Indeed, he thought and deliberated
verses.tl: Innahu fakkara waqaddara

verses.ar: فَقُتِلَ كَيۡفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.tr: So may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated
verses.tl: Faqutila kayfa qaddara

verses.ar: ثُمَّ قُتِلَ كَيۡفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.tr: Then may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated
verses.tl: Thumma qutila kayfa qaddara

verses.ar: ثُمَّ نَظَرَ
verses.tr: Then he considered [again]
verses.tl: Thumma nathara

verses.ar: ثُمَّ عَبَسَ وَبَسَرَ
verses.tr: Then he frowned and scowled
verses.tl: Thumma AAabasa wabasara

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَدۡبَرَ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرَ
verses.tr: Then he turned back and was arrogant
verses.tl: Thumma adbara waistakbara

verses.ar: فَقَالَ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحۡرٞ يُؤۡثَرُ
verses.tr: And said, "This is not but magic imitated [from others]
verses.tl: Faqala in hatha illa sihrun yutharu

verses.ar: إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوۡلُ ٱلۡبَشَرِ
verses.tr: This is not but the word of a human being
verses.tl: In hatha illa qawlu albashari

verses.ar: سَأُصۡلِيهِ سَقَرَ
verses.tr: I will drive him into Saqar
verses.tl: Saosleehi saqara

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is Saqar
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma saqaru

verses.ar: لَا تُبۡقِي وَلَا تَذَرُ
verses.tr: It lets nothing remain and leaves nothing [unburned]
verses.tl: La tubqee wala tatharu

verses.ar: لَوَّاحَةٞ لِّلۡبَشَرِ
verses.tr: Blackening the skins
verses.tl: Lawwahatun lilbashari

verses.ar: عَلَيۡهَا تِسۡعَةَ عَشَرَ
verses.tr: Over it are nineteen [angels]
verses.tl: AAalayha tisAAata AAashara

verses.ar: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَآ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٗۖ وَمَا جَعَلۡنَا عِدَّتَهُمۡ إِلَّا فِتۡنَةٗ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِيَسۡتَيۡقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَيَزۡدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِيمَٰنٗا وَلَا يَرۡتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٞ وَٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلٗاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَمَا يَعۡلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَۚ وَمَا هِيَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرَىٰ لِلۡبَشَرِ
verses.tr: And We have not made the keepers of the Fire except angels. And We have not made their number except as a trial for those who disbelieve - that those who were given the Scripture will be convinced and those who have believed will increase in faith and those who were given the Scripture and the believers will not doubt and that those in whose hearts is hypocrisy and the disbelievers will say, "What does Allah intend by this as an example?" Thus does Allah leave astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And none knows the soldiers of your Lord except Him. And mention of the Fire is not but a reminder to humanity
verses.tl: Wama jaAAalna ashaba alnnari illa malaikatan wama jaAAalna AAiddatahum illa fitnatan lillatheena kafaroo liyastayqina allatheena ootoo alkitaba wayazdada allatheena amanoo eemanan wala yartaba allatheena ootoo alkitaba waalmuminoona waliyaqoola allatheena fee quloobihim maradun waalkafiroona matha arada Allahu bihatha mathalan kathalika yudillu Allahu man yashao wayahdee man yashao wama yaAAlamu junooda rabbika illa huwa wama hiya illa thikra lilbashari

verses.ar: كَلَّا وَٱلۡقَمَرِ
verses.tr: No! By the moon
verses.tl: Kalla waalqamari

verses.ar: وَٱلَّيۡلِ إِذۡ أَدۡبَرَ
verses.tr: And [by] the night when it departs
verses.tl: Waallayli ith adbara

verses.ar: وَٱلصُّبۡحِ إِذَآ أَسۡفَرَ
verses.tr: And [by] the morning when it brightens
verses.tl: Waalssubhi itha asfara

verses.ar: إِنَّهَا لَإِحۡدَى ٱلۡكُبَرِ
verses.tr: Indeed, the Fire is of the greatest [afflictions]
verses.tl: Innaha laihda alkubari

verses.ar: نَذِيرٗا لِّلۡبَشَرِ
verses.tr: As a warning to humanity
verses.tl: Natheeran lilbashari

verses.ar: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمۡ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوۡ يَتَأَخَّرَ
verses.tr: To whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind
verses.tl: Liman shaa minkum an yataqaddama aw yataakhkhara

verses.ar: كُلُّ نَفۡسِۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتۡ رَهِينَةٌ
verses.tr: Every soul, for what it has earned, will be retained
verses.tl: Kullu nafsin bima kasabat raheenatun

verses.ar: إِلَّآ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡيَمِينِ
verses.tr: Except the companions of the right
verses.tl: Illa ashaba alyameeni

verses.ar: فِي جَنَّـٰتٖ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.tr: [Who will be] in gardens, questioning each other
verses.tl: Fee jannatin yatasaaloona

verses.ar: عَنِ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: About the criminals
verses.tl: AAani almujrimeena

verses.ar: مَا سَلَكَكُمۡ فِي سَقَرَ
verses.tr: [And asking them], "What put you into Saqar
verses.tl: Ma salakakum fee saqara

verses.ar: قَالُواْ لَمۡ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلۡمُصَلِّينَ
verses.tr: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed
verses.tl: Qaloo lam naku mina almusalleena

verses.ar: وَلَمۡ نَكُ نُطۡعِمُ ٱلۡمِسۡكِينَ
verses.tr: Nor did we used to feed the poor
verses.tl: Walam naku nutAAimu almiskeena

verses.ar: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلۡخَآئِضِينَ
verses.tr: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it]
verses.tl: Wakunna nakhoodu maAAa alkhaideena

verses.ar: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: And we used to deny the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Wakunna nukaththibu biyawmi alddeeni

verses.ar: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَىٰنَا ٱلۡيَقِينُ
verses.tr: Until there came to us the certainty
verses.tl: Hatta atana alyaqeenu

verses.ar: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمۡ شَفَٰعَةُ ٱلشَّـٰفِعِينَ
verses.tr: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors
verses.tl: Fama tanfaAAuhum shafaAAatu alshshafiAAeena

verses.ar: فَمَا لَهُمۡ عَنِ ٱلتَّذۡكِرَةِ مُعۡرِضِينَ
verses.tr: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away
verses.tl: Fama lahum AAani alttathkirati muAArideena

verses.ar: كَأَنَّهُمۡ حُمُرٞ مُّسۡتَنفِرَةٞ
verses.tr: As if they were alarmed donkeys
verses.tl: Kaannahum humurun mustanfiratun

verses.ar: فَرَّتۡ مِن قَسۡوَرَةِۭ
verses.tr: Fleeing from a lion
verses.tl: Farrat min qaswaratin

verses.ar: بَلۡ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيٕٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُؤۡتَىٰ صُحُفٗا مُّنَشَّرَةٗ
verses.tr: Rather, every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about
verses.tl: Bal yureedu kullu imriin minhum an yuta suhufan munashsharatan

verses.ar: كَلَّاۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ
verses.tr: No! But they do not fear the Hereafter
verses.tl: Kalla bal la yakhafoona alakhirata

verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذۡكِرَةٞ
verses.tr: No! Indeed, the Qur'an is a reminder
verses.tl: Kalla innahu tathkiratun

verses.ar: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: Then whoever wills will remember it
verses.tl: Faman shaa thakarahu

verses.ar: وَمَا يَذۡكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ هُوَ أَهۡلُ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ وَأَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَغۡفِرَةِ
verses.tr: And they will not remember except that Allah wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness
verses.tl: Wama yathkuroona illa an yashaa Allahu huwa ahlu alttaqwa waahlu almaghfirati

verses.ar: لَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ
verses.tr: I swear by the Day of Resurrection
verses.tl: La oqsimu biyawmi alqiyamati

verses.ar: وَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِٱلنَّفۡسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ
verses.tr: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection]
verses.tl: Wala oqsimu bialnnafsi allawwamati

verses.ar: أَيَحۡسَبُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجۡمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ
verses.tr: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones
verses.tl: Ayahsabu alinsanu allan najmaAAa AAithamahu

verses.ar: بَلَىٰ قَٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُۥ
verses.tr: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips
verses.tl: Bala qadireena AAala an nusawwiya bananahu

verses.ar: بَلۡ يُرِيدُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ لِيَفۡجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ
verses.tr: But man desires to continue in sin
verses.tl: Bal yureedu alinsanu liyafjura amamahu

verses.ar: يَسۡـَٔلُ أَيَّانَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ
verses.tr: He asks, "When is the Day of Resurrection
verses.tl: Yasalu ayyana yawmu alqiyamati

verses.ar: فَإِذَا بَرِقَ ٱلۡبَصَرُ
verses.tr: So when vision is dazzled
verses.tl: Faitha bariqa albasaru

verses.ar: وَخَسَفَ ٱلۡقَمَرُ
verses.tr: And the moon darkens
verses.tl: Wakhasafa alqamaru

verses.ar: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمۡسُ وَٱلۡقَمَرُ
verses.tr: And the sun and the moon are joined
verses.tl: WajumiAAa alshshamsu waalqamaru

verses.ar: يَقُولُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ يَوۡمَئِذٍ أَيۡنَ ٱلۡمَفَرُّ
verses.tr: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape
verses.tl: Yaqoolu alinsanu yawmaithin ayna almafarru

verses.ar: كَلَّا لَا وَزَرَ
verses.tr: No! There is no refuge
verses.tl: Kalla la wazara

verses.ar: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ ٱلۡمُسۡتَقَرُّ
verses.tr: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence
verses.tl: Ila rabbika yawmaithin almustaqarru

verses.ar: يُنَبَّؤُاْ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
verses.tr: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back
verses.tl: Yunabbao alinsanu yawmaithin bima qaddama waakhkhara

verses.ar: بَلِ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفۡسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةٞ
verses.tr: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness
verses.tl: Bali alinsanu AAala nafsihi baseeratun

verses.ar: وَلَوۡ أَلۡقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ
verses.tr: Even if he presents his excuses
verses.tl: Walaw alqa maAAatheerahu

verses.ar: لَا تُحَرِّكۡ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعۡجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
verses.tr: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur'an
verses.tl: La tuharrik bihi lisanaka litaAAjala bihi

verses.ar: إِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا جَمۡعَهُۥ وَقُرۡءَانَهُۥ
verses.tr: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation
verses.tl: Inna AAalayna jamAAahu waquranahu

verses.ar: فَإِذَا قَرَأۡنَٰهُ فَٱتَّبِعۡ قُرۡءَانَهُۥ
verses.tr: So when We have recited it [through Gabriel], then follow its recitation
verses.tl: Faitha qaranahu faittabiAA quranahu

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا بَيَانَهُۥ
verses.tr: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you]
verses.tl: Thumma inna AAalayna bayanahu

verses.ar: كَلَّا بَلۡ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ
verses.tr: No! But you love the immediate
verses.tl: Kalla bal tuhibboona alAAajilata

verses.ar: وَتَذَرُونَ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ
verses.tr: And leave the Hereafter
verses.tl: Watatharoona alakhirata

verses.ar: وُجُوهٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ نَّاضِرَةٌ
verses.tr: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant
verses.tl: Wujoohun yawmaithin nadiratun

verses.ar: إِلَىٰ رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٞ
verses.tr: Looking at their Lord
verses.tl: Ila rabbiha nathiratun

verses.ar: وَوُجُوهٞ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بَاسِرَةٞ
verses.tr: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted
verses.tl: Wawujoohun yawmaithin basiratun

verses.ar: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفۡعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٞ
verses.tr: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking
verses.tl: Tathunnu an yufAAala biha faqiratun

verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِيَ
verses.tr: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones
verses.tl: Kalla itha balaghati alttaraqiya

verses.ar: وَقِيلَ مَنۡۜ رَاقٖ
verses.tr: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]
verses.tl: Waqeela man raqin

verses.ar: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلۡفِرَاقُ
verses.tr: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation
verses.tl: Wathanna annahu alfiraqu

verses.ar: وَٱلۡتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ
verses.tr: And the leg is wound about the leg
verses.tl: Wailtaffati alssaqu bialssaqi

verses.ar: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوۡمَئِذٍ ٱلۡمَسَاقُ
verses.tr: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession
verses.tl: Ila rabbika yawmaithin almasaqu

verses.ar: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed
verses.tl: Fala saddaqa wala salla

verses.ar: وَلَٰكِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: But [instead], he denied and turned away
verses.tl: Walakin kaththaba watawalla

verses.ar: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ
verses.tr: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride]
verses.tl: Thumma thahaba ila ahlihi yatamatta

verses.ar: أَوۡلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: Woe to you, and woe
verses.tl: Awla laka faawla

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَوۡلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوۡلَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Then woe to you, and woe
verses.tl: Thumma awla laka faawla

verses.ar: أَيَحۡسَبُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ أَن يُتۡرَكَ سُدًى
verses.tr: Does man think that he will be left neglected
verses.tl: Ayahsabu alinsanu an yutraka sudan

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ يَكُ نُطۡفَةٗ مِّن مَّنِيّٖ يُمۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted
verses.tl: Alam yaku nutfatan min manayyin yumna

verses.ar: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةٗ فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.tr: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]
verses.tl: Thumma kana AAalaqatan fakhalaqa fasawwa

verses.ar: فَجَعَلَ مِنۡهُ ٱلزَّوۡجَيۡنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلۡأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And made of him two mates, the male and the female
verses.tl: FajaAAala minhu alzzawjayni alththakara waalontha

verses.ar: أَلَيۡسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحۡـِۧيَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ
verses.tr: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead
verses.tl: Alaysa thalika biqadirin AAala an yuhyiya almawta

verses.ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ حِينٞ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهۡرِ لَمۡ يَكُن شَيۡـٔٗا مَّذۡكُورًا
verses.tr: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned
verses.tl: Hal ata AAala alinsani heenun mina alddahri lam yakun shayan mathkooran

verses.ar: إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ أَمۡشَاجٖ نَّبۡتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ سَمِيعَۢا بَصِيرًا
verses.tr: Indeed, We created man from a sperm-drop mixture that We may try him; and We made him hearing and seeing
verses.tl: Inna khalaqna alinsana min nutfatin amshajin nabtaleehi fajaAAalnahu sameeAAan baseeran

verses.ar: إِنَّا هَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرٗا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
verses.tr: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful
verses.tl: Inna hadaynahu alssabeela imma shakiran waimma kafooran

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَاْ وَأَغۡلَٰلٗا وَسَعِيرًا
verses.tr: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze
verses.tl: Inna aAAtadna lilkafireena salasila waaghlalan wasaAAeeran

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ يَشۡرَبُونَ مِن كَأۡسٖ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
verses.tr: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur
verses.tl: Inna alabrara yashraboona min kasin kana mizajuha kafooran

verses.ar: عَيۡنٗا يَشۡرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفۡجِيرٗا
verses.tr: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance]
verses.tl: AAaynan yashrabu biha AAibadu Allahi yufajjiroonaha tafjeeran

verses.ar: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذۡرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوۡمٗا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسۡتَطِيرٗا
verses.tr: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread
verses.tl: Yoofoona bialnnathri wayakhafoona yawman kana sharruhu mustateeran

verses.ar: وَيُطۡعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسۡكِينٗا وَيَتِيمٗا وَأَسِيرًا
verses.tr: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive
verses.tl: WayutAAimona alttaAAama AAala hubbihi miskeenan wayateeman waaseeran

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا نُطۡعِمُكُمۡ لِوَجۡهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمۡ جَزَآءٗ وَلَا شُكُورًا
verses.tr: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude
verses.tl: Innama nutAAimukum liwajhi Allahi la nureedu minkum jazaan wala shukooran

verses.ar: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوۡمًا عَبُوسٗا قَمۡطَرِيرٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful
verses.tl: Inna nakhafu min rabbina yawman AAaboosan qamtareeran

verses.ar: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمۡ نَضۡرَةٗ وَسُرُورٗا
verses.tr: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness
verses.tl: Fawaqahumu Allahu sharra thalika alyawmi walaqqahum nadratan wasurooran

verses.ar: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُواْ جَنَّةٗ وَحَرِيرٗا
verses.tr: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments]
verses.tl: Wajazahum bima sabaroo jannatan wahareeran

verses.ar: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِۖ لَا يَرَوۡنَ فِيهَا شَمۡسٗا وَلَا زَمۡهَرِيرٗا
verses.tr: [They will be] reclining therein on adorned couches. They will not see therein any [burning] sun or [freezing] cold
verses.tl: Muttakieena feeha AAala alaraiki la yarawna feeha shamsan wala zamhareeran

verses.ar: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيۡهِمۡ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتۡ قُطُوفُهَا تَذۡلِيلٗا
verses.tr: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance
verses.tl: Wadaniyatan AAalayhim thilaluha wathullilat qutoofuha tathleelan

verses.ar: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٖ مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖ كَانَتۡ قَوَارِيرَا۠
verses.tr: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass]
verses.tl: Wayutafu AAalayhim bianiyatin min fiddatin waakwabin kanat qawareera

verses.ar: قَوَارِيرَاْ مِن فِضَّةٖ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقۡدِيرٗا
verses.tr: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure
verses.tl: Qawareera min fiddatin qaddarooha taqdeeran

verses.ar: وَيُسۡقَوۡنَ فِيهَا كَأۡسٗا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
verses.tr: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger
verses.tl: Wayusqawna feeha kasan kana mizajuha zanjabeelan

verses.ar: عَيۡنٗا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلۡسَبِيلٗا
verses.tr: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel
verses.tl: AAaynan feeha tusamma salsabeelan

verses.ar: ۞وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَٰنٞ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ حَسِبۡتَهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤٗا مَّنثُورٗا
verses.tr: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls
verses.tl: Wayatoofu AAalayhim wildanun mukhalladoona itha raaytahum hasibtahum luluan manthooran

verses.ar: وَإِذَا رَأَيۡتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيۡتَ نَعِيمٗا وَمُلۡكٗا كَبِيرًا
verses.tr: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion
verses.tl: Waitha raayta thamma raayta naAAeeman wamulkan kabeeran

verses.ar: عَٰلِيَهُمۡ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضۡرٞ وَإِسۡتَبۡرَقٞۖ وَحُلُّوٓاْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٖ وَسَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ شَرَابٗا طَهُورًا
verses.tr: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink
verses.tl: AAaliyahum thiyabu sundusin khudrun waistabraqun wahulloo asawira min fiddatin wasaqahum rabbuhum sharaban tahooran

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ جَزَآءٗ وَكَانَ سَعۡيُكُم مَّشۡكُورًا
verses.tr: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated
verses.tl: Inna hatha kana lakum jazaan wakana saAAyukum mashkooran

verses.ar: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَنزِيلٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur'an progressively
verses.tl: Inna nahnu nazzalna AAalayka alqurana tanzeelan

verses.ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعۡ مِنۡهُمۡ ءَاثِمًا أَوۡ كَفُورٗا
verses.tr: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever]
verses.tl: Faisbir lihukmi rabbika wala tutiAA minhum athiman aw kafooran

verses.ar: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ بُكۡرَةٗ وَأَصِيلٗا
verses.tr: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
verses.tl: Waothkuri isma rabbika bukratan waaseelan

verses.ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَٱسۡجُدۡ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحۡهُ لَيۡلٗا طَوِيلًا
verses.tr: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night
verses.tl: Wamina allayli faosjud lahu wasabbihhu laylan taweelan

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ يَوۡمٗا ثَقِيلٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day
verses.tl: Inna haolai yuhibboona alAAajilata wayatharoona waraahum yawman thaqeelan

verses.ar: نَّحۡنُ خَلَقۡنَٰهُمۡ وَشَدَدۡنَآ أَسۡرَهُمۡۖ وَإِذَا شِئۡنَا بَدَّلۡنَآ أَمۡثَٰلَهُمۡ تَبۡدِيلًا
verses.tr: We have created them and strengthened their forms, and when We will, We can change their likenesses with [complete] alteration
verses.tl: Nahnu khalaqnahum washadadna asrahum waitha shina baddalna amthalahum tabdeelan

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةٞۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way
verses.tl: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan

verses.ar: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمٗا
verses.tr: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise
verses.tl: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu inna Allaha kana AAaleeman hakeeman

verses.ar: يُدۡخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمَۢا
verses.tr: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment
verses.tl: Yudkhilu man yashao fee rahmatihi waalththalimeena aAAadda lahum AAathaban aleeman

verses.ar: وَٱلۡمُرۡسَلَٰتِ عُرۡفٗا
verses.tr: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts
verses.tl: Waalmursalati AAurfan

verses.ar: فَٱلۡعَٰصِفَٰتِ عَصۡفٗا
verses.tr: And the winds that blow violently
verses.tl: FaalAAasifati AAasfan

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّـٰشِرَٰتِ نَشۡرٗا
verses.tr: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]
verses.tl: Waalnnashirati nashran

verses.ar: فَٱلۡفَٰرِقَٰتِ فَرۡقٗا
verses.tr: And those [angels] who bring criterion
verses.tl: Faalfariqati farqan

verses.ar: فَٱلۡمُلۡقِيَٰتِ ذِكۡرًا
verses.tr: And those [angels] who deliver a message
verses.tl: Faalmulqiyati thikran

verses.ar: عُذۡرًا أَوۡ نُذۡرًا
verses.tr: As justification or warning
verses.tl: AAuthran aw nuthran

verses.ar: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٰقِعٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur
verses.tl: Innama tooAAadoona lawaqiAAun

verses.ar: فَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ طُمِسَتۡ
verses.tr: So when the stars are obliterated
verses.tl: Faitha alnnujoomu tumisat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ فُرِجَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the heaven is opened
verses.tl: Waitha alssamao furijat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡجِبَالُ نُسِفَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the mountains are blown away
verses.tl: Waitha aljibalu nusifat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلرُّسُلُ أُقِّتَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the messengers' time has come
verses.tl: Waitha alrrusulu oqqitat

verses.ar: لِأَيِّ يَوۡمٍ أُجِّلَتۡ
verses.tr: For what Day was it postponed
verses.tl: Liayyi yawmin ojjilat

verses.ar: لِيَوۡمِ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ
verses.tr: For the Day of Judgement
verses.tl: Liyawmi alfasli

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا يَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is the Day of Judgement
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma yawmu alfasli

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ نُهۡلِكِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: Did We not destroy the former peoples
verses.tl: Alam nuhliki alawwaleena

verses.ar: ثُمَّ نُتۡبِعُهُمُ ٱلۡأٓخِرِينَ
verses.tr: Then We will follow them with the later ones
verses.tl: Thumma nutbiAAuhumu alakhireena

verses.ar: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفۡعَلُ بِٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ
verses.tr: Thus do We deal with the criminals
verses.tl: Kathalika nafAAalu bialmujrimeena

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ نَخۡلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءٖ مَّهِينٖ
verses.tr: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained
verses.tl: Alam nakhluqkum min main maheenin

verses.ar: فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ فِي قَرَارٖ مَّكِينٍ
verses.tr: And We placed it in a firm lodging
verses.tl: FajaAAalnahu fee qararin makeenin

verses.ar: إِلَىٰ قَدَرٖ مَّعۡلُومٖ
verses.tr: For a known extent
verses.tl: Ila qadarin maAAloomin

verses.ar: فَقَدَرۡنَا فَنِعۡمَ ٱلۡقَٰدِرُونَ
verses.tr: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine
verses.tl: Faqadarna faniAAma alqadiroona

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ نَجۡعَلِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ كِفَاتًا
verses.tr: Have We not made the earth a container
verses.tl: Alam najAAali alarda kifatan

verses.ar: أَحۡيَآءٗ وَأَمۡوَٰتٗا
verses.tr: Of the living and the dead
verses.tl: Ahyaan waamwatan

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ شَٰمِخَٰتٖ وَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰكُم مَّآءٗ فُرَاتٗا
verses.tr: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water
verses.tl: WajaAAalna feeha rawasiya shamikhatin waasqaynakum maan furatan

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny
verses.tl: Intaliqoo ila ma kuntum bihi tukaththiboona

verses.ar: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ ظِلّٖ ذِي ثَلَٰثِ شُعَبٖ
verses.tr: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns
verses.tl: Intaliqoo ila thillin thee thalathi shuAAabin

verses.ar: لَّا ظَلِيلٖ وَلَا يُغۡنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
verses.tr: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame
verses.tl: La thaleelin wala yughnee mina allahabi

verses.ar: إِنَّهَا تَرۡمِي بِشَرَرٖ كَٱلۡقَصۡرِ
verses.tr: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress
verses.tl: Innaha tarmee bishararin kaalqasri

verses.ar: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَٰلَتٞ صُفۡرٞ
verses.tr: As if they were yellowish [black] camels
verses.tl: Kaannahu jimalatun sufrun

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.tr: This is a Day they will not speak
verses.tl: Hatha yawmu la yantiqoona

verses.ar: وَلَا يُؤۡذَنُ لَهُمۡ فَيَعۡتَذِرُونَ
verses.tr: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse
verses.tl: Wala yuthanu lahum fayaAAtathiroona

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: هَٰذَا يَوۡمُ ٱلۡفَصۡلِۖ جَمَعۡنَٰكُمۡ وَٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: This is the Day of Judgement; We will have assembled you and the former peoples
verses.tl: Hatha yawmu alfasli jamaAAnakum waalawwaleena

verses.ar: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمۡ كَيۡدٞ فَكِيدُونِ
verses.tr: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me
verses.tl: Fain kana lakum kaydun fakeedooni

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ فِي ظِلَٰلٖ وَعُيُونٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs
verses.tl: Inna almuttaqeena fee thilalin waAAuyoonin

verses.ar: وَفَوَٰكِهَ مِمَّا يَشۡتَهُونَ
verses.tr: And fruits from whatever they desire
verses.tl: Wafawakiha mimma yashtahoona

verses.ar: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
verses.tr: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do
verses.tl: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima kuntum taAAmaloona

verses.ar: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجۡزِي ٱلۡمُحۡسِنِينَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good
verses.tl: Inna kathalika najzee almuhsineena

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: كُلُواْ وَتَمَتَّعُواْ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُم مُّجۡرِمُونَ
verses.tr: [O disbelievers], eat and enjoy yourselves a little; indeed, you are criminals
verses.tl: Kuloo watamattaAAoo qaleelan innakum mujrimoona

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرۡكَعُواْ لَا يَرۡكَعُونَ
verses.tr: And when it is said to them, "Bow [in prayer]," they do not bow
verses.tl: Waitha qeela lahumu irkaAAoo la yarkaAAoona

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: فَبِأَيِّ حَدِيثِۭ بَعۡدَهُۥ يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: Then in what statement after the Qur'an will they believe
verses.tl: Fabiayyi hadeethin baAAdahu yuminoona

verses.ar: عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.tr: About what are they asking one another
verses.tl: AAamma yatasaaloona

verses.ar: عَنِ ٱلنَّبَإِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
verses.tr: About the great news
verses.tl: AAani alnnabai alAAatheemi

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي هُمۡ فِيهِ مُخۡتَلِفُونَ
verses.tr: That over which they are in disagreement
verses.tl: Allathee hum feehi mukhtalifoona

verses.ar: كَلَّا سَيَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: No! They are going to know
verses.tl: Kalla sayaAAlamoona

verses.ar: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Then, no! They are going to know
verses.tl: Thumma kalla sayaAAlamoona

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ نَجۡعَلِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا
verses.tr: Have We not made the earth a resting place
verses.tl: Alam najAAali alarda mihadan

verses.ar: وَٱلۡجِبَالَ أَوۡتَادٗا
verses.tr: And the mountains as stakes
verses.tl: Waaljibala awtadan

verses.ar: وَخَلَقۡنَٰكُمۡ أَزۡوَٰجٗا
verses.tr: And We created you in pairs
verses.tl: Wakhalaqnakum azwajan

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا نَوۡمَكُمۡ سُبَاتٗا
verses.tr: And made your sleep [a means for] rest
verses.tl: WajaAAalna nawmakum subatan

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱلَّيۡلَ لِبَاسٗا
verses.tr: And made the night as clothing
verses.tl: WajaAAalna allayla libasan

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشٗا
verses.tr: And made the day for livelihood
verses.tl: WajaAAalna alnnahara maAAashan

verses.ar: وَبَنَيۡنَا فَوۡقَكُمۡ سَبۡعٗا شِدَادٗا
verses.tr: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]
verses.tl: Wabanayna fawqakum sabAAan shidadan

verses.ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا سِرَاجٗا وَهَّاجٗا
verses.tr: And made [therein] a burning lamp
verses.tl: WajaAAalna sirajan wahhajan

verses.ar: وَأَنزَلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلۡمُعۡصِرَٰتِ مَآءٗ ثَجَّاجٗا
verses.tr: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water
verses.tl: Waanzalna mina almuAAsirati maan thajjajan

verses.ar: لِّنُخۡرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبّٗا وَنَبَاتٗا
verses.tr: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation
verses.tl: Linukhrija bihi habban wanabatan

verses.ar: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ أَلۡفَافًا
verses.tr: And gardens of entwined growth
verses.tl: Wajannatin alfafan

verses.ar: إِنَّ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡفَصۡلِ كَانَ مِيقَٰتٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time
verses.tl: Inna yawma alfasli kana meeqatan

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأۡتُونَ أَفۡوَاجٗا
verses.tr: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
verses.tl: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori fatatoona afwajan

verses.ar: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبٗا
verses.tr: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways
verses.tl: Wafutihati alssamao fakanat abwaban

verses.ar: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلۡجِبَالُ فَكَانَتۡ سَرَابًا
verses.tr: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage
verses.tl: Wasuyyirati aljibalu fakanat saraban

verses.ar: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتۡ مِرۡصَادٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait
verses.tl: Inna jahannama kanat mirsadan

verses.ar: لِّلطَّـٰغِينَ مَـَٔابٗا
verses.tr: For the transgressors, a place of return
verses.tl: Lilttagheena maaban

verses.ar: لَّـٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحۡقَابٗا
verses.tr: In which they will remain for ages [unending]
verses.tl: Labitheena feeha ahqaban

verses.ar: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرۡدٗا وَلَا شَرَابًا
verses.tr: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink
verses.tl: La yathooqoona feeha bardan wala sharaban

verses.ar: إِلَّا حَمِيمٗا وَغَسَّاقٗا
verses.tr: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence
verses.tl: Illa hameeman waghassaqan

verses.ar: جَزَآءٗ وِفَاقًا
verses.tr: An appropriate recompense
verses.tl: Jazaan wifaqan

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ كَانُواْ لَا يَرۡجُونَ حِسَابٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, they were not expecting an account
verses.tl: Innahum kanoo la yarjoona hisaban

verses.ar: وَكَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كِذَّابٗا
verses.tr: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial
verses.tl: Wakaththaboo biayatina kiththaban

verses.ar: وَكُلَّ شَيۡءٍ أَحۡصَيۡنَٰهُ كِتَٰبٗا
verses.tr: But all things We have enumerated in writing
verses.tl: Wakulla shayin ahsaynahu kitaban

verses.ar: فَذُوقُواْ فَلَن نَّزِيدَكُمۡ إِلَّا عَذَابًا
verses.tr: So taste [the penalty], and never will We increase you except in torment
verses.tl: Fathooqoo falan nazeedakum illa AAathaban

verses.ar: إِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا
verses.tr: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment
verses.tl: Inna lilmuttaqeena mafazan

verses.ar: حَدَآئِقَ وَأَعۡنَٰبٗا
verses.tr: Gardens and grapevines
verses.tl: Hadaiqa waaAAnaban

verses.ar: وَكَوَاعِبَ أَتۡرَابٗا
verses.tr: And full-breasted [companions] of equal age
verses.tl: WakawaAAiba atraban

verses.ar: وَكَأۡسٗا دِهَاقٗا
verses.tr: And a full cup
verses.tl: Wakasan dihaqan

verses.ar: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوٗا وَلَا كِذَّـٰبٗا
verses.tr: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood
verses.tl: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan wala kiththaban

verses.ar: جَزَآءٗ مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابٗا
verses.tr: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account
verses.tl: Jazaan min rabbika AAataan hisaban

verses.ar: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُ خِطَابٗا
verses.tr: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech
verses.tl: Rabbi alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma alrrahmani la yamlikoona minhu khitaban

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفّٗاۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابٗا
verses.tr: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct
verses.tl: Yawma yaqoomu alrroohu waalmalaikatu saffan la yatakallamoona illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waqala sawaban

verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلۡحَقُّۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
verses.tr: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return
verses.tl: Thalika alyawmu alhaqqu faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi maaban

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَنذَرۡنَٰكُمۡ عَذَابٗا قَرِيبٗا يَوۡمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلۡمَرۡءُ مَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلۡكَافِرُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي كُنتُ تُرَٰبَۢا
verses.tr: Indeed, We have warned you of a near punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say, "Oh, I wish that I were dust
verses.tl: Inna antharnakum AAathaban qareeban yawma yanthuru almaro ma qaddamat yadahu wayaqoolu alkafiru ya laytanee kuntu turaban

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَٰتِ غَرۡقٗا
verses.tr: By those [angels] who extract with violence
verses.tl: WaalnnaziAAati gharqan

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّـٰشِطَٰتِ نَشۡطٗا
verses.tr: And [by] those who remove with ease
verses.tl: Waalnnashitati nashtan

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّـٰبِحَٰتِ سَبۡحٗا
verses.tr: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming
verses.tl: Waalssabihati sabhan

verses.ar: فَٱلسَّـٰبِقَٰتِ سَبۡقٗا
verses.tr: And those who race each other in a race
verses.tl: Faalssabiqati sabqan

verses.ar: فَٱلۡمُدَبِّرَٰتِ أَمۡرٗا
verses.tr: And those who arrange [each] matter
verses.tl: Faalmudabbirati amran

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ تَرۡجُفُ ٱلرَّاجِفَةُ
verses.tr: On the Day the blast [of the Horn] will convulse [creation]
verses.tl: Yawma tarjufu alrrajifatu

verses.ar: تَتۡبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ
verses.tr: There will follow it the subsequent [one]
verses.tl: TatbaAAuha alrradifatu

verses.ar: قُلُوبٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ وَاجِفَةٌ
verses.tr: Hearts, that Day, will tremble
verses.tl: Quloobun yawmaithin wajifatun

verses.ar: أَبۡصَٰرُهَا خَٰشِعَةٞ
verses.tr: Their eyes humbled
verses.tl: Absaruha khashiAAatun

verses.ar: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرۡدُودُونَ فِي ٱلۡحَافِرَةِ
verses.tr: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]
verses.tl: Yaqooloona ainna lamardoodoona fee alhafirati

verses.ar: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَٰمٗا نَّخِرَةٗ
verses.tr: Even if we should be decayed bones
verses.tl: Aitha kunna AAithaman nakhiratan

verses.ar: قَالُواْ تِلۡكَ إِذٗا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٞ
verses.tr: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return
verses.tl: Qaloo tilka ithan karratun khasiratun

verses.ar: فَإِنَّمَا هِيَ زَجۡرَةٞ وَٰحِدَةٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, it will be but one shout
verses.tl: Fainnama hiya zajratun wahidatun

verses.ar: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ
verses.tr: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface
verses.tl: Faitha hum bialssahirati

verses.ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Has there reached you the story of Moses
verses.tl: Hal ataka hadeethu moosa

verses.ar: إِذۡ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلۡوَادِ ٱلۡمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
verses.tr: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa
verses.tl: Ith nadahu rabbuhu bialwadi almuqaddasi tuwan

verses.ar: ٱذۡهَبۡ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
verses.tr: Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed
verses.tl: Ithhab ila firAAawna innahu tagha

verses.ar: فَقُلۡ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.tr: And say to him, 'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself
verses.tl: Faqul hal laka ila an tazakka

verses.ar: وَأَهۡدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]
verses.tl: Waahdiyaka ila rabbika fatakhsha

verses.ar: فَأَرَىٰهُ ٱلۡأٓيَةَ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: And he showed him the greatest sign
verses.tl: Faarahu alayata alkubra

verses.ar: فَكَذَّبَ وَعَصَىٰ
verses.tr: But Pharaoh denied and disobeyed
verses.tl: Fakaththaba waAAasa

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَدۡبَرَ يَسۡعَىٰ
verses.tr: Then he turned his back, striving
verses.tl: Thumma adbara yasAAa
