verses.ar: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ
verses.tr: And he gathered [his people] and called out
verses.tl: Fahashara fanada

verses.ar: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: And said, "I am your most exalted lord
verses.tl: Faqala ana rabbukumu alaAAla

verses.ar: فَأَخَذَهُ ٱللَّهُ نَكَالَ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ وَٱلۡأُولَىٰٓ
verses.tr: So Allah seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression]
verses.tl: Faakhathahu Allahu nakala alakhirati waaloola

verses.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّمَن يَخۡشَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah]
verses.tl: Inna fee thalika laAAibratan liman yakhsha

verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمۡ أَشَدُّ خَلۡقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُۚ بَنَىٰهَا
verses.tr: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it
verses.tl: Aantum ashaddu khalqan ami alssamao banaha

verses.ar: رَفَعَ سَمۡكَهَا فَسَوَّىٰهَا
verses.tr: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it
verses.tl: RafaAAa samkaha fasawwaha

verses.ar: وَأَغۡطَشَ لَيۡلَهَا وَأَخۡرَجَ ضُحَىٰهَا
verses.tr: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness
verses.tl: Waaghtasha laylaha waakhraja duhaha

verses.ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَىٰهَآ
verses.tr: And after that He spread the earth
verses.tl: Waalarda baAAda thalika dahaha

verses.ar: أَخۡرَجَ مِنۡهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرۡعَىٰهَا
verses.tr: He extracted from it its water and its pasture
verses.tl: Akhraja minha maaha wamarAAaha

verses.ar: وَٱلۡجِبَالَ أَرۡسَىٰهَا
verses.tr: And the mountains He set firmly
verses.tl: Waaljibala arsaha

verses.ar: مَتَٰعٗا لَّكُمۡ وَلِأَنۡعَٰمِكُمۡ
verses.tr: As provision for you and your grazing livestock
verses.tl: MataAAan lakum walianAAamikum

verses.ar: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity
verses.tl: Faitha jaati alttammatu alkubra

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.tr: The Day when man will remember that for which he strove
verses.tl: Yawma yatathakkaru alinsanu ma saAAa

verses.ar: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلۡجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ
verses.tr: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see
verses.tl: Waburrizati aljaheemu liman yara

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا مَن طَغَىٰ
verses.tr: So as for he who transgressed
verses.tl: Faamma man tagha

verses.ar: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا
verses.tr: And preferred the life of the world
verses.tl: Waathara alhayata alddunya

verses.ar: فَإِنَّ ٱلۡجَحِيمَ هِيَ ٱلۡمَأۡوَىٰ
verses.tr: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge
verses.tl: Fainna aljaheema hiya almawa

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفۡسَ عَنِ ٱلۡهَوَىٰ
verses.tr: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination
verses.tl: Waama man khafa maqama rabbihi wanaha alnnafsa AAani alhawa

verses.ar: فَإِنَّ ٱلۡجَنَّةَ هِيَ ٱلۡمَأۡوَىٰ
verses.tr: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge
verses.tl: Fainna aljannata hiya almawa

verses.ar: يَسۡـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرۡسَىٰهَا
verses.tr: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival
verses.tl: Yasaloonaka AAani alssaAAati ayyana mursaha

verses.ar: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكۡرَىٰهَآ
verses.tr: In what [position] are you that you should mention it
verses.tl: Feema anta min thikraha

verses.ar: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ مُنتَهَىٰهَآ
verses.tr: To your Lord is its finality
verses.tl: Ila rabbika muntahaha

verses.ar: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخۡشَىٰهَا
verses.tr: You are only a warner for those who fear it
verses.tl: Innama anta munthiru man yakhshaha

verses.ar: كَأَنَّهُمۡ يَوۡمَ يَرَوۡنَهَا لَمۡ يَلۡبَثُوٓاْ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوۡ ضُحَىٰهَا
verses.tr: It will be, on the Day they see it, as though they had not remained [in the world] except for an afternoon or a morning thereof
verses.tl: Kaannahum yawma yarawnaha lam yalbathoo illa AAashiyyatan aw duhaha

verses.ar: عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.tr: The Prophet frowned and turned away
verses.tl: AAabasa watawalla

verses.ar: أَن جَآءَهُ ٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ
verses.tr: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting]
verses.tl: An jaahu alaAAma

verses.ar: وَمَا يُدۡرِيكَ لَعَلَّهُۥ يَزَّكَّىٰٓ
verses.tr: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified
verses.tl: Wama yudreeka laAAallahu yazzakka

verses.ar: أَوۡ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him
verses.tl: Aw yaththakkaru fatanfaAAahu alththikra

verses.ar: أَمَّا مَنِ ٱسۡتَغۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: As for he who thinks himself without need
verses.tl: Amma mani istaghna

verses.ar: فَأَنتَ لَهُۥ تَصَدَّىٰ
verses.tr: To him you give attention
verses.tl: Faanta lahu tasadda

verses.ar: وَمَا عَلَيۡكَ أَلَّا يَزَّكَّىٰ
verses.tr: And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified
verses.tl: Wama AAalayka alla yazzakka

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَن جَآءَكَ يَسۡعَىٰ
verses.tr: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]
verses.tl: Waamma man jaaka yasAAa

verses.ar: وَهُوَ يَخۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: While he fears [Allah]
verses.tl: Wahuwa yakhsha

verses.ar: فَأَنتَ عَنۡهُ تَلَهَّىٰ
verses.tr: From him you are distracted
verses.tl: Faanta AAanhu talahha

verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذۡكِرَةٞ
verses.tr: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder
verses.tl: Kalla innaha tathkiratun

verses.ar: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: So whoever wills may remember it
verses.tl: Faman shaa thakarahu

verses.ar: فِي صُحُفٖ مُّكَرَّمَةٖ
verses.tr: [It is recorded] in honored sheets
verses.tl: Fee suhufin mukarramatin

verses.ar: مَّرۡفُوعَةٖ مُّطَهَّرَةِۭ
verses.tr: Exalted and purified
verses.tl: MarfooAAatin mutahharatin

verses.ar: بِأَيۡدِي سَفَرَةٖ
verses.tr: [Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels
verses.tl: Biaydee safaratin

verses.ar: كِرَامِۭ بَرَرَةٖ
verses.tr: Noble and dutiful
verses.tl: Kiramin bararatin

verses.ar: قُتِلَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مَآ أَكۡفَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he
verses.tl: Qutila alinsanu ma akfarahu

verses.ar: مِنۡ أَيِّ شَيۡءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ
verses.tr: From what substance did He create him
verses.tl: Min ayyi shayin khalaqahu

verses.ar: مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ خَلَقَهُۥ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ
verses.tr: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him
verses.tl: Min nutfatin khalaqahu faqaddarahu

verses.ar: ثُمَّ ٱلسَّبِيلَ يَسَّرَهُۥ
verses.tr: Then He eased the way for him
verses.tl: Thumma alssabeela yassarahu

verses.ar: ثُمَّ أَمَاتَهُۥ فَأَقۡبَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him
verses.tl: Thumma amatahu faaqbarahu

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِذَا شَآءَ أَنشَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: Then when He wills, He will resurrect him
verses.tl: Thumma itha shaa ansharahu

verses.ar: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقۡضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him
verses.tl: Kalla lamma yaqdi ma amarahu

verses.ar: فَلۡيَنظُرِ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ إِلَىٰ طَعَامِهِۦٓ
verses.tr: Then let mankind look at his food
verses.tl: Falyanthuri alinsanu ila taAAamihi

verses.ar: أَنَّا صَبَبۡنَا ٱلۡمَآءَ صَبّٗا
verses.tr: How We poured down water in torrents
verses.tl: Anna sababna almaa sabban

verses.ar: ثُمَّ شَقَقۡنَا ٱلۡأَرۡضَ شَقّٗا
verses.tr: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts]
verses.tl: Thumma shaqaqna alarda shaqqan

verses.ar: فَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا حَبّٗا
verses.tr: And caused to grow within it grain
verses.tl: Faanbatna feeha habban

verses.ar: وَعِنَبٗا وَقَضۡبٗا
verses.tr: And grapes and herbage
verses.tl: WaAAinaban waqadban

verses.ar: وَزَيۡتُونٗا وَنَخۡلٗا
verses.tr: And olive and palm trees
verses.tl: Wazaytoonan wanakhlan

verses.ar: وَحَدَآئِقَ غُلۡبٗا
verses.tr: And gardens of dense shrubbery
verses.tl: Wahadaiqa ghulban

verses.ar: وَفَٰكِهَةٗ وَأَبّٗا
verses.tr: And fruit and grass
verses.tl: Wafakihatan waabban

verses.ar: مَّتَٰعٗا لَّكُمۡ وَلِأَنۡعَٰمِكُمۡ
verses.tr: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock
verses.tl: MataAAan lakum walianAAamikum

verses.ar: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلصَّآخَّةُ
verses.tr: But when there comes the Deafening Blast
verses.tl: Faitha jaati alssakhkhatu

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَفِرُّ ٱلۡمَرۡءُ مِنۡ أَخِيهِ
verses.tr: On the Day a man will flee from his brother
verses.tl: Yawma yafirru almaro min akheehi

verses.ar: وَأُمِّهِۦ وَأَبِيهِ
verses.tr: And his mother and his father
verses.tl: Waommihi waabeehi

verses.ar: وَصَٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَبَنِيهِ
verses.tr: And his wife and his children
verses.tl: Wasahibatihi wabaneehi

verses.ar: لِكُلِّ ٱمۡرِيٕٖ مِّنۡهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ شَأۡنٞ يُغۡنِيهِ
verses.tr: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him
verses.tl: Likulli imriin minhum yawmaithin shanun yughneehi

verses.ar: وُجُوهٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ مُّسۡفِرَةٞ
verses.tr: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright
verses.tl: Wujoohun yawmaithin musfiratun

verses.ar: ضَاحِكَةٞ مُّسۡتَبۡشِرَةٞ
verses.tr: Laughing, rejoicing at good news
verses.tl: Dahikatun mustabshiratun

verses.ar: وَوُجُوهٞ يَوۡمَئِذٍ عَلَيۡهَا غَبَرَةٞ
verses.tr: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust
verses.tl: Wawujoohun yawmaithin AAalayha ghabaratun

verses.ar: تَرۡهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ
verses.tr: Blackness will cover them
verses.tl: Tarhaquha qataratun

verses.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡكَفَرَةُ ٱلۡفَجَرَةُ
verses.tr: Those are the disbelievers, the wicked ones
verses.tl: Olaika humu alkafaratu alfajaratu

verses.ar: إِذَا ٱلشَّمۡسُ كُوِّرَتۡ
verses.tr: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
verses.tl: Itha alshshamsu kuwwirat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ ٱنكَدَرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the stars fall, dispersing
verses.tl: Waitha alnnujoomu inkadarat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the mountains are removed
verses.tl: Waitha aljibalu suyyirat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡعِشَارُ عُطِّلَتۡ
verses.tr: And when full-term she-camels are neglected
verses.tl: Waitha alAAisharu AAuttilat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡوُحُوشُ حُشِرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the wild beasts are gathered
verses.tl: Waitha alwuhooshu hushirat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the seas are filled with flame
verses.tl: Waitha albiharu sujjirat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّفُوسُ زُوِّجَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the souls are paired
verses.tl: Waitha alnnufoosu zuwwijat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡمَوۡءُۥدَةُ سُئِلَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the girl [who was] buried alive is asked
verses.tl: Waitha almawoodatu suilat

verses.ar: بِأَيِّ ذَنۢبٖ قُتِلَتۡ
verses.tr: For what sin she was killed
verses.tl: Biayyi thanbin qutilat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلصُّحُفُ نُشِرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the pages are made public
verses.tl: Waitha alssuhufu nushirat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ كُشِطَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the sky is stripped away
verses.tl: Waitha alssamao kushitat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡجَحِيمُ سُعِّرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when Hellfire is set ablaze
verses.tl: Waitha aljaheemu suAAAAirat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡجَنَّةُ أُزۡلِفَتۡ
verses.tr: And when Paradise is brought near
verses.tl: Waitha aljannatu ozlifat

verses.ar: عَلِمَتۡ نَفۡسٞ مَّآ أَحۡضَرَتۡ
verses.tr: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it]
verses.tl: AAalimat nafsun ma ahdarat

verses.ar: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِٱلۡخُنَّسِ
verses.tr: So I swear by the retreating stars
verses.tl: Fala oqsimu bialkhunnasi

verses.ar: ٱلۡجَوَارِ ٱلۡكُنَّسِ
verses.tr: Those that run [their courses] and disappear
verses.tl: Aljawari alkunnasi

verses.ar: وَٱلَّيۡلِ إِذَا عَسۡعَسَ
verses.tr: And by the night as it closes in
verses.tl: Waallayli itha AAasAAasa

verses.ar: وَٱلصُّبۡحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ
verses.tr: And by the dawn when it breathes
verses.tl: Waalssubhi itha tanaffasa

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوۡلُ رَسُولٖ كَرِيمٖ
verses.tr: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
verses.tl: Innahu laqawlu rasoolin kareemin

verses.ar: ذِي قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِي ٱلۡعَرۡشِ مَكِينٖ
verses.tr: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position]
verses.tl: Thee quwwatin AAinda thee alAAarshi makeenin

verses.ar: مُّطَاعٖ ثَمَّ أَمِينٖ
verses.tr: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy
verses.tl: MutaAAin thamma ameenin

verses.ar: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجۡنُونٖ
verses.tr: And your companion is not [at all] mad
verses.tl: Wama sahibukum bimajnoonin

verses.ar: وَلَقَدۡ رَءَاهُ بِٱلۡأُفُقِ ٱلۡمُبِينِ
verses.tr: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon
verses.tl: Walaqad raahu bialofuqi almubeeni

verses.ar: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلۡغَيۡبِ بِضَنِينٖ
verses.tr: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen
verses.tl: Wama huwa AAala alghaybi bidaneenin

verses.ar: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوۡلِ شَيۡطَٰنٖ رَّجِيمٖ
verses.tr: And the Qur'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens]
verses.tl: Wama huwa biqawli shaytanin rajeemin

verses.ar: فَأَيۡنَ تَذۡهَبُونَ
verses.tr: So where are you going
verses.tl: Faayna tathhaboona

verses.ar: إِنۡ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرٞ لِّلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: It is not except a reminder to the worlds
verses.tl: In huwa illa thikrun lilAAalameena

verses.ar: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمۡ أَن يَسۡتَقِيمَ
verses.tr: For whoever wills among you to take a right course
verses.tl: Liman shaa minkum an yastaqeema

verses.ar: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu rabbu alAAalameena

verses.ar: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنفَطَرَتۡ
verses.tr: When the sky breaks apart
verses.tl: Itha alssamao infatarat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡكَوَاكِبُ ٱنتَثَرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the stars fall, scattering
verses.tl: Waitha alkawakibu intatharat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the seas are erupted
verses.tl: Waitha albiharu fujjirat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡقُبُورُ بُعۡثِرَتۡ
verses.tr: And when the [contents of] graves are scattered
verses.tl: Waitha alqubooru buAAthirat

verses.ar: عَلِمَتۡ نَفۡسٞ مَّا قَدَّمَتۡ وَأَخَّرَتۡ
verses.tr: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back
verses.tl: AAalimat nafsun ma qaddamat waakhkharat

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلۡكَرِيمِ
verses.tr: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha alinsanu ma gharraka birabbika alkareemi

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّىٰكَ فَعَدَلَكَ
verses.tr: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you
verses.tl: Allathee khalaqaka fasawwaka faAAadalaka

verses.ar: فِيٓ أَيِّ صُورَةٖ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
verses.tr: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you
verses.tl: Fee ayyi sooratin ma shaa rakkabaka

verses.ar: كَلَّا بَلۡ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: No! But you deny the Recompense
verses.tl: Kalla bal tukaththiboona bialddeeni

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ عَلَيۡكُمۡ لَحَٰفِظِينَ
verses.tr: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers
verses.tl: Wainna AAalaykum lahafitheena

verses.ar: كِرَامٗا كَٰتِبِينَ
verses.tr: Noble and recording
verses.tl: Kiraman katibeena

verses.ar: يَعۡلَمُونَ مَا تَفۡعَلُونَ
verses.tr: They know whatever you do
verses.tl: YaAAlamoona ma tafAAaloona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ لَفِي نَعِيمٖ
verses.tr: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
verses.tl: Inna alabrara lafee naAAeemin

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ ٱلۡفُجَّارَ لَفِي جَحِيمٖ
verses.tr: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire
verses.tl: Wainna alfujjara lafee jaheemin

verses.ar: يَصۡلَوۡنَهَا يَوۡمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Yaslawnaha yawma alddeeni

verses.ar: وَمَا هُمۡ عَنۡهَا بِغَآئِبِينَ
verses.tr: And never therefrom will they be absent
verses.tl: Wama hum AAanha bighaibeena

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma yawmu alddeeni

verses.ar: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Thumma ma adraka ma yawmu alddeeni

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ
verses.tr: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allah
verses.tl: Yawma la tamliku nafsun linafsin shayan waalamru yawmaithin lillahi

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ لِّلۡمُطَفِّفِينَ
verses.tr: Woe to those who give less [than due]
verses.tl: Waylun lilmutaffifeena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكۡتَالُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسۡتَوۡفُونَ
verses.tr: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full
verses.tl: Allatheena itha iktaloo AAala alnnasi yastawfoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمۡ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمۡ يُخۡسِرُونَ
verses.tr: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss
verses.tl: Waitha kaloohum aw wazanoohum yukhsiroona

verses.ar: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبۡعُوثُونَ
verses.tr: Do they not think that they will be resurrected
verses.tl: Ala yathunnu olaika annahum mabAAoothoona

verses.ar: لِيَوۡمٍ عَظِيمٖ
verses.tr: For a tremendous Day
verses.tl: Liyawmin AAatheemin

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَقُومُ ٱلنَّاسُ لِرَبِّ ٱلۡعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.tr: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds
verses.tl: Yawma yaqoomu alnnasu lirabbi alAAalameena

verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلۡفُجَّارِ لَفِي سِجِّينٖ
verses.tr: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen
verses.tl: Kalla inna kitaba alfujjari lafee sijjeenin

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٞ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is sijjeen
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma sijjeenun

verses.ar: كِتَٰبٞ مَّرۡقُومٞ
verses.tr: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
verses.tl: Kitabun marqoomun

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.tr: Woe, that Day, to the deniers
verses.tl: Waylun yawmaithin lilmukaththibeena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِيَوۡمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: Who deny the Day of Recompense
verses.tl: Allatheena yukaththiboona biyawmi alddeeni

verses.ar: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعۡتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.tr: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor
verses.tl: Wama yukaththibu bihi illa kullu muAAtadin atheemin

verses.ar: إِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
verses.tr: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples
verses.tl: Itha tutla AAalayhi ayatuna qala asateeru alawwaleena

verses.ar: كَلَّاۖ بَلۡۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
verses.tr: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning
verses.tl: Kalla bal rana AAala quloobihim ma kanoo yaksiboona

verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمۡ عَن رَّبِّهِمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّمَحۡجُوبُونَ
verses.tr: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned
verses.tl: Kalla innahum AAan rabbihim yawmaithin lamahjooboona

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمۡ لَصَالُواْ ٱلۡجَحِيمِ
verses.tr: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire
verses.tl: Thumma innahum lasaloo aljaheemi

verses.ar: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny
verses.tl: Thumma yuqalu hatha allathee kuntum bihi tukaththiboona

verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ
verses.tr: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in 'illiyyun
verses.tl: Kalla inna kitaba alabrari lafee AAilliyyeena

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is 'illiyyun
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma AAilliyyoona

verses.ar: كِتَٰبٞ مَّرۡقُومٞ
verses.tr: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
verses.tl: Kitabun marqoomun

verses.ar: يَشۡهَدُهُ ٱلۡمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.tr: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah]
verses.tl: Yashhaduhu almuqarraboona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ لَفِي نَعِيمٍ
verses.tr: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
verses.tl: Inna alabrara lafee naAAeemin

verses.ar: عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.tr: On adorned couches, observing
verses.tl: AAala alaraiki yanthuroona

verses.ar: تَعۡرِفُ فِي وُجُوهِهِمۡ نَضۡرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.tr: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure
verses.tl: TaAArifu fee wujoohihim nadrata alnnaAAeemi

verses.ar: يُسۡقَوۡنَ مِن رَّحِيقٖ مَّخۡتُومٍ
verses.tr: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed
verses.tl: Yusqawna min raheeqin makhtoomin

verses.ar: خِتَٰمُهُۥ مِسۡكٞۚ وَفِي ذَٰلِكَ فَلۡيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلۡمُتَنَٰفِسُونَ
verses.tr: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete
verses.tl: Khitamuhu miskun wafee thalika falyatanafasi almutanafisoona

verses.ar: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسۡنِيمٍ
verses.tr: And its mixture is of Tasneem
verses.tl: Wamizajuhu min tasneemin

verses.ar: عَيۡنٗا يَشۡرَبُ بِهَا ٱلۡمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.tr: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink
verses.tl: AAaynan yashrabu biha almuqarraboona

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجۡرَمُواْ كَانُواْ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ يَضۡحَكُونَ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed
verses.tl: Inna allatheena ajramoo kanoo mina allatheena amanoo yadhakoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا مَرُّواْ بِهِمۡ يَتَغَامَزُونَ
verses.tr: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances
verses.tl: Waitha marroo bihim yataghamazoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُواْ فَكِهِينَ
verses.tr: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting
verses.tl: Waitha inqalaboo ila ahlihimu inqalaboo fakiheena

verses.ar: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.tr: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost
verses.tl: Waitha raawhum qaloo inna haolai ladalloona

verses.ar: وَمَآ أُرۡسِلُواْ عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَٰفِظِينَ
verses.tr: But they had not been sent as guardians over them
verses.tl: Wama orsiloo AAalayhim hafitheena

verses.ar: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡكُفَّارِ يَضۡحَكُونَ
verses.tr: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers
verses.tl: Faalyawma allatheena amanoo mina alkuffari yadhakoona

verses.ar: عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.tr: On adorned couches, observing
verses.tl: AAala alaraiki yanthuroona

verses.ar: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُواْ يَفۡعَلُونَ
verses.tr: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do
verses.tl: Hal thuwwiba alkuffaru ma kanoo yafAAaloona

verses.ar: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنشَقَّتۡ
verses.tr: When the sky has split [open]
verses.tl: Itha alssamao inshaqqat

verses.ar: وَأَذِنَتۡ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتۡ
verses.tr: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
verses.tl: Waathinat lirabbiha wahuqqat

verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلۡأَرۡضُ مُدَّتۡ
verses.tr: And when the earth has been extended
verses.tl: Waitha alardu muddat

verses.ar: وَأَلۡقَتۡ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتۡ
verses.tr: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]
verses.tl: Waalqat ma feeha watakhallat

verses.ar: وَأَذِنَتۡ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتۡ
verses.tr: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
verses.tl: Waathinat lirabbiha wahuqqat

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدۡحٗا فَمُلَٰقِيهِ
verses.tr: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it
verses.tl: Ya ayyuha alinsanu innaka kadihun ila rabbika kadhan famulaqeehi

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ
verses.tr: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand
verses.tl: Faama man ootiya kitabahu biyameenihi

verses.ar: فَسَوۡفَ يُحَاسَبُ حِسَابٗا يَسِيرٗا
verses.tr: He will be judged with an easy account
verses.tl: Fasawfa yuhasabu hisaban yaseeran

verses.ar: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ مَسۡرُورٗا
verses.tr: And return to his people in happiness
verses.tl: Wayanqalibu ila ahlihi masrooran

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهۡرِهِۦ
verses.tr: But as for he who is given his record behind his back
verses.tl: Waamma man ootiya kitabahu waraa thahrihi

verses.ar: فَسَوۡفَ يَدۡعُواْ ثُبُورٗا
verses.tr: He will cry out for destruction
verses.tl: Fasawfa yadAAoo thubooran

verses.ar: وَيَصۡلَىٰ سَعِيرًا
verses.tr: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze
verses.tl: Wayasla saAAeeran

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِيٓ أَهۡلِهِۦ مَسۡرُورًا
verses.tr: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness
verses.tl: Innahu kana fee ahlihi masrooran

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ
verses.tr: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah]
verses.tl: Innahu thanna an lan yahoora

verses.ar: بَلَىٰٓۚ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرٗا
verses.tr: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing
verses.tl: Bala inna rabbahu kana bihi baseeran

verses.ar: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِٱلشَّفَقِ
verses.tr: So I swear by the twilight glow
verses.tl: Fala oqsimu bialshshafaqi

verses.ar: وَٱلَّيۡلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ
verses.tr: And [by] the night and what it envelops
verses.tl: Waallayli wama wasaqa

verses.ar: وَٱلۡقَمَرِ إِذَا ٱتَّسَقَ
verses.tr: And [by] the moon when it becomes full
verses.tl: Waalqamari itha ittasaqa

verses.ar: لَتَرۡكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَن طَبَقٖ
verses.tr: [That] you will surely experience state after state
verses.tl: Latarkabunna tabaqan AAan tabaqin

verses.ar: فَمَا لَهُمۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ
verses.tr: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe
verses.tl: Fama lahum la yuminoona

verses.ar: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيۡهِمُ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانُ لَا يَسۡجُدُونَۤ۩
verses.tr: And when the Qur'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allah]
verses.tl: Waitha quria AAalayhimu alquranu la yasjudoona

verses.ar: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ يُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.tr: But those who have disbelieved deny
verses.tl: Bali allatheena kafaroo yukaththiboona

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ
verses.tr: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves
verses.tl: WaAllahu aAAlamu bima yooAAoona

verses.ar: فَبَشِّرۡهُم بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.tr: So give them tidings of a painful punishment
verses.tl: Fabashshirhum biAAathabin aleemin

verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمۡ أَجۡرٌ غَيۡرُ مَمۡنُونِۭ
verses.tr: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted
verses.tl: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati lahum ajrun ghayru mamnoonin

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلۡبُرُوجِ
verses.tr: By the sky containing great stars
verses.tl: Waalssamai thati alburooji

verses.ar: وَٱلۡيَوۡمِ ٱلۡمَوۡعُودِ
verses.tr: And [by] the promised Day
verses.tl: Waalyawmi almawAAoodi

verses.ar: وَشَاهِدٖ وَمَشۡهُودٖ
verses.tr: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed
verses.tl: Washahidin wamashhoodin

verses.ar: قُتِلَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأُخۡدُودِ
verses.tr: Cursed were the companions of the trench
verses.tl: Qutila ashabu alukhdoodi

verses.ar: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلۡوَقُودِ
verses.tr: [Containing] the fire full of fuel
verses.tl: Alnnari thati alwaqoodi

verses.ar: إِذۡ هُمۡ عَلَيۡهَا قُعُودٞ
verses.tr: When they were sitting near it
verses.tl: Ith hum AAalayha quAAoodun

verses.ar: وَهُمۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفۡعَلُونَ بِٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ شُهُودٞ
verses.tr: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses
verses.tl: Wahum AAala ma yafAAaloona bialmumineena shuhoodun

verses.ar: وَمَا نَقَمُواْ مِنۡهُمۡ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤۡمِنُواْ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَزِيزِ ٱلۡحَمِيدِ
verses.tr: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy
verses.tl: Wama naqamoo minhum illa an yuminoo biAllahi alAAazeezi alhameedi

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ شَهِيدٌ
verses.tr: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness
verses.tl: Allathee lahu mulku alssamawati waalardi waAllahu AAala kulli shayin shaheedun

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُواْ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمۡ يَتُوبُواْ فَلَهُمۡ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابُ ٱلۡحَرِيقِ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire
verses.tl: Inna allatheena fatanoo almumineena waalmuminati thumma lam yatooboo falahum AAathabu jahannama walahum AAathabu alhareeqi

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمۡ جَنَّـٰتٞ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡفَوۡزُ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ
verses.tr: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment
verses.tl: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati lahum jannatun tajree min tahtiha alanharu thalika alfawzu alkabeeru

verses.ar: إِنَّ بَطۡشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.tr: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe
verses.tl: Inna batsha rabbika lashadeedun

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ يُبۡدِئُ وَيُعِيدُ
verses.tr: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats
verses.tl: Innahu huwa yubdio wayuAAeedu

verses.ar: وَهُوَ ٱلۡغَفُورُ ٱلۡوَدُودُ
verses.tr: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate
verses.tl: Wahuwa alghafooru alwadoodu

verses.ar: ذُو ٱلۡعَرۡشِ ٱلۡمَجِيدُ
verses.tr: Honorable Owner of the Throne
verses.tl: Thoo alAAarshi almajeedi

verses.ar: فَعَّالٞ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
verses.tr: Effecter of what He intends
verses.tl: FaAAAAalun lima yureedu

verses.ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلۡجُنُودِ
verses.tr: Has there reached you the story of the soldiers
verses.tl: Hal ataka hadeethu aljunoodi

verses.ar: فِرۡعَوۡنَ وَثَمُودَ
verses.tr: [Those of] Pharaoh and Thamud
verses.tl: FirAAawna wathamooda

verses.ar: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي تَكۡذِيبٖ
verses.tr: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial
verses.tl: Bali allatheena kafaroo fee taktheebin

verses.ar: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطُۢ
verses.tr: While Allah encompasses them from behind
verses.tl: WaAllahu min waraihim muheetun

verses.ar: بَلۡ هُوَ قُرۡءَانٞ مَّجِيدٞ
verses.tr: But this is an honored Qur'an
verses.tl: Bal huwa quranun majeedun

verses.ar: فِي لَوۡحٖ مَّحۡفُوظِۭ
verses.tr: [Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate
verses.tl: Fee lawhin mahfoothin

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ
verses.tr: By the sky and the night comer
verses.tl: Waalssamai waalttariqi

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلطَّارِقُ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is the night comer
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma alttariqu

verses.ar: ٱلنَّجۡمُ ٱلثَّاقِبُ
verses.tr: It is the piercing star
verses.tl: Alnnajmu alththaqibu

verses.ar: إِن كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ لَّمَّا عَلَيۡهَا حَافِظٞ
verses.tr: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector
verses.tl: In kullu nafsin lamma AAalayha hafithun

verses.ar: فَلۡيَنظُرِ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مِمَّ خُلِقَ
verses.tr: So let man observe from what he was created
verses.tl: Falyanthuri alinsanu mimma khuliqa

verses.ar: خُلِقَ مِن مَّآءٖ دَافِقٖ
verses.tr: He was created from a fluid, ejected
verses.tl: Khuliqa min main dafiqin

verses.ar: يَخۡرُجُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِ ٱلصُّلۡبِ وَٱلتَّرَآئِبِ
verses.tr: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs
verses.tl: Yakhruju min bayni alssulbi waalttaraibi

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجۡعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able
verses.tl: Innahu AAala rajAAihi laqadirun

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ تُبۡلَى ٱلسَّرَآئِرُ
verses.tr: The Day when secrets will be put on trial
verses.tl: Yawma tubla alssarairu

verses.ar: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٖ وَلَا نَاصِرٖ
verses.tr: Then man will have no power or any helper
verses.tl: Fama lahu min quwwatin wala nasirin

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلرَّجۡعِ
verses.tr: By the sky which returns [rain]
verses.tl: Waalssamai thati alrrajAAi

verses.ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ ذَاتِ ٱلصَّدۡعِ
verses.tr: And [by] the earth which cracks open
verses.tl: Waalardi thati alssadAAi

verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوۡلٞ فَصۡلٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, the Qur'an is a decisive statement
verses.tl: Innahu laqawlun faslun

verses.ar: وَمَا هُوَ بِٱلۡهَزۡلِ
verses.tr: And it is not amusement
verses.tl: Wama huwa bialhazli

verses.ar: إِنَّهُمۡ يَكِيدُونَ كَيۡدٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, they are planning a plan
verses.tl: Innahum yakeedoona kaydan

verses.ar: وَأَكِيدُ كَيۡدٗا
verses.tr: But I am planning a plan
verses.tl: Waakeedu kaydan

verses.ar: فَمَهِّلِ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ أَمۡهِلۡهُمۡ رُوَيۡدَۢا
verses.tr: So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile
verses.tl: Famahhili alkafireena amhilhum ruwaydan

verses.ar: سَبِّحِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلۡأَعۡلَى
verses.tr: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High
verses.tl: Sabbihi isma rabbika alaAAla

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.tr: Who created and proportioned
verses.tl: Allathee khalaqa fasawwa

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِي قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ
verses.tr: And who destined and [then] guided
verses.tl: Waallathee qaddara fahada

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِيٓ أَخۡرَجَ ٱلۡمَرۡعَىٰ
verses.tr: And who brings out the pasture
verses.tl: Waallathee akhraja almarAAa

verses.ar: فَجَعَلَهُۥ غُثَآءً أَحۡوَىٰ
verses.tr: And [then] makes it black stubble
verses.tl: FajaAAalahu ghuthaan ahwa

verses.ar: سَنُقۡرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ
verses.tr: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget
verses.tl: Sanuqrioka fala tansa

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعۡلَمُ ٱلۡجَهۡرَ وَمَا يَخۡفَىٰ
verses.tr: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden
verses.tl: Illa ma shaa Allahu innahu yaAAlamu aljahra wama yakhfa

verses.ar: وَنُيَسِّرُكَ لِلۡيُسۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: And We will ease you toward ease
verses.tl: Wanuyassiruka lilyusra

verses.ar: فَذَكِّرۡ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: So remind, if the reminder should benefit
verses.tl: Fathakkir in nafaAAati alththikra

verses.ar: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded
verses.tl: Sayaththakkaru man yakhsha

verses.ar: وَيَتَجَنَّبُهَا ٱلۡأَشۡقَى
verses.tr: But the wretched one will avoid it
verses.tl: Wayatajannabuha alashqa

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يَصۡلَى ٱلنَّارَ ٱلۡكُبۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire
verses.tl: Allathee yasla alnnara alkubra

verses.ar: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحۡيَىٰ
verses.tr: Neither dying therein nor living
verses.tl: Thumma la yamootu feeha wala yahya

verses.ar: قَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.tr: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
verses.tl: Qad aflaha man tazakka

verses.ar: وَذَكَرَ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّهِۦ فَصَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays
verses.tl: Wathakara isma rabbihi fasalla

verses.ar: بَلۡ تُؤۡثِرُونَ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا
verses.tr: But you prefer the worldly life
verses.tl: Bal tuthiroona alhayata alddunya

verses.ar: وَٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ وَأَبۡقَىٰٓ
verses.tr: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring
verses.tl: Waalakhiratu khayrun waabqa

verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَفِي ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures
verses.tl: Inna hatha lafee alssuhufi aloola

verses.ar: صُحُفِ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ
verses.tr: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses
verses.tl: Suhufi ibraheema wamoosa

verses.ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلۡغَٰشِيَةِ
verses.tr: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]
verses.tl: Hal ataka hadeethu alghashiyati

verses.ar: وُجُوهٞ يَوۡمَئِذٍ خَٰشِعَةٌ
verses.tr: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled
verses.tl: Wujoohun yawmaithin khashiAAatun

verses.ar: عَامِلَةٞ نَّاصِبَةٞ
verses.tr: Working [hard] and exhausted
verses.tl: AAamilatun nasibatun

verses.ar: تَصۡلَىٰ نَارًا حَامِيَةٗ
verses.tr: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire
verses.tl: Tasla naran hamiyatan

verses.ar: تُسۡقَىٰ مِنۡ عَيۡنٍ ءَانِيَةٖ
verses.tr: They will be given drink from a boiling spring
verses.tl: Tusqa min AAaynin aniyatin

verses.ar: لَّيۡسَ لَهُمۡ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٖ
verses.tr: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant
verses.tl: Laysa lahum taAAamun illa min dareeAAin

verses.ar: لَّا يُسۡمِنُ وَلَا يُغۡنِي مِن جُوعٖ
verses.tr: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger
verses.tl: La yusminu wala yughnee min jooAAin

verses.ar: وُجُوهٞ يَوۡمَئِذٖ نَّاعِمَةٞ
verses.tr: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure
verses.tl: Wujoohun yawmaithin naAAimatun

verses.ar: لِّسَعۡيِهَا رَاضِيَةٞ
verses.tr: With their effort [they are] satisfied
verses.tl: LisaAAyiha radiyatun

verses.ar: فِي جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٖ
verses.tr: In an elevated garden
verses.tl: Fee jannatin AAaliyatin

verses.ar: لَّا تَسۡمَعُ فِيهَا لَٰغِيَةٗ
verses.tr: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech
verses.tl: La tasmaAAu feeha laghiyatan

verses.ar: فِيهَا عَيۡنٞ جَارِيَةٞ
verses.tr: Within it is a flowing spring
verses.tl: Feeha AAaynun jariyatun

verses.ar: فِيهَا سُرُرٞ مَّرۡفُوعَةٞ
verses.tr: Within it are couches raised high
verses.tl: Feeha sururun marfooAAatun

verses.ar: وَأَكۡوَابٞ مَّوۡضُوعَةٞ
verses.tr: And cups put in place
verses.tl: Waakwabun mawdooAAatun

verses.ar: وَنَمَارِقُ مَصۡفُوفَةٞ
verses.tr: And cushions lined up
verses.tl: Wanamariqu masfoofatun

verses.ar: وَزَرَابِيُّ مَبۡثُوثَةٌ
verses.tr: And carpets spread around
verses.tl: Wazarabiyyu mabthoothatun

verses.ar: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلۡإِبِلِ كَيۡفَ خُلِقَتۡ
verses.tr: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created
verses.tl: Afala yanthuroona ila alibili kayfa khuliqat

verses.ar: وَإِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيۡفَ رُفِعَتۡ
verses.tr: And at the sky - how it is raised
verses.tl: Waila alssamai kayfa rufiAAat

verses.ar: وَإِلَى ٱلۡجِبَالِ كَيۡفَ نُصِبَتۡ
verses.tr: And at the mountains - how they are erected
verses.tl: Waila aljibali kayfa nusibat

verses.ar: وَإِلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ كَيۡفَ سُطِحَتۡ
verses.tr: And at the earth - how it is spread out
verses.tl: Waila alardi kayfa sutihat

verses.ar: فَذَكِّرۡ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُذَكِّرٞ
verses.tr: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder
verses.tl: Fathakkir innama anta muthakkirun

verses.ar: لَّسۡتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِمُصَيۡطِرٍ
verses.tr: You are not over them a controller
verses.tl: Lasta AAalayhim bimusaytirin

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَن تَوَلَّىٰ وَكَفَرَ
verses.tr: However, he who turns away and disbelieves
verses.tl: Illa man tawalla wakafara

verses.ar: فَيُعَذِّبُهُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡعَذَابَ ٱلۡأَكۡبَرَ
verses.tr: Then Allah will punish him with the greatest punishment
verses.tl: FayuAAaththibuhu Allahu alAAathaba alakbara

verses.ar: إِنَّ إِلَيۡنَآ إِيَابَهُمۡ
verses.tr: Indeed, to Us is their return
verses.tl: Inna ilayna iyabahum

verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا حِسَابَهُم
verses.tr: Then indeed, upon Us is their account
verses.tl: Thumma inna AAalayna hisabahum

verses.ar: وَٱلۡفَجۡرِ
verses.tr: By the dawn
verses.tl: Waalfajri

verses.ar: وَلَيَالٍ عَشۡرٖ
verses.tr: And [by] ten nights
verses.tl: Walayalin AAashrin

verses.ar: وَٱلشَّفۡعِ وَٱلۡوَتۡرِ
verses.tr: And [by] the even [number] and the odd
verses.tl: WaalshshafAAi waalwatri

verses.ar: وَٱلَّيۡلِ إِذَا يَسۡرِ
verses.tr: And [by] the night when it passes
verses.tl: Waallayli itha yasri

verses.ar: هَلۡ فِي ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٞ لِّذِي حِجۡرٍ
verses.tr: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception
verses.tl: Hal fee thalika qasamun lithee hijrin

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
verses.tr: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad
verses.tl: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biAAadin

verses.ar: إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلۡعِمَادِ
verses.tr: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars
verses.tl: Irama thati alAAimadi

verses.ar: ٱلَّتِي لَمۡ يُخۡلَقۡ مِثۡلُهَا فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ
verses.tr: The likes of whom had never been created in the land
verses.tl: Allatee lam yukhlaq mithluha fee albiladi

verses.ar: وَثَمُودَ ٱلَّذِينَ جَابُواْ ٱلصَّخۡرَ بِٱلۡوَادِ
verses.tr: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley
verses.tl: Wathamooda allatheena jaboo alssakhra bialwadi

verses.ar: وَفِرۡعَوۡنَ ذِي ٱلۡأَوۡتَادِ
verses.tr: And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes
verses.tl: WafirAAawna thee alawtadi

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ طَغَوۡاْ فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ
verses.tr: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands
verses.tl: Allatheena taghaw fee albiladi

verses.ar: فَأَكۡثَرُواْ فِيهَا ٱلۡفَسَادَ
verses.tr: And increased therein the corruption
verses.tl: Faaktharoo feeha alfasada

verses.ar: فَصَبَّ عَلَيۡهِمۡ رَبُّكَ سَوۡطَ عَذَابٍ
verses.tr: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment
verses.tl: Fasabba AAalayhim rabbuka sawta AAathabin

verses.ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلۡمِرۡصَادِ
verses.tr: Indeed, your Lord is in observation
verses.tl: Inna rabbaka labialmirsadi

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبۡتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكۡرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّيٓ أَكۡرَمَنِ
verses.tr: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me
verses.tl: Faamma alinsanu itha ma ibtalahu rabbuhu faakramahu wanaAAAAamahu fayaqoolu rabbee akramani

verses.ar: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبۡتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيۡهِ رِزۡقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّيٓ أَهَٰنَنِ
verses.tr: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me
verses.tl: Waamma itha ma ibtalahu faqadara AAalayhi rizqahu fayaqoolu rabbee ahanani

verses.ar: كَلَّاۖ بَل لَّا تُكۡرِمُونَ ٱلۡيَتِيمَ
verses.tr: No! But you do not honor the orphan
verses.tl: Kalla bal la tukrimoona alyateema

verses.ar: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلۡمِسۡكِينِ
verses.tr: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor
verses.tl: Wala tahaddoona AAala taAAami almiskeeni

verses.ar: وَتَأۡكُلُونَ ٱلتُّرَاثَ أَكۡلٗا لَّمّٗا
verses.tr: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether
verses.tl: Watakuloona altturatha aklan lamman

verses.ar: وَتُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡمَالَ حُبّٗا جَمّٗا
verses.tr: And you love wealth with immense love
verses.tl: Watuhibboona almala hubban jamman

verses.ar: كَلَّآۖ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ دَكّٗا دَكّٗا
verses.tr: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed
verses.tl: Kalla itha dukkati alardu dakkan dakkan

verses.ar: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلۡمَلَكُ صَفّٗا صَفّٗا
verses.tr: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank
verses.tl: Wajaa rabbuka waalmalaku saffan saffan

verses.ar: وَجِاْيٓءَ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِجَهَنَّمَۚ يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance
verses.tl: Wajeea yawmaithin bijahannama yawmaithin yatathakkaru alinsanu waanna lahu alththikra

verses.ar: يَقُولُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي قَدَّمۡتُ لِحَيَاتِي
verses.tr: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life
verses.tl: Yaqoolu ya laytanee qaddamtu lihayatee

verses.ar: فَيَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّا يُعَذِّبُ عَذَابَهُۥٓ أَحَدٞ
verses.tr: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment
verses.tl: Fayawmaithin la yuAAaththibu AAathabahu ahadun

verses.ar: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٞ
verses.tr: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers]
verses.tl: Wala yoothiqu wathaqahu ahadun

verses.ar: يَـٰٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفۡسُ ٱلۡمُطۡمَئِنَّةُ
verses.tr: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul
verses.tl: Ya ayyatuha alnnafsu almutmainnatu

verses.ar: ٱرۡجِعِيٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةٗ مَّرۡضِيَّةٗ
verses.tr: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him]
verses.tl: IrjiAAee ila rabbiki radiyatan mardiyyatan

verses.ar: فَٱدۡخُلِي فِي عِبَٰدِي
verses.tr: And enter among My [righteous] servants
verses.tl: Faodkhulee fee AAibadee

verses.ar: وَٱدۡخُلِي جَنَّتِي
verses.tr: And enter My Paradise
verses.tl: Waodkhulee jannatee

verses.ar: لَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِهَٰذَا ٱلۡبَلَدِ
verses.tr: I swear by this city, Makkah
verses.tl: La oqsimu bihatha albaladi

verses.ar: وَأَنتَ حِلُّۢ بِهَٰذَا ٱلۡبَلَدِ
verses.tr: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city
verses.tl: Waanta hillun bihatha albaladi

verses.ar: وَوَالِدٖ وَمَا وَلَدَ
verses.tr: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him]
verses.tl: Wawalidin wama walada

verses.ar: لَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ فِي كَبَدٍ
verses.tr: We have certainly created man into hardship
verses.tl: Laqad khalaqna alinsana fee kabadin

verses.ar: أَيَحۡسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقۡدِرَ عَلَيۡهِ أَحَدٞ
verses.tr: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him
verses.tl: Ayahsabu an lan yaqdira AAalayhi ahadun

verses.ar: يَقُولُ أَهۡلَكۡتُ مَالٗا لُّبَدًا
verses.tr: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance
verses.tl: Yaqoolu ahlaktu malan lubadan

verses.ar: أَيَحۡسَبُ أَن لَّمۡ يَرَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.tr: Does he think that no one has seen him
verses.tl: Ayahsabu an lam yarahu ahadun

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ نَجۡعَل لَّهُۥ عَيۡنَيۡنِ
verses.tr: Have We not made for him two eyes
verses.tl: Alam najAAal lahu AAaynayni

verses.ar: وَلِسَانٗا وَشَفَتَيۡنِ
verses.tr: And a tongue and two lips
verses.tl: Walisanan washafatayni

verses.ar: وَهَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلنَّجۡدَيۡنِ
verses.tr: And have shown him the two ways
verses.tl: Wahadaynahu alnnajdayni

verses.ar: فَلَا ٱقۡتَحَمَ ٱلۡعَقَبَةَ
verses.tr: But he has not broken through the difficult pass
verses.tl: Fala iqtahama alAAaqabata

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلۡعَقَبَةُ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma alAAaqabatu

verses.ar: فَكُّ رَقَبَةٍ
verses.tr: It is the freeing of a slave
verses.tl: Fakku raqabatin

verses.ar: أَوۡ إِطۡعَٰمٞ فِي يَوۡمٖ ذِي مَسۡغَبَةٖ
verses.tr: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger
verses.tl: Aw itAAamun fee yawmin thee masghabatin

verses.ar: يَتِيمٗا ذَا مَقۡرَبَةٍ
verses.tr: An orphan of near relationship
verses.tl: Yateeman tha maqrabatin

verses.ar: أَوۡ مِسۡكِينٗا ذَا مَتۡرَبَةٖ
verses.tr: Or a needy person in misery
verses.tl: Aw miskeenan tha matrabatin

verses.ar: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلصَّبۡرِ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلۡمَرۡحَمَةِ
verses.tr: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion
verses.tl: Thumma kana mina allatheena amanoo watawasaw bialssabri watawasaw bialmarhamati

verses.ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَيۡمَنَةِ
verses.tr: Those are the companions of the right
verses.tl: Olaika ashabu almaymanati

verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا هُمۡ أَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡمَشۡـَٔمَةِ
verses.tr: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left
verses.tl: Waallatheena kafaroo biayatina hum ashabu almashamati

verses.ar: عَلَيۡهِمۡ نَارٞ مُّؤۡصَدَةُۢ
verses.tr: Over them will be fire closed in
verses.tl: AAalayhim narun musadatun

verses.ar: وَٱلشَّمۡسِ وَضُحَىٰهَا
verses.tr: By the sun and its brightness
verses.tl: Waalshshamsi waduhaha

verses.ar: وَٱلۡقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَىٰهَا
verses.tr: And [by] the moon when it follows it
verses.tl: Waalqamari itha talaha

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا جَلَّىٰهَا
verses.tr: And [by] the day when it displays it
verses.tl: Waalnnahari itha jallaha

verses.ar: وَٱلَّيۡلِ إِذَا يَغۡشَىٰهَا
verses.tr: And [by] the night when it covers it
verses.tl: Waallayli itha yaghshaha

verses.ar: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا بَنَىٰهَا
verses.tr: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it
verses.tl: Waalssamai wama banaha

verses.ar: وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا طَحَىٰهَا
verses.tr: And [by] the earth and He who spread it
verses.tl: Waalardi wama tahaha

verses.ar: وَنَفۡسٖ وَمَا سَوَّىٰهَا
verses.tr: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it
verses.tl: Wanafsin wama sawwaha

verses.ar: فَأَلۡهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقۡوَىٰهَا
verses.tr: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness
verses.tl: Faalhamaha fujooraha wataqwaha

verses.ar: قَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ مَن زَكَّىٰهَا
verses.tr: He has succeeded who purifies it
verses.tl: Qad aflaha man zakkaha

verses.ar: وَقَدۡ خَابَ مَن دَسَّىٰهَا
verses.tr: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption]
verses.tl: Waqad khaba man dassaha

verses.ar: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُودُ بِطَغۡوَىٰهَآ
verses.tr: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression
verses.tl: Kaththabat thamoodu bitaghwaha

verses.ar: إِذِ ٱنۢبَعَثَ أَشۡقَىٰهَا
verses.tr: When the most wretched of them was sent forth
verses.tl: Ithi inbaAAatha ashqaha

verses.ar: فَقَالَ لَهُمۡ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ نَاقَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَسُقۡيَٰهَا
verses.tr: And the messenger of Allah [Salih] said to them, "[Do not harm] the she-camel of Allah or [prevent her from] her drink
verses.tl: Faqala lahum rasoolu Allahi naqata Allahi wasuqyaha

verses.ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمۡدَمَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمۡ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
verses.tr: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them]
verses.tl: Fakaththaboohu faAAaqarooha fadamdama AAalayhim rabbuhum bithanbihim fasawwaha

verses.ar: وَلَا يَخَافُ عُقۡبَٰهَا
verses.tr: And He does not fear the consequence thereof
verses.tl: Wala yakhafu AAuqbaha

verses.ar: وَٱلَّيۡلِ إِذَا يَغۡشَىٰ
verses.tr: By the night when it covers
verses.tl: Waallayli itha yaghsha

verses.ar: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: And [by] the day when it appears
verses.tl: Waalnnahari itha tajalla

verses.ar: وَمَا خَلَقَ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلۡأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And [by] He who created the male and female
verses.tl: Wama khalaqa alththakara waalontha

verses.ar: إِنَّ سَعۡيَكُمۡ لَشَتَّىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, your efforts are diverse
verses.tl: Inna saAAyakum lashatta

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا مَنۡ أَعۡطَىٰ وَٱتَّقَىٰ
verses.tr: As for he who gives and fears Allah
verses.tl: Faamma man aAAta waittaqa

verses.ar: وَصَدَّقَ بِٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: And believes in the best [reward]
verses.tl: Wasaddaqa bialhusna

verses.ar: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلۡيُسۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: We will ease him toward ease
verses.tl: Fasanuyassiruhu lilyusra

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَنۢ بَخِلَ وَٱسۡتَغۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
verses.tl: Waamma man bakhila waistaghna

verses.ar: وَكَذَّبَ بِٱلۡحُسۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: And denies the best [reward]
verses.tl: Wakaththaba bialhusna

verses.ar: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلۡعُسۡرَىٰ
verses.tr: We will ease him toward difficulty
verses.tl: Fasanuyassiruhu lilAAusra

verses.ar: وَمَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
verses.tr: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls
verses.tl: Wama yughnee AAanhu maluhu itha taradda

verses.ar: إِنَّ عَلَيۡنَا لَلۡهُدَىٰ
verses.tr: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance
verses.tl: Inna AAalayna lalhuda

verses.ar: وَإِنَّ لَنَا لَلۡأٓخِرَةَ وَٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life]
verses.tl: Wainna lana lalakhirata waaloola

verses.ar: فَأَنذَرۡتُكُمۡ نَارٗا تَلَظَّىٰ
verses.tr: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing
verses.tl: Faanthartukum naran talaththa

verses.ar: لَا يَصۡلَىٰهَآ إِلَّا ٱلۡأَشۡقَى
verses.tr: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one
verses.tl: La yaslaha illa alashqa

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.tr: Who had denied and turned away
verses.tl: Allathee kaththaba watawalla

verses.ar: وَسَيُجَنَّبُهَا ٱلۡأَتۡقَى
verses.tr: But the righteous one will avoid it
verses.tl: Wasayujannabuha alatqa

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يُؤۡتِي مَالَهُۥ يَتَزَكَّىٰ
verses.tr: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself
verses.tl: Allathee yutee malahu yatazakka

verses.ar: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعۡمَةٖ تُجۡزَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
verses.tl: Wama liahadin AAindahu min niAAmatin tujza

verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱبۡتِغَآءَ وَجۡهِ رَبِّهِ ٱلۡأَعۡلَىٰ
verses.tr: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High
verses.tl: Illa ibtighaa wajhi rabbihi alaAAla

verses.ar: وَلَسَوۡفَ يَرۡضَىٰ
verses.tr: And he is going to be satisfied
verses.tl: Walasawfa yarda

verses.ar: وَٱلضُّحَىٰ
verses.tr: By the morning brightness
verses.tl: Waaldduha

verses.ar: وَٱلَّيۡلِ إِذَا سَجَىٰ
verses.tr: And [by] the night when it covers with darkness
verses.tl: Waallayli itha saja

verses.ar: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ
verses.tr: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you]
verses.tl: Ma waddaAAaka rabbuka wama qala

verses.ar: وَلَلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلۡأُولَىٰ
verses.tr: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life]
verses.tl: Walalakhiratu khayrun laka mina aloola

verses.ar: وَلَسَوۡفَ يُعۡطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرۡضَىٰٓ
verses.tr: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied
verses.tl: Walasawfa yuAAteeka rabbuka fatarda

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ يَجِدۡكَ يَتِيمٗا فَـَٔاوَىٰ
verses.tr: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge
verses.tl: Alam yajidka yateeman faawa

verses.ar: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلّٗا فَهَدَىٰ
verses.tr: And He found you lost and guided [you]
verses.tl: Wawajadaka dallan fahada

verses.ar: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلٗا فَأَغۡنَىٰ
verses.tr: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient
verses.tl: Wawajadaka AAailan faaghna

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا ٱلۡيَتِيمَ فَلَا تَقۡهَرۡ
verses.tr: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him]
verses.tl: Faamma alyateema fala taqhar

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا ٱلسَّآئِلَ فَلَا تَنۡهَرۡ
verses.tr: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him]
verses.tl: Waamma alssaila fala tanhar

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا بِنِعۡمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثۡ
verses.tr: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it]
verses.tl: Waamma biniAAmati rabbika fahaddith

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ نَشۡرَحۡ لَكَ صَدۡرَكَ
verses.tr: Did We not expand for you, [O Muhammad], your breast
verses.tl: Alam nashrah laka sadraka

verses.ar: وَوَضَعۡنَا عَنكَ وِزۡرَكَ
verses.tr: And We removed from you your burden
verses.tl: WawadaAAna AAanka wizraka

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنقَضَ ظَهۡرَكَ
verses.tr: Which had weighed upon your back
verses.tl: Allathee anqada thahraka

verses.ar: وَرَفَعۡنَا لَكَ ذِكۡرَكَ
verses.tr: And raised high for you your repute
verses.tl: WarafaAAna laka thikraka

verses.ar: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلۡعُسۡرِ يُسۡرًا
verses.tr: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease
verses.tl: Fainna maAAa alAAusri yusran

verses.ar: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلۡعُسۡرِ يُسۡرٗا
verses.tr: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease
verses.tl: Inna maAAa alAAusri yusran

verses.ar: فَإِذَا فَرَغۡتَ فَٱنصَبۡ
verses.tr: So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship]
verses.tl: Faitha faraghta fainsab

verses.ar: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرۡغَب
verses.tr: And to your Lord direct [your] longing
verses.tl: Waila rabbika fairghab

verses.ar: وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيۡتُونِ
verses.tr: By the fig and the olive
verses.tl: Waaltteeni waalzzaytooni

verses.ar: وَطُورِ سِينِينَ
verses.tr: And [by] Mount Sinai
verses.tl: Watoori seeneena

verses.ar: وَهَٰذَا ٱلۡبَلَدِ ٱلۡأَمِينِ
verses.tr: And [by] this secure city [Makkah]
verses.tl: Wahatha albaladi alameeni

verses.ar: لَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ فِيٓ أَحۡسَنِ تَقۡوِيمٖ
verses.tr: We have certainly created man in the best of stature
verses.tl: Laqad khalaqna alinsana fee ahsani taqweemin

verses.ar: ثُمَّ رَدَدۡنَٰهُ أَسۡفَلَ سَٰفِلِينَ
verses.tr: Then We return him to the lowest of the low
verses.tl: Thumma radadnahu asfala safileena

verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ فَلَهُمۡ أَجۡرٌ غَيۡرُ مَمۡنُونٖ
verses.tr: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted
verses.tl: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati falahum ajrun ghayru mamnoonin

verses.ar: فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعۡدُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense
verses.tl: Fama yukaththibuka baAAdu bialddeeni

verses.ar: أَلَيۡسَ ٱللَّهُ بِأَحۡكَمِ ٱلۡحَٰكِمِينَ
verses.tr: Is not Allah the most just of judges
verses.tl: Alaysa Allahu biahkami alhakimeena

verses.ar: ٱقۡرَأۡ بِٱسۡمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ
verses.tr: Recite in the name of your Lord who created
verses.tl: Iqra biismi rabbika allathee khalaqa

verses.ar: خَلَقَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِنۡ عَلَقٍ
verses.tr: Created man from a clinging substance
verses.tl: Khalaqa alinsana min AAalaqin

verses.ar: ٱقۡرَأۡ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلۡأَكۡرَمُ
verses.tr: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous
verses.tl: Iqra warabbuka alakramu

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي عَلَّمَ بِٱلۡقَلَمِ
verses.tr: Who taught by the pen
verses.tl: Allathee AAallama bialqalami

verses.ar: عَلَّمَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مَا لَمۡ يَعۡلَمۡ
verses.tr: Taught man that which he knew not
verses.tl: AAallama alinsana ma lam yaAAlam

verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِنَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ لَيَطۡغَىٰٓ
verses.tr: No! [But] indeed, man transgresses
verses.tl: Kalla inna alinsana layatgha

verses.ar: أَن رَّءَاهُ ٱسۡتَغۡنَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Because he sees himself self-sufficient
verses.tl: An raahu istaghna

verses.ar: إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجۡعَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Indeed, to your Lord is the return
verses.tl: Inna ila rabbika alrrujAAa

verses.ar: أَرَءَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِي يَنۡهَىٰ
verses.tr: Have you seen the one who forbids
verses.tl: Araayta allathee yanha

verses.ar: عَبۡدًا إِذَا صَلَّىٰٓ
verses.tr: A servant when he prays
verses.tl: AAabdan itha salla

verses.ar: أَرَءَيۡتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Have you seen if he is upon guidance
verses.tl: Araayta in kana AAala alhuda

verses.ar: أَوۡ أَمَرَ بِٱلتَّقۡوَىٰٓ
verses.tr: Or enjoins righteousness
verses.tl: Aw amara bialttaqwa

verses.ar: أَرَءَيۡتَ إِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.tr: Have you seen if he denies and turns away
verses.tl: Araayta in kaththaba watawalla

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ يَعۡلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ
verses.tr: Does he not know that Allah sees
verses.tl: Alam yaAAlam bianna Allaha yara

verses.ar: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمۡ يَنتَهِ لَنَسۡفَعَۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
verses.tr: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock
verses.tl: Kalla lain lam yantahi lanasfaAAan bialnnasiyati

verses.ar: نَاصِيَةٖ كَٰذِبَةٍ خَاطِئَةٖ
verses.tr: A lying, sinning forelock
verses.tl: Nasiyatin kathibatin khatiatin

verses.ar: فَلۡيَدۡعُ نَادِيَهُۥ
verses.tr: Then let him call his associates
verses.tl: FalyadAAu nadiyahu

verses.ar: سَنَدۡعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ
verses.tr: We will call the angels of Hell
verses.tl: SanadAAu alzzabaniyata

verses.ar: كَلَّا لَا تُطِعۡهُ وَٱسۡجُدۡۤ وَٱقۡتَرِب۩
verses.tr: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah]
verses.tl: Kalla la tutiAAhu waosjud waiqtarib

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَنزَلۡنَٰهُ فِي لَيۡلَةِ ٱلۡقَدۡرِ
verses.tr: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree
verses.tl: Inna anzalnahu fee laylati alqadri

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا لَيۡلَةُ ٱلۡقَدۡرِ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma laylatu alqadri

verses.ar: لَيۡلَةُ ٱلۡقَدۡرِ خَيۡرٞ مِّنۡ أَلۡفِ شَهۡرٖ
verses.tr: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months
verses.tl: Laylatu alqadri khayrun min alfi shahrin

verses.ar: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذۡنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمۡرٖ
verses.tr: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter
verses.tl: Tanazzalu almalaikatu waalrroohu feeha biithni rabbihim min kulli amrin

verses.ar: سَلَٰمٌ هِيَ حَتَّىٰ مَطۡلَعِ ٱلۡفَجۡرِ
verses.tr: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn
verses.tl: Salamun hiya hatta matlaAAi alfajri

verses.ar: لَمۡ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأۡتِيَهُمُ ٱلۡبَيِّنَةُ
verses.tr: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from misbelief] until there came to them clear evidence
verses.tl: Lam yakuni allatheena kafaroo min ahli alkitabi waalmushrikeena munfakkeena hatta tatiyahumu albayyinatu

verses.ar: رَسُولٞ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتۡلُواْ صُحُفٗا مُّطَهَّرَةٗ
verses.tr: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures
verses.tl: Rasoolun mina Allahi yatloo suhufan mutahharatan

verses.ar: فِيهَا كُتُبٞ قَيِّمَةٞ
verses.tr: Within which are correct writings
verses.tl: Feeha kutubun qayyimatun

verses.ar: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا جَآءَتۡهُمُ ٱلۡبَيِّنَةُ
verses.tr: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence
verses.tl: Wama tafarraqa allatheena ootoo alkitaba illa min baAAdi ma jaathumu albayyinatu

verses.ar: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓاْ إِلَّا لِيَعۡبُدُواْ ٱللَّهَ مُخۡلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤۡتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلۡقَيِّمَةِ
verses.tr: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion
verses.tl: Wama omiroo illa liyaAAbudoo Allaha mukhliseena lahu alddeena hunafaa wayuqeemoo alssalata wayutoo alzzakata wathalika deenu alqayyimati

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ فِي نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآۚ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمۡ شَرُّ ٱلۡبَرِيَّةِ
verses.tr: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures
verses.tl: Inna allatheena kafaroo min ahli alkitabi waalmushrikeena fee nari jahannama khalideena feeha olaika hum sharru albariyyati

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ هُمۡ خَيۡرُ ٱلۡبَرِيَّةِ
verses.tr: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures
verses.tl: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati olaika hum khayru albariyyati

verses.ar: جَزَآؤُهُمۡ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ جَنَّـٰتُ عَدۡنٖ تَجۡرِي مِن تَحۡتِهَا ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدٗاۖ رَّضِيَ ٱللَّهُ عَنۡهُمۡ وَرَضُواْ عَنۡهُۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنۡ خَشِيَ رَبَّهُۥ
verses.tr: Their reward with Allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allah being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord
verses.tl: Jazaohum AAinda rabbihim jannatu AAadnin tajree min tahtiha alanharu khalideena feeha abadan radiya Allahu AAanhum waradoo AAanhu thalika liman khashiya rabbahu

verses.ar: إِذَا زُلۡزِلَتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ زِلۡزَالَهَا
verses.tr: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
verses.tl: Itha zulzilati alardu zilzalaha

verses.ar: وَأَخۡرَجَتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ أَثۡقَالَهَا
verses.tr: And the earth discharges its burdens
verses.tl: Waakhrajati alardu athqalaha

verses.ar: وَقَالَ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مَا لَهَا
verses.tr: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it
verses.tl: Waqala alinsanu ma laha

verses.ar: يَوۡمَئِذٖ تُحَدِّثُ أَخۡبَارَهَا
verses.tr: That Day, it will report its news
verses.tl: Yawmaithin tuhaddithu akhbaraha

verses.ar: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوۡحَىٰ لَهَا
verses.tr: Because your Lord has commanded it
verses.tl: Bianna rabbaka awha laha

verses.ar: يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَصۡدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشۡتَاتٗا لِّيُرَوۡاْ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡ
verses.tr: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds
verses.tl: Yawmaithin yasduru alnnasu ashtatan liyuraw aAAmalahum

verses.ar: فَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيۡرٗا يَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it
verses.tl: Faman yaAAmal mithqala tharratin khayran yarahu

verses.ar: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِثۡقَالَ ذَرَّةٖ شَرّٗا يَرَهُۥ
verses.tr: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it
verses.tl: Waman yaAAmal mithqala tharratin sharran yarahu

verses.ar: وَٱلۡعَٰدِيَٰتِ ضَبۡحٗا
verses.tr: By the racers, panting
verses.tl: WaalAAadiyati dabhan

verses.ar: فَٱلۡمُورِيَٰتِ قَدۡحٗا
verses.tr: And the producers of sparks [when] striking
verses.tl: Faalmooriyati qadhan

verses.ar: فَٱلۡمُغِيرَٰتِ صُبۡحٗا
verses.tr: And the chargers at dawn
verses.tl: Faalmugheerati subhan

verses.ar: فَأَثَرۡنَ بِهِۦ نَقۡعٗا
verses.tr: Stirring up thereby [clouds of] dust
verses.tl: Faatharna bihi naqAAan

verses.ar: فَوَسَطۡنَ بِهِۦ جَمۡعًا
verses.tr: Arriving thereby in the center collectively
verses.tl: Fawasatna bihi jamAAan

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٞ
verses.tr: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful
verses.tl: Inna alinsana lirabbihi lakanoodun

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ لَشَهِيدٞ
verses.tr: And indeed, he is to that a witness
verses.tl: Wainnahu AAala thalika lashaheedun

verses.ar: وَإِنَّهُۥ لِحُبِّ ٱلۡخَيۡرِ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.tr: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense
verses.tl: Wainnahu lihubbi alkhayri lashadeedun

verses.ar: ۞أَفَلَا يَعۡلَمُ إِذَا بُعۡثِرَ مَا فِي ٱلۡقُبُورِ
verses.tr: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
verses.tl: Afala yaAAlamu itha buAAthira ma fee alquboori

verses.ar: وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِي ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.tr: And that within the breasts is obtained
verses.tl: Wahussila ma fee alssudoori

verses.ar: إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّخَبِيرُۢ
verses.tr: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted
verses.tl: Inna rabbahum bihim yawmaithin lakhabeerun

verses.ar: ٱلۡقَارِعَةُ
verses.tr: The Striking Calamity
verses.tl: AlqariAAatu

verses.ar: مَا ٱلۡقَارِعَةُ
verses.tr: What is the Striking Calamity
verses.tl: Ma alqariAAatu

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلۡقَارِعَةُ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma alqariAAatu

verses.ar: يَوۡمَ يَكُونُ ٱلنَّاسُ كَٱلۡفَرَاشِ ٱلۡمَبۡثُوثِ
verses.tr: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed
verses.tl: Yawma yakoonu alnnasu kaalfarashi almabthoothi

verses.ar: وَتَكُونُ ٱلۡجِبَالُ كَٱلۡعِهۡنِ ٱلۡمَنفُوشِ
verses.tr: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up
verses.tl: Watakoonu aljibalu kaalAAihni almanfooshi

verses.ar: فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتۡ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.tr: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds]
verses.tl: Faamma man thaqulat mawazeenuhu

verses.ar: فَهُوَ فِي عِيشَةٖ رَّاضِيَةٖ
verses.tr: He will be in a pleasant life
verses.tl: Fahuwa fee AAeeshatin radiyatin

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ خَفَّتۡ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.tr: But as for one whose scales are light
verses.tl: Waamma man khaffat mawazeenuhu

verses.ar: فَأُمُّهُۥ هَاوِيَةٞ
verses.tr: His refuge will be an abyss
verses.tl: Faommuhu hawiyatun

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهۡ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what that is
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma hiyah

verses.ar: نَارٌ حَامِيَةُۢ
verses.tr: It is a Fire, intensely hot
verses.tl: Narun hamiyatun

verses.ar: أَلۡهَىٰكُمُ ٱلتَّكَاثُرُ
verses.tr: Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you
verses.tl: Alhakumu alttakathuru

verses.ar: حَتَّىٰ زُرۡتُمُ ٱلۡمَقَابِرَ
verses.tr: Until you visit the graveyards
verses.tl: Hatta zurtumu almaqabira

verses.ar: كَلَّا سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: No! You are going to know
verses.tl: Kalla sawfa taAAlamoona

verses.ar: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ
verses.tr: Then no! You are going to know
verses.tl: Thumma kalla sawfa taAAlamoona

verses.ar: كَلَّا لَوۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ عِلۡمَ ٱلۡيَقِينِ
verses.tr: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty
verses.tl: Kalla law taAAlamoona AAilma alyaqeeni

verses.ar: لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلۡجَحِيمَ
verses.tr: You will surely see the Hellfire
verses.tl: Latarawunna aljaheema

verses.ar: ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيۡنَ ٱلۡيَقِينِ
verses.tr: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty
verses.tl: Thumma latarawunnaha AAayna alyaqeeni

verses.ar: ثُمَّ لَتُسۡـَٔلُنَّ يَوۡمَئِذٍ عَنِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.tr: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure
verses.tl: Thumma latusalunna yawmaithin AAani alnnaAAeemi

verses.ar: وَٱلۡعَصۡرِ
verses.tr: By time
verses.tl: WaalAAasri

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ لَفِي خُسۡرٍ
verses.tr: Indeed, mankind is in loss
verses.tl: Inna alinsana lafee khusrin

verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوۡاْ بِٱلصَّبۡرِ
verses.tr: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience
verses.tl: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati watawasaw bialhaqqi watawasaw bialssabri

verses.ar: وَيۡلٞ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٖ لُّمَزَةٍ
verses.tr: Woe to every scorner and mocker
verses.tl: Waylun likulli humazatin lumazatin

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي جَمَعَ مَالٗا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ
verses.tr: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it
verses.tl: Allathee jamaAAa malan waAAaddadahu

verses.ar: يَحۡسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخۡلَدَهُۥ
verses.tr: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal
verses.tl: Yahsabu anna malahu akhladahu

verses.ar: كَلَّاۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِي ٱلۡحُطَمَةِ
verses.tr: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher
verses.tl: Kalla layunbathanna fee alhutamati

verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلۡحُطَمَةُ
verses.tr: And what can make you know what is the Crusher
verses.tl: Wama adraka ma alhutamatu

verses.ar: نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلۡمُوقَدَةُ
verses.tr: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled
verses.tl: Naru Allahi almooqadatu

verses.ar: ٱلَّتِي تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلۡأَفۡـِٔدَةِ
verses.tr: Which mounts directed at the hearts
verses.tl: Allatee tattaliAAu AAala alafidati

verses.ar: إِنَّهَا عَلَيۡهِم مُّؤۡصَدَةٞ
verses.tr: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them
verses.tl: lnnaha AAalayhim musadatun

verses.ar: فِي عَمَدٖ مُّمَدَّدَةِۭ
verses.tr: In extended columns
verses.tl: Fee AAamadin mumaddadatin

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡفِيلِ
verses.tr: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant
verses.tl: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biashabi alfeeli

verses.ar: أَلَمۡ يَجۡعَلۡ كَيۡدَهُمۡ فِي تَضۡلِيلٖ
verses.tr: Did He not make their plan into misguidance
verses.tl: Alam yajAAal kaydahum fee tadleelin

verses.ar: وَأَرۡسَلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ طَيۡرًا أَبَابِيلَ
verses.tr: And He sent against them birds in flocks
verses.tl: Waarsala AAalayhim tayran ababeela

verses.ar: تَرۡمِيهِم بِحِجَارَةٖ مِّن سِجِّيلٖ
verses.tr: Striking them with stones of hard clay
verses.tl: Tarmeehim bihijaratin min sijjeelin

verses.ar: فَجَعَلَهُمۡ كَعَصۡفٖ مَّأۡكُولِۭ
verses.tr: And He made them like eaten straw
verses.tl: FajaAAalahum kaAAasfin makoolin

verses.ar: لِإِيلَٰفِ قُرَيۡشٍ
verses.tr: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh
verses.tl: Lieelafi qurayshin

verses.ar: إِۦلَٰفِهِمۡ رِحۡلَةَ ٱلشِّتَآءِ وَٱلصَّيۡفِ
verses.tr: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer
verses.tl: Eelafihim rihlata alshshitai waalssayfi

verses.ar: فَلۡيَعۡبُدُواْ رَبَّ هَٰذَا ٱلۡبَيۡتِ
verses.tr: Let them worship the Lord of this House
verses.tl: FalyaAAbudoo rabba hatha albayti

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِيٓ أَطۡعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٖ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنۡ خَوۡفِۭ
verses.tr: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear
verses.tl: Allathee atAAamahum min jooAAin waamanahum min khawfin

verses.ar: أَرَءَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِي يُكَذِّبُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.tr: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense
verses.tl: Araayta allathee yukaththibu bialddeeni

verses.ar: فَذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِي يَدُعُّ ٱلۡيَتِيمَ
verses.tr: For that is the one who drives away the orphan
verses.tl: Fathalika allathee yaduAAAAu alyateema

verses.ar: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلۡمِسۡكِينِ
verses.tr: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor
verses.tl: Wala yahuddu AAala taAAami almiskeeni

verses.ar: فَوَيۡلٞ لِّلۡمُصَلِّينَ
verses.tr: So woe to those who pray
verses.tl: Fawaylun lilmusalleena

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ عَن صَلَاتِهِمۡ سَاهُونَ
verses.tr: [But] who are heedless of their prayer
verses.tl: Allatheena hum AAan salatihim sahoona

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمۡ يُرَآءُونَ
verses.tr: Those who make show [of their deeds]
verses.tl: Allatheena hum yuraoona

verses.ar: وَيَمۡنَعُونَ ٱلۡمَاعُونَ
verses.tr: And withhold [simple] assistance
verses.tl: WayamnaAAoona almaAAoona

verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَعۡطَيۡنَٰكَ ٱلۡكَوۡثَرَ
verses.tr: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar
verses.tl: Inna aAAtaynaka alkawthara

verses.ar: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنۡحَرۡ
verses.tr: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone]
verses.tl: Fasalli lirabbika wainhar

verses.ar: إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ ٱلۡأَبۡتَرُ
verses.tr: Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off
verses.tl: Inna shaniaka huwa alabtaru

verses.ar: قُلۡ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ
verses.tr: Say, "O disbelievers
verses.tl: Qul ya ayyuha alkafiroona

verses.ar: لَآ أَعۡبُدُ مَا تَعۡبُدُونَ
verses.tr: I do not worship what you worship
verses.tl: La aAAbudu ma taAAbudoona

verses.ar: وَلَآ أَنتُمۡ عَٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعۡبُدُ
verses.tr: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship
verses.tl: Wala antum AAabidoona ma aAAbudu

verses.ar: وَلَآ أَنَا۠ عَابِدٞ مَّا عَبَدتُّمۡ
verses.tr: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship
verses.tl: Wala ana AAabidun ma AAabadtum

verses.ar: وَلَآ أَنتُمۡ عَٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعۡبُدُ
verses.tr: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship
verses.tl: Wala antum AAabidoona ma aAAbudu

verses.ar: لَكُمۡ دِينُكُمۡ وَلِيَ دِينِ
verses.tr: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion
verses.tl: Lakum deenukum waliya deeni

verses.ar: إِذَا جَآءَ نَصۡرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلۡفَتۡحُ
verses.tr: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest
verses.tl: Itha jaa nasru Allahi waalfathu

verses.ar: وَرَأَيۡتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدۡخُلُونَ فِي دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفۡوَاجٗا
verses.tr: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes
verses.tl: Waraayta alnnasa yadkhuloona fee deeni Allahi afwajan

verses.ar: فَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرۡهُۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابَۢا
verses.tr: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance
verses.tl: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika waistaghfirhu innahu kana tawwaban

verses.ar: تَبَّتۡ يَدَآ أَبِي لَهَبٖ وَتَبَّ
verses.tr: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he
verses.tl: Tabbat yada abee lahabin watabba

verses.ar: مَآ أَغۡنَىٰ عَنۡهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
verses.tr: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained
verses.tl: Ma aghna AAanhu maluhu wama kasaba

verses.ar: سَيَصۡلَىٰ نَارٗا ذَاتَ لَهَبٖ
verses.tr: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
verses.tl: Sayasla naran thata lahabin

verses.ar: وَٱمۡرَأَتُهُۥ حَمَّالَةَ ٱلۡحَطَبِ
verses.tr: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood
verses.tl: Waimraatuhu hammalata alhatabi

verses.ar: فِي جِيدِهَا حَبۡلٞ مِّن مَّسَدِۭ
verses.tr: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber
verses.tl: Fee jeediha hablun min masadin

verses.ar: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
verses.tr: Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One
verses.tl: Qul huwa Allahu ahadun

verses.ar: ٱللَّهُ ٱلصَّمَدُ
verses.tr: Allah, the Eternal Refuge
verses.tl: Allahu alssamadu

verses.ar: لَمۡ يَلِدۡ وَلَمۡ يُولَدۡ
verses.tr: He neither begets nor is born
verses.tl: Lam yalid walam yooladu

verses.ar: وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُۥ كُفُوًا أَحَدُۢ
verses.tr: Nor is there to Him any equivalent
verses.tl: Walam yakun lahu kufuwan ahadun

verses.ar: قُلۡ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلۡفَلَقِ
verses.tr: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
verses.tl: Qul aAAoothu birabbi alfalaqi

verses.ar: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
verses.tr: From the evil of that which He created
verses.tl: Min sharri ma khalaqa

verses.ar: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ
verses.tr: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
verses.tl: Wamin sharri ghasiqin itha waqaba

verses.ar: وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّـٰثَٰتِ فِي ٱلۡعُقَدِ
verses.tr: And from the evil of the blowers in knots
verses.tl: Wamin sharri alnnaffathati fee alAAuqadi

verses.ar: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
verses.tr: And from the evil of an envier when he envies
verses.tl: Wamin sharri hasidin itha hasada

verses.ar: قُلۡ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.tr: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind
verses.tl: Qul aAAoothu birabbi alnnasi

verses.ar: مَلِكِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.tr: The Sovereign of mankind
verses.tl: Maliki alnnasi

verses.ar: إِلَٰهِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.tr: The God of mankind
verses.tl: Ilahi alnnasi

verses.ar: مِن شَرِّ ٱلۡوَسۡوَاسِ ٱلۡخَنَّاسِ
verses.tr: From the evil of the retreating whisperer
verses.tl: Min sharri alwaswasi alkhannasi

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي يُوَسۡوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.tr: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind
verses.tl: Allathee yuwaswisu fee sudoori alnnasi

verses.ar: مِنَ ٱلۡجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ
verses.tr: From among the jinn and mankind
verses.tl: Mina aljinnati wa alnnasm
